local: Maa san ɔ gyɛ kebii‐pii mʋ, ɔ sʋ asa mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kɩɩ mʋ sʋ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kɩɩ mʋ atɔ mʋ sʋ bɛɛ sa mʋ, naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ mʋ‐sɛ yɩla mʋ yɛ o gyii kapatɩyɛ mʋ.

eng: In the same way, when we were minors, we were also enslaved by this worlds system.
local: Kanɩn nɩɩ anɛ gbaa anɛ an daa an du fɛɛ nbii mʋ nɩɩ anɛ anaana‐tɔ yɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ atɔ kaapʋsa, ɩɩ nyan anɛ fɛɛ anyɛ.

eng: But when the fulfillment of the time came, God sent his Son, born through a woman, and born under the Law.
local: Amaa saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɩla kyɛɛkyɛɛ maa fʋʋ mʋ, o sun mʋ gbaa‐gbaa Mu‐Bii dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ kʋʋgɛ mʋ Gyiwu obii waa nbara mʋ tɔ.

eng: This was so he could redeem those under the Law so that we could be adopted.
local: kɛ ɔ nyɛ kɔɔlɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ nbara mʋ kasɛ mʋ yɛgɛ, kɛ anɛ kpini an nyɛ ba biliŋi Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana.

eng: Because you are sons and daughters, God sent the Spirit of his Son into our hearts, crying, Abba, Father.
local: Lɩɩ fan maa gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii ana sʋ mʋ, o sun Mu‐Bii Kayaayu mʋ ɔ ba kyɩna fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ. Kayaayu mʋ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an taalɛ tɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ, Aba abɛɛ Ɔsɛ.

eng: Therefore, you are no longer a slave but a son or daughter, and if you are his child, then you are also an heir through God.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan man bɩla fan gyɛ anyɛ, amaa fan gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana nɩn. Nɩɩ fan maa gyɛ mu‐bii ana falɛ bɩrɛ, fan gyɛ mʋ kapatɩyɛ mʋ agyipu.

eng: At the time, when you didnt know God, you were enslaved by things that arent gods by nature.
local: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ fan man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, fan gyɛ anyɛ sa ɩdakpa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ anyɩrɩpɛ kʋ.

eng: But now, after knowing God , how can you turn back again to the weak and worthless world system? Do you want to be slaves to it again?.
local: Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ fan maa bɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ falɛ, abɛɛ n tɔwɛ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bɩrɛ ɩ ba bɩɩ fanɛ falɛ mʋ, nɛnɛ sʋ nɩɩ fɛn bɩla bwii naa buu kanɩn ɩdakpa atɔ kaapʋsa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ ɔlʋn kʋ, nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ tɔnɔ? Fen biti fan bɩla biliŋi anyɛ sa ɩmʋ nɩn abɛɛ?.

eng: You observe religious days and months and seasons and years.
local: Fan sʋ kensi‐gyii nkɛ sa Gyiwu abi nkɛ nkʋ, yɛ ɩbwaayɩ ɩkʋ, yɛ ɩsaŋa ɩkʋ, yɛ nsu nkʋ.

eng: Im afraid for you! Perhaps my hard work for you has been for nothing.
local: Fanɛ asɩn ɩ sʋ mɛ kufuu, nɩɩ n fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ akʋtɔ mɛ kɩkpɩnɛ mʋ nɩɩ n kpɩnɛ fanɛ sʋ falɛ ii biti ɩ waa kɩyan.

eng: I beg you to be like me, brothers and sisters, because I have become like you! You havent wronged me.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, n kʋlɛ fanɛ nɩn fɛɛ fan baa fan du fɛɛ mɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ngbaa n maa gyɛ Gyiwu obii mʋ, n ba waa mɛ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ. Nɩɩ fan man waa mɛ alibi akʋ.

eng: You know that I first preached the gospel to you because of an illness.
local: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan nyi mʋ, lɩɩ mɛ kʋlɔ sʋ nɩɩ n gyankpaa ba tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sa fanɛ.

eng: Though my poor health burdened you, you didnt look down on me or reject me, but you welcomed me as if I were an angel from God, or as if I were Christ Jesus!.
local: Halɩɩ mɛ kʋlɔ kɩ maa gyɛ kasʋla sa fanɛ gbaa mʋ, fan man lɛɛ fanɛ ansi yɛgɛ mɛ, nɩɩ fan man kina mɛ. Amaa fan kɔɔlɛ mɛ abaa anyɔ fɛɛ n maa gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ, abɛɛ n maa gyɛ Krisito Yesu gbaa‐gbaa mʋ.

eng: Where then is the great attitude that you had? I swear that, if possible, you would have dug out your eyes and given them to me.
local: Nɩɩ kanɩn saŋa maa mʋ, kensi‐gyii lala bʋ fanɛ tɔ lɩɩ mɛ sʋ. Nɩɩ n taalɛ n tɔwɛ gbaa yɛ, nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fɛn taalɛ nɩn, naafɔɔ fɛn kyɔlɛ fanɛ ansi gbaa fan sa mɛ. Nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa?.

eng: So then, have I become your enemy by telling you the truth?.
local: N ba biliŋi fanɛ dʋn lɩɩ kesintin mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ n sa fanɛ mʋ sʋ nɩn abɛɛ?.

eng: They are so concerned about you, though not with good intentions. Rather, they want to shut you out so that you would run after them.
local: Nɩɩ kanɩn asa mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kaapʋ fanɛ asɩn kʋkwɩɩ mʋ bɩrɛ, bamʋ ansi ɩ payɩ fanɛ sʋ, amaa bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ man bʋrɔn. Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ bee biti mʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, ba barɩgɛ fanɛ lɩɩ mɛ asɛ, kɛ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan baa fen nu bamʋ asɛ.

eng: However, its always good to have people concerned about you with good intentions, and not just when Im there with you.
local: Ɩ bʋrɔn fɛɛ fanɛ ansi ɩ maa payɩ lɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋ sʋ, nɩɩ kʋtɔ maa gyɛ kʋtɔ danbɩrasa, kɛ ɩ man naa waa fɛɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ nkʋn, amaa saŋa kʋmaa.

eng: My little children, Im going through labor pains again until Christ is formed in you.
local: Mi‐bii ana danbɩrasa, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ keduŋidi ɩɩ kɩtaa ɔkyɩɩ mʋ, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ ɩ bɩla ɩɩ waa mɛ sa fanɛ, naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Krisito kudubi mʋ ki loo bɔla fanɛ tɔ.

eng: But I wish I could be with you now and change how I sound, because Im at a loss about you.
local: N daa biti nɩn fɛɛ n san n bʋ fanɛ asɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ, naafɔɔ n nyɛ kyɛɛgɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ ɔlʋn sʋ n sa fanɛ mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ mɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ tɔɔrɔɔ mɛ fanɛ sʋ.

eng: Tell me—those of you who want to be under the Law—dont you listen to the Law?.
local: Fan yɛgɛ n taasɛ fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fen biti fan buu nbara mʋ. Fan man nu kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ nbara mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ mʋ kasɛ nɩn abɛɛ?.

eng: Its written that Abraham had two sons, one by the slave woman and one by the free woman.
local: Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, Abraham sʋ nbii‐nyɩnsa anyɔ, kɩnyɛ Haga mu‐bii ɩ gyɛ ɔkʋ, nɩɩ odibii Sara mɔɔ mu‐bii gyɛ ɔkʋ.

eng: The son by the slave woman was conceived the normal way, but the son by the free woman was conceived through a promise.
local: Obii mʋ nɩɩ kɩnyɛ‐kyɩɩ kʋʋgɛ mʋ, mʋ kakʋʋgɛ du nɩn fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ daadimaadi kʋʋgɛ obii mʋ, amaa odibii mu‐bii mʋ bɩrɛ, ba kʋʋgɛ mʋ bɔla asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ tɔwɛ yɩla mʋ sʋ nɩn.

eng: These things are an allegory: the women are two covenants. One is from Mount Sinai, which gives birth to slave children; this is Hagar.
local: Falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn kaalasa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ sʋ kasɛ. Akyɩɩ anyɔ mʋ ba yɩlɛ sa ntɔwɛ‐kyula anyɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa maa asa nsana mʋ. Kɩnyɛ‐kyɩɩ Haga ɩ yɩlɛ sa katɔwɛ kyula mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa Sinayi kɩbɩɩ mʋ sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ nbii mʋ nɩɩ Haga kʋʋgɛ mʋ gyɛ anyɛ nɩn.

eng: Hagar is Mount Sinai in Arabia, and she corresponds to the present-day Jerusalem, because the city is in slavery with her children.
local: Nɩɩ Haga ɩ yɩlɛ sa Sinayi kɩbɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Arabiya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ kɩ bɩla yɩlɛ sa ndaga Gyerusalem kadɛ lala mʋ, nɩɩ kɩmaa kɩmʋ asa kpini ba gyɛ anyɛ nɩn.

eng: But the Jerusalem that is above is free, and she is our mother.
local: Amaa sʋsʋ Gyerusalem mʋ bɩrɛ gyɛ odibii‐kyɩɩ, nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ anɛ‐nyi.

eng: Its written: Rejoice, barren woman, you who have not given birth . Break out with a shout, you who have not suffered labor pains; because the woman who has been deserted will have many more children than the woman who has a husband .
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, O ogbentipu‐kyɩɩ, fʋ mʋ nɩɩ fʋ man kʋʋgɛ kɩɩ, yɛgɛ ɩ waa fʋ ɔkɔn, fʋ mʋ nɩɩ fʋ man pɩɩta duŋi kɩɩ mʋ, taa kensi‐gyii lala kuusi waa ɩlawʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ mu‐kuli sɩlɛ yɛgɛ mʋ mʋ, ii biti ɔ nyɛ nbii ɔ kyɔ ɔkyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ mu‐kuli man sɩlɛ yɛgɛ mʋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you are children of the promise like Isaac.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, fan gyɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɩla pɔyɩ nɩɩ Sara ba kʋʋgɛ Isaki mʋ, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan gyɛ.

eng: But just as it was then, so it is now also: the one who was conceived the normal way harassed the one who was conceived by the Spirit.
local: Kanɩn saŋa maŋa mʋ, obii‐nyɩnsa mʋ nɩɩ ba kʋʋgɛ mʋ daadimaadi kakʋʋgɛ ɩkpa sʋ mʋ, nyanla obii‐nyɩnsa mʋ nɩɩ ba kʋʋgɛ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kayaayu ɔlʋn tɔ mʋ. Nɩɩ kanɩn nɩɩ i du nbɩɩnbɩɩ gbaa.

eng: But what does the scripture say? Throw out the slave woman and her son, because the slave womans son wont share the inheritance with the free womans son .
local: Amaa mɩnɛ asɩn nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ mʋ? Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, Gya kɩnyɛ‐kyɩɩ mʋ maa mu‐bii‐nyɩnsa mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ kɩnyɛ‐kyɩɩ mu‐bii maa odibii‐kyɩɩ mʋ mu‐bii ba mɛɛ bʋga bee gyii ɔsɛ mʋ kapatɩyɛ.

eng: Therefore, brothers and sisters, we arent the slave womans children, but we are the free womans children.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, an man gyɛ kɩnyɛ‐kyɩɩ mʋ mu‐bii ana nɩn, amaa an gyɛ odibii‐kyɩɩ mʋ mu‐bii ana nɩn.

eng: Brothers and sisters, if a person is caught doing something wrong, you who are spiritual should restore someone like this with a spirit of gentleness. Watch out for yourselves so you wont be tempted too.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ kan tɩyɛ alibi tɔ mʋ, fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan buu Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ ɔkpa kyɛɛkyɛɛ sʋ mʋ, fan taa kebiti kyɛ mʋ tɔ, kɛ o bwii ba ɔkpa danbɩrasa mʋ sʋ. Amaa fan kɩɩ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ danbɩrasa, kɛ Sɩtaanɛ ɔ man nyɛ ɔkpa tʋʋ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ tɔ kɩɩ.

eng: Carry each others burdens and so you will fulfill the law of Christ.
local: Fan yɛgɛ fanɛ bɩrɩsa ana asɩn ɩ baa ɩ gyɛ fanɛ asɩn. Nɩɩ fan kan waa kanɩn mʋ, ɩmʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ fen gyii Krisito nbara nɩmʋ sʋ.

eng: If anyone thinks they are important when they arent, theyre fooling themselves.
local: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan fɛ nfɛɛrɛ yɛ ɔ gyɛ kʋtɔ kʋ, yɛgɛ ɔ man gyɛ sɛhn mʋ, ɛɛ pɩna mʋ n‐yɩɩ nɩn.

eng: Each person should test their own work and be happy with doing a good job and not compare themselves with others.
local: Ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ kɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ awaasa i du. Nɩɩ ɩ kan ɩ bʋrɔn mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ ɛɛ taalɛ kaapʋ mʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ awaasa mʋ sʋ, yɛgɛ ɔ man taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaala ɔkʋ lɛɛ.

eng: Each person will have to carry their own load.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ dagaa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ maa sʋla mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ kasʋla.

eng: Those who are taught the word should share all good things with their teacher.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kaapʋ mʋ abwaarɛsɩn mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa kyɛ mʋ ɔkaapʋpʋ mʋ tɔ, lɩɩ atɔ danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ mʋ.

eng: Make no mistake, God is not mocked. A person will harvest what they plant.
local: Fan man pɩna fanɛ n‐yɩɩ. Ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ sisii Ɩbwaarɛ. Kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa duu mʋ, kɩmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɩŋɛ.

eng: Those who plant only for their own benefit will harvest devastation from their selfishness, but those who plant for the benefit of the Spirit will harvest eternal life from the Spirit.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee duu kɛ o gyii mu alibi kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ ansi mʋ, mʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ maŋa tɔ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ tɩŋɛ lewu, nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee duu kɛ o gyii Kayaayu mu ansi mʋ, Kayaayu maŋa tɔ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ nyɛ nkpa kakpaa.

eng: Lets not get tired of doing good, because in time well have a harvest if we dont give up.
local: A man yɛgɛ kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa o fii anɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ an man kan yɛgɛ ɩmʋ kɩwaa mʋ, kakaakʋ an biti a ba gyii ɩmʋ tɔnɔ.

eng: So then, lets work for the good of all whenever we have an opportunity, and especially for those in the household of faith.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an nyɛ ɩmʋ ɔkpa falɛ, fan yɛgɛ kɛ a waa kɩdanbɩrasa sa asa kpini, fɔnfɔn bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa ana akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ.

eng: Look at the large letters Im making with my own handwriting!.
local: Yɛ fan wu akyʋrɔɔ‐bi lala nɩmʋ? Mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ kɩbaa nɩɩ n taa kyʋrɔɔ ɩmʋ nfɩɩ bɩya fanɛ!.

eng: Whoever wants to look good by human standards will try to get you to be circumcised, but only so they wont be harassed for the cross of Christ.
local: Bamʋ nɩɩ bee biti yɛ asa ba wu bamʋ ifuli sʋ kɩdanbɩrasa mʋ, ɩɩ nyan fanɛ yɛ fan tɩŋɛ fanɛ iduu. Kʋtɔ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa kanɩn ɩ gyɛ yɛ, be mee biti ba tɔwɛ Krisito kelewu oyu laasa mʋ sʋ asɩn, kɛ ɔkʋ nyanla bamʋ.

eng: Those who are circumcised dont observe the Law themselves, but they want you to be circumcised, so they can boast about your physical body.
local: Halɩɩ Gyiwu abi ba maa buu iduu kɩtɩn gbaa mʋ, be mee buu Gyiwu abi nbara mʋ. Amaa bee biti yɛ fan tɩŋɛ fanɛ iduu, kɛ ba nyɛ kaapʋ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ yɛ fan nu bamʋ katɔwɛ.

eng: But as for me, God forbid that I should boast about anything except for the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. The world has been crucified to me through him, and I have been crucified to the world.
local: Amaa mɛ bɩrɛ, n mɛɛ kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ, amɔɔ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kelewu oyu laasa mʋ sʋ nkʋn, nɩɩ kɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ dulinyaa atɔ man gyɛ sɛhn mi ansi sʋ, nɩɩ ngbaa n man bɩla n gyɛ sɛhn dulinyaa tɔ.

eng: Being circumcised or not being circumcised doesnt mean anything. What matters is a new creation.
local: Nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa tɩn oduu oo, ɔ man tɩn oduu nɩn oo, man gyɛ ɩmʋ i tiri. Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri mʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ Krisito sa anɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ pʋpwɛ.

eng: May peace and mercy be on whoever follows this rule and on Gods Israel.
local: Nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ kɩbaabʋtɔ pʋpwɛ nɩɩ bee buu ɩmʋ asɩn mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ keyuula yɛ mʋ kʋwɛɛ kuwu i bun bamʋ sʋ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ kpini sʋ.

eng: From now on, no one should bother me because I bear the marks of Jesus on my body.
local: Lɩɩ ndaga ɩɩ sʋ ii kpee mʋ, ɔkʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔkʋ ɔ man bɩla sa mɛ tɔɔrɔɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ alɔpanɛ mʋ nɩɩ n nyɛ lɩɩ Yesu sʋ mʋ, ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ n gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, may the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit. Amen.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kabwaala mʋ kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ kpini asɛ. Amen.

eng: Christ has set us free for freedom. Therefore, stand firm and dont submit to the bondage of slavery again.
local: Krisito kɔɔlɛ anɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an nyɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ. Kanɩn sʋ fan yɩlɛ tɔ kenken, kɛ fan man bɩla yɛgɛ ba taa fanɛ waa nbara mʋ kibuu anyɛ.

eng: Look, I, Paul, am telling you that if you have yourselves circumcised, having Christ wont help you.
local: Fan nu! Mɛ Pɔɔlɩ n gyii fanɛ kesintin fɛɛ nɩɩ fan kan yɛgɛ nɩɩ ba tɩŋɛ fanɛ iduu mʋ, ɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ Krisito man bɩla ɔ sʋ kyaarɛ sa fanɛ kpini‐kpini.

eng: Again I swear to every man who has himself circumcised that he is required to do the whole Law.
local: N bɩla n da fanɛ amu tɔ yɛ, ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ba tɩn mʋ oduu mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ ɩ dagaa maa buu nbara mʋ kpini.

eng: You people who are trying to be made righteous by the Law have been estranged from Christ. You have fallen away from grace!.
local: Fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fen biti fɛɛ fan buu nbara mʋ, kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ o wu fɛɛ fanɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ mʋ, fan barɩgɛ lɩɩ Krisito asɛ, nɩɩ fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ tɔ.

eng: We eagerly wait for the hope of righteousness through the Spirit by faith.
local: Amaa anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ, Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an sʋ tamaa an gyoo Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ kɔɔlɛ anɛ kyula fɛɛ, anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ asɛ lɩɩ anɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ.

eng: Being circumcised or not being circumcised doesnt matter in Christ Jesus, but faith working through love does matter.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ, a maa buu Krisito Yesu falɛ mʋ, an tɩŋɛ iduu‐o, an man tɩŋɛ iduu‐o, man gyɛ ɩmʋ i tiri. Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri ɩ gyɛ yɛ Krisito kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an nyɛ kebiti sa abaa.

eng: You were running well—who stopped you from obeying the truth?.
local: Naafɔɔ fan kyɩna fan yɩlɛ tɔ danbɩrasa. Anɩmʋ i fun waa fanɛ nɩɩ fan yɛgɛ kesintin ɔkpa mʋ kibuu?.

eng: This line of reasoning doesnt come from the one who calls you.
local: N nyi fɛɛ man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ yɛ fan ba waa mʋ lɛɛ mʋ, ɩ waa kanɩn.

eng: A little yeast works through the whole lump of dough.
local: Fan nyiŋi fɛɛ, Bodobodo inyifo kɩfa‐tinsa gbɛrɛɛ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ bodobodo inyifo mʋ kpini i tin.

eng: Im convinced about you in the Lord that you wont think any other way. But the one who is confusing you will pay the penalty, whoever that may be.
local: N kɔɔlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ gyii fɛɛ, fan man yɛ fan kyɛɛgɛ naa buu ɔkpa pʋpwɛ kʋ. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee nyita fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ maŋa mʋ, ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ bɩɩtɛ mʋ kʋsʋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, if Im still preaching circumcision, why am I still being harassed? In that case, the offense of the cross would be canceled.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, nɩɩ n kan n kaapʋ yɛ iduu kɩtɩn ɩ gyɛ asɩn tirisa nɩn, naafɔɔ mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ Gyiwu abi ba san bɛɛ nyanla mɛ? Nɩɩ ɩ daa ɩ gyɛ kanɩn nɩn, naafɔɔ Krisito kiwu oyu laasa sʋ asɩn mʋ, man dɩn bɩya asɩn kʋ.

eng: I wish that the ones who are upsetting you would castrate themselves!.
local: N biti fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔɔrɔɔ fanɛ lɩɩ iduu kɩtɩn sʋ mʋ, naafɔɔ ba lɛɛ bamʋ awɛɛ tii bamʋ iduu kɩtɩn sʋ!.

eng: You were called to freedom, brothers and sisters; only dont let this freedom be an opportunity to indulge your selfish impulses, but serve each other through love.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, fanɛ bɩrɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ kɔɔlɛ fanɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fan nyɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kanɩn Mosesi nbara kibuu mʋ tɔ. Amaa fan man kan yɛgɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩnyɛ mʋ kɩ sa fanɛ ɔkpa, kɛ fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kayalaga mʋ ki gyii fanɛ sʋ. Amaa fan taa kebiti sun abaa.

eng: All the Law has been fulfilled in a single statement: Love your neighbor as yourself .
local: Mosesi nbara mʋ kpini ɩ lɩɩ kɔnɔsa kʋlʋn tɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, Biti fʋ bɩrɩsa fɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ.

eng: But if you bite and devour each other, be careful that you dont get eaten up by each other!.
local: Nɩɩ fan kan fan du fɛɛ ndʋnbwɛ nɩɩ fen duŋi nɩɩ fɛn larɩgɛ abaa mʋ, fan baa fan da sʋ, man gyɛ kanɩn mʋ fen biti fan mɔɔ abaa.

eng: I say be guided by the Spirit and you wont carry out your selfish desires.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ n tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, fan yɛgɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ ɔ kaapʋ fanɛ ɔkpa, kɛ fan man nyɛ buu fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kayalaga.

eng: A persons selfish desires are set against the Spirit, and the Spirit is set against ones selfish desires. They are opposed to each other, so you shouldnt do whatever you want to do.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Kayaayu mʋ ii biti mʋ, mɛɛ kyɩna yɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ ɩɩ yalaga mʋ, nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ ɩɩ yalaga mʋ gbaa mɛɛ kyɩna yɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Kayaayu mʋ ii biti mʋ. Bɛɛ kɔ yɛ abaa saŋa kʋmaa, ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋlʋn fɛɛ fan waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fen biti mʋ.

eng: But if you are being led by the Spirit, you arent under the Law.
local: Amaa nɩɩ fan yɛgɛ nɩɩ Kayaayu mʋ kaapʋ fanɛ ɔkpa mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ fan man bʋ nbara mʋ kasɛ.

eng: The actions that are produced by selfish motives are obvious, since they include sexual immorality, moral corruption, doing whatever feels good.
local: Kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ asun libi ɩ mɛɛ baala. Ɩmʋ ɩkʋ ɩ gyɛ kɩlɩɩ okuli abɛɛ ɔkaa kamaa, yɛ kɩgyagaa ineesi, yɛ kabʋrʋkɔɔnɛ.

eng: idolatry, drug use and casting spells, hate, fighting, obsession, losing your temper, competitive opposition, conflict, selfishness, group rivalry.
local: yɛ ɩdakpa kusun, yɛ akpa‐sɩn, yɛ kekisi, yɛ keluu, yɛ kayɩɩ‐basa, yɛ kɩnyɛ agbʋ, yɛ mɛ nkʋn n nyɛ, yɛ nbarɩgɛ tɔ, yɛ nfɛɛrɛ kɩfɛ fɛɛ mɛ nkʋn asɩn ɩ bʋrɔn.

eng: jealousy, drunkenness, partying, and other things like that. I warn you as I have already warned you, that those who do these kinds of things wont inherit Gods kingdom.
local: Ɩkʋ mɔɔ ɩ gyɛ yɛ kensi payɩ libi, yɛ kata‐bʋʋ, yɛ kensi‐gyii kɩbansa, yɛ alibi kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ i tii sʋ. N da fanɛ amu tɔ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n wʋla da fanɛ amu tɔ mʋ yɛ, ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ falɛ kakyɩna tɔ mʋ, mɛɛ yɛ ɔ nyɛ loo Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii mʋ tɔ.

eng: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness.
local: Amaa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ asa bɛɛ waa mʋ ɩ gyɛ kebiti, yɛ kensi‐gyii, yɛ keyuula, yɛ kenyiita, yɛ kʋwɛɛ kuwu, yɛ kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa, yɛ kesintin kigyii.

eng: gentleness, and self-control. There is no law against things like this.
local: yɛ kɩbwahn kɩwaa, yɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩkɩta. Nbara kʋ man bʋ tɔ nɩɩ ɩɩ kɔ ii tii ɩnɩmʋ.

eng: Those who belong to Christ Jesus have crucified the self with its passions and its desires.
local: Bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ Krisito Yesu asa mʋ bɩrɛ, ba taa bamʋ alibi kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kayalaga yɛ kɩmʋ kɔkɔlɔ biti mʋ da mata oyu laasa mʋ sʋ mɔɔ ɩmʋ kpini.

eng: If we live by the Spirit, lets follow the Spirit.
local: Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ maa sa anɛ kakyɩna pʋpwɛ falɛ bɩrɛ, fan yɛgɛ kɛ ɔ gyankpaa anɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: Lets not become arrogant, make each other angry, or be jealous of each other.
local: Fan man yɛgɛ kɛ a kaapʋ anɛ n‐yɩɩ, kɛ a man waa anɛ bɩrɩsa ana agbʋ‐sɩn, kɛ fan man kɔ abaa kɔkʋrʋkɔ.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will. To the holy and faithful people in Christ Jesus in Ephesus.
local: Mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ mʋ nɩɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti sʋ nɩɩ n ba waa Krisito Yesu osunpu mʋ, ɩ kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ n bɩya fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa, nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ Krisito Yesu gyii kesintin tɔ, nɩɩ fan bʋ Efeso kadɛ tɔ mʋ.

eng: Grace and peace to you from God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ba bwaala fanɛ kɛ ba sa fanɛ kayɩɩ‐yuuli.

eng: Bless the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! He has blessed us in Christ with every spiritual blessing that comes from heaven.
local: Fan yɛgɛ a fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito Mʋ‐Sɛ. Kpalɩ fɛɛ a maa waa kʋkʋlʋn yɛ Krisito mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ taa kusee kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ mʋ ayɛ sʋsʋ mʋ bwaala anɛ.

eng: God chose us in Christ to be holy and blameless in Gods presence before the creation of the world.
local: Pɔyɩ kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ tʋʋ dulinyaa mʋ, ɔ bɔla anaa Krisito kɩwaa kʋkʋlʋn mʋ sʋ lɛɛ anɛ waa mʋ lɛɛ, kɛ a ba waa asa mʋ nɩɩ a man sʋ alibi abɛɛ asɩn pwɩɩsa kʋ mʋ asɛ. Lɩɩ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ sa anɛ sʋ mʋ.

eng: God destined us to be his adopted children through Jesus Christ because of his love. This was according to his goodwill and plan.
local: o ŋmina yɩla yɛ, bɔla Yesu Krisito sʋ mʋ, ee biti ɔ taa anɛ biliŋi mu‐bii ana. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ biti.

eng: and to honor his glorious grace that he has given to us freely through the Son whom he loves.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ an yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ kabwaala damantɛ mʋ sʋ mʋ, ɔ bɔla mu‐Bii bitisa mʋ sʋ bwaala anɛ atɔ kpini.

eng: We have been ransomed through his Sons blood, and we have forgiveness for our failures based on his overflowing grace.
local: Lɩɩ mu‐Bii Yesu nkalan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kyɛɛgɛ mʋ sʋ mʋ, an nyɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa taa anɛ alibi kɛɛ anɛ, nɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ kabwaala lala mʋ sʋ mʋ.

eng: which he poured over us with wisdom and understanding.
local: ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an nyɛ kanyaasɩn yɛ kinyi.

eng: God revealed his hidden design to us, which is according to his goodwill and the plan that he intended to accomplish through his Son.
local: Asɩn baalasa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ŋmina yɩla mʋ, nbɩɩnbɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ ɩmʋ kaapʋ anɛ. Ɩmʋ nɩɩ o ŋmina kpini yɩlɛ Yesu Krisito sʋ lɩɩ koo dɩdaa kanan mʋ nɩɩ ee biti.

eng: This is what God planned for the climax of all times: to bring all things together in Christ, the things in heaven along with the things on earth.
local: Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ŋmina yɩla mʋ, nɩɩ ɩmʋ saŋa kyɛɛkyɛɛ kan fʋʋ mʋ, ee biti ɔ taa kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ sʋsʋ yɛ kasɛ sʋ bʋga tɔ, kɛ Krisito ɔ waa ɩmʋ kpini kumu.

eng: We have also received an inheritance in Christ. We were destined by the plan of God, who accomplishes everything according to his design.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ ɩ waa, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla ŋmina yɩla, nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ mʋ. Nɩɩ anaa Krisito kɩwaa kʋkʋlʋn sʋ mʋ, ɔ wʋla lɛɛ anɛ lɩɩ koo npiili asɛ yɛ a ba waa mʋ asa lɩɩ mu kebiti mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla ŋmina yɩla mʋ sʋ.

eng: We are called to be an honor to Gods glory because we were the first to hope in Christ.
local: Saamʋ, anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an gyankpaa an sʋ tamaa Krisito tɔ mʋ, a yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ bʋnyaa mʋ.

eng: You too heard the word of truth in Christ, which is the good news of your salvation. You were sealed with the promised Holy Spirit because you believed in Christ.
local: Kanɩn nɩɩ i du sa fanɛ. Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ fan nu kesintin asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ asɩn danbɩrasa, nɩɩ ɩ bɩya fanɛ kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ, fan kɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa mu keduligi gyaga fanɛ sʋ. Kɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɩla yɛ ee biti ɔ sa fanɛ mʋ.

eng: The Holy Spirit is the down payment on our inheritance, which is applied toward our redemption as Gods own people, resulting in the honor of Gods glory.
local: Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa yɩla kasɛ, fɛɛ an biti a nyɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɛ ee biti ɔ sa mʋ asa mʋ. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ anɛ tamaa fɛɛ anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ, an biti an nyɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ. Fan yɛgɛ a yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ bʋnyaa mʋ.

eng: Since I heard about your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love for all Gods people, this is the reason that.
local: Falɛ sʋ, lɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n nu fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu gyii, yɛ fanɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ sa Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ.

eng: I dont stop giving thanks to God for you when I remember you in my prayers.
local: n man yɛgɛ afwaala kɩtaa sa Ɩbwaarɛ mɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ tɔ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ. Nɩɩ n nyiŋi fanɛ sʋ.

eng: I pray that the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, will give you a spirit of wisdom and revelation that makes God known to you.
local: n kʋlɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ bʋnyaa wuya mʋ yɛ, ɔ sa fanɛ mʋ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ sa fanɛ kanyaasɩn, kɛ ɔ lɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kaapʋ fanɛ, kɛ fan nyɛ bɩɩ mʋ danbɩrasa.

eng: I pray that the eyes of your heart will have enough light to see what is the hope of Gods call, what is the richness of Gods glorious inheritance among believers.
local: N bɩla n kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ o bugi fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ, kɛ fan nyɛ bɩɩ tamaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ kɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, yɛ bʋnyaa kapatɩyɛ kparɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɛ ee biti ɔ sa mʋ asa mʋ.

eng: and what is the overwhelming greatness of Gods power that is working among us believers. This power is conferred by the energy of Gods powerful strength.
local: N kʋlɛ mʋ yɛ ɔ yɛgɛ fan bɩɩ mʋ ɔlɔn kparɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa waa anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ tɔ. Ɔlʋn lala nɩmʋ man sʋ bɩrɩsa.

eng: Gods power was at work in Christ when God raised him from the dead and sat him at Gods right side in the heavens.
local: nɩɩ ɔlʋn maŋa nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ kaapʋ Krisito tɔ fɛɛ maa kyiŋi mʋ lɩɩ lewu tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ kyɩna mʋ kɩbaa gyisa sʋ sʋsʋ.

eng: far above every ruler and authority and power and angelic power, any power that might be named not only now but in the future.
local: Nɩɩ Krisito ii gyii kuwura awura yɛ alʋnpʋ yɛ kɩnyɩn kigyii yɛ anyɩrɩpɛ kpini sʋ. Nɩɩ ɔ sʋ ɔlʋn kparɛ ɔ kyɔ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ kɩtɩɩ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ yɛ kɩmʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ ba ba mʋ tɔ.

eng: God put everything under Christs feet and made him head of everything in the church.
local: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ waa Krisito kasɛ, nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ ba waa kumu sa mʋ kʋbʋ mʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ.

eng: which is his body. His body, the church, is the fullness of Christ, who fills everything in every way.
local: Kʋbʋ mʋ kpini ɩ gyɛ Krisito kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ, nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kumu sa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ, nɩɩ mʋ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ ɩɩ lʋwɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ ɔkpa kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ.

eng: At one time you were like a dead person because of the things you did wrong and your offenses against God.
local: Fanɛ fanɛ naafɔɔ fan kyɩna fan du nɩn fɛɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba wu mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan waa Ɩbwaarɛ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn yɛ alibi.

eng: You used to live like people of this world. You followed the rule of a destructive spiritual power. This is the spirit of disobedience to Gods will that is now at work in persons whose lives are characterized by disobedience.
local: Kanɩn saŋa maŋa fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ mʋ, fan kyɩna fan buu dulinyaa nɩmʋ awaasa, nɩɩ fan buu n‐yaayu libi kpini owura mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ asa tɔ ee sun kusun nbɩɩnbɩɩ, nɩɩ be mee nu bɛɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ.

eng: At one time you were like those persons. All of you used to do whatever felt good and whatever you thought you wanted so that you were children headed for punishment just like everyone else.
local: Anɛ kpini an kyɩna an du fɛɛ bamʋ saŋa kʋ tɔ, yɛgɛ an bʋ anɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kɩpɩrɛ tɔ, nɩɩ an buu ɩmʋ kayalaga yɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ anɛ nkɔlɔ ii biti mʋ. Naafɔɔ anɛ kpini an tii bamʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ dɛ o gyoo bamʋ mʋ sʋ.

eng: However, God is rich in mercy. He brought us to life with Christ while we were dead as a result of those things that we did wrong. He did this because of the great love that he has for us. You are saved by Gods grace!.
local: Amaa lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti lala mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ sa anɛ yɛ mʋ kʋwɛɛ kuwu kʋkyɔ mʋ sʋ mʋ.

eng: However, God is rich in mercy. He brought us to life with Christ while we were dead as a result of those things that we did wrong. He did this because of the great love that he has for us. You are saved by Gods grace!.
local: anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an kyɩna an du fɛɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba waa Ɩbwaarɛ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn mʋ, ɔ bɔla Krisito sʋ sa anɛ nkpa. Lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ sʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ.

eng: And God raised us up and seated us in the heavens with Christ Jesus.
local: Anaa Krisito Yesu kɩwaa kʋkʋlʋn sʋ mʋ, ɩ waa fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bʋga kʋsaa anaa Yesu lɩɩ lewu tɔ. Nɩɩ ɔ sa anɛ ɔkyɩnakpa Yesu asɛ sʋsʋ.

eng: God did this to show future generations the greatness of his grace by the goodness that God has shown us in Christ Jesus.
local: kɛ ɔ taa lɛɛ kaapʋ saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ fɛɛ mʋ kabwaala yɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ sa anɛ mʋ, ba mɛɛ taalɛ taa kaala sɛhn, lɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Yesu Krisito waa mʋ sʋ.

eng: You are saved by Gods grace because of your faith. This salvation is Gods gift. Its not something you possessed.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɔlɩgɛ fanɛ kpalɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fanɛ awaasa sʋ, ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kakɛɛ nɩn.

eng: Its not something you did that you can be proud of.
local: Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ ɔkʋ kusun sunsa sʋ nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ, kɛ ɔkʋ ɔ man nyɛ kaapʋ mʋ n‐yɩɩ.

eng: Instead, we are Gods accomplishment, created in Christ Jesus to do good things. God planned for these good things to be the way that we live our lives.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ waa anɛ asa pʋpwɛ, nɩɩ anaa Krisito Yesu kɩwaa kʋkʋlʋn sʋ mʋ, ɔ tʋʋ anɛ yɛ a waa atɔ danbɩrasa, mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla lɔŋɔ yɩla anɛ yɛ an waa mʋ.

eng: So remember that once you were Gentiles by physical descent, who were called uncircumcised by Jews who are physically circumcised.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan man gyɛ Gyiwu abi kakʋʋgɛ tɔ mʋ, Gyiwu abi mʋ bɛɛ tɩɩ fanɛ yɛ, bamʋ nɩɩ ba man tɩŋɛ iduu, nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ yɛ, iduu atɩŋɛpʋ. .

eng: At that time you were without Christ. You were aliens rather than citizens of Israel, and strangers to the covenants of Gods promise. In this world you had no hope and no God.
local: Fan nyiŋi fɛɛ kanɩn saŋa maŋa mʋ, fan man tii Krisito sʋ, fan kyɩna fan gyɛ afɔ kyilim nɩɩ fan man tii Ɩsɩrayɩ abi mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ fan man tii katɔwɛ kyula mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɩla mʋ sʋ, fan man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ nɩɩ fan man sʋ tamaa.

eng: But now, thanks to Christ Jesus, you who once were so far away have been brought near by the blood of Christ.
local: Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ naafɔɔ fan kyɩna fan bʋ kata yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, fanaa Krisito fan waa kʋkʋlʋn, nɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ nkalan kɩkyɛɛgɛ mʋ sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ bɩɩtɛ fanɛ tiri mʋ tɔ.

eng: Christ is our peace. He made both Jews and Gentiles into one group. With his body, he broke down the barrier of hatred that divided us.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Yesu gbaa‐gbaa ɩ bɩya anɛ keyuula nɩɩ mʋ ɩ taa Gyiwu abi yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ bʋga waa asa kʋlʋn. Nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ kekisi mʋ nɩɩ kɩ barɩgɛ bamʋ nsana fɛɛ kɩbandɩyɛ mʋ tʋʋ.

eng: He canceled the detailed rules of the Law so that he could create one new person out of the two groups, making peace.
local: Ɔ taa mʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ waa saraga tɩn Gyiwu abi nbara mʋ kibuu yɛ ɩmʋ kɩkaapʋ, kɛ ɔ nyɛ taa asa yiri ntun nnyɔ mʋ bʋga waa asa kʋlʋn yɛ mʋ Krisito. Ɔ waa kanɩn nɩn bɩya keyuula.

eng: He reconciled them both as one body to God by the cross, which ended the hostility to God.
local: Nɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ kelewu oyu laasa mʋ sʋ mʋ, o nyita kekisi mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ bamʋ nsana mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ waa bamʋ kʋkʋlʋn. Nɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ kelewu mʋ sʋ mʋ, ɔ lɔŋɔ bamʋ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nsana.

eng: When he came, he announced the good news of peace to you who were far away from God and to those who were near.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ Krisito ba, nɩɩ ɔ ba tɔwɛ keyuula asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sa fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan kyɩna fan bʋ kata yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, yɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ tiri Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ.

eng: We both have access to the Father through Christ by the one Spirit.
local: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ lɩɩ Krisito sʋ mʋ, anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an gyɛ Gyiwu abi yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ kpini, an taalɛ bɔla Kayaayu kʋlʋn mʋ sʋ ba Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

eng: So now you are no longer strangers and aliens. Rather, you are fellow citizens with Gods people, and you belong to Gods household.
local: Kanɩn sʋ, fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ, fan man bɩla fan gyɛ afɔ kyilim yɛ ndɛndɛmandɛ abi, amaa fanaa Ɩbwaarɛ asa fan gyɛ ndɛ‐bii yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩkpaara sʋ asa nɩn.

eng: As Gods household, you are built on the foundation of the apostles and prophets with Christ Jesus himself as the cornerstone.
local: nɩɩ fan du nɩn fɛɛ ɔpɔrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba pɔyɩ gyaga kisibi mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ Krisito asunpu yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ mʋ sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ Krisito Yesu gbaa‐gbaa ɩ gyɛ kɩmʋ kɩbɔntɔnbʋlɔntɔ kubuu kparɛ mʋ.

eng: The whole building is joined together in him, and it grows up into a temple that is dedicated to the Lord.
local: Nɩɩ mʋ ɩɩ sʋ obu mʋ katɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ bʋga tɔ, nɩɩ ɛɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ kii dii sʋsʋ kɩ ba waa kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ.

eng: Christ is building you into a place where God lives through the Spirit.
local: Fanaa Krisito kɩwaa kʋkʋlʋn sʋ mʋ, fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan man gyɛ Gyiwu abi nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ taa fanɛ bʋga yɛ asansa mʋ, kɛ fan ba waa mʋ Kayaayu mʋ ɔkyɩnakpa.

eng: Therefore, as a prisoner for the Lord, I encourage you to live as people worthy of the call you received from God.
local: Kanɩn sʋ, mɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba tii mɛ obu kpalɩ kusun mʋ nɩɩ n sun n sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ sʋ mʋ, n kʋlɛ fanɛ yɛ, fan kyɩna kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dagaa yɛ kɩtɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ ba waa mʋ lɛɛ mʋ.

eng: Conduct yourselves with all humility, gentleness, and patience. Accept each other with love.
local: Fan baa fɛn bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ, kɛ fan baa fen du bɔhn, yɛgɛ fan sʋ kenyiita, nɩɩ lɩɩ kebiti sʋ mʋ fan man taa abaa asɩn waa fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ.

eng: and make an effort to preserve the unity of the Spirit with the peace that ties you together.
local: Fan bɔla fanɛ kayɩɩ yuuli mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋga fanɛ mʋ sʋ kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩtaa kɔnɔ kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ sa fanɛ mʋ tɔ kenken.

eng: You are one body and one spirit, just as God also called you in one hope.
local: Anɛ kpini an gyɛ fɛɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn nɩn, nɩɩ Kayaayu kʋlʋn kpen nɩɩ an sʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ anɛ ba tamaa kʋlʋn tɔ mʋ.

eng: There is one Lord, one faith, one baptism.
local: An sʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kʋlʋn nɩn, yɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kʋlʋn, yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee kʋlʋn.

eng: and one God and Father of all, who is over all, through all, and in all.
local: An sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ anɛ kpini Ɔsɛ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ anɛ kpini Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, ɛɛ bɔla anɛ kpini sʋ ee sun kusun, nɩɩ ɔ bʋ anɛ kpini nkɔlɔ tɔ.

eng: God has given his grace to each one of us measured out by the gift that is given by Christ.
local: Amaa Krisito taa mʋ kabwaala nkɛɛ mʋ sa anɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ barɩgɛ tɔ yɩla mʋ.

eng: Thats why scripture says, When he climbed up to the heights, he captured prisoners, and he gave gifts to people .
local: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, Ɔ maa dii kpee sʋsʋ legelege mʋ, ɔ taa bamʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔ nyɛ mʋ kpee nɩɩ ɔ kɛɛ asa atɔ damantɛ.

eng: What does the phrase he climbed up mean if it doesnt mean that he had first gone down into the lower regions, the earth?.
local: Maa tɔwɛ yɛ, Ɔ maa dii kpee sʋsʋ legelege mʋ, kɩmʋ kasɛ ɩ gyɛ nɛnɛ? Kɩmʋ kasɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ pɔyɩ kɛ o dii kpee sʋsʋ mʋ, ɔ wʋla lɩɩ sʋsʋ nɩn ba kasɛ sʋ, kasɛ tɔ kasɛ tɔ.

eng: The one who went down is the same one who climbed up above all the heavens so that he might fill everything.
local: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ kpɩlɩgɛ ba kasɛ sʋ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ o dii kpee sʋsʋ mʋ. O dii kpee sʋsʋ‐sʋsʋ abwaarɛ‐wʋlɛ kamaa, kɛ ɔ nyɛ ɔ bʋ kasɛ sʋ yɛ sʋsʋ katɩn kʋmaa.

eng: He gave some apostles, some prophets, some evangelists, and some pastors and teachers.
local: Mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ sa nkɛɛ. Ɔ lɛɛ akʋ waa mu asunpu, nɩɩ ɔ waa akʋ mʋ atɔwɛpʋ, ɔ waa akʋ asɩn danbɩrasa atɔwɛpʋ, nɩɩ ɔ waa akʋ mɔɔ agyankpaapʋ yɛ akaapʋpʋ.

eng: His purpose was to equip Gods people for the work of serving and building up the body of Christ.
local: Krisito waa bamʋ kanɩn nɩn kɛ ba nyɛ lɔŋɔ Ɩbwaarɛ asa ba waa Krisito kusun mʋ, kɛ mʋ kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ mʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ kɩ nyɛ kɩɩ dan kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ.

eng: until we all reach the unity of faith and knowledge of Gods Son. Gods goal is for us to become mature adults—to be fully grown, measured by the standard of the fullness of Christ.
local: naa fʋʋ fɛɛ anɛ kpini an nyɛ kɔnɔ kʋlʋn kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ, kɛ a bɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐Bii mʋ, kɛ a dan danbɩrasa naa lʋwɛ fɛɛ Krisito kudubi mʋ.

eng: As a result, we arent supposed to be infants any longer who can be tossed and blown around by every wind that comes from teaching with deceitful scheming and the tricks people play to deliberately mislead others.
local: Saamʋ an man bɩla an gyɛ nbii kɛ asa ba nyɛ taa antɩŋɛsa kɩkaapʋ yɛ kigolongolon kɔnɔ tɔ kɔn pɩna anɛ kɛ anɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ baa i du fɛɛ afuu ɩmaa da nɩɩ apaa i kyenkpen tɔ mʋ.

eng: Instead, by speaking the truth with love, lets grow in every way into Christ.
local: Amaa a taa kebiti tɔwɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ, kɛ a dan ba waa fɛɛ Krisito ɔkpa kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ, nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kumu mʋ.

eng: who is the head. The whole body grows from him, as it is joined and held together by all the supporting ligaments. The body makes itself grow in that it builds itself up with love as each one does its part.
local: Krisito sʋ nɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ abaafʋn‐abaafʋn mʋ ɩ kyaa abaa sʋ, nɩɩ ɩkyagakpa mʋ ɩɩ kɩtaa abaafʋn mʋ bʋga abaa tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ kɩbaafʋn kʋmaa nɩmʋ waa kɩmʋ kusun yɛ ɔdan mʋ, kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ kpini ɩɩ dan nɩɩ ɩɩ nyɛ ɔlʋn kebiti tɔ.

eng: So Im telling you this, and I insist on it in the Lord: you shouldnt live your life like the Gentiles anymore. They base their lives on pointless thinking.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ n tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ, nɩɩ n yɩlɛ ɩmʋ sʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ yɛ, fan man kyɩna fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ be mee sun Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ. Falɛ asa nfɛɛrɛ ɩ man sʋ kyaarɛ.

eng: and they are in the dark in their reasoning. They are disconnected from Gods life because of their ignorance and their closed hearts.
local: Kitentenbiri ki bun bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ sʋ, nɩɩ ba mɛɛ yɛ ba nyɛ nkpa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ ɛɛ sa mʋ, lɩɩ bamʋ kɩman nyi yɛ bamʋ nkɔlɔ ɔsɩɩ mʋ sʋ.

eng: They are people who lack all sense of right and wrong, and who have turned themselves over to doing whatever feels good and to practicing every sort of corruption along with greed.
local: Lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ipeeli ɩ man bɩla ɩ bʋ bamʋ ansi sʋ mʋ, ba taa bamʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ bɛɛ waa asɩn gyaga kʋmaa nɩmʋ mʋ nɩɩ i gyii bamʋ amu.

eng: But you didnt learn that sort of thing from Christ.
local: Amaa fanɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ, man gyɛ ɩnɩmʋ nɩɩ fan bɩɩla lɩɩ Krisito sʋ.

eng: Since you really listened to him and you were taught how the truth is in Jesus.
local: N nyi fan maa nu mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ba kaapʋ fanɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ Yesu tɔ mʋ.

eng: change the former way of life that was part of the person you once were, corrupted by deceitful desires.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ fanɛ kakyɩna dɩdaa mʋ fɔyɩ. Kakyɩna dɩdaa mʋ kayalaga daa kyɩna ɩɩ pɩna fanɛ nɩn, nɩɩ ii nyita fanɛ.

eng: Instead, renew the thinking in your mind by the Spirit.
local: Nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fanɛ nkɔlɔ yɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ kpini i waa apʋpwɛ.

eng: and clothe yourself with the new person created according to Gods image in justice and true holiness.
local: kɛ fan kyɩna kakyɩna pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tʋʋ kɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩmʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi, nɩɩ i du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ keduli mʋ.

eng: Therefore, after you have gotten rid of lying, Each of you must tell the truth to your neighbor because we are parts of each other in the same body.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fanɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ yɛgɛ atɩŋɛsa, kɛ fan baa fen gyii kesintin fɛn sa fanɛ bɩrɩsa ana. Lɩɩ fɛɛ anɛ kpini an gyɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn asa nɩn.

eng: Be angry without sinning. Dont let the sun set on your anger.
local: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan nyɛ agbʋ mʋ, ɔ man yɛgɛ mʋ agbʋ mʋ ɩ yɛgɛ ɔ waa alibi, nɩɩ ɔ man kyaga agbʋ mʋ sʋ naa tɩyɛ kyɔwɛ.

eng: Dont provide an opportunity for the devil.
local: Kɛ ɔ man sa Sɩtaanɛ ɔkpa kpini‐kpini.

eng: Thieves should no longer steal. Instead, they should go to work, using their hands to do good so that they will have something to share with whoever is in need.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kyɩna ee yuuri mʋ, ɔ man bɩla yuuri, amaa ɔ taa mʋ abaa sun kusun mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ tɔnɔ, kɛ ɔ nyɛ ɩkʋ kyɛ atiripu tɔ.

eng: Dont let any foul words come out of your mouth. Only say what is helpful when it is needed for building up the community so that it benefits those who hear what you say.
local: Fan man yɛgɛ ntɔwɛ libi kʋ ɩ lɩɩ fanɛ nnɔ tɔ, amɔɔ nkyɛtɔ ntɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ii kpiya asa ansi tɔ, nɩɩ bɛɛ nyɛ bamʋ atɔ tirisa mʋ. Saamʋ bamʋ nɩɩ bee nu mʋ, ba nyɛ‐nyɛ fanɛ katɔwɛ mʋ tɔnɔ.

eng: Dont make the Holy Spirit of God unhappy—you were sealed by him for the day of redemption.
local: Fan man waa kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ o nyita mʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Kayaayu maŋa nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa dulugi fanɛ kaapʋ fɛɛ, mʋ asa ɩ gyɛ fanɛ sa Kakɛ lala mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ mɔlɩgɛ fanɛ mʋ.

eng: Put aside all bitterness, losing your temper, anger, shouting, and slander, along with every other evil.
local: Fan man bɩla yɛgɛ asɩn ɩ kɔ fanɛ, abɛɛ fan taa asɩn waa fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ, abɛɛ fan nyɛ agbʋ. Fan man pʋntɛ abaa sʋ, abɛɛ fan saalɛ abaa, abɛɛ fan kisi abaa ɩkpa kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ sʋ.

eng: Be kind, compassionate, and forgiving to each other, in the same way God forgave you in Christ.
local: Amaa fan baa fɛn waa abaa kɩdanbɩrasa, kɛ fan baa fan su asa kʋwɛɛ, kɛ fan baa fan sʋ alibi fɛn kɛɛ abaa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla Krisito sʋ taa fanɛ alibi kɛɛ fanɛ mʋ.

eng: This is why I, Paul, am a prisoner of Christ for you Gentiles.
local: Lɩɩ falɛ sʋ, mɛ Pɔɔlɩ, mʋ nɩɩ ba tii mɛ obu Krisito Yesu sʋ, lɩɩ Krisito asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ n sa fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ sʋ mʋ, n kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ n sa fanɛ.

eng: Youve heard, of course, about the responsibility to distribute Gods grace, which God gave to me for you, right?.
local: Kesintin tɔ fan nu yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa kusun nɩmʋ sa mɛ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ.

eng: God showed me his secret plan in a revelation, as I mentioned briefly before .
local: Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn baalasa, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ kaapʋ mɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n wʋla kyʋrɔɔ ɩmʋ gbɛrɛɛ yɩla mʋ.

eng: when you read this, youll understand my insight into the secret plan about Christ.
local: Nɩɩ fan kan kalɛ ɩmʋ mʋ, fen biti fan taalɛ wu fɛɛ n nu asɩn baalasa lɩɩ Krisito sʋ mʋ kasɛ.

eng: Earlier generations didnt know this hidden plan that God has now revealed to his holy apostles and prophets through the Spirit.
local: Saamʋ dɩdaa mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ man lɛɛ asɩn maŋa kaapʋ dɩdaa asa mʋ, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ ɔ bɔla mʋ Kayaayu mʋ sʋ lɛɛ kanɩn asɩn baalasa maŋa kaapʋ Krisito asunpu yɛ atɔwɛpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ.

eng: This plan is that the Gentiles would be coheirs and parts of the same body, and that they would share with the Jews in the promises of God in Christ Jesus through the gospel.
local: Asɩn baalasa mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, lɩɩ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sʋ mʋ, bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ bee biti ba ba nyɛ kusee damantɛ mʋ bʋga tii Gyiwu abi mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ bamʋ kpini bee biti ba baa ba gyɛ asa kʋlʋn, kɛ ba nyɛ kusee atɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla Krisito Yesu sʋ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɩla mʋ.

eng: I became a servant of the gospel because of the grace that God showed me through the exercise of his power.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ bwaala mɛ, lɩɩ mʋ ɔlʋn kusun mʋ sʋ waa mɛ asɩn danbɩrasa nɩmʋ osunpu.

eng: God gave his grace to me, the least of all Gods people, to preach the good news about the immeasurable riches of Christ to the Gentiles.
local: Halɩɩ n maa man fʋʋ Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ tɔ kalʋwɛ asɛ gbaa mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ taa asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ kɩtɔwɛ bwaala mɛ yɛ, n tɔwɛ Krisito kusee mʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ taa kala sɛhn mʋ, sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ.

eng: As for children, obey your parents in the Lord, because it is right.
local: Nbii, lɩɩ fan maa gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ lɛɛ sʋ mʋ, fan nu fanɛ akʋʋgɛpʋ asɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩmʋ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ fan waa.

eng: God sent me to reveal the secret plan that had been hidden since the beginning of time by God, who created everything.
local: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa waa mɛ kabaa tɔ yɛ, n yɛgɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ o wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ asɩn baalasa nɩmʋ ii sun kusun. Saamʋ dɩdaa mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ mʋ taa asɩn mʋ baala.

eng: The commandment Honor your father and mother is the first one with a promise attached.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ nbara mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, Nu sa fʋ‐sɛ yɛ fu‐nyi, mʋ, ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ nbara gyankpaasa mʋ nɩɩ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ kɩda tii sʋ.

eng: Gods purpose is now to show the rulers and powers in the heavens the many different varieties of his wisdom through the church.
local: kɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ ɔ nyɛ bɔla Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ sʋ lɛɛ mʋ kanyaasɩn damantɛ kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ mʋ kaapʋ nbɔɔ yɛ awura yɛ alʋnpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ sʋsʋ mʋ.

eng: so that things will go well for you, and you will live for a long time in the land .
local: Kɔkɔlɔ sʋ kɩda mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, nɩɩ fʋ kan nu sa fʋ‐sɛ yɛ fu‐nyi mʋ, ii biti ɩ waa ɔdan sa fʋ, kɛ fʋ kyɩna kasɛ sʋ kyɛɛrɛɛ.

eng: This was consistent with the plan he had from the beginning of time that he accomplished through Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: Ɔ waa ɩnɩmʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla ŋmina yɩla lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ bɔla anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Krisito Yesu sʋ waa kanɩn.

eng: As for parents, dont provoke your children to anger, but raise them with discipline and instruction about the Lord.
local: Akʋgɛpʋ, fan man waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ yɛgɛ fanɛ nbii ba nyɛ agbʋ, amaa fan kɩɩ bamʋ sʋ, kɛ fan taa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kɩkaapʋ mʋ bɩla bamʋ.

eng: In Christ we have bold and confident access to God through faith in him.
local: Lɩɩ a maa waa kʋkʋlʋn yɛ Krisito, nɩɩ an kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii sʋ mʋ, an taalɛ yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ kɩnyɩn tɔ yɛgɛ a man sʋ kufuu.

eng: As for slaves, obey your human masters with fear and trembling and with sincere devotion to Christ.
local: Anyɛ, fan nu sa fanɛ kasɛ sʋ anyɩrɩpɛ ana, kɛ fan sɩlɛ bamʋ lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ kpini tɔ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fen biti fan waa sa Krisito mʋ.

eng: So then, I ask you not to become discouraged by what Im suffering for you, which is your glory.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ n tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, fan man yɛgɛ fanɛ abaa ɩ yɔɔ, lɩɩ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ n wu fanɛ sʋ falɛ. Ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩ bɩya fanɛ tɔnɔ.

eng: Dont work to make yourself look good and try to flatter people, but act like slaves of Christ carrying out Gods will from the heart.
local: Fan man nu sa bamʋ ansi sʋ wʋlɛ kɛ fan nyɛ gyii bamʋ amu, amaa fan maa gyɛ Krisito anyɛ sʋ mʋ, fan waa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩpɩrɛ sʋ.

eng: This is why I kneel before the Father.
local: Nɩɩ n kan fɛ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa sa fanɛ falɛ mʋ, n muŋa mɛ amulii sʋ n kʋlɛ anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ n sa fanɛ.

eng: Serve your owners enthusiastically, as though you were serving the Lord and not human beings.
local: Fan sun bamʋ lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ fɛɛ fan maa sun Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ, nɩɩ man gyɛ asa nɩɩ fen sun mʋ.

eng: Every ethnic group in heaven or on earth is recognized by him.
local: Mʋ tɔ nɩɩ yiri kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ kasɛ sʋ yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ sʋsʋ mʋ kpini ɩ lɩɩ.

eng: You know that the Lord will reward every person who does what is right, whether that person is a slave or a free person.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan nyi fɛɛ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ ii biti ɔ ka ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kʋkɔ lɩɩ kusun danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa mʋ sʋ. Ɩ man tiri fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ kɩnyɛ abɛɛ ee gyii mʋ kɩbaa sʋ.

eng: I ask that he will strengthen you in your inner selves from the riches of his glory through the Spirit.
local: N kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ, lɩɩ mʋ bʋnyaa kparɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, ɔ bɔla mʋ Kayaayu mʋ sʋ, waa fanɛ kala ana ɔlʋn gaa.

eng: As for masters, treat your slaves in the same way. Stop threatening them, because you know that both you and your slaves have a master in heaven. He doesnt distinguish between people on the basis of status.
local: Anyɩrɩpɛ mɔɔ, kanɩn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ fan waa fanɛ anyɛ. Fan man ŋaala bamʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fu nyi fɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ fanaa bamʋ kpini Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ bʋ sʋsʋ nɩn, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ mɛɛgɛ tɔ.

eng: I ask that Christ will live in your hearts through faith. As a result of having strong roots in love.
local: Mɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, lɩɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ mʋ, Krisito ɔ ba kyɩna fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ. Nɩɩ n bɩla n kʋlɛ yɛ, fan nyɛ ilin kɛ fan yɩlɛ fanɛ kebiti tɔ kenken.

eng: Finally, be strengthened by the Lord and his powerful strength.
local: Mɛ asɩn laalaalʋwɛ mʋ gyɛ yɛ, fan nyɛ ɔlʋn lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ yɛ mʋ ɔlʋn lala mʋ tɔ.

eng: I ask that youll have the power to grasp loves width and length, height and depth, together with all believers.
local: kɛ fan naa Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ kpini fan nyɛ ɔlʋn nu Krisito kebiti mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ ɔkaa nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ bɩrɩsa mʋ kasɛ.

eng: Put on Gods armor so that you can make a stand against the tricks of the devil.
local: Fan taa adʋn tɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa fanɛ mʋ kpini bun, kɛ fan nyɛ taalɛ kɔ yɛ Sɩtaanɛ kanyaasɩn ɩkpa libi mʋ.

eng: I ask that youll know the love of Christ that is beyond knowledge so that you will be filled entirely with the fullness of God.
local: Halɩɩ ɩ maa bʋ tɔ fɛɛ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ nu Krisito kebiti mʋ kasɛ lʋwɛ gbaa mʋ, n kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ ɔ yɛgɛ fan nu kebiti mʋ kasɛ, kɛ fanɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ kɩ baa ki du fɛɛ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa.

eng: We arent fighting against human enemies but against rulers, authorities, forces of cosmic darkness, and spiritual powers of evil in the heavens.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ man gyɛ anaa anyɩmɩsa ɩɩ kɔ. Amaa an kɔ yɛ awuragyipu yɛ alʋlʋnpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ afuu tɔ. An kɔ yɛ n‐yaayu libi mʋ nɩɩ ii gyii kuwura dulinyaa kitentenbiri nɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: Glory to God, who is able to do far beyond all that we could ask or imagine by his power at work within us.
local: Fan yɛgɛ a yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ ii sun kusun anɛ tɔ mʋ sʋ mʋ, ɛɛ taalɛ waa atɔ damantɛ ɔ kyɔ ɩmʋ nɩɩ an kʋlɛ mʋ, yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ a mɛɛ fɛ ɩmʋ nfɛɛrɛ gbaa mʋ.

eng: Therefore, pick up the full armor of God so that you can stand your ground on the evil day and after you have done everything possible to still stand.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan taa adʋntɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa fanɛ mʋ kpini bun. Saamʋ nɩɩ nkɛ libi kan ba mʋ, fɛn taalɛ nyɛ ɔlʋn kɔ tii Sɩtaanɛ ɩkpa libi mʋ. Nɩɩ fan kan kɔ lʋwɛ gbaa mʋ, fan yɩlɛ fanɛ ayaa sʋ.

eng: glory to him in the church and in Christ Jesus for all generations, forever and always. Amen.
local: Nɩɩ lɩɩ Krisito Yesu sʋ mʋ, mu abuupu mʋ kpini ba taa bʋnyaa bɛɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ lɩɩ ndaga ɩɩ sʋ ii kpee naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ ɔkaa. Amen!.

eng: So stand with the belt of truth around your waist, justice as your breastplate.
local: Fan yɩlɛ tɔ kenken, kɛ fan taa kesintin waa kɩrɩsʋ ŋmina fanɛ nsɛ tɔ. Kɛ fan taa ɩkpa kigyiigi waa fɛɛ kɩbɩlɛ tɔ panpasan kun fanɛ nkɔlɔ sʋ.

eng: Therefore, imitate God like dearly loved children.
local: Kpalɩ fan maa gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana mʋ nɩɩ ee biti fanɛ gaa sʋ mʋ, fan kasɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔ.

eng: and put shoes on your feet so that you are ready to spread the good news of peace.
local: Fan kʋʋla fanɛ n‐yɩɩ biti asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ bɩya keyuula mʋ kɩtɔwɛ fɛɛ fanɛ ayaa sʋ asɩbɩta.

eng: Live your life with love, following the example of Christ, who loved us and gave himself for us. He was a sacrificial offering that smelled sweet to God.
local: Fan nyɛ kebiti sa abaa fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Krisito nyɛ kebiti sa anɛ, nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ lɛɛ saraga nɩɩ o wu fwɩɩ anɛ alibi, nɩɩ kanɩn saraga mʋ ii lii fen femm nɩɩ kɩɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi mʋ.

eng: Above all, carry the shield of faith so that you can extinguish the flaming arrows of the evil one.
local: Saŋa kʋmaa fan taa kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩtaa fɛɛ kɩbaa tɔ kʋtɔ kunsa. Kɩmʋ nɩɩ fɛn taalɛ taa dunla Olibilibi fʋlɔn anyenbi mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tʋʋ fanɛ mʋ kɔnɔ.

eng: Sexual immorality, and any kind of impurity or greed, shouldnt even be mentioned among you, which is right for holy persons.
local: Lɩɩ fan maa gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa sʋ mʋ, ɩ man dagaa ɔkʋ maa nu fɛɛ kanyɩn abɛɛ kakyɩɩ biti kɩgyagaa, abɛɛ ineesi ɩkʋ, abɛɛ onsi‐payɩ libi kʋ ɩ baa ɩ bʋ fanɛ tɔ.

eng: Take the helmet of salvation and the sword of the Spirit, which is Gods word.
local: Fan taa kamɔlɩgɛ fɛɛ abɩlɩtɔ kʋwʋrʋ bun, kɛ fan taa abwaarɛsɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kɩnaa tɔ sakunde, mʋ nɩɩ Kayaayu mʋ ɩɩ sa mʋ kɩtaa.

eng: Obscene language, silly talk, or vulgar jokes arent acceptable for believers. Instead, there should be thanksgiving.
local: Nɩɩ ɩ man dagaa fan maa tɔwɛ ineesi asɩn, abɛɛ amelensi‐sɩn, abɛɛ agyaga‐sɩn, amaa fan taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: Offer prayers and petitions in the Spirit all the time. Stay alert by hanging in there and praying for all believers.
local: Kɛ fan taa Kayaayu mʋ ɔlʋn kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ, kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ kyɛ fanɛ tɔ. Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, fan baa fan da sʋ, kɛ fan waa aniya kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ saŋa kʋmaa fɛn sa Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ kpini.

eng: Because you know for sure that persons who are sexually immoral, impure, or greedy—which happens when things become gods—those persons wont inherit the kingdom of Christ and God.
local: Fan dan fen nyi kesintin tɔ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa kakyɩɩ abɛɛ kanyɩn biti kɩgyagaa, abɛɛ ineesi asɩn, abɛɛ onsi‐payɩ libi mʋ, ɔ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ nyɛ loo Krisito maa Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii mʋ tɔ. Onsi‐payɩ libi du nɩn fɛɛ kusun ɩdakpa mʋ.

eng: As for me, pray that when I open my mouth, Ill get a message that confidently makes this secret plan of the gospel known.
local: Fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa ngbaa mɛ fɛɛ saŋa kʋmaa nɩɩ n kan bugi mɛ kɔnɔ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ sa mɛ asɩn tɔwɛsa, kɛ n nyɛ yɩlɛ kɩnyɩn tɔ lɛɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ naafɔɔ ɩ baala mʋ kaapʋ.

eng: Nobody should deceive you with stupid ideas. Gods anger comes down on those who are disobedient because of this kind of thing.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ agbʋ ii biti ɩ ba bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa mʋ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn mʋ sʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ fan man yɛgɛ ɔkʋ ɔ taa ntɔwɛ kɩyan pɩna fanɛ.

eng: Im an ambassador in chains for the sake of the gospel. Pray so that the Lord will give me the confidence to say what I have to say.
local: Asɩn danbɩrasa nɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ Krisito sun mɛ, nɩɩ ba tii mɛ obu falɛ. Fan kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ n taalɛ tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ kɩnyɩn tɔ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa.

eng: So you shouldnt have anything to do with them.
local: kanɩn sʋ faa naa kanɩn asa maŋa fan man bʋga waa sɛhn.

eng: Tychicus, my loved brother and faithful servant of the Lord, can inform you about my situation and what Im doing.
local: Anɛ bɩrɩsa bitisa Tikiku, ɔ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kɩyaafɔlɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa kɔkɔlɔ kʋlʋn ee sun mʋ, mʋ ii biti ɔ ba tɔwɛ fanɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa, kɛ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan nyɛ bɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n du yɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n waa.

eng: You were once darkness, but now you are light in the Lord, so live your life as children of light.
local: Fanɛ gbaa fanɛ kitentenbiri kɩ kyɩna kɩ bʋ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ nɩn, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ fan maa gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ asa sʋ mʋ, kaŋmaŋɛ bʋ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ nɩn. Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ fan gyɛ ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ tɔ asa.

eng: Ive sent him for this reason—so that you will know about us. He can reassure you.
local: Falɛ sʋ nɩɩ n sun mʋ fanɛ asɛ, kɛ fan nyɛ bɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an du kɛ ɔ tɔwɛ waa fanɛ aniya tɔ.

eng: Light produces fruit that consists of every sort of goodness, justice, and truth.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩŋmaŋɛsa nɩmʋ ɩ bɩya kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa yɛ ɩkpa kikyiigi yɛ kesintin kigyii.

eng: May there be peace with the brothers and sisters as well as love with the faith that comes from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ba sa fanɛ, anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana keyuula yɛ kebiti yɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii.

eng: Therefore, test everything to see whats pleasing to the Lord.
local: Kɛ fan waa aniya waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi.

eng: May grace be with all those who love our Lord Jesus Christ forever.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ bwaala bamʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ ɔkaa sa anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito mʋ.

eng: and dont participate in the unfruitful actions of darkness. Instead, you should reveal the truth about them.
local: Fan man taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ naa tii kitentenbiri awaasa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ kʋʋgɛ obii danbɩrasa mʋ sʋ, amaa fan lɛɛ ɩmʋ kaapʋ yɛ ɩ gyɛ alibi.

eng: Its embarrassing to even talk about what certain persons do in secret.
local: Ɩ gyɛ apeeli‐sɩn gbaa fɛɛ fan tɔwɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ asʋtɔ ɔlʋn wuya ana bɛɛ baala bɛɛ waa mʋ asɩn.

eng: But everything exposed to the light is revealed by the light.
local: Amaa kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ lɛɛ ifuli sʋ mʋ, ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ii wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ ki du.

eng: Everything that is revealed by the light is light. Therefore, it says, Wake up, sleeper! Get up from the dead, and Christ will shine on you. .
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ ɩŋmaŋɛsa ɩ ba kʋtɔ kʋmaa sʋ mʋ, kanɩn kʋtɔ maŋa mɛɛ baala. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ yɩla yɛ, Fʋ, nsɩɩrɛ ɔdɛpʋ, kyiŋi, kʋsʋ lɩɩ lewu tɔ, kɛ Krisito ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ ɩ ba fʋ sʋ.

eng: So be careful to live your life wisely, not foolishly.
local: Fan kɩɩ danbɩrasa kɛ fan man kyɩna fɛɛ amelensipu, amaa fan kyɩna fɛɛ anyaasɩnpʋ.

eng: Take advantage of every opportunity because these are evil times.
local: Nɩɩ fan kan nyɛ ɔkpa kʋmaa nɩmʋ yɛ fan waa kɩdanbɩrasa mʋ, fan man yɛgɛ ɩ kyʋn fanɛ sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa nɩmʋ tɔ mʋ libi ɩ nyɛ akyɔ.

eng: Because of this, dont be ignorant, but understand the Lords will.
local: Fan man waa fɛɛ amelensipu, amaa fan kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ bɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu ii biti fɛɛ fan waa.

eng: Dont get drunk on wine, which produces depravity. Instead, be filled with the Spirit in the following ways.
local: Fan man kan nuu nta bʋʋ, kɛ ɩ nyɛ nyita fanɛ amu. Amaa fan yɛgɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ o loo bɔla fanɛ tɔ gaa.

eng: speak to each other with psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs; sing and make music to the Lord in your hearts.
local: Fan taa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩlʋn yɛ abwaarɛsɩn ɩlʋn yɛ Kayaayu kɩlɛɛkaapʋ ɩlʋn fɛn tɔwɛ fɛn waa abaa. Fan taa fanɛ nkɔlɔ kpini bɩɩ ɩlʋn sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ.

eng: always give thanks to God the Father for everything in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ fan taa afwaala sa Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ, lɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ.

eng: and submit to each other out of respect for Christ.
local: Fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa fanɛ bɩrɩsa ana kɛ ɩ sa Krisito bɛɛrɛɛ.

eng: For example, wives should submit to their husbands as if to the Lord.
local: Akyɩɩ‐kilipu, fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa fanɛ‐kuli ana fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ nɩɩ fɛn waa fɛn sa mʋ.

eng: A husband is the head of his wife like Christ is head of the church, that is, the savior of the body.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ okuli mʋ ɩ gyɛ kumu sa mʋ‐ka, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Krisito gyɛ kumu sa mu abuupu kʋbʋ, mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ mʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ, nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kɩmʋ ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ mʋ.

eng: So wives submit to their husbands in everything like the church submits to Christ.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Krisito abuupu mʋ bɛɛ bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ bɛɛ sa Krisito mʋ, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ akyɩɩ‐kilipu gbaa ba bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa bamʋ‐kuli ana kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ.

eng: As for husbands, love your wives just like Christ loved the church and gave himself for her.
local: Anyɩn‐kilipu, fan nyɛ kebiti sa fanɛ‐ka ana fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Krisito nyɛ kebiti sa mʋ kʋbʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa saraga wu sa bamʋ mʋ.

eng: He did this to make her holy by washing her in a bath of water with the word.
local: Kɛ ɔ nyɛ bɔla nkyu yɛ mʋ asɩn mʋ sʋ gyee bamʋ waa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ sa mʋ n‐yɩɩ.

eng: He did this to present himself with a splendid church, one without any sort of stain or wrinkle on her clothes, but rather one that is holy and blameless.
local: Ɔ waa kanɩn nɩn kɛ mʋ kʋbʋ mʋ ba baa ba gyɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ, yɛgɛ ba man sʋ ineesi, abɛɛ alibi akʋ, abɛɛ awaasa libi, yɛgɛ ba du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, nɩɩ ba man sʋ asɩn pwɩɩsa akʋ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ.

eng: Thats how husbands ought to love their wives—in the same way as they do their own bodies. Anyone who loves his wife loves himself.
local: Ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ, ɩ dagaa fɛɛ anyɩn‐kilipu ba maa nyɛ kebiti sa bamʋ‐ka ana, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ kebiti sa bamʋ gbaa‐gbaa n‐yɩɩ mʋ. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti mʋ‐ka mʋ, ii biti mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ nɩn.

eng: No one ever hates his own body, but feeds it and takes care of it just like Christ does for the church.
local: Ɔsa kʋ man bʋ tɔ nɩɩ ee kisi mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ, amaa ɛɛ bɩla kɩmʋ, yɛgɛ ɛɛ kɩɩ kɩmʋ sʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Krisito ɩɩ kɩɩ mʋ kʋbʋ mʋ sʋ mʋ.

eng: because we are parts of his body.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ anɛ ɩ gyɛ Krisito kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ yɛ ɩmʋ abaafʋn kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ mʋ.

eng: This is why a man will leave his father and mother and be united with his wife, and the two of them will be one body .
local: Ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, Lɩɩ falɛ sʋ ɔnyɩn ii biti ɔ lɩɩ mu‐nyi yɛ mʋ‐sɛ asɛ, kɛ ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ naa bʋga mʋ‐ka tɔ, kɛ bamʋ asa anyɔ mʋ ba ba waa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn.

eng: Marriage is a significant allegory, and Im applying it to Christ and the church.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn baalasa mʋ nɩɩ i budu, amaa mɛɛ mɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ falɛ mʋ ɩ yɩlɛ sa Krisito maa mʋ kʋbʋ mʋ nɩn.

eng: In any case, as for you individually, each one of you should love his wife as himself, and wives should respect their husbands.
local: Amaa n tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, ɔnyɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ nyɛ kebiti sa mʋ‐ka, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ mʋ, nɩɩ ɩ dagaa ɔkyɩɩ‐kilipu kʋmaa nɩmʋ mɔɔ maa bɩya mʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa mu‐kuli.

eng: From Paul and Timothy, slaves of Christ Jesus. To all those in Philippi who are Gods people in Christ Jesus, along with your supervisors and servants.
local: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ mɛ Pɔɔlɩ yɛ Timoti, mʋ nɩɩ an gyɛ Krisito Yesu ayaafɔlɛ mʋ asɛ. Nɩɩ an kyʋrɔɔ an sa fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa kpini mʋ nɩɩ fanaa Krisito Yesu fan waa kʋkʋlʋn, yɛ fanɛ abɩlɩsa yɛ akyɛtɔpʋ mʋ nɩɩ fan bʋ Filipi kadɛ tɔ mʋ.

eng: May the grace and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: Anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ba bwaala fanɛ kɛ ba sa fanɛ kayɩɩ yuuli.

eng: I thank my God every time I mention you in my prayers.
local: N fwaala mɛ Ɩbwaarɛ saŋa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ n nyiŋi fanɛ sʋ mʋ.

eng: Im thankful for all of you every time I pray, and its always a prayer full of joy.
local: Nɩɩ saŋa kʋmaa n maa kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ n sa fanɛ kpini mʋ, n kʋlɛ yɛ kɔkɔlɔ fuuli tɔ.

eng: Im glad because of the way you have been my partners in the ministry of the gospel from the time you first believed it until now.
local: lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan ba tii mɛ sʋ nɩɩ an waa asɩn danbɩrasa kɩtɔwɛ kusun saŋa mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ gyii ba fʋʋ halɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ.

eng: Im sure about this: the one who started a good work in you will stay with you to complete the job by the day of Christ Jesus.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ n dan n nyi fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ o piili kusun danbɩrasa fanɛ tɔ mʋ, ee biti ɔ kɩɩ sʋ kɛ ii kpee sʋ naa lʋwɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ Krisito Yesu ii biti o bwii ba mʋ.

eng: I have good reason to think this way about all of you because I keep you in my heart. You are all my partners in Gods grace, both during my time in prison and in the defense and support of the gospel.
local: Kpalɩ fɛɛ saŋa kʋmaa fan maa bʋ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ sʋ mʋ, ɩmʋ ɔkpa nɩn fɛɛ n fɛ falɛ nfɛɛrɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ. Halɩɩ n maa bʋ obu tiisa tɔ gbaa mʋ, abɛɛ n maa kɔ n kun asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ yɛ ɩ yɩlɛ mʋ, fanɛ kpini fan taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ tii Ɩbwaarɛ kusun mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa bwaala mɛ mʋ sʋ.

eng: God is my witness that I feel affection for all of you with the compassion of Christ Jesus.
local: N sʋ Krisito Yesu kebiti mʋ n sa fanɛ kpini, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ yɩlɛ mɛ sʋ fɛɛ n wu fanɛ.

eng: This is my prayer: that your love might become even more and more rich with knowledge and all kinds of insight.
local: Mɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa fanɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fanɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ mʋ kɩ nyɛ akyɔ tii sʋ, kɛ fan dan fanɛ kinyi yɛ kasɛ kunu kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ.

eng: I pray this so that you will be able to decide what really matters and so you will be sincere and blameless on the day of Christ.
local: saamʋ fɛn nyɛ taalɛ bɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋrɔn kyʋn sʋ yɛgɛ ineesi yɛ asɩn pwɩɩsa kʋ man bʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ naa fʋʋ Krisito kɩba mʋ.

eng: I pray that you will then be filled with the fruit of righteousness, which comes from Jesus Christ, in order to give glory and praise to God.
local: Kɛ fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ awaasa kpini i kyiigi lɩɩ Yesu Krisito sʋ waa ɔdan, kɛ ɩ taa bʋnyaa yɛ ayɩn‐bi sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I want you to know that the things that have happened to me have actually advanced the gospel.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, n biti fan bɩɩ fɛɛ, kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tu mɛ mʋ, ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ yɛlɩgɛ kpee ansi tɔ.

eng: The whole Praetorian Guard and everyone else knows that Im in prison for Christ.
local: Lɩɩ kanɩn sʋ mʋ, owura‐kpa akunpu mʋ kpini yɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ nfɩɩ mʋ, ba bɩɩ fɛɛ ba maa tii mɛ obu lɩɩ n maa gyɛ Krisito kɩnyɛ mʋ sʋ.

eng: Most of the brothers and sisters have had more confidence through the Lord to speak the word boldly and bravely because of my jail time.
local: Kpalɩ ba maa tii mɛ obu sʋ mʋ, ɩ yɛgɛ Krisito akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu gaalaagaa ba yɩlɛ kɩnyɩn tɔ bɛɛ tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, yɛgɛ ba man sʋ kufuu.

eng: Some certainly preach Christ with jealous and competitive motives, but others preach with good motives.
local: Nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kesintin nɩn fɛɛ akʋ lɩɩ kayɩɩ basa yɛ kolu biti mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ mɛ sʋ, nɩɩ ba sʋ bɛɛ tɔwɛ asɩn lɩɩ Krisito sʋ, amaa akʋ bɩrɛ ba taa nfɛɛrɛ danbɩrasa nɩn bɛɛ tɔwɛ Krisito asɩn mʋ.

eng: They are motivated by love, because they know that Im put here to give a defense of the gospel.
local: Ba mɛɛ bamʋ bɩrɛ, kebiti sʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa kanɩn, lɩɩ fɛɛ be nyi Ɩbwaarɛ maa taa asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ kukun waa mɛ abaa tɔ.

eng: the others preach Christ because of their selfish ambition. They are insincere, hoping to cause me more pain while Im in prison.
local: Amaa akʋ bɩrɛ, bɛɛ kɩɩ bee biti bamʋ nkʋn lɛɛ sʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔwɛ, man gyɛ nfɛɛrɛ danbɩrasa sʋ, be nyi fɛɛ bɛɛ waa kanɩn nɩn kɛ mɛ awʋrʋfɔ ɩ lɔŋɔ tii sʋ yɛgɛ n tii obu.

eng: What do I think about this? Just this: since Christ is proclaimed in every possible way, whether from dishonest or true motives, Im glad and Ill continue to be glad.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɩnɛ i tiri? Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, nɩɩ nfɛɛrɛ libi nɩɩ ba sʋ oo, abɛɛ kesintin tɔ nɩn oo, ɔkpa kʋmaa anɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, ba tɔwɛ Krisito asɩn mʋ. Nɩɩ lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ mi ansi i gyii. Nɩɩ n biti n kyaga sʋ gyii mi ansi.

eng: Im glad because I know that this will result in my release through your prayers and the help of the Spirit of Jesus Christ.
local: lɩɩ fɛɛ n nyi lɩɩ fanɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ tɔ yɛ Yesu Krisito Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nkyɛtɔ sʋ mʋ, asɩn mʋ nɩɩ i tu mɛ mʋ, ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ n nyɛ mɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ ɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: It is my expectation and hope that I wont be put to shame in anything. Rather, I hope with daring courage that Christs greatness will be seen in my body, now as always, whether I live or die.
local: Mɛ kɩpɩrɛ yɛ tamaa mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, n mɛɛ yɛ n waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kii gyila mɛ ipeeli, amaa n yɩlɛ kɩnyɩn tɔ, saamʋ, lewu tɔ nɩn oo, nkpa tɔ nɩn oo, lɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ yɛ saŋa kʋmaa, asa ba bʋnyaa Krisito lɩɩ mɛ sʋ.

eng: Because for me, living serves Christ and dying is even better.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ mɛɛ mɛ bɩrɛ, n maa tɛ nkpa tɔ falɛ mʋ, n tɛ sa Krisito, nɩɩ n kan wu mɔɔ nɩn, ɩɩ gyɛ tɔnɔ sa mɛ.

eng: If I continue to live in this world, I get results from my work.
local: Amaa nɩɩ n kan n san n tɛ nkpa tɔ mʋ, n taalɛ waa kusun danbɩrasa. Ɩmʋ sʋ nkpa nɩn oo, lewu nɩn oo, n man n nyi kɩmʋ nɩɩ n lɛɛ.

eng: But I dont know what I prefer. Im torn between the two because I want to leave this life and be with Christ, which is far better.
local: N sii n kyɔlɛ ɩmʋ anyɔ nsana. Mɛ kɩpɩrɛ tɔ n gyɛ fɛɛ n lɩɩ kasɛ sʋ nfɩɩ, kɛ n naa kyɩna Krisito asɛ, ɩmʋ ɩ bɔ.

eng: However, its more important for me to stay in this world for your sake.
local: Amaa n maa san n tɛ kasɛ sʋ falɛ mʋ, ɩmʋ bʋrɔn sa fanɛ.

eng: Im sure of this: I will stay alive and remain with all of you to help your progress and the joy of your faith.
local: N maa kɔɔlɛ ɩnɩmʋ gyii mʋ, n nyi fɛɛ n biti n baa n bʋ tɔ, kɛ n kyaga sʋ kyɩna yɛ fanɛ kpini, kɛ i kpiya fanɛ ansi tɔ, kɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ i fuuli fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ.

eng: and to increase your pride in Christ Jesus through my presence when I visit you again.
local: Saamʋ, mɛ kɩbɩla ba kyɩna fanɛ asɛ mʋ, bɔla mɛ sʋ mʋ, fanɛ ansi ii biti i gyii Krisito Yesu tɔ tii sʋ.

eng: Most important, live together in a manner worthy of Christs gospel. Do this, whether I come and see you or Im absent and hear about you. Do this so that you stand firm, united in one spirit and mind as you struggle together to remain faithful to the gospel.
local: Nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, fan yɛgɛ fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ awaasa ɩmaa asɩn danbɩrasa lɩɩ Yesu Krisito sʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ kaapʋ mʋ, ɩ waa kʋkʋlʋn. Saamʋ n kan bʋ fanɛ asɛ oo, n man bʋ fanɛ asɛ oo, n biti n nu fɛɛ fan yɩlɛ tɔ kenken kɔnɔ kʋlʋn tɔ, nɩɩ fan sʋ nfɛɛrɛ kʋlʋn fɛn payɩ ansi lɩɩ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ.

eng: That way, you wont be afraid of anything your enemies do. Your faithfulness and courage are a sign of their coming destruction and your salvation, which is from God.
local: Nɩɩ n biti n bɩla nu yɛ fan man sɩlɛ fanɛ dʋn ana ɔkpa kʋmaa sʋ. Nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩɩ kaapʋ bamʋ fɛɛ bee biti ba wu muuri, kɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ fan nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ɩ ba kanɩn.

eng: God has generously granted you the privilege, not only of believing in Christ but also of suffering for Christs sake.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ man gyɛ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ sa fanɛ ɔkpa yɛ fan ba kɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii nkʋn, amaa awʋrʋfɔ kigyii lɩɩ mʋ sʋ gbaa tii sʋ.

eng: You are having the same struggle that you saw me face and now hear that Im still facing.
local: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ fan ba tii mɛ sʋ kolu mʋ tɔ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan daa kyɩna wu n maa kɔ mʋ, kanɩn kolu kʋlʋn maŋa nɩɩ n san n kɔ falɛ.

eng: Therefore, if there is any encouragement in Christ, any comfort in love, any sharing in the Spirit, any sympathy.
local: Fɛɛ nɩɩ fanɛ abaa ɩ man yɔɔ lɩɩ fan maa bʋ Krisito tɔ sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ sa fanɛ sʋ nɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ ii fuuli fanɛ mʋ, nɩɩ fan naa Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ fan sʋ kɔnɔ kʋlʋn mʋ, nɩɩ fan sʋ kebiti yɛ kʋwɛɛ kuwu sa abaa mʋ.

eng: complete my joy by thinking the same way, having the same love, being united, and agreeing with each other.
local: kanɩn bɩrɛ fan yɛgɛ nɩɩ mi ansi i gyii naa lʋwɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ, fɛɛ fan maa sʋ nfɛɛrɛ kʋlʋn yɛ kebiti kʋlʋn yɛ nɩɩ fan yɩlɛ kʋtɔ kʋlʋn sʋ.

eng: Dont do anything for selfish purposes, but with humility think of others as better than yourselves.
local: Fan man waa kʋtɔ kʋ biti fanɛ nkʋn lɛɛ abɛɛ fan waa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ alala‐sɩn tɔ, amaa fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ, kɛ fan fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɩsa ana ba kyɔ fanɛ.

eng: Instead of each person watching out for their own good, watch out for what is better for others.
local: Fanɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ man kɩɩ biti kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ kyɛ mʋ nkʋn tɔ, amaa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ kyɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: Adopt the attitude that was in Christ Jesus.
local: Ɩ dagaa fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩɩ baa i du fɛɛ Krisito Yesu lɛɛ mʋ.

eng: Though he was in the form of God, he did not consider being equal with God something to exploit.
local: Krisito maa gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kedubi falɛ gbaa mʋ, ɔ man yɩlɛ kɩmʋ sʋ kɩtaa tɔ fɛɛ maa Ɩbwaarɛ ba gyɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

eng: But he emptied himself by taking the form of a slave and by becoming like human beings. When he found himself in the form of a human.
local: Amaa ɔ waa mʋ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ man gyɛ sɛhn, nɩɩ ɔ waa mʋ n‐yɩɩ kɩnyɛ, nɩɩ o be biliŋi nyɩmɩsa, nɩɩ ba wu mʋ maa gyɛ nyɩmɩsa.

eng: he humbled himself by becoming obedient to the point of death, even death on a cross.
local: ɔ bɩya mʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ nyɛ kʋsʋ‐nu sa Ɩbwaarɛ naa fʋʋ lewu tɔ, halɩɩ oyu laasa sʋ lewu.

eng: Therefore, God highly honored him and gave him a name above all names.
local: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋsaa mʋ naa kyɩna sʋsʋ opula kparɛ, nɩɩ ɔ sa mʋ kɩtɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ kyɔ atɩɩ kpini.

eng: so that at the name of Jesus everyone in heaven, on earth, and under the earth might bow.
local: kɛ nyɩmɩsa yɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ sʋsʋ yɛ kasɛ sʋ yɛ kamandɛ tɔ kpini, ba muŋa sun Yesu kɩtɩɩ.

eng: and every tongue confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
local: kɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ o bugi kɔnɔ lɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, Yesu Krisito ɩ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ, kɛ bʋnyaa ɔ baa ɔ gyɛ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ.

eng: Therefore, my loved ones, just as you always obey me, not just when I am present but now even more while I am away, carry out your own salvation with fear and trembling.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana danbɩrasa, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ fanɛ asɛ nɩɩ fan nu sa mɛ saŋa kʋmaa mʋ, halɩɩ nɩɩ n man bʋ fanɛ asɛ gbaa mʋ, fan waa kanɩn tii sʋ gaa. Fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ kɛ fan sɩlɛ mʋ kɛ fan sun kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ mʋ kusun naa lʋwɛ.

eng: God is the one who enables you both to want and to actually live out his good purposes.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa kusun fanɛ tɔ saŋa kʋmaa, nɩɩ ɛɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fɛn waa mʋ kɔkɔlɔ biti yɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɩlɛ sʋ.

eng: Do everything without grumbling and arguing.
local: Kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fɛn waa mʋ, fan man kɔlɩtɛ abɛɛ fan gyii abaa ɩmɔɔrɛ.

eng: so that you may be blameless and pure, innocent children of God surrounded by people who are crooked and corrupt. Among these people you shine like stars in the world.
local: Saamʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ nyɛ asɩn pwɩɩsa yɛ ineesi ɩkʋ, yɛgɛ fan gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana mʋ nɩɩ fan man sʋ alibi kʋ, nɩɩ fan sʋ fan tɛ yɛ nfɛɛrɛ libi wuya ana yɛ asun libi awaapʋ. Nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fan maa ŋalɩgɛ sʋ bamʋ tɔ fɛɛ akyikpebi mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ sʋsʋ ɩɩ ŋalɩgɛ mʋ.

eng: because you hold on to the word of life. This will allow me to say on the day of Christ that I havent run for nothing or worked for nothing.
local: fɛɛ fan maa sʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sa nkpa fɛn sa bamʋ falɛ. Nɩɩ fan kan waa kanɩn mʋ, ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ kɛ n nyɛ kaapʋ mɛ n‐yɩɩ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ Krisito ii biti o bwii ba mʋ, kɛ ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ mɛ kɩkpan n‐yɩɩ yɛ kɩpayɩ ansi waa kusun fanɛ tɔ mʋ, ɩ man waa kɩyan.

eng: But even if I am poured out like a drink offering upon the altar of service for your faith, I am glad. Im glad with all of you.
local: Fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ gyii yɛ kusun sa mʋ mʋ, du nɩn fɛɛ saraga sa mʋ, halɩɩ nɩɩ bee biti ba kyɛɛgɛ mɛ nkalan wʋrɩgɛ tii waa saraga mʋ sʋ, ii biti ɩ waa mɛ ɔkɔn gaa kɛ n maa fanɛ ansi i gyii.

eng: You should be glad about this in the same way. Be glad with me!.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ dagaa fanɛ gbaa fanɛ ɩ waa fanɛ ɔkɔn, kɛ maa fanɛ ansi i gyii.

eng: I hope in the Lord Jesus to send Timothy to see you soon so that I may be encouraged by hearing about you.
local: Nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kebiti tɔ mʋ, n sʋ tamaa fɛɛ ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ kyɛɛrɛɛ n biti n sun Timoti fanɛ asɛ, kɛ n nyɛ nu fanɛ sʋ kɛ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ ɔ nyɛ dɛ mɛ.

eng: I have no one like him. He is a person who genuinely cares about your well-being.
local: N man bɩla n sʋ ɔkʋ fɛɛ mʋ, nɩɩ fanɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ asɩn i tiri mʋ.

eng: All the others put their own business ahead of Jesus Christs business.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ asansa mʋ kpini bamʋ lɛɛ nkʋn nɩɩ bee biti, man gyɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Yesu Krisito lɛɛ.

eng: You know his character, how he labors with me for the gospel like a son works with his father.
local: Amaa fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fan nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ Timoti lɛɛ mʋ daa kaapʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ o tii mɛ sʋ nɩɩ an sun asɩn danbɩrasa kusun mʋ, fɛɛ ɔsɛ yɛ obii.

eng: So he is the one that I hope to send as soon as I find out how things turn out here for me.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ, n sʋ tamaa fɛɛ nɩɩ n dan nyɛ wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ ii kpee sʋ ɩɩ sa mɛ mʋ, n biti n sun mʋ fanɛ asɛ.

eng: I trust in the Lord that I also will visit you soon.
local: Nɩɩ n sʋ tamaa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ tɔ fɛɛ, ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ kyɛɛrɛɛ n gbaa‐gbaa mɛ n biti n ba fanɛ asɛ.

eng: I think it is also necessary to send Epaphroditus to you. He is my brother, coworker, and fellow soldier; and he is your representative who serves my needs.
local: Amaa n fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ ii tiri fɛɛ, n bwii sun anɛ bɩrɩsa Epafuroditu fanɛ asɛ. N maa mʋ an bʋga an waa kusun, nɩɩ an kɔ an kun asɩn danbɩrasa fanɛ asɛ. Nɩɩ mʋ ɩ bɩla ɔ gyɛ fanɛ kabɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan sun, nɩɩ ɔ ba kyɛ mɛ tɔ ɩmʋ nɩɩ i tiri mɛ mʋ.

eng: He misses you all, and he was upset because you heard he was sick.
local: Ɩ gyʋgyʋʋ mʋ yɛ o wu fanɛ kpini, nɩɩ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ ki nyita mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan maa nu yɛ ɛɛ lɔ sʋ mʋ.

eng: In fact, he was so sick that he nearly died. But God had mercy on him—and not just on him but also on me, because his death would have caused me great sorrow.
local: Ɩ gyɛ kesintin fɛɛ ɔ lɔ, halɩɩ ɩ san gbɛrɛɛ o wu. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ wu mʋ kʋwɛɛ nɩɩ man gyɛ mʋ nkʋn, amaa yɛ ngbaa mɛ, nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ n man bɔɔta tɔ tii sʋ.

eng: Therefore, I am sending him immediately so that when you see him again you can be glad and I wont worry.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ gyʋgyʋʋ mɛ gaa fɛɛ n sun mʋ fanɛ asɛ. Saamʋ, nɩɩ fan kan bɩla wu mʋ mʋ, kɛ ɩ waa fanɛ ɔkɔn tii sʋ, kɛ mɛ kɩbɔɔta tɔ mʋ ɩ lʋwɛ.

eng: So welcome him in the Lord with great joy and show great respect for people like him.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan taa kensi‐gyii kɔɔlɛ mʋ abaa anyɔ fɛɛ maa gyɛ fanɛ bɩrɩsa ɔkɔɔlɛ‐gyipu Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu tɔ mʋ. Fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa asa fɛɛ mu kudubi.

eng: He risked his life and almost died for the work of Christ, and he did this to make up for the help you couldnt give me.
local: lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ san gbɛrɛɛ o wu kpalɩ Krisito kusun mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ nkpa taga apʋ, kyɛ mɛ tɔ lɩɩ nkyɛtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan man taalɛ kyɛ mɛ tɔ mʋ.

eng: So then, my brothers and sisters, be glad in the Lord. Its no trouble for me to repeat the same things to you because they will help keep you on track.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ san mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fanɛ ansi i gyii lɩɩ fan maa waa kʋkʋlʋn yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu sʋ mʋ! Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ asɩn tɔɔrɔɔsa sa mɛ fɛɛ n maa bɩla n kyʋrɔɔ atɔ kʋlʋn maŋa n sa fanɛ, amaa ɩ gyɛ nkyɛtɔ sa fanɛ nɩn.

eng: Watch out for the dogs. Watch out for people who do evil things. Watch out for those who insist on circumcision, which is really mutilation.
local: Fan kɩɩ yɛ ɔdan lɩɩ asa mʋ nɩɩ be du fɛɛ igyoonɔ nɩɩ ba gyɛ alibi awaapʋ, nɩɩ ba yɩlɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kɩtɩn sʋ.

eng: We are the circumcision. We are the ones who serve by Gods Spirit and who boast in Christ Jesus. We dont put our confidence in rituals performed on the body.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ sʋ an sun mʋ, nɩɩ an kaapʋ anɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ anɛ kɩwaa kʋkʋlʋn yɛ Krisito Yesu sʋ mʋ, anɛ nɩɩ ba tɩŋɛ iduu kesintin tɔ mʋ. Nɩɩ a man taa anɛ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kɩtɩn sʋ.

eng: though I have good reason to have this kind of confidence. If anyone else has reason to put their confidence in physical advantages, I have even more.
local: Naafɔɔ ngbaa mɛ n sʋ ɔkpa n taa mɛ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ kanɩn awaasa sʋ. Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ɛɛ fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ ɔ sʋ ɔkpa ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kɩtɩn sʋ mʋ, naafɔɔ mɛ ɩ sʋ ɔkpa n kyɔ mʋ.

eng: I was circumcised on the eighth day. I am from the people of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a Hebrew of the Hebrews. With respect to observing the Law, Im a Pharisee.
local: Ba tɩn mɛ oduu kakɛ buruwasapu, nɩɩ n gyɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ obii nɩn, nɩɩ n lɩɩ Bengyamin kebunɔ, nɩɩ n gyɛ Hibriwu obii gbaa‐gbaa, nɩɩ taa lɩɩ nbara mʋ kibuu sʋ mʋ, n kyɩna n gyɛ Farasii nɩn.

eng: With respect to devotion to the faith, I harassed the church. With respect to righteousness under the Law, Im blameless.
local: nɩɩ lɩɩ mɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩkpan Gyiwu kabwaarɛ‐sun tɔ mʋ, n nyanla Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ, nɩɩ lɩɩ ɔkʋ kɩnyɛ ɩkpa kigyiigi lɩɩ Gyiwu nbara mʋ kibuu sʋ mʋ, n man sʋ kilibi ɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: These things were my assets, but I wrote them off as a loss for the sake of Christ.
local: Amaa kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ n daa kɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ tɔnɔ sa mɛ mʋ, nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ lɩɩ Yesu Krisito sʋ mʋ, ɩ man bɩla ɩ gyɛ sɛhn mɛ asɛ.

eng: But even beyond that, I consider everything a loss in comparison with the superior value of knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have lost everything for him, but what I lost I think of as sewer trash, so that I might gain Christ.
local: Man gyɛ ɩmʋ nkʋn, kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ gyɛ mɛ asɛ fɛɛ atɔ fɔyɩsa, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ atɔ kparɛ sa mɛ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ n ba bɩɩ Mɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito. Lɩɩ Krisito sʋ mʋ n pan kʋtɔ kʋmaa, nɩɩ n kɩɩ ɩmʋ fɛɛ kɩgyaakpa sʋ atɔ, kɛ n nyɛ‐nyɛ Krisito.

eng: and be found in him. In Christ I have a righteousness that is not my own and that does not come from the Law but rather from the faithfulness of Christ. It is the righteousness of God that is based on faith.
local: Saamʋ, n waa kʋkʋlʋn yɛ mʋ kakpaa, yɛgɛ n man bɩla n sʋ n gbaa‐gbaa mɛ ɩkpa kikyiigi lɩɩ nbara mʋ kibuu sʋ, amaa ɩkpa kikyiigi mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bɔla kɩkɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii sʋ. Nɩɩ ɩkpa kikyiigi nɩmʋ, mʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ, gyan kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ nɩn.

eng: The righteousness that I have comes from knowing Christ, the power of his resurrection, and the participation in his sufferings. It includes being conformed to his death.
