local: Nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n biti ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, n baa n nyi Krisito yɛ mʋ kelewu kyiŋi ɔlʋn mʋ, kɛ n gyii mʋ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ ɩkʋ, kɛ n ba waa fɛɛ n wu bʋga yɛ mʋ.

eng: so that I may perhaps reach the goal of the resurrection of the dead.
local: saamʋ ɩ waa nɛnɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ nyɛ kyiŋi ngbaa mɛ lɩɩ alewupu tɔ, ba nkpa tɔ.

eng: Its not that I have already reached this goal or have already been perfected, but I pursue it, so that I may grab hold of it because Christ grabbed hold of me for just this purpose.
local: N mɛɛ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ n tɛɛ nyɛ ɩmʋ abɛɛ n tɛɛ wʋla waa kyɛɛkyɛɛ naa lʋwɛ. Amaa n kpan mɛ n‐yɩɩ kɛ n kɩtaa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Krisito Yesu tɩɩ mɛ waa mʋ lɛɛ mʋ tɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I myself dont think Ive reached it, but I do this one thing: I forget about the things behind me and reach out for the things ahead of me.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, n mɛɛ fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ mɛ kɩbaa tɛɛ kɩtaa ɩmʋ. Amaa kʋtɔ kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ n waa mʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ wʋla kyʋn mɛ kamaa mʋ, n tan kɩmʋ sʋ, kɛ n waa aniya fʋʋ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dɛ mi ansi tɔ mʋ.

eng: The goal I pursue is the prize of Gods upward call in Christ Jesus.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ n kpan mɛ n‐yɩɩ nɩn n sɩlɛ ntintin naa lʋwɛ, kɛ n nyɛ‐nyɛ nkpa kakɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla Krisito Yesu sʋ tɩɩ asa mʋ.

eng: So all of us who are spiritually mature should think this way, and if anyone thinks differently, God will reveal it to him or her.
local: Nɩɩ anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an dan kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ mʋ kpini, ɩ dagaa a maa sʋ nfɛɛrɛ kʋlʋn nɩmʋ. Amaa nɩɩ fanɛ akʋ bɛɛ kan bɛɛ fɛ nfɛɛrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ kwɩɩ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ lɛɛ ɩmʋ gbaa kasɛ sa fanɛ.

eng: Only lets live in a way that is consistent with whatever level we have reached.
local: Nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, fan yɛgɛ a kɩtaa kɩkaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ an wʋla nyɛ mʋ nkʋn.

eng: Brothers and sisters, become imitators of me and watch those who live this way—you can use us as models.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, fan kasɛ mɛ awaasa tɔ, kɛ fan pɛɛsɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba tɛ kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ an kaapʋ tɔ yɩla sa fanɛ mʋ.

eng: As I have told you many times and now say with deep sadness, many people live as enemies of the cross.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ, nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ n bɩla n tɔwɛ ɩmʋ yɛ ansikyu gbaa, yɛ asa gaalaagaa bamʋ kakyɩna tɔ du nɩn fɛɛ ba maa kisi Krisito kelewu oyu laasa mʋ sʋ asɩn.

eng: Their lives end with destruction. Their god is their stomach, and they take pride in their disgrace because their thoughts focus on earthly things.
local: Asa anɩmʋ bɩrɛ, bamʋ kala ana bee biti ba muuri, nɩɩ bamʋ ɩtɔ nɩɩ bee sun, nɩɩ bamʋ ipeeli‐sɩn tɔ nɩɩ bɛɛ kʋsaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ. Nɩɩ bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ gyan dulinyaa atɔ wʋlɛ nkʋn sʋ nɩn.

eng: Our citizenship is in heaven. We look forward to a savior that comes from there—the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Amaa anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ, anɛ ayɛ bʋ sʋsʋ nɩn. Nɩɩ ɩ gyʋgyʋʋ anɛ an gyoo anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ lɩɩ tʋtɔ ba mʋ.

eng: He will transform our humble bodies so that they are like his glorious body, by the power that also makes him able to subject all things to himself.
local: Nɩɩ ɔ kan ba mʋ, ee biti ɔ kyɛɛgɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ ii wu falɛ, kɛ ɔ waa ɩmʋ fɛɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ bʋnyaa mʋ. Ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ ɛɛ yɛgɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa kɩ baa kɩ bʋ mʋ kasɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ee biti ɔ taa waa kanɩn.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, and Timothy our brother.
local: Mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ mʋ nɩɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti sʋ nɩɩ n ba waa Krisito Yesu osunpu, yɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa Timoti ɩ kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ.

eng: To the holy and faithful brothers and sisters in Christ in Colossae. Grace and peace to you from God our Father.
local: An kyʋrɔɔ an sa fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa, mʋ nɩɩ fan gyɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa ana nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii, nɩɩ fan bʋ Kolose kadɛ tɔ mʋ. An kʋlɛ anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ mʋ kabwaala yɛ keyuula ɩ baa ɩ bʋ fanɛ asɛ.

eng: We always give thanks to God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, when we pray for you.
local: Saŋa kʋmaa nɩɩ an kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ an sa fanɛ mʋ, an fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ, anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito Mʋ‐Sɛ.

eng: Weve done this since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and your love for all Gods people.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ an nu kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ Krisito Yesu gyii, yɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ sa Ɩbwaarɛ asa kpini mʋ.

eng: You have this faith and love because of the hope reserved for you in heaven. You previously heard about this hope through the true message, the good news.
local: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ kesintin asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ gyankpaa ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, fan nu tamaa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ sʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kebiti mʋ gyan kanɩn tamaa, mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa yɩla sa fanɛ sʋsʋ.

eng: which has come to you. This message has been bearing fruit and growing among you since the day you heard and truly understood Gods grace, in the same way that it is bearing fruit and growing in the whole world.
local: Dulinya nɩmʋ kpini tɔ mʋ, asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ ɩɩ sɔyɩ abi, yɛgɛ ɩɩ yɛlɩgɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ waa fanɛ tɔ, lɩɩ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan nu asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, nɩɩ fan nu Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ kasɛ kesintin tɔ.

eng: You learned it from Epaphras, who is the fellow slave we love and Christs faithful minister for your sake.
local: Epafarasi, anɛ bɩrɩsa Krisito kɩyaafɔlɛ kesintin tɔ mʋ, ɩ ba yɩlɛ anɛ ayaa tɔ tɔwɛ fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ asɩn.

eng: He informed us of your love in the Spirit.
local: nɩɩ mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ anɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ sa fanɛ.

eng: Because of this, since the day we heard about you, we havent stopped praying for you and asking for you to be filled with the knowledge of Gods will, with all wisdom and spiritual understanding.
local: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ, lɩɩ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ an nu fanɛ sʋ mʋ, a man yɛgɛ kɩkʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ sa fanɛ. An kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ ɔ sa fanɛ kanyaasɩn yɛ kasɛ kunu bɔla Kayaayu mʋ sʋ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ fan taalɛ bɩɩ mu kebiti mʋ.

eng: Were praying this so that you can live lives that are worthy of the Lord and pleasing to him in every way: by producing fruit in every good work and growing in the knowledge of God.
local: Nɩɩ an kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kanɩn nɩn kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ fan kyɩna kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ ii biti, nɩɩ ii gyii mu ansi ɔkpa kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ, kɛ fanɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ ɩ bɩya adanbɩrasa kɛ fan dan Ɩbwaarɛ kinyi tɔ.

eng: by being strengthened through his glorious might so that you endure everything and have patience.
local: An kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ ɔ sa fanɛ ɔlʋn kparɛ lɩɩ mʋ bʋnyaa ɔlʋn mʋ tɔ, saamʋ fɛn nyɛ‐nyɛ kenyiita yɛ nkɔlɔ yɩlɛ tɔ. Fan yɛgɛ fanɛ ansi i gyii.

eng: and by giving thanks with joy to the Father. He made it so you could take part in the inheritance, in light granted to Gods holy people.
local: kɛ fan taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fan dagaa mu kuwura‐gyii kɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ tɔ npatɩyɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ ɛɛ sa mʋ asa mʋ.

eng: He rescued us from the control of darkness and transferred us into the kingdom of the Son he loves.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ ɩ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ lɩɩ kitentenbiri ɔlʋn mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ taa anɛ ba mu‐Bii bitisa mu kuwura‐gyii tɔ.

eng: He set us free through the Son and forgave our sins.
local: Mʋ ɩ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa anɛ alibi kɛɛ anɛ.

eng: The Son is the image of the invisible God, the one who is first over all creation.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ man pɩɩta wu mʋ mʋ, mʋ kudubi ɩ gyɛ Krisito Yesu, Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ bʋ tɔ pɔyɩ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa.

eng: Because all things were created by him: both in the heavens and on the earth, the things that are visible and the things that are invisible. Whether they are thrones or powers, or rulers or authorities, all things were created through him and for him.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla mʋ sʋ nɩn tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa, sʋsʋ atɔ yɛ kasɛ sʋ atɔ, ɩmʋ nɩɩ an wu yɛ ansi yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ a mɛɛ wu yɛ ansi, awuragya, yɛ n‐yaayu libi, yɛ awuragyipu yɛ alʋlʋnpʋ. Mʋ sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa, nɩɩ ɔ taa ɩmʋ kpini waa mʋ abaa tɔ.

eng: He existed before all things, and all things are held together in him.
local: Ɔ bʋ tɔ pɔyɩ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ, nɩɩ mʋ kɩpɩrɛ sʋ nɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa kɩ bʋ tɔ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

eng: He is the head of the body, the church, who is the beginning, the one who is firstborn from among the dead so that he might occupy the first place in everything.
local: Nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kumu sa mʋ kʋbʋ mʋ kpini, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ kumu gyɛ sa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ. Nɩɩ mʋ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ sʋ nkpa, yɛ ɔgyankpaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ o kyiŋi lɩɩ lewu tɔ, kɛ ɔ baa ɔ gyɛ ɔgyankpaapʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: Because all the fullness of God was pleased to live in him.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩpɩrɛ nɩn fɛɛ mu kedubi mʋ kpini ɩ baa ɩ bʋ mu‐bii mʋ tɔ.

eng: and he reconciled all things to himself through him— whether things on earth or in the heavens. He brought peace through the blood of his cross.
local: Mu‐Bii Yesu kelewu oyu laasa mʋ sʋ, yɛ nkalan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kyɛɛgɛ mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla sʋ taa lɔŋɔ sʋsʋ yɛ kasɛ sʋ atɔ mʋ kpini yɛ mʋ nsana.

eng: Once you were alienated from God and you were enemies with him in your minds, which was shown by your evil actions.
local: Saŋa kʋ tɔ mʋ, naafɔɔ fanɛ kamaa nɩɩ fan taa kaapʋ Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ lɩɩ fanɛ alibi sʋ mʋ fan kisi mʋ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ.

eng: But now he has reconciled you by his physical body through death, to present you before God as a people who are holy, faultless, and without blame.
local: Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla Krisito mʋ nɩɩ o be biliŋi nyɩmɩsa nɩɩ o wu mʋ sʋ, lɔŋɔ fanaa mʋ nsana. Ɔ waa ɩnɩmʋ kɛ fan ba waa asa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, yɛgɛ fan man sʋ ineesi yɛ asɩn pwɩɩsa kʋ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

eng: But you need to remain well established and rooted in faith and not shift away from the hope given in the good news that you heard. This message has been preached throughout all creation under heaven. And I, Paul, became a servant of this good news.
local: nɩɩ fan kan kyaga sʋ kɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii, nɩɩ fan yɩlɛ tɔ kenken nɩɩ fan man kyɛɛgɛ lɩɩ tamaa mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ lɩɩ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ tɔ mʋ. Asɩn danbɩrasa maŋa nɩɩ fan nu, nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ sa ɔsa kʋmaa nɩmʋ kasɛ sʋ, nɩɩ mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ n baa n gyɛ kusun mʋ osunpu falɛ.

eng: Now Im happy to be suffering for you. Im completing what is missing from Christs sufferings with my own body. Im doing this for the sake of his body, which is the church.
local: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ mi ansi i gyii fɛɛ n man gyii awʋrʋfɔ sa fanɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ mɛ awʋrʋfɔ tɔ mʋ, ngbaa mɛ n wu Krisito awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ san mʋ sa mʋ asa, mʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ mʋ kʋbʋ kpini mʋ.

eng: I became a servant of the church by Gods commission, which was given to me for you, in order to complete Gods word.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ waa mɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ kɩyaafɔlɛ, nɩɩ o sun mɛ yɛ n ba waa mu kusun. Kusun mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ n lɛɛ mʋ asɩn mʋ kpini kasɛ sa fanɛ.

eng: Im completing it with a secret plan that has been hidden for ages and generations but which has now been revealed to his holy people.
local: Asɩn baalasa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ man lɛɛ ɩmʋ ifuli sa dɩdaa abi, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ ɔ lɛɛ ɩmʋ kaapʋ mʋ asa.

eng: God wanted to make the glorious riches of this secret plan known among the Gentiles, which is Christ living in you, the hope of glory.
local: Ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩpɩrɛ tɔ fɛɛ ɔ lɛɛ asɩn baalasa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ bʋnyaa asɩn mʋ kaapʋ ndɛndɛmandɛ asa kpini. Asɩn baalasa mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ Krisito maa bʋ fanɛ tɔ mʋ, fan sʋ tamaa yɛ bʋnyaa lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

eng: This is what we preach as we warn and teach every person with all wisdom so that we might present each one mature in Christ.
local: An taa kanyaasɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa anɛ mʋ an tɔwɛ abwaarɛsɩn, nɩɩ an da ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kumu tɔ, yɛgɛ an kaapʋ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kɛ a taa mʋ waa Ɩbwaarɛ abaa tɔ fɛɛ ɔ nyɛ dan kɩkɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii mʋ tɔ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

eng: I work hard and struggle for this goal with his energy, which works in me powerfully.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n taa ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Krisito sa mɛ nɩɩ ii sun kusun mɛ tɔ mʋ, n kpan mɛ n‐yɩɩ n sun mʋ.

eng: I want you to know how much I struggle for you, for those in Laodicea, and for all who havent known me personally.
local: N biti fan wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ n mɔɔ mɛ n‐yɩɩ gaa n sa fanɛ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Lawodisiya kadɛ tɔ yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩta wu mɛ yɛ ansi mʋ.

eng: My goal is that their hearts would be encouraged and united together in love so that they might have all the riches of assurance that come with understanding, so that they might have the knowledge of the secret plan of God, namely Christ.
local: N waa ɩnɩmʋ kɛ ɩ waa fanɛ kpini ɔlʋn tɔ, kɛ fan taa kebiti waa kɔnɔ kʋlʋn. Falɛ sʋ mʋ, fen biti fan nu asɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ naa lʋwɛ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ fan bɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn baalasa mʋ, ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ Krisito gbaa‐gbaa mʋ.

eng: All the treasures of wisdom and knowledge are hidden in him.
local: Mʋ nkʋn tɔ nɩɩ kanyaasɩn yɛ kinyi lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ kpini baala.

eng: Im telling you this so that no one deceives you with convincing arguments.
local: N tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ nɩn kɛ ɔkʋ ɔ man nyɛ taa kɔnɔ tɔ kɔn asɩn pʋpwɛ kʋ ba pɩna fanɛ.

eng: because even though I am absent physically, Im with you in spirit. Im happy to see the discipline and stability of your faith in Christ.
local: Halɩɩ n maa man bʋ fanɛ asɛ falɛ gbaa mʋ, mɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ gyan fanɛ sʋ, nɩɩ ɩ waa mɛ ɔkɔn n maa nu fɛɛ fɛn waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa, nɩɩ fɛn sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ Krisito gyii mʋ tɔ kenken.

eng: So live in Christ Jesus the Lord in the same way as you received him.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ, fɛɛ fan maa tɛɛ kɔɔlɛ Krisito Yesu fɛɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ fanɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ mʋ, fan kyɩna yɛ mʋ kanɩn.

eng: Be rooted and built up in him, be established in faith, and overflow with thanksgiving just as you were taught.
local: Kɛ fan nyɛ ilin yɩlɛ mʋ tɔ kɛ fan dan, kɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii Krisito tɔ mʋ ɩ waa ɔlʋn tii sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba kaapʋ fanɛ mʋ. Kɛ fan taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ gaa.

eng: See to it that nobody enslaves you with philosophy and foolish deception, which conform to human traditions and the way the world thinks and acts rather than Christ.
local: Fan baa fan da sʋ kɛ fan man yɛgɛ akʋ ba taa nyɩmɩsa kanyaasɩn yɛ antɩŋɛsa pɩna fanɛ biliŋi bamʋ anyɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ bamʋ kɩkaapʋ mʋ gyɛ anaana‐tɔ yɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ n‐yaayu libi lɛɛ nɩn, nɩɩ ɩ man lɩɩ Krisito asɛ.

eng: All the fullness of deity lives in Christs body.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Krisito Yesu tɔ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ laalaamuu mʋ kpini bʋ.

eng: And you have been filled by him, who is the head of every ruler and authority.
local: nɩɩ fan naa Krisito kɩwaa kʋkʋlʋn sʋ mʋ, fan nyɛ mʋ nkpa nɩmʋ lʋwɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ kumu sa awura yɛ alʋnpʋ kpini.

eng: In him you were also circumcised with a circumcision not administered by human hands. The circumcision of Christ is realized in the stripping away of the whole self dominated by sin.
local: Fan naa Krisito kɩwaa kʋkʋlʋn sʋ mʋ, ɩ waa nɩn fɛɛ Krisito maa tɩŋɛ fanɛ iduu mʋ, nɩɩ man gyɛ nyɩmɩsa ɩ taa abaa tɩŋɛ fanɛ. Krisito kɩtɩŋɛ fanɛ iduu mʋ, ɩ kaapʋ nɩn fɛɛ ɔ lɛɛ fanɛ lɩɩ alibi ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ mʋ.

eng: You were buried with him through baptism and raised with him through faith in the power of God, who raised him from the dead.
local: Ba maa gyee fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee mʋ, i du nɩn fɛɛ ba maa pula fanɛ tii Krisito sʋ, nɩɩ ba bɩla kyiŋi fanɛ tii mʋ sʋ ba nkpa tɔ mʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa kyiŋi mʋ ba nkpa tɔ mʋ gyii.

eng: When you were dead because of the things you had done wrong and because your body wasnt circumcised, God made you alive with Christ and forgave all the things you had done wrong.
local: Fan kyɩna fan du nɩn fɛɛ alewupu mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ lɩɩ fanɛ alibi, yɛ fanɛ kɩman buu Ɩbwaarɛ nbara sʋ. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ kyiŋi fanɛ tii Krisito sʋ ba nkpa tɔ. Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa anɛ alibi kpini kɛɛ anɛ.

eng: He destroyed the record of the debt we owed, with its requirements that worked against us. He canceled it by nailing it to the cross.
local: nɩɩ ɔ kpayɩ kʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ yɩla lɩɩ anɛ kɩman buu nbara mʋ sʋ mʋ. Ɔ lɛɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ i du nɩn fɛɛ ba da ɩmʋ tii Krisito sʋ mata oyu laasa mʋ sʋ.

eng: When he disarmed the rulers and authorities, he exposed them to public disgrace by leading them in a triumphal parade.
local: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla Krisito kelewu oyu laasa mʋ kɔɔlɛ n‐yaayu libi yɛ alʋnpʋ mʋ ɔlʋn kpini, nɩɩ ɔ ŋaabaa bamʋ sakyɔ tɔ kaapʋ fɛɛ o gyii bamʋ sʋ.

eng: So dont let anyone judge you about eating or drinking or about a festival, a new moon observance, or sabbaths.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan man yɛgɛ ɔkʋ o bun fanɛ kʋpwɛ lɩɩ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ fen gyii abɛɛ fen nuu mʋ sʋ, abɛɛ fan maa mee gyii kesu kɔnɔ kʋ yɛ ɔbwaayɩ pʋpwɛ kakɛ gyankpaasa abɛɛ Gyiwu abi kakɛ fʋʋtɛsa akɛ kensi‐gyii.

eng: These religious practices are only a shadow of what was coming—the body that cast the shadow is Christ.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ sɩnkaala sa atɔ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ ba mʋ. Nɩɩ atɔ gbaa‐gbaa maŋa ɩ gyɛ Krisito nɩn.

eng: Dont let anyone who wants to practice harsh self-denial and worship angels rob you of the prize. They go into detail about what they have seen in visions and have become unjustifiably arrogant by their selfish way of thinking.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan man kan yɛgɛ ɔkʋ o bun fanɛ kʋpwɛ tɔwɛ yɛ fan man dagaa kʋkɔka mʋ, lɩɩ fan maa man bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ nɩɩ fan mee sun Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ fɛɛ mʋ mʋ. Kanɩn ɔsa maŋa ɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ ɔ nyɛ ansi sʋ kɩlɛɛkaapʋ mʋ, amaa nyɩmɩsa nfɛɛrɛ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ ɛɛ waa alala‐sɩn kanɩn.

eng: They dont stay connected to the head. The head nourishes and supports the whole body through the joints and ligaments, so the body grows with a growth that is from God.
local: Nɩɩ ɔ man bɩla taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ tii Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ kumu mʋ sa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ kpini. Nɩɩ Krisito ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ mʋ kpini kɩɩ nyɛ ɔlʋn, ikyini yɛ ɩkyagakpa mʋ kpini bʋga kɩtaa abaa, nɩɩ ɩɩ dan kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti.

eng: If you died with Christ to the way the world thinks and acts, why do you submit to rules and regulations as though you were living in the world?.
local: Lɩɩ fan maa wu tii Krisito sʋ nɩɩ fan barɩgɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ dulinyaa nɩmʋ atɔ kaapʋsa tɔ falɛ mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ fan san fan bʋ kakyɩna dɩdaa mʋ tɔ nɩɩ fan buu ɩmʋ ɩkpa?.

eng: Dont handle! Dont taste! Dont touch.
local: Kanɩn akaapʋsa mʋ akʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, Fan man kɩtaa kɩnɩmʋ tɔ! Fan man gyii ɩnɩmʋ! Fan man mata ɩnɩmʋ.

eng: All these things cease to exist when they are used. Such rules are human commandments and teachings.
local: Atɔ kisisa mʋ kpini ii biti ɩ ba kyʋn. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ asa kɩkaapʋ nɩn.

eng: They look like they are wise with this self-made religion and their self-denial by the harsh treatment of the body, but they are no help against indulging in selfish immoral behavior.
local: Kanɩn nbara mʋ du nɩn fɛɛ kanyaasɩn maa bʋ ɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kpan bamʋ n‐yɩɩ bɛɛ waa fɛɛ ba maa sun Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ gaa mʋ, nɩɩ bɛɛ pɩna yɛ bɛɛ bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ, nɩɩ bɛɛ waa bamʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ awʋrʋfɔ. Amaa ɩnɩmʋ kpini mɛɛ kyɛ bamʋ tɔ kɛ ba yɛgɛ alibi kɩwaa.

eng: Masters, be just and fair to your slaves, knowing that you yourselves have a master in heaven.
local: Kasɛ sʋ anyɩrɩpɛ, fan kɩɩ fanɛ anyɛ sʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn, lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan nyi fan maa sʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ sʋsʋ.

eng: Keep on praying and guard your prayers with thanksgiving.
local: Fan nyɛ saŋa sa kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ saŋa kʋmaa, kɛ fan baa fan da sʋ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ tɔ, kɛ fan taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: At the same time, pray for us also. Pray that God would open a door for the word so we can preach the secret plan of Christ—which is why Im in chains.
local: Kɛ fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa anɛ gbaa‐gbaa anɛ fɛɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ o bugi ɔkpa sa mʋ asɩn mʋ kɩtɔwɛ, kɛ a nyɛ ɔkpa tɔwɛ asɩn baalasa lɩɩ Krisito sʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n tii obu falɛ.

eng: Pray that I might be able to make it as clear as I ought to when I preach.
local: Fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ fɛɛ n taalɛ n bugi tɔ n tɔwɛ asɩn mʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ n tɔwɛ mʋ.

eng: Act wisely toward outsiders, making the most of the opportunity.
local: Fan bɩɩ kanyaasɩn lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan kyɩna yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Krisito abuupu mʋ, nɩɩ ɔkpa kʋ kan bugi sa fanɛ yɛ fan tɔwɛ bamʋ Krisito asɩn mʋ, fan tɔwɛ ɩmʋ sa bamʋ.

eng: Your speech should always be gracious and sprinkled with insight so that you may know how to respond to every person.
local: Fan yɛgɛ fanɛ ntɔwɛ ɩ baa ɩ bʋkɔn fɛɛ nfɔlɛ, kɛ fan bɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan lɛɛ kɔnɔ sa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taasɛ fanɛ asɩn mʋ.

eng: Tychicus, our dearly loved brother, faithful minister, and fellow slave in the Lord, will inform you about everything that has happened to me.
local: Anɛ bɩrɩsa Tikiku danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ kesintin obuupu yɛ kɩyaafɔlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kusun tɔ mʋ, ii biti ɔ ba tɔwɛ fanɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n du nfɩɩ.

eng: This is why I sent him to you, so that youll know all about us and so he can encourage your hearts.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n sun mʋ fanɛ asɛ, kɛ fan nyɛ bɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an du nfɩɩ, kɛ ɔ bɛ tɔwɛ saŋɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ.

eng: I sent him with Onesimus, our faithful and dearly loved brother, who is one of you. They will let you know about everything here.
local: Maa anɛ bɩrɩsa danbɩrasa Krisito ɔkɔɔlɛ‐gyipu Onesimu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ fanɛ ayɛ obii mʋ, nɩɩ n sun mʋ fanɛ asɛ. Bamʋ ii biti ba tɔwɛ fanɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ii kpee sʋ nfɩɩ kpini.

eng: Aristarchus, my fellow prisoner, says hello to you. So does Mark, Barnabas cousin .
local: Mɛ bɩrɩsa Arisitako mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ mɛ asɛ obu tiisa tɔ mʋ ɩɩ fwaala fanɛ. Kanɩn nɩɩ Banabasi mu‐supu Maki gbaa ɩɩ fwaala fanɛ. N wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ nɩɩ ɔ kan ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, fan kɩɩ mʋ sʋ danbɩrasa.

eng: Jesus, called Justus, also says hello. These are my only fellow workers for Gods kingdom who are Jewish converts. They have been an encouragement to me.
local: Gyosuwa mʋ nɩɩ ba bɩla bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Gyusitusi mʋ gbaa ɩ fwaala fanɛ. Bamʋ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ nɩɩ ba tii mɛ bɩrɩsa ana sʋ, nɩɩ ba gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii mʋ tɔ asunsunpu, nɩɩ ba kyɛ mɛ tɔ yɛ ɔdan.

eng: Epaphras, who is one of you, says hello. Hes a slave of Christ Jesus who always wrestles for you in prayers so that you will stand firm and be fully mature and complete in the entire will of God.
local: Epafarasi mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ fanɛ ayɛ abi nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Yesu Krisito kɩyaafɔlɛ mʋ ɩɩ fwaala fanɛ. Saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ ɛɛ kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gaa ɛɛ sa fanɛ fɛɛ, ɔ waa fanɛ kɛ fan yɩlɛ tɔ kenken, kɛ fan dan kɛ fanɛ Krisito kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii ɩ nyɛ ilin gaa, kɛ fan waa Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti sʋ.

eng: I can vouch for him that he has worked hard for you and for those in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
local: Ngbaagbaa mɛ n nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ Epafarasi taa fanɛ asɩn yɛ Lawodisiya abi yɛ Hirapoli abi asɩn waa mʋ asɩn tirisa, nɩɩ ee wu fanɛ lewu.

eng: Luke, the dearly loved physician, and Demas say hello.
local: Anɛ kyɛmɩnɛ danbɩrasa Luka mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ ɔkyɛpʋ mʋ, yɛ Demasi bɛɛ fwaala fanɛ.

eng: Say hello to the brothers and sisters in Laodicea, along with Nympha and the church that meets in her house.
local: Ngbaa mɛ n fwaala anɛ bɩrɩsa ana mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Lawodisiya mʋ, yɛ ɔkyɩɩ Nimfa yɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ gyaŋɛ mʋ ayɛ mʋ.

eng: After this letter has been read to you publicly, make sure that the church in Laodicea reads it and that you read the one from Laodicea.
local: Nɩɩ ba kan kalɛ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ sa fanɛ lʋwɛ mʋ, fan kɩɩ sʋ kɛ ba kalɛ ɔwʋlɛ maŋa sa Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Lawodisiya kadɛ tɔ mʋ gbaa, kɛ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan kalɛ ɔwʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ naa sa Lawodisiya abi mʋ.

eng: And tell Archippus, See to it that you complete the ministry that you received in the Lord.
local: Fan tɔwɛ Akipusi yɛ, Kɩɩ sʋ kɛ fʋ lʋwɛ kusun mʋ nɩɩ fʋ nyɛ lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ asɛ mʋ.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting personally. Remember that Im in prison. Grace be with you.
local: Mɛ Pɔɔlɩ ɩ taa mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ kɩbaa kyʋrɔɔ afwaala nɩmʋ n sa fanɛ. Fan man tan sʋ fɛɛ n san n bʋ obu kitii tɔ. Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ bwaala fanɛ.

eng: Therefore, if you were raised with Christ, look for the things that are above where Christ is sitting at Gods right side.
local: Lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa kyiŋi fanɛ tii Krisito sʋ ba nkpa tɔ sʋ mʋ, fan taa fanɛ nkɔlɔ gyaga sʋsʋ atɔ sʋ, katɩn mʋ nɩɩ Krisito tɛ kuwura‐gya sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ gyisa sʋ mʋ.

eng: Think about the things above and not things on earth.
local: Fan taa fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ gyaga sʋsʋ atɔ sʋ, man gyɛ kasɛ sʋ atɔ sʋ.

eng: You died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan wu sa fanɛ kakyɩna dɩdaa mʋ, nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ fanɛ nkpa ɩ baala tii Krisito sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

eng: When Christ, who is your life, is revealed, then you also will be revealed with him in glory.
local: Nɩɩ Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ fanɛ nkpa kan lɩɩ ifuli mʋ, fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fen biti fan lɩɩ ifuli yɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ.

eng: So put to death the parts of your life that belong to the earth, such as sexual immorality, moral corruption, lust, evil desire, and greed .
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kasɛ sʋ kɩbaabʋtɔ libi kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ, fɛɛ abawʋlɛ kebiti, yɛ agyaga‐sɩn, yɛ kanyɩn yɛ kakyɩɩ biti kayɛlɩgɛ, yɛ onsi‐payɩ libi, yɛ mɛ nkʋn n nyɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kusun ɩdakpa mʋ.

eng: The wrath of God is coming upon disobedient people because of these things.
local: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ agbʋ lala mʋ ɩ bʋ ɔkpa ɩɩ ba.

eng: You used to live this way, when you were alive to these things.
local: Naafɔɔ kanɩn nɩɩ fan kyɩna fɛn waa, nɩɩ alibi mʋ ii gyii fanɛ sʋ.

eng: But now set aside these things, such as anger, rage, malice, slander, and obscene language.
local: Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ, n tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ kpini tɔ, fɛɛ agbʋ yɛ agbʋ libi, yɛ kekisi yɛ nyɩmɩsa kɩtɩɩ‐nyita yɛ ntɔwɛ gyaga mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ lɩɩ fanɛ nnɔ tɔ.

eng: Dont lie to each other. Take off the old human nature with its practices.
local: Fan man tɩn antɩŋɛsa sa abaa, lɩɩ fan maa lɛɛ fanɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ dɩdaa yɛ ɩmʋ awaasa libi tʋʋ mʋ.

eng: and put on the new nature, which is renewed in knowledge by conforming to the image of the one who created it.
local: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ anɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ biliŋi nyɩmɩsa pʋpwɛ nɩn, nɩɩ fan baa fan du fɛɛ fanɛ ɔtʋʋpʋ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, kɛ fan ba bɩɩ mʋ danbɩrasa.

eng: In this image there is neither Greek nor Jew, circumcised nor uncircumcised, barbarian, Scythian, slave nor free, but Christ is all things and in all people.
local: Lɩɩ kɩbaabʋtɔ pʋpwɛ nɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, ɩ man bɩla i tiri fɛɛ ɔkʋ gyɛ Giriki obii abɛɛ Gyiwu obii, abɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba tɩn iduu abɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man tɩn iduu. Ɩ man tiri fɛɛ ɔkʋ gyɛ ɔfɔ kyilim abɛɛ ɔkʋ ansi ɩ man bugi, abɛɛ ɔkʋ gyɛ kɩnyɛ abɛɛ ɔkʋ man gyɛ kɩnyɛ, amaa ɩmʋ nɩɩ i tiri mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ Krisito ɩ gyɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa, nɩɩ mʋ ɩ bʋ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu kpini tɔ.

eng: Therefore, as Gods choice, holy and loved, put on compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience.
local: Kanɩn sʋ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa tɩɩ fanɛ ba waa mʋ asa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa fanɛ mʋ, fan taa kʋwɛɛ kuwu, yɛ kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa, yɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ kɩbɩya, yɛ bwahn kɩwaa yɛ kenyiita bun fɛɛ kaalɛ.

eng: Be tolerant with each other and, if someone has a complaint against anyone, forgive each other. As the Lord forgave you, so also forgive each other.
local: Nɩɩ fanɛ bɩrɩsa kan waa fanɛ alibi mʋ, fan kpala ɩmʋ sʋ, kɛ fan taa alibi kɛɛ abaa. Fan taa kɛɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ taa kɛɛ fanɛ mʋ.

eng: And over all these things put on love, which is the perfect bond of unity.
local: Nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ kpini kumu ɩ gyɛ kɩnyɛ kebiti sa abaa, kɩmʋ ɩɩ bɩɩtɛ ɩmʋ kpini bʋga waa kɔnɔ kʋlʋn kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

eng: The peace of Christ must control your hearts—a peace into which you were called in one body. And be thankful people.
local: Lɩɩ fan maa gyɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kʋlʋn abi sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ fanɛ ba waa Krisito keyuula mʋ tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ keyuula mʋ ki gyii kuwura fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ. Fan taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: The word of Christ must live in you richly. Teach and warn each other with all wisdom by singing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs. Sing to God with gratitude in your hearts.
local: Fan yɛgɛ Krisito asɩn mʋ ɩ kyɩna fanɛ tɔ gaa. Fan taa kanyaasɩn kaapʋ abaa kɛ fan da abaa amu tɔ. Fan taa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩlʋn yɛ abwaarɛsɩn ɩlʋn yɛ Kayaayu kɩlɛɛkaapʋ ɩlʋn fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ.

eng: Whatever you do, whether in speech or action, do it all in the name of the Lord Jesus and give thanks to God the Father through him.
local: Nɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fɛn waa abɛɛ fɛn tɔwɛ mʋ, fan waa ɩmʋ kpini Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ, kɛ fan bɔla mʋ sʋ taa afwaala sa Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: Wives, submit to your husbands in a way that is appropriate in the Lord.
local: Akyɩɩ‐kilipu, fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa fanɛ‐kuli ana, kanɩn ɩ dagaa Krisito ɔkyɩɩ maa waa.

eng: Husbands, love your wives and dont be harsh with them.
local: Anyɩn‐kilipu, fan nyɛ kebiti sa fanɛ‐ka ana kɛ fan man ŋmanyan bamʋ.

eng: Children, obey your parents in everything, because this pleases the Lord.
local: Nbii, fan nu sa fanɛ akʋʋgɛpʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩnɩmʋ ii gyii Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu mu ansi.

eng: Parents, dont provoke your children in a way that ends up discouraging them.
local: Akʋgɛpʋ fan man waa fanɛ‐bii ana agbʋ, man gyɛ kanɩn bamʋ abaa ii biti ɩ yɔɔ.

eng: Slaves, obey your masters on earth in everything. Dont just obey like people pleasers when they are watching. Instead, obey with the single motivation of fearing the Lord.
local: Anyɛ, fan nu sa fanɛ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ kasɛ sʋ nfɩɩ mʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ. Man gyɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ ansi ɩ gyan fanɛ sʋ mʋ nkʋn nɩɩ fan waa, kɛ fan nyɛ kʋwɛɛ kuwu lɩɩ bamʋ asɛ. Amaa fan nu sa bamʋ kesintin tɔ lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ, lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ bɛɛrɛɛ sʋ.

eng: Whatever you do, do it from the heart for the Lord and not for people.
local: Kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fɛn waa mʋ, fan taa fanɛ nkɔlɔ kpini waa ɩmʋ fɛɛ fan maa waa ɩmʋ fɛn sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ, nɩɩ man gyɛ asa.

eng: You know that you will receive an inheritance as a reward. You serve the Lord Christ.
local: fɛɛ fan nyi fan maa biti fan nyɛ kʋkɔka mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ taa yɩla mʋ asa mʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Krisito ɩ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ nɩɩ fen sun mʋ.

eng: But evildoers will receive their reward for their evil actions. There is no discrimination.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa alibi mu alibi kʋkɔka nɩɩ ee biti ɔ nyɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ man sʋ nmɛɛgɛ tɔ.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy. To the Thessalonians church that is in God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ. Grace and peace to all of you.
local: Mɛ Pɔɔlɩ maa Silasi yɛ Timoti ɩ kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ an sa fanɛ Krisito abi kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ fan bʋ Tesalonika mʋ, nɩɩ fan gyɛ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito asa mʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala yɛ kayɩɩ‐yuuli kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ asɛ.

eng: We always thank God for all of you when we mention you constantly in our prayers.
local: Saŋa kʋmaa an fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ, nɩɩ an nyiŋi fanɛ kpini sʋ anɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ tɔ.

eng: This is because we remember your work that comes from faith, your effort that comes from love, and your perseverance that comes from hope in our Lord Jesus Christ in the presence of our God and Father.
local: Anɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ anɛ‐Sɛ mʋ, an nyiŋi fanɛ sʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan sun kusun lɩɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ, yɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fan taa waa kusun bʋlʋnsa, yɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ yɩlɛ tɔ lɩɩ tamaa mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito tɔ mʋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you are loved by God, and we know that he has chosen you.
local: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, an nyi fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti sʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ fanɛ waa mʋ lɛɛ.

eng: We know this because our good news didnt come to you just in speech but also with power and the Holy Spirit and with deep conviction. You know as well as we do what kind of people we were when we were with you, which was for your sake.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ an man taa asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ ba tɔwɛ sa fanɛ kɔnɔ tɔ nkʋn nɩn. Amaa an ba tɔwɛ fanɛ asɩn mʋ yɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ ɔlʋn tɔ, nɩɩ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ asɩn mʋ gyii yɛ ɩ gyɛ kesintin. Nɩɩ fan wu kakyɩna danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ an kyɩna yɛ fanɛ, kɛ ɩ kyɛ fanɛ tɔ.

eng: You became imitators of us and of the Lord when you accepted the message that came from the Holy Spirit with joy in spite of great suffering.
local: Fan kasɛ anɛ yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ awaasa tɔ, ɩmʋ sʋ halɩɩ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan bʋ ɩmʋ tɔ gbaa mʋ, fan kɔɔlɛ asɩn mʋ yɛ kensi‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ sa fanɛ mʋ.

eng: As a result you became an example to all the believers in Macedonia and Achaia.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Masedoniya yɛ Akiya mʋ kpini bɛɛ kɩɩ fanɛ awaasa nɩɩ bɛɛ bɩɩla ɩmʋ.

eng: The message about the Lord rang out from you, not only in Macedonia and Achaia but in every place. The news about your faithfulness to God has spread so that we dont even need to mention it.
local: Nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ asɩn mʋ ɩ man yalagɛ lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ kpee Masedoniya yɛ Akiya nkʋn, amaa fanɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii asɩn mʋ, ɩ yalagɛ kpee katɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ. Kanɩn sʋ ɩ man daaga fɛɛ a bɩla tɔwɛ kʋtɔ kʋ lɩɩ ɩmʋ sʋ.

eng: People tell us about what sort of welcome we had from you and how you turned to God from idols. As a result, you are serving the living and true God.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ bamʋ gbaa‐gbaa bamʋ bɛɛ tɔwɛ kɩfɔ kɩtaa mʋ nɩɩ fan kɩtaa anɛ. Bɛɛ tɔwɛ asa kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan kyɛɛgɛ lɩɩ ɩdakpa kusun tɔ, ba sun Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ nkpa yɛ kesintin mʋ.

eng: and you are waiting for his Son from heaven. His Son is Jesus, who is the one he raised from the dead and who is the one who will rescue us from the coming wrath.
local: Nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔwɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan gyoo Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii Yesu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kusaa mʋ lɩɩ lewu tɔ, mʋ kibwii lɩɩ sʋsʋ ba mʋ asɩn. Nɩɩ mʋ ɩɩ kɔɔlɛ anɛ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ agbʋ lala mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ ba asa sʋ mʋ.

eng: So when we couldnt stand it any longer, we thought it was a good idea to stay on in Athens by ourselves.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ a maa wu yɛ a man bɩla yɛ a taalɛ waa kʋtɔ kʋ lɩɩ ɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, an waa anɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ anɛ nkʋn an sii Antensi kadɛ tɔ nfɩɩ.

eng: and we sent you Timothy, who is our brother and Gods coworker in the good news about Christ. We sent him to strengthen and encourage you in your faithfulness.
local: Nɩɩ an sun anɛ‐supu Timoti mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa Ɩbwaarɛ kusun obuupu mʋ nɩɩ anaa mʋ an tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa lɩɩ Krisito sʋ. An sun mʋ yɛ ɔ ba waa fanɛ ɔlʋn tɔ yɛ aniya tɔ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ.

eng: We didnt want any of you to be shaken by these problems. You know very well that we were meant to go through this.
local: Kɛ kanyanla mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ ba fanɛ sʋ falɛ, ɩ man yɛgɛ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ o bwii kamaa. Fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fanɛ fen nyi fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti nɩɩ kanyanla nɩmʋ ɩ ba anɛ sʋ.

eng: In fact, when we were with you, we kept on predicting that we were going to face problems exactly like what happened, as you know.
local: Kesintin tɔ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ an bʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ, an taalɛ an tɔwɛ fanɛ fɛɛ an biti an nyɛ kanyanla. Nɩɩ ɩ ba kanɩn kesintin fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan nyi mʋ.

eng: Thats why I sent Timothy to find out about your faithfulness when I couldnt stand it anymore. I was worried that the tempter might have tempted you so that our work would have been a waste of time.
local: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ n maa man bɩla yɛ n taalɛ kyɩna yɛgɛ n man wu fanɛ mʋ, n sun Timoti yɛ ɔ ba kɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan yɩlɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ sʋ mɛ kufuu fɛɛ falɛ ɔtʋʋtɔkɩɩpʋ mʋ ba tʋʋ fanɛ tɔ kɩɩ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ anɛ kɩkpɩnɛ mʋ ɩ waa kɩyan.

eng: Now Timothy has returned to us from you and has given us good news about your faithfulness and love! He says that you always have good memories about us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
local: Amaa Timoti dan lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ ba nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɩya asɩn bʋkɔnsa lɩɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ fanɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ. Nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ anɛ yɛ anɛ asɩn a bʋ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ nɩɩ fen nyiŋi anɛ sʋ gaa saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ, nɩɩ fen biti fɛɛ anaa fanɛ an wu abaa, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ anɛ gbaa anɛ an biti mʋ.

eng: Because of this, brothers and sisters, we were encouraged in all our distress and trouble through your faithfulness.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ, mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, anaa anɛ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ an gyii yɛ kanyanla mʋ nɩɩ a wu mʋ kpini mʋ, lɩɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ mʋ ɩ waa anɛ ɔlʋn tɔ.

eng: For now we are alive if you are standing your ground in the Lord.
local: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ, anɛ nkɔlɔ ɩ tɩyɛ anɛ lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan yɩlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ tɔ kenken mʋ.

eng: How can we thank God enough for you, given all the joy we have because of you before our God?.
local: Afwaala mɔɔ nɩɩ an biti a taa sa Ɩbwaarɛ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ, lɩɩ kensi‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an nyɛ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ falɛ?.

eng: Night and day, we pray more than ever to see all of you in person and to complete whatever you still need for your faith.
local: Kakyʋwapɛ yɛ kagyanbwɛ kpini an kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ gaa lɩɩ anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ fɛɛ a bɩla nyɛ wu fanɛ, kɛ a sa fanɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ.

eng: Now may our God and Father himself and our Lord Jesus guide us on our way back to you.
local: Nɩɩ anɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa‐gbaa yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu ba bugi ɔkpa sa anɛ kɛ a ba fanɛ asɛ.

eng: May the Lord cause you to increase and enrich your love for each other and for everyone in the same way as we also love you.
local: An kʋlɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu yɛ, ɔ yɛgɛ fanɛ kebiti kɩ nyɛ akyɔ tii sʋ, kɛ fan biti abaa yɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ gaa, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ anɛ gbaa an sʋ kebiti sa fanɛ mʋ.

eng: May the love cause your hearts to be strengthened, to be blameless in holiness before our God and Father when our Lord Jesus comes with all his people. Amen.
local: An kʋlɛ fɛɛ ɔ sa fanɛ kɔkɔlɔ ɔsɩɩ, kɛ alibi yɛ ineesi ɩkʋ ɩ man bʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu ii biti ɔ ba maa Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ.

eng: As you yourselves know, brothers and sisters, our visit with you wasnt a waste of time.
local: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana Krisito abuupu, fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fanɛ fen nyi fɛɛ anɛ kɩba mʋ nɩɩ an ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ man waa kɩyan.

eng: On the contrary, we had the courage through God to speak Gods good news in spite of a lot of opposition, although we had already suffered and were publicly insulted in Philippi, as you know.
local: Pɔyɩ kɛ a ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, fen nyi kanan mʋ Filipi abi ba saalɛ anɛ nɩɩ ba yɛgɛ nɩɩ an gyii awʋrʋfɔ. Amaa halɩɩ ba maa kʋsʋ yɩlɛ anɛ sʋ gbaa mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ kyɛ anɛ tɔ nɩɩ an nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ yɩlɛ tɔ, nɩɩ an taalɛ tɔwɛ fanɛ mʋ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ.

eng: Our appeal isnt based on false information, the wrong motives, or deception.
local: Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ an kʋlɛ fanɛ falɛ mʋ, an man fɔyɩ ɔkpa, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ nfɛɛrɛ libi kʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ npɩna asɩn.

eng: Rather, we have been examined and approved by God to be trusted with the good news, and thats exactly how we speak. We arent trying to please people, but we are trying to please God, who continues to examine our hearts.
local: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ kɩɩ wu anɛ nɩɩ ɔ taa Asɩn danbɩrasa katɔwɛ waa anɛ abaa tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ man gyɛ nyɩmɩsa kebiti sʋ nɩɩ an waa, amaa kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi mʋ. Mʋ ii nyi anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ yɛ anɛ nfɛɛrɛ.

eng: As you know, we never used flattery, and God is our witness that we didnt have greedy motives.
local: Fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fen nyi fɛɛ an man taa kɔnɔ tɔ kɔn asɩn tɔwɛ fanɛ. Nɩɩ an man taa sɛhn baala fanɛ sʋ kɛ a nyɛ kʋtɔ kʋ lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ. Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ anɛ kesintin ogyipu.

eng: We didnt ask for special treatment from people—not from you or from others.
local: An man kyɩna an biti ayɩn‐bi lɩɩ asa asɛ abɛɛ fanɛ asɛ abɛɛ ɔkʋ asɛ. Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an gyɛ Krisito Asunpu falɛ mʋ, naafɔɔ an sʋ ɔkpa fɛɛ a biliŋi kasʋla fanɛ sʋ.

eng: although we could have thrown our weight around as Christs apostles. Instead, we were gentle with you like a nursing mother caring for her own children.
local: amaa an yɔɔ anɛ n‐yɩɩ kyɩna fanɛ asɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ talapʋ ɩɩ yɔɔ mʋ n‐yɩɩ ɛɛ kɩɩ mu‐bii ana sʋ mʋ.

eng: We were glad to share not only Gods good news with you but also our very lives because we cared for you so much.
local: A maa biti fanɛ asɩn gaa sʋ mʋ, man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nkʋn nɩɩ an taa bɩya fanɛ. Amaa an taa anɛ n‐yɩɩ gbaa sa fanɛ tii sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan biliŋi anɛ abitipu.

eng: You remember, brothers and sisters, our efforts and hard work. We preached Gods good news to you, while we worked night and day so we wouldnt be a burden on any of you.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, n kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ fen nyiŋi kanan mʋ nɩɩ an waa kusun gaa saŋa mʋ nɩɩ an bʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ. An waa kusun kakyʋwapɛ yɛ kagyanbwɛ an kɩɩ anɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ fanɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, kanan mʋ nɩɩ a man biliŋi kasʋla fanɛ ɔkʋ sʋ.

eng: You and God are witnesses of how holy, just, and blameless we were toward you believers.
local: Fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii mʋ, fan naa Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ anɛ kesintin agyipu lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an kyɩna fanɛ tɔ, nɩɩ an man sʋ ineesi ɩkʋ, nɩɩ anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi, nɩɩ alibi kʋ man bʋ anɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ.

eng: Likewise, you know how we treated each of you like a father treats his own children.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ an bɩla fanɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔsɛ ɩɩ bɩla mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mu‐bii ana mʋ.

eng: We appealed to you, encouraged you, and pleaded with you to live lives worthy of the God who is calling you into his own kingdom and glory.
local: An waa fanɛ aniya tɔ, nɩɩ an tɔwɛ yuula fanɛ nkɔlɔ, nɩɩ an tɔwɛ waa fanɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan kyɩna kakyɩna danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi. Mʋ ɩ tɩɩ fanɛ ba mu kuwura‐gyii yɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ tɔ.

eng: We also thank God constantly for this: when you accepted Gods word that you heard from us, you welcomed it for what it truly is. Instead of accepting it as a human message, you accepted it as Gods message, and it continues to work in you who are believers.
local: Nɩɩ anɛ gbaa anɛ an bɩla an kyaga sʋ an fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan maa kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ fan nu lɩɩ anɛ asɛ mʋ, fan man kɔɔlɛ asɩn mʋ fɛɛ asa asɩn, amaa fan kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ gyii fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ gbaa‐gbaa, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kesintin mʋ. Kanɩn Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn maŋa ii sun kusun fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ tɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you became imitators of the churches of God in Judea, which are in Christ Jesus. This was because you also suffered the same things from your own people as they did from the Jews.
local: Fanɛ, mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, an wu fɛɛ asɩn libi mʋ nɩɩ ɩ ba tu Ɩbwaarɛ kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Krisito lɛɛ, nɩɩ ɩ bʋ Gyudeya mʋ, kanɩn asɩn libi kʋlʋn maŋa ɩ ba tu fanɛ gbaa. Lɩɩ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan wu awʋrʋfɔ fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa asa abaa tɔ mʋ, kanɩn nɩɩ ba wu awʋrʋfɔ Gyiwu abi abaa tɔ.

eng: They killed both the Lord Jesus and the prophets and drove us out. They dont please God, and they are hostile to the entire human race.
local: Bamʋ ɩ gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba mɔɔ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu, nɩɩ dɩdaa mʋ bamʋ ɩ mɔɔ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ mʋ, nɩɩ bamʋ akʋlʋn maŋa ɩ gya anɛ kyʋŋɛ mʋ. Bamʋ asɩn i mee gyii Ɩbwaarɛ ansi, nɩɩ ba kʋsʋ yɩlɛ asa kpini sʋ.

eng: when they try to stop us from speaking to the Gentiles so they can be saved. Their sins are constantly pushing the limit. Gods wrath has caught up with them in the end.
local: Nɩɩ ba kpan bamʋ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ naafɔɔ bee tii anɛ ɔkpa, kɛ a man nyɛ tɔwɛ Asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ, kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ mɔlɩgɛ bamʋ. Lɩɩ falɛ ɔkpa sʋ mʋ, ba kʋʋla bamʋ alibi gyaga abaa sʋ naa fʋʋ ɩmʋ laalaalʋwɛ. Nbɩɩnbɩɩ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ nyɛ agbʋ waa bamʋ, nɩɩ ee biti ɔ bɩɩtɛ bamʋ asʋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we were separated from you for a while physically but not in our hearts. We made every effort in our desire to see you again face-to-face.
local: Amaa mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, saŋa dɛɛ kʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba barɩgɛ anaa fanɛ nsana mʋ, an lɩɩ fanɛ ansi sʋ bɩrɛ, amaa fanɛ asɩn ɩ san ɩ bʋ anɛ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ yɩlɛ anɛ ansi sʋ gaa fɛɛ ɔkpa kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ mʋ a bwii ba wu fanɛ.

eng: We wanted to come to you—I, Paul, tried over and over again—and Satan stopped us.
local: An biti gaa fɛɛ a ba fanɛ asɛ. Mɛ Pɔɔlɩ, n kpan mɛ n‐yɩɩ saŋa gaalaagaa sʋ fɛɛ a ba fanɛ asɛ, amaa Sɩtaanɛ tii anɛ ɔkpa.

eng: What is our hope, joy, or crown that we can brag about in front of our Lord Jesus when he comes? Isnt it all of you?.
local: Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kibwii ba mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩ gyɛ anɛ tamaa yɛ anɛ kensi‐gyii yɛ anɛ bʋnyaa kɩnyɛ mu ansi tɔ? Man gyɛ fanɛ?.

eng: You are our glory and joy!.
local: Kesintin mʋ, fanɛ ɩ gyɛ anɛ bʋnyaa yɛ kensi‐gyii.

eng: Therefore, my brothers and sisters whom I love and miss, who are my joy and crown, stand firm in the Lord. Loved ones.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana mʋ nɩɩ n biti fanɛ asɩn gaa mʋ, n biti kuwu fanɛ. Fanɛ sʋ nɩɩ mi ansi i gyii nɩɩ n nyɛ kɩtɩɩ. Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana danbɩrasa, fan yɩlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ tɔ kenken kanɩn.

eng: I urge Euodia and I urge Syntyche to come to an agreement in the Lord.
local: N kʋlɛ Yuwodiya maa Sintike fɛɛ ba maa gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ asa falɛ sʋ mʋ, ba tɔwɛ kyula abaa.

eng: Yes, and Im also asking you, loyal friend, to help these women who have struggled together with me in the ministry of the gospel, along with Clement and the rest of my coworkers whose names are in the scroll of life.
local: Nɩɩ n kʋlɛ ngbaa fʋ mɛ bɩrɩsa kusun ɔwaapʋ kesintin tɔ, fɛɛ fʋ kyɛ kanɩn akyɩɩ anyɔ mʋ tɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ba kyɛ mɛ tɔ asɩn danbɩrasa kusun mʋ kɩ yɛlɩgɛ tɔ. Akyɩɩ nɩmʋ maa Kelementi yɛ mɛ tɔmaa ana asunpu kpini mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ atɩɩ ɩ bʋ Ɩbwaarɛ nkpa ɔwʋlɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, ba kyɔ mɛ tɔ gaa.

eng: Be glad in the Lord always! Again I say, be glad!.
local: Fan yɛgɛ fanɛ ansi i gyii saŋa kʋmaa, fɛɛ fan maa gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ lɛɛ mʋ, n bɩla n pɩla tɔ yɛ, fan yɛgɛ fanɛ ansi i gyii!.

eng: Let your gentleness show in your treatment of all people. The Lord is near.
local: Fan yɛgɛ ɔkʋmaa o wu fanɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fen du bwahn. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kɩba mʋ ki tiri tɔ.

eng: Dont be anxious about anything; rather, bring up all of your requests to God in your prayers and petitions, along with giving thanks.
local: Fan man yɩyɛɛ lɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋ sʋ, amaa kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ mʋ, fɛn kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ kɛ fɛn taa fanɛ asɩn tirisa kpini tʋʋ mu ansi tɔ.

eng: Then the peace of God that exceeds all understanding will keep your hearts and minds safe in Christ Jesus.
local: Saamʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ sa fanɛ mʋ kayɩɩ yuuli gaa mʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa mɛɛ taalɛ nu kasɛ, kɛ ki kun fanɛ nkɔlɔ yɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ fan maa kɔɔlɛ Krisito Yesu gyii mʋ.

eng: From now on, brothers and sisters, if anything is excellent and if anything is admirable, focus your thoughts on these things: all that is true, all that is holy, all that is just, all that is pure, all that is lovely, and all that is worthy of praise.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, mɛ asɩn laalaalʋwɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fan yɛgɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ baa ɩ gyan kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ kesintin sʋ, yɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ, yɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dɛ ɔkpa, yɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ ineesi, yɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ kebiti, yɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ansi ii gyii sʋ. Nɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋ kɩ kan kɩ bʋrɔn gaa abɛɛ kɩ sʋ kɩyɩn mʋ, falɛ atɔ ɩnɩmʋ nɩɩ fɛn fɛ ɩmʋ nfɛɛrɛ.

eng: Practice these things: whatever you learned, received, heard, or saw in us. The God of peace will be with you.
local: Fan waa kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fan bɩɩla abɛɛ fan nyɛ lɩɩ mɛ asɛ, abɛɛ fan nu abɛɛ fan wu n maa waa, kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kayɩɩ yuuli wuya mʋ ɔ baa ɔ bʋ fanɛ asɛ.

eng: I was very glad in the Lord because now at last you have shown concern for me again.
local: Lɩɩ n maa gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ lɛɛ sʋ mʋ, mi ansi i gyii gaa, fɛɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ bɩrɛ fan bɩla kaapʋ fɛɛ mɛ asɩn i tiri fanɛ. Nɩɩ kesintin tɔ n nyi mɛ asɩn ɩ maa tiri fanɛ, amaa ɔkpa nɩɩ fan man nyɛ kɛ fan kaapʋ fɛɛ mɛ asɩn i tiri fanɛ.

eng: Im not saying this because I need anything, for I have learned how to be content in any circumstance.
local: Man gyɛ yɛ mɛ n‐yɩɩ ɩ kɩtaa mɛ sʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ kanɩn, lɩɩ fɛɛ n bɩɩla ɔkpa kʋmaa sʋ fɛɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ n sʋ mʋ ɩ kʋkwɛ mɛ.

eng: I know the experience of being in need and of having more than enough; I have learned the secret to being content in any and every circumstance, whether full or hungry or whether having plenty or being poor.
local: Nɩɩ n nyi kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri kakyɩna tɔ, nɩɩ n bɩla n nyi kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kanyɛ kʋkyɔ tɔ gbaa du. N bɩɩla ɩmʋ ɔkpa kʋmaa sʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ saŋa kʋmaa yɛ katɩn kʋmaa ɩmʋ nɩɩ n sʋ mʋ ɩ kʋkwɛ mɛ. Halɩɩ n nyɛ gyii ŋmɛ abɛɛ n naa akʋn, halɩɩ n sʋ naa bansʋ abɛɛ n man sʋ gbaa mʋ ɩ kʋkwɛ mɛ.

eng: I can endure all these things through the power of the one who gives me strength.
local: N taalɛ waa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ lɩɩ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Krisito ɩɩ sa mɛ mʋ sʋ.

eng: Still, you have done well to share my distress.
local: Amaa fan waa kusun gaa fɛɛ fan maa kyɛ mɛ tɔ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ awʋrʋfɔ tɔ mʋ.

eng: You Philippians know from the time of my first mission work in Macedonia how no church shared in supporting my ministry except you.
local: Fanɛ Filipi abi gbaa fan nyi danbɩrasa fɛɛ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n piili asɩn danbɩrasa katɔwɛ Masedoniya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ, nɩɩ n lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ tʋtɔ mʋ, Krisito kʋbʋ kʋ man kɛɛ mɛ afulee lɩɩ kusee mʋ nɩɩ ba nyɛ mʋ sʋ, amɔɔ fanɛ nkʋn.

eng: You sent contributions repeatedly to take care of my needs even while I was in Thessalonica.
local: Halɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ Tesalonika kadɛ tɔ nɩɩ i tiri mɛ mʋ, fan kyɛ mɛ tɔ afulee ɩlɩɩ kanankʋ.

eng: Im not hoping for a gift, but I am hoping for a profit that accumulates in your account.
local: Man gyɛ fɛɛ nkɛɛ nɩɩ n dan n kɩɩ n biti lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ sʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ kanɩn, amaa n biti fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ taa agyaga tii fanɛ awaasa danbɩrasa kʋkɔka mʋ sʋ.

eng: I now have plenty and it is more than enough. I am full to overflowing because I received the gifts that you sent from Epaphroditus. Those gifts give off a fragrant aroma, an acceptable sacrifice that pleases God.
local: Nɩɩ n tɛɛ nyɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ii tiri mɛ mʋ, halɩɩ naa ban kanan mʋ nɩɩ n biti mʋ gbaa sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan taa sa Epafuroditu yɛ ɔ bɩya mɛ mʋ i loo mɛ abaa tɔ. Atɔ mʋ i du fɛɛ saraga atɔ liifensa mʋ nɩɩ ba taa lɛɛ saraga sa Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ, nɩɩ ɩ bɔla mu ansi.

eng: My God will meet your every need out of his riches in the glory that is found in Christ Jesus.
local: Mɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ mʋ atɔ kparɛ damantɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, ee biti ɔ sa fanɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kii tiri fanɛ lɩɩ fan maa gyɛ Krisito Yesu lɛɛ sʋ.

eng: Let glory be given to God our Father forever and always. Amen.
local: Bʋnyaa ɔ baa ɔ gyɛ anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ kakpaa‐kakpaa. Amen.

eng: Greet all Gods people in Christ Jesus. The brothers and sisters with me send you their greeting.
local: N fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Krisito Yesu lɛɛ mʋ. Krisito abi mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ mɛ asɛ nfɩɩ gbaa bɛɛ fwaala fanɛ.

eng: All Gods people here, especially those in Caesars household, send you their greeting.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ asa kpini mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ nfɩɩ mʋ bɛɛ fwaala fanɛ, fɔnfɔn bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Roma abi Owura lala kɩkpaara sʋ mʋ.

eng: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirits.
local: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kabwaala kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ kpini asɛ. Amen!.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, we ask and encourage you in the Lord Jesus to keep living the way you already are and even do better in how you live and please God—just as you learned from us.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, an sa fanɛ kɔnɔ yɛ fan kyɩna kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ i gyii Ɩbwaarɛ ansi, nɩɩ fan nu sa anɛ. Anɛ laalaalʋwɛ asɩn mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ an sʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu an kʋlɛ fanɛ yɛ, fan kɩtaa tɔ kɛ fan waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ kyɔ falɛ tii sʋ.

eng: You know the instructions we gave you through the Lord Jesus.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fen nyi kɩkaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ an kaapʋ fanɛ lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu ɔlʋn tɔ.

eng: Gods will is that your lives are dedicated to him. This means that you stay away from sexual immorality.
local: Ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti nɩn fɛɛ fan man waa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ ineesi, kɛ fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ abawʋlɛ‐sɩn tɔ.

eng: and learn how to control your own body in a pure and respectable way.
local: Kɛ fanɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ o kun mʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kakyɩɩ abɛɛ kanyɩn biti sʋ, kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ baa o du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ kɛ ɔ nyɛ bɛɛrɛɛ.

eng: Dont be controlled by your sexual urges like the Gentiles who dont know God.
local: Kɛ mʋ awaasa ɩ man ba ɩ gyɛ kayalaga ɔkpa sʋ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ maa mʋ ɩkpa mʋ.

eng: No one should mistreat or take advantage of their brother or sister in this issue. The Lord punishes people for all these things, as we told you before and sternly warned you.
local: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ ɔ man taa falɛ awaasa libi nɩmʋ waa mʋ bɩrɩsa, abɛɛ o sisii mʋ kayalaga asɩn kʋ tɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ ii biti ɔ bɩɩtɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa falɛ alibi asʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ nɩɩ an da fanɛ amu tɔ mʋ.

eng: God didnt call us to be immoral but to be dedicated to him.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ man tɩɩ anɛ yɛ an ba waa agyaga‐sɩn nɩn, amaa a ba kyɩna kakyɩna kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ tɔ.

eng: Therefore, whoever rejects these instructions isnt rejecting a human authority. They are rejecting God, who gives his Holy Spirit to you.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee kina kɩkaapʋ nɩmʋ mʋ, man gyɛ nyɩmɩsa nɩɩ ee kina, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ sa anɛ mʋ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ee kina.

eng: You dont need us to write about loving your brothers and sisters because God has already taught you to love each other.
local: Nɩɩ lɩɩ kinyi‐bii kebiti bɩrɛ sʋ mʋ, ɩ man bɩla i tiri fɛɛ a kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ sa fanɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kaapʋ fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fanɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan biti abaa.

eng: In fact, you are doing loving deeds for all the brothers and sisters throughout Macedonia. Now we encourage you, brothers and sisters, to do so even more.
local: Nɩɩ kesintin tɔ mʋ, fen biti fanɛ bɩrɩsa ana mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Masedoniya kasɛ sʋ kpini. Amaa anɛ bɩrɩsa ana, an tɔwɛ an waa fanɛ aniya tɔ fɛɛ fan kyaga sʋ waa kanɩn tii sʋ.

eng: Aim to live quietly, mind your own business, and earn your own living, just as I told you.
local: Fan kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kɛ fan kyɩna kayɩɩ yuuli tɔ, kɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ man taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa asa asɩn tɔ, kɛ fan taa fanɛ abaa sun kusun. An wʋla tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ kpini.

eng: That way youll behave appropriately toward outsiders, and you wont be in need.
local: Lɩɩ kanɩn sʋ mʋ, fen biti fan nyɛ bɛɛrɛɛ lɩɩ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba man tii fanɛ sʋ mʋ asɛ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ kɛ fan man taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ ɔkʋ sʋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we want you to know about people who have died so that you wont mourn like others who dont have any hope.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, a mee biti fɛɛ fan baa fan bʋ kitentenbiri tɔ lɩɩ alewupu sʋ, abɛɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ i nyita fanɛ fɛɛ asansa mʋ nɩɩ ba man sʋ tamaa mʋ.

eng: Since we believe that Jesus died and rose, so we also believe that God will bring with him those who have died in Jesus.
local: An kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ Yesu wu nɩɩ o bwii kyiŋi ba nkpa tɔ, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ an bɩla kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii nɩɩ ba wu mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ bwii kyiŋi bamʋ ba nkpa tɔ, kɛ ba maa Yesu ba bwii ba.

eng: What we are saying is a message from the Lord: we who are alive and still around at the Lords coming definitely wont go ahead of those who have died.
local: Lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa kɔnɔ tɔ asɩn mʋ, nɩɩ an tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an san an tɛ nkpa tɔ naa fʋʋ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ ii biti ɔ ba mʋ, a mɛɛ yɛ a gyankpaa alewupu mʋ.

eng: This is because the Lord himself will come down from heaven with the signal of a shout by the head angel and a blast on Gods trumpet. First, those who are dead in Christ will rise.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa ii biti ɔ kpɩlɩgɛ lɩɩ sʋsʋ ɛɛ ba kasɛ, yɛ ɩlawʋ lala kɔnɔsa yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ bɩlɩsa ɔbʋlɛ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabɩlɛ, kɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba wu Krisito tɔ mʋ ba gyankpaa kyiŋi.

eng: Then, we who are living and still around will be taken up together with them in the clouds to meet with the Lord in the air. That way we will always be with the Lord.
local: Ɩmʋ kamaa mʋ, anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an sii nɩɩ an san an bʋ nkpa tɔ mʋ, ee biti ɔ kɩtaa anɛ bʋga bamʋ tɔ abwaarɛ‐wʋlɛ tɔ, kɛ a naa gyaŋa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ sʋsʋ. Kɛ a naa kyɩna yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ kakpaa.

eng: So encourage each other with these words.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan taa falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ tɔwɛ waa abaa ɔlʋn tɔ.

eng: We dont need to write to you about the timing and dates, brothers and sisters.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, ɩ man bɩla i tiri fɛɛ a kyʋrɔɔ asɩn kʋ lɩɩ saŋa yɛ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ii biti i ba mʋ sa fanɛ.

eng: You know very well that the day of the Lord is going to come like a thief in the night.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fen nyi kesintin tɔ fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Kakɛ Lala mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ ba mʋ, ii biti ɩ baa i du nɩn fɛɛ oyu maa ba kagyanbwɛ mʋ.

eng: When they are saying, There is peace and security, at that time sudden destruction will attack them, like labor pains start with a pregnant woman, and they definitely wont escape.
local: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ asa bɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, An sʋ kayɩɩ yuuli nɩɩ sɛhn man bɩla yɛ ɔ waa anɛ mʋ, tʋtɔ nɩɩ kenyiita kii biti kɩ ba bamʋ sʋ opula tɔ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ keduŋidi kɩɩ kɩtaa ɔtɔ wuya mʋ. Nɩɩ bamʋ ɔkʋ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ taalɛ lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kanɩn awʋrʋfɔ mʋ tɔ.

eng: But you arent in darkness, brothers and sisters, so the day wont catch you by surprise like a thief.
local: Amaa fanɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu bɩrɛ, fan man bʋ kitentenbiri tɔ, kɛ kanɩn kakɛ maŋa kɩ ba purigi fanɛ fɛɛ oyu mʋ.

eng: All of you are children of light and children of the day. We dont belong to night or darkness.
local: Fanɛ kpini fɛn gyɛ fɩtɩla tɔ asa nɩɩ fɛn naa kayɩkɛ tɔ. Amaa a man gyɛ kagyanbwɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ an naa kitentenbiri tɔ.

eng: So then, lets not sleep like the others, but lets stay awake and stay sober.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan man yɛgɛ an baa an du fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba dɛ tan sʋ mʋ, amaa fan yɛgɛ an kʋʋla anɛ n‐yɩɩ kɛ an baa an da sʋ.

eng: People who sleep sleep at night, and people who get drunk get drunk at night.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ dɛ mʋ, bɛɛ dɛ kagyanbwɛ nɩn, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ bʋʋ nta mʋ, bɛɛ bʋʋ kagyanbwɛ nɩn.

eng: Since we belong to the day, lets stay sober, wearing faithfulness and love as a piece of armor that protects our body and the hope of salvation as a helmet.
local: Amaa fɛɛ a maa gyɛ kayɩkɛ tɔ asa mʋ, fan yɛgɛ an kʋʋla anɛ n‐yɩɩ, kɛ a taa anɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kebiti waa kʋtɔ kunsa kun anɛ nkɔlɔ sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ anaakɔpʋ bɛɛ waa mʋ. Kɛ a taa kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ nɩɩ an sʋ tamaa mʋ waa kʋwʋrʋ bun anɛ amu sʋ fɛɛ anaakɔpʋ awʋrʋ.

eng: God didnt intend for us to suffer his wrath but rather to possess salvation through our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ man tɩɩ anɛ yɛ a ba gyii awʋrʋfɔ lɩɩ mʋ agbʋ lala mʋ sʋ. Amaa ɔ tɩɩ anɛ yɛ lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito sʋ kɛ a ba nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ.

eng: Jesus died for us so that, whether we are awake or asleep, we will live together with him.
local: Yesu Krisito wu sa anɛ nɩn, ɩmʋ sʋ an kan an tɛ nkpa tɔ nɩn oo, abɛɛ an wu nɩn oo, anaa mʋ a bʋga kyɩna.

eng: So continue encouraging each other and building each other up, just like you are doing already.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan tɔwɛ waa abaa ɔlʋn tɔ, kɛ fan kyɛ abaa tɔ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fɛn wʋla fɛn waa falɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we ask you to respect those who are working with you, leading you, and instructing you.
local: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, an kʋlɛ fanɛ fɛɛ fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa fanɛ agyankpaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ fanaa bamʋ fen sun Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito mʋ. Bɛɛ kpan bamʋ n‐yɩɩ bɛɛ waa kusun nɩɩ bɛɛ kaapʋ fanɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan kyɩna kakyɩna danbɩrasa tɔ.

eng: Think of them highly with love because of their work. Live in peace with each other.
local: Lɩɩ kusun mʋ nɩɩ bee sun sʋ mʋ, fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ lala sa bamʋ kɛ fan biti bamʋ asɩn gaa. Kɛ fan taa kayɩɩ‐yuuli kyɩna yɛ abaa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we urge you to warn those who are disorderly. Comfort the discouraged. Help the weak. Be patient with everyone.
local: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, an tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, fan da awʋlɛgyɔpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ fanɛ tɔ mʋ amu tɔ, kɛ fan tɔwɛ waa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man sʋ nkɔlɔ mʋ, kɛ fan kyɛ apɔɔsɩpʋ mʋ tɔ, kɛ fan nyɛ kenyiita sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ.

eng: Make sure no one repays a wrong with a wrong, but always pursue the good for each other and everyone else.
local: Fan kɩɩ sʋ yɛ ɔdan kɛ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ ɔ man taa alibi ka alibi kʋkɔ. Amaa saŋa kʋmaa fan kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ fan waa kɩdanbɩrasa fɛn sa abaa yɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ.

eng: Rejoice always.
local: Fan yɛgɛ fanɛ ansi i gyii saŋa kʋmaa.

eng: Pray continually.
local: Fan kyaga sʋ fɛn kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ saŋa kʋmaa.

eng: Give thanks in every situation because this is Gods will for you in Christ Jesus.
local: Fan taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩnɩmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti fɛɛ fan waa lɩɩ Yesu Krisito ɔlʋn tɔ sʋ.

eng: Dont suppress the Spirit.
local: Fan man dun Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ fʋlɔn mʋ kusun.

eng: Dont brush off Spirit-inspired messages.
local: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu kan lɛɛ asɩn sa mʋ atɔwɛpʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔwɛ fanɛ mʋ, fan man mirigi asɩn mʋ nnɔ.

eng: but examine everything carefully and hang on to what is good.
local: Amaa fan tʋʋ bamʋ asɩn tɔwɛsa yɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ kɩɩ, kɛ fan kɩtaa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn.

eng: Avoid every kind of evil.
local: Kɛ fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ alibi kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: Now, may the God of peace himself cause you to be completely dedicated to him; and may your spirit, soul, and body be kept intact and blameless at our Lord Jesus Christs coming.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ keyuula wuya mʋ, ɔ lɔŋɔ fanɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ yɩla sa mʋ n‐yɩɩ. Kɛ ɔ kɩɩ fanɛ kayaayu yɛ fanɛ kala yɛ fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kpini sʋ, kɛ alibi akʋ ɩ man ba ɩ bʋ fanɛ sʋ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ii biti o bwii ba mʋ.

eng: The one who is calling you is faithful and will do this.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ waa mʋ lɛɛ mʋ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ kesintin wuya nɩɩ ee biti ɔ waa kanɩn.

eng: Brothers and sisters, pray for us.
local: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa anɛ.

eng: Greet all the brothers and sisters with a holy kiss.
local: Fan fwaala Krisito abi mʋ kpini kɛ fan taa kebiti baari abaa.

eng: By the Lords authority, I order all of you to have this letter read aloud to all the brothers and sisters.
local: Lɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ, n tɔwɛ fan yɛ fan kalɛ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ sa akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ kpini.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kabwaala kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ asɛ.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy: To the church of the Thessalonians, which is in God our Father, and in the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Mɛ Pɔɔlɩ maa Silasi yɛ Timoti ɩ kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ an sa fanɛ Krisito abi kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ fan bʋ Tesalonika, nɩɩ fan gyɛ anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito asa mʋ.

eng: Grace and peace to all of you from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ba bwaala fanɛ kɛ ba sa fanɛ kayɩɩ yuuli.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we must always thank God for you. This is only right because your faithfulness is growing by leaps and bounds, and the love that all of you have for each other is increasing.
local: Anɛ‐daa yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, i tiri fɛɛ an fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ lɩɩ fanɛ sʋ. Nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ a maa waa kanɩn. Lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩɩ dan kii tii sʋ, nɩɩ fanɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ sa abaa mʋ kii tii sʋ.

eng: Thats why we ourselves are bragging about you in Gods churches. We tell about your endurance and faithfulness in all the harassments and trouble that you have put up with.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ anɛ gbaa‐gbaa anɛ an taalɛ da anɛ nkɔlɔ sʋ, an tɔwɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ asɩn an sa Ɩbwaarɛ kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ kpini, lɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fɛn nyɛ nkɔlɔ yɩlɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ, lɩɩ fanɛ kanyanla yɛ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ fen gyii mʋ tɔ.

eng: This shows that Gods judgment is right, and that you will be considered worthy of Gods kingdom for which you are suffering.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ katalɛ mʋ ki du kyɛɛkyɛɛ. Ɩmʋ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ kɛ fan baa fan dagaa sa Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ fen gyii kɩmʋ sʋ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ.

eng: After all, its right for God to pay back the ones making trouble for you with trouble.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ gyɛ kesintin ogyipu nɩn. Mʋ ii biti ɔ taa awʋrʋfɔ tɛɛla bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ nyanla fanɛ mʋ.

eng: and to pay back you who are having trouble with relief along with us. This payback will come when the Lord Jesus is revealed from heaven with his powerful angels.
local: Ee biti ɔ sa fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fen gyii awʋrʋfɔ mʋ yɛ anɛ kpini ɔfʋʋtɛ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu ee biti ɔ lɩɩ sʋsʋ ba maa mʋ nbɔɔ lʋlʋnpʋ yɛ fʋlɔn mʋ.

eng: He will give justice with blazing fire to those who dont recognize God and dont obey the good news of our Lord Jesus.
local: Nɩɩ fʋlɔn nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ taa bɩɩtɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bee kina mʋ mʋ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito Asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ.

eng: They will pay the penalty of eternal destruction away from the Lords presence and away from his mighty glory.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ bɩɩtɛ bamʋ kʋsʋ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ kenyiita kakpaa, kɛ ɔ gya bamʋ lɩɩ mu ansi yɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ ɔlʋn tɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we have a request for you concerning our Lord Jesus Christs coming and when we are gathered together to be with him.
local: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, lɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kɩba mʋ sʋ yɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ a bʋga naa gyaŋa mʋ sʋ mʋ, an kʋlɛ fanɛ yɛ.

eng: This will happen when he comes on that day to receive honor from his holy people and to be admired by everyone who has believed—and our testimony to you was believed.
local: Kanɩn kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ Yesu ii biti ɔ ba mʋ, mʋ asa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɔŋɔ yɩla mʋ, bee biti ba kʋsaa mʋ kɩtɩɩ sʋsʋ, kɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ ba yɩn mʋ. Fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan tii sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan kɔɔlɛ mʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ fanɛ mʋ gyii.

eng: We dont want you to be easily confused in your mind or upset if you hear that the day of the Lord is already here, whether you hear it through some spirit, a message, or a letter supposedly from us.
local: nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ba fanɛ asɛ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ asɩn sa mʋ yɛ ɔ tɔwɛ fanɛ mʋ, abɛɛ ɔ nyɛ ɔkala kʋ abɛɛ ɔ nyɛ ɔwʋlɛ lɩɩ anɛ asɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kakɛ lala mʋ kɩ tɛɛ ba mʋ, fan man yɛgɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ i wuliti fanɛ tɔ abɛɛ ɩ ŋmaa fanɛ nkɔlɔ.

eng: We are constantly praying for you for this: that our God will make you worthy of his calling and accomplish every good desire and faithful work by his power.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini ɩ maa bʋ anɛ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ sʋ mʋ, an kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ an sa fanɛ saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ lɔŋɔ fanɛ, kɛ fan dagaa kɩtɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ mʋ. Kɛ lɩɩ mʋ ɔlʋn tɔ sʋ mʋ ɔ yɛgɛ kʋtɔ danbɩrasa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fan fɛ nfɛɛrɛ yɛ fen biti fan waa mʋ, ɩ waa ɔdan sa fanɛ, kɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kusun mʋ nɩɩ fɛn waa mʋ fan taalɛ waa kɩmʋ naa lʋwɛ.

eng: Dont let anyone deceive you in any way. That day wont come unless the rebellion comes first and the person who is lawless is revealed, who is headed for destruction.
local: Ɔkpa kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ mʋ fan man yɛgɛ ɔkʋ ɔ pɩna fanɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ kanɩn kakɛ mʋ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ ba, amɔɔ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ ba kʋsʋ yɩlɛ kina Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, ɔ ba pɔyɩ. Nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa mʋ nɩɩ o mee buu sɛhn, nɩɩ ee biti o wu fɔyɩ kakpaa mʋ, ii biti ɩ lɛɛ mʋ ifuli pɔyɩ kɛ kakɛ mʋ kɩ fʋ.

eng: Then the name of our Lord Jesus will be honored by you, and you will be honored by him, consistent with the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: An kʋlɛ ɩnɩmʋ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ fɛɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kɩtɩɩ ki dii sʋsʋ, kɛ asa ba wu mʋ bʋnyaa fanɛ tɔ, kɛ lɩɩ Yesu Krisito sʋ mʋ, fanɛ kɩtɩɩ ki dii sʋsʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ba bwaala fanɛ mʋ.

eng: He is the opponent of every so-called god or object of worship and promotes himself over them. So he sits in Gods temple, displaying himself to show that he is God.
local: Ee biti ɔ kʋsʋ yɩlɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa ii sun fɛɛ ɩdakpa yɛ ɩmʋ tɔ atɔ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa. Ɩmʋ sʋ ee biti ɔ kʋsaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ kpini sʋ, kɛ ɔ naa kyɩna kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ mʋ tɔ, ɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: You remember that I used to tell you these things while I was with you, dont you?.
local: Fen mee nyiŋi fɛɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n kyɩna n bʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ n tɔwɛ fanɛ ɩnɩmʋ kpini?.

eng: Now you know what holds him back so that he can be revealed when his time comes.
local: Nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ fan nyi kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kii tii ɔmʋ nɩɩ o mee buu sɛhn mʋ ɔkpa, lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ ba lɛɛ mʋ ifuli mʋ ɩ man pɩɩ fʋʋ.

eng: The hidden plan to live without any law is at work now, but it will be secret only until the one who is holding it back is out of the way.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ o mee buu sɛhn mʋ ɔlʋn mʋ ɩ wʋla ii sun kusun asiri tɔ, nɩɩ ɩ yɛgɛ asa bɛɛ waa kʋsʋ tɔ alʋn. Amaa ɔmʋ nɩɩ ee kun kɩmʋ nbɩɩnbɩɩ mʋ, ii biti ɔ kyaga sʋ ee kun kanɩn naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ lɛɛ mʋ lɩɩ ɔkpa mʋ sʋ.

eng: Then the person who is lawless will be revealed. The Lord Jesus will destroy him with the breath from his mouth. When the Lord comes, his appearance will put an end to him.
local: Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ lɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ o mee buu sɛhn mʋ ifuli, nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kan bwii ba mʋ, kɛ ɔ taa mʋ kɔnɔ tɔ afuu mʋ mɔɔ mʋ, kɛ ɔ taa mʋ bʋnyaa nyita mʋ kakpaa.

eng: When the person who is lawless comes, it will happen through Satans effort, with all kinds of fake power, signs, and wonders.
local: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ o mee buu sɛhn mʋ kɩba mʋ, ee biti o sun Sɩtaanɛ kusun. Ee biti ɔ taa Sɩtaanɛ ɔlʋn waa adangana yɛ sɩnkaala yɛ asɩn kyinkyinsa pɩna asa.

eng: It will happen with every sort of wicked deception of those who are heading toward destruction because they have refused to love the truth that would allow them to be saved.
local: Nɩɩ ee biti ɔ bɔla ɔkpa kʋmaa sʋ taa asɩn libi pɩna bamʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba nyita mʋ. Bee nyita, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba kina kesintin mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ mɔlɩgɛ bamʋ mʋ.

eng: This is why God will send them an influence that will mislead them so that they will believe the lie.
local: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ antɩŋɛsa lala ba bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ, kɛ ba lan bɛɛ kɔɔlɛ antɩŋɛsa mʋ bee gyii.

eng: The result will be that everyone will be judged who is not convinced by the truth but is happy with injustice.
local: kɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kina kesintin kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ, nɩɩ bamʋ ansi i gyii alibi kɩwaa sʋ mʋ kpini bee biti ba gyii kʋpwɛ.

eng: But we always must thank God for you, brothers and sisters who are loved by God. This is because he chose you from the beginning to be the first crop of the harvest. This brought salvation, through your dedication to God by the Spirit and through your belief in the truth.
local: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ ii biti fanɛ asɩn, ɩ dagaa saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ a maa fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ sa fanɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla lɛɛ fanɛ lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ yɛ ee biti ɔ mɔlɩgɛ fanɛ. Ɔ waa ɩnɩmʋ nɩn lɩɩ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ ɔlʋn tɔ yɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ kesintin mʋ gyii, kɛ fan baa fan gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɔŋɔ yɩlɛ sa mʋ n‐yɩɩ.

eng: God called all of you through our good news so you could possess the honor of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla mʋ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ mʋ sʋ tɩɩ fanɛ yɛ fan ba nyɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito bʋnyaa mʋ.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, stand firm and hold on to the traditions we taught you, whether we taught you in person or through our letter.
local: Kanɩn sʋ, anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, anɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an kaapʋ fanɛ yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ an kyʋrɔɔ sa fanɛ mʋ, fan yɩlɛ tɔ kɛ fan kɩtaa ɩmʋ tɔ kenken.

eng: Our Lord Jesus Christ himself and God our Father loved us and through grace gave us eternal comfort and a good hope.
local: Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito gbaa‐gbaa yɛ anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ bee biti anɛ asɩn gaa mʋ, ba bɔla kabwaala mʋ sʋ tɔwɛ waa anɛ ɔlʋn tɔ kakpaa, nɩɩ ba sa anɛ tamaa danbɩrasa.

eng: May he encourage your hearts and give you strength in every good thing you do or say.
local: An kʋlɛ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ tɔwɛ kɩtaa fanɛ nkɔlɔ, kɛ ɔ waa fanɛ ɔlʋn tɔ lɩɩ fanɛ kʋtɔ danbɩrasa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fɛn waa yɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ fɛn tɔwɛ.

eng: Finally, brothers and sisters, pray for us so that the Lords message will spread quickly and be honored, just like it happened with you.
local: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, anɛ laalaalʋwɛ asɩn mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ sa anɛ kɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ asɩn mʋ ɩ nyɛ yalagɛ bilen‐bilen, kɛ ɩ nyɛ bɛɛrɛɛ lala fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ nyɛ fanɛ asɛ mʋ.

eng: Pray too that we will be rescued from inappropriate and evil people since everyone that we meet wont respond with faith.
local: Kɛ fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ lɛɛ anɛ lɩɩ amu tɔ ɔlʋn wuya ana yɛ asɩn libi wuya ana abaa tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ man gyɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɩɩ kɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii.

eng: But the Lord is faithful and will give you strength and protect you from the evil one.
local: Amaa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ gyɛ kesintin wuya nɩn, nɩɩ mʋ ii biti ɔ sa fanɛ ɔlʋn kɛ o kun fanɛ lɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ kɩbaa tɔ.

eng: We are confident about you in the Lord—that you are doing and will keep doing what we tell you to do.
local: An sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ tɔ fɛɛ ɛɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fɛn waa, nɩɩ fen biti fan kyaga sʋ waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ an sa fanɛ kɔnɔ yɛ fan waa mʋ.

eng: May the Lord lead your hearts to express Gods love and Christs endurance.
local: An kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ yɛ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ o biliŋaa fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ kpee Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti mʋ tɔ yɛ Yesu Krisito kɔkɔlɔ kɩnyɛ yɩlɛ tɔ mʋ tɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we command you in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to stay away from every brother or sister who lives an undisciplined life that is not in line with the traditions that you received from us.
local: Anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana, lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ mʋ, an sa fanɛ kɔnɔ yɛ fanɛ bɩrɩsa mʋ nɩɩ o mee biti kusun kɩwaa, nɩɩ mʋ kɩbaabʋtɔ kɩ man naa yɛ kɩkaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ lɩɩ anɛ asɛ mʋ, fan kɩtaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ sʋ.

eng: You yourselves know how you need to imitate us because we were not undisciplined when we were with you.
local: Fanɛ gbaa‐gbaa fanɛ fen nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ fan buu anɛ ayaa natɛsa. Lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ an bʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ a man kyɩna waa wʋlʋgyɔ.

eng: We didnt eat anyones food without paying for it. Instead, we worked night and day with effort and hard work so that we would not impose on you.
local: nɩɩ an man gyii ɔkʋ agyitɔ yɛgɛ a man ka ɩmʋ kʋkɔ. Amaa an payɩ ansi waa kusun yɛ kɩkpɩnɛ kakyʋwapɛ yɛ kagyanbwɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ anɛ kɩkyɩna fanɛ asɛ mʋ ɩ man waa kasʋla sa fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ.

eng: We did this to give you an example to imitate, not because we didnt have a right to insist on financial support.
local: A maa waa ɩnɩmʋ mʋ, ɩ man gyɛ nɩn yɛ a man sʋ ɔkpa kɛ a taa anɛ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ fanɛ nkyɛtɔ sʋ, amaa an waa yɩla nɩn kɛ fan nyɛ buu anɛ ayaa natɛsa sʋ.

eng: Even when we were with you we were giving you this command: If anyone doesnt want to work, they shouldnt eat.
local: Halɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ an bʋ fanɛ asɛ mʋ an sa fanɛ kɔnɔ yɛ, Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o mee biti kusun kɩwaa mʋ, ɔ man gyii.

eng: We hear that some of you are living an undisciplined life. They arent working, but they are meddling in other peoples business.
local: An nu yɛ akʋ ba bʋ fanɛ tɔ ba sʋ wʋlʋgyɔ. Be mee sun kusun kʋ, amɔɔ asa asɩn tɔ kɩnatɛ loo.

eng: By the Lord Jesus Christ, we command and encourage such people to work quietly and put their own food on the table.
local: Bamʋ nɩɩ be du kanɩn mʋ, an sa bamʋ kɔnɔ nɩɩ an tɔwɛ an sa bamʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kɩtɩɩ tɔ sʋ yɛ ba biti kusun waa biti bamʋ agyitɔ gyisa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, dont get discouraged in doing what is right.
local: Amaa fanɛ, anɛ‐daa ana yɛ anɛ‐supu ana bɩrɛ, fan man yɛgɛ kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa i fii fanɛ.

eng: Take note of anyone who doesnt obey what we have said in this letter. Dont associate with them so they will be ashamed of themselves.
local: Nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ kan kina anɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an kyʋrɔɔ waa ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ tɔ falɛ mʋ, fan baa fan da mʋ sʋ. Fanaa mʋ fan man bɩla bʋga waa sɛhn, kɛ ipeeli ɩ kɩtaa mʋ.

eng: Dont treat them like enemies, but warn them like you would do for a brother or sister.
local: Fan man taa mʋ waa fɛɛ fanɛ dʋn, amaa fan tɔwɛ waa mʋ fɛɛ fanɛ‐nyi mu‐bii ana tɔ ɔkʋ.

eng: May the Lord of peace himself give you peace always in every way. The Lord be with all of you.
local: Anɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito gbaa‐gbaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ kayɩɩ‐yuuli wuya mʋ, ɔ sa fanɛ kayɩɩ‐yuuli saŋa kʋmaa yɛ ɔkpa kʋmaa sʋ. Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu ɔ baa ɔ bʋ fanɛ kpini asɛ.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting with my own hand. This verifies that the letter is from me, as in every letter of mine. This is how I write.
local: Mɛ Pɔɔlɩ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ ɩ taa mɛ kɩbaa kyʋrɔɔ afwaala nɩmʋ. Kanɩn nɩɩ n duligi mɛ ɩwʋlɛ kpini. Falɛ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kabwaala kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ kpini asɛ.

eng: From Paul, who is an apostle of Jesus Christ by the command of God our savior and of Christ Jesus our hope.
local: Mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ ɩ kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ. Lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ yɛ Krisito Yesu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ anɛ tamaa kɩpɩrɛ sʋ nɩɩ n ba waa Krisito Yesu Osunpu.

eng: To Timothy, my true child in the faith. Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and from Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: N kyʋrɔɔ n sa fʋ Timoti mʋ nɩɩ lɩɩ Yesu kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ nɩɩ fʋ gyɛ mɛ kesintin tɔ kebii. Kabwaala yɛ kʋwɛɛ kuwu yɛ kayɩɩ yuuli mʋ nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Krisito Yesu asɛ mʋ kɩ ba fʋ sʋ.

eng: When I left for Macedonia, I asked you to stay behind in Ephesus so that you could instruct certain individuals not to spread wrong teaching.
local: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ waa fʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n kpee Masedoniya mʋ, sii kyɩna Efeso tʋtɔ kɛ fʋ nyɛ tii antɩŋɛsa akaapʋpʋ mʋ kɩkaapʋ ɔkpa.

eng: They shouldnt pay attention to myths and endless genealogies. Their teaching only causes useless guessing games instead of faithfulness to Gods way of doing things.
local: Tɔwɛ sa bamʋ yɛ ba yɛgɛ asɩrɩkpan ikisii‐sɩn yɛ kakʋʋgɛ tɔ nkyaga sʋ asɩn. Lɩɩ fɛɛ falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ ɩɩ bɩya ɩmɔɔrɛ‐libi nɩn, nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ kyɛ asa kabwaarɛ‐sun mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ bɔla kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ mʋ tɔ.

eng: The goal of instruction is love from a pure heart, a good conscience, and a sincere faith.
local: Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ mɛ kɔnɔsa nɩmʋ yɩlɛ sʋ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, asa ba nyɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ kɩ lɩɩ kɔkɔlɔ fuuli tɔ, yɛ nfɛɛrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn, yɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kesintin tɔ.

eng: Because they missed this goal, some people have been distracted by talk that doesnt mean anything.
local: Akʋ ba man bɩla ba buu ɩnɩmʋ, amaa ba buu ntɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ kasɛ.

eng: They want to be teachers of Law without understanding either what they are saying or what they are talking about with such confidence.
local: Bee biti ba baa ba gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbara akaapʋpʋ mʋ, amaa ba man nyi nɩɩ be mee nu asɩn mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ yɩlɛ ɩmʋ sʋ bɛɛ tɔwɛ mʋ kasɛ.

eng: Now we know that the Law is good if used appropriately.
local: An nyi fɛɛ nbara mʋ ɩ bʋrɔn, nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kan buu ɩmʋ ɔkpa sʋ mʋ, ɩ bʋrɔn sa mʋ.

eng: We understand this: the Law isnt established for a righteous person but for people who live without laws and without obeying any authority. They are the ungodly and the sinners. They are people who are not spiritual, and nothing is sacred to them. They kill their fathers and mothers, and murder others.
local: Nɩɩ an bɩla an nyi yɛ nbara mʋ ɩ man dɛ sa ɩkpa kyiigisa wuya ana, amaa ɩ dɛ sa nbara anyitapu yɛ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn wuya ana, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba mɛɛ bʋnyaa Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ alibi awaapʋ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ be mee sun Ɩbwaarɛ, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ mɔɔ bamʋ‐sɛ ana abɛɛ bamʋ‐nyi ana, yɛ asa amɔɔpʋ.

eng: They are people who are sexually unfaithful, and people who have intercourse with the same sex. They are kidnappers, liars, individuals who give false testimonies in court, and those who do anything else that is opposed to sound teaching.
local: Nbara mʋ ɩ bʋ tɔ sa bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ lɩɩ bamʋ‐kuli ana abɛɛ bamʋ‐ka ana kamaa, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa agyaga‐sɩn, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɩtaa asa bɛɛ fɛ kɛ ba nyɛ afulee, yɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya ana, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩn antɩŋɛsa bɛɛ bɔ ntan, yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa asɩn kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ i mee buu kesintin kɩkaapʋ mʋ.

eng: Sound teaching agrees with the glorious gospel of the blessed God that has been trusted to me.
local: Kɩkaapʋ nɩmʋ kɩ lɩɩ bʋnyaa asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ayenbi ɩ gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ taa waa mɛ abaa tɔ yɛ n tɔwɛ n sa asa.

eng: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me strength because he considered me faithful. So he appointed me to ministry.
local: N sʋ afwaala n sa anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Krisito Yesu, mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sa mɛ ɔlʋn yɛ n waa kusun, nɩɩ o wu mɛ fɛɛ kesintin‐gyipu, nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mɛ yɛ n ba waa mu kusun mʋ.

eng: even though I used to speak against him, attack his people, and I was proud. But I was shown mercy because I acted in ignorance and without faith.
local: Naafɔɔ saŋa kʋ tɔ mʋ, n kyɩna n tɔwɛ n nyita Krisito mʋ, yɛgɛ n nyanla mu abuupu, nɩɩ n biti bamʋ keluu. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ wu mɛ kʋwɛɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ n man kyɩna n nyi nɩn, nɩɩ n man kyɩna kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii.

eng: Our Lords favor poured all over me along with the faithfulness and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Krisito bwaala mɛ gaa, nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ n kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii, nɩɩ n nyɛ mu kebiti mʋ.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves full acceptance: Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners—and Im the biggest sinner of all.
local: Katɔwɛ nɩmʋ gyɛ kesintin nɩn, nɩɩ i tiri fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa ɔ kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ gyii. Asɩn mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, Krisito Yesu ba dulinyaa tɔ nɩn yɛ ɔ ba mɔlɩgɛ alibi awaapʋ, nɩɩ bamʋ tɔ kpini mʋ, mɛ ɩ gyɛ olibilibi mʋ.
