eng: But this is why I was shown mercy, so that Christ Jesus could show his endless patience to me first of all. So Im an example for those who are going to believe in him for eternal life.
local: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ wu mɛ kʋwɛɛ, saamʋ Krisito Yesu ɩ nyɛ lɛɛ mu kenyiita lala mʋ kaapʋ, kɛ ɩ ba waa sɩnkaala sa asa mʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba ba kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ kpini, kɛ ba nyɛ nkpa kakpaa.

eng: Now to the king of the ages, to the immortal, invisible, and only God, may honor and glory be given to him forever and always! Amen.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ a taa bɛɛrɛɛ yɛ bʋnyaa sa Owura mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ kakpaa naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ ɔkaa. Nɩɩ mʋ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ o mee wu, nɩɩ a mee wu mʋ yɛ ansi. Amen!.

eng: Timothy, my child, Im giving you these instructions based on the prophecies that were once made about you. So if you follow them, you can wage a good war.
local: Mi‐bii Timoti, n sa fʋ falɛ kɔnɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ii buu asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ wʋla tɔwɛ yɩla lɩɩ fʋ sʋ mʋ. Nɩɩ fʋ kan taa ɩmʋ waa kusun mʋ, fii biti fʋ kɔ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ asɩn mʋ ɩkɔ.

eng: because you have faith and a good conscience. Some people have ruined their faith because they refused to listen to their conscience.
local: yɛgɛ fʋ sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ nɩɩ fʋ bɩɩ fʋ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ yɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ fɩɩ waa mʋ ɩ bʋrɔn. Akʋ ba kina ɩnɩmʋ nɩɩ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii i muuri fɛɛ afuu maa muuri ɔkʋlɩ mʋ.

eng: such as Hymenaeus and Alexander. Ive handed them over to Satan so that they can be taught not to speak against God.
local: Bamʋ tɔ akʋ ɩ gyɛ Himenasu yɛ Alekisanda. N yɛgɛ bamʋ waa Sɩtaanɛ abaa tɔ, kɛ ɩ kaapʋ bamʋ yɛ ba man bɩla tɔwɛ yii Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: First of all, then, I ask that requests, prayers, petitions, and thanksgiving be made for all people.
local: Kanɩn sʋ, kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri nɩɩ n kʋlɛ yɛ fan waa mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fan taa asa asɩn tirisa tʋʋ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ, kɛ fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ, kɛ fan yɩlɛ bamʋ ayaa tɔ kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ sa bamʋ, kɛ fan taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: Pray for kings and everyone who is in authority so that we can live a quiet and peaceful life in complete godliness and dignity.
local: Fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ sa awura yɛ alʋlʋnpʋ kpini, kɛ a kyɩna keyuula yɛ kayɩɩ‐yuuli tɔ, kɛ a sun Ɩbwaarɛ danbɩrasa, kɛ a kyɩna kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa.

eng: This is right and it pleases God our savior.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ bʋrɔn, nɩɩ ɩmʋ ii gyii Ɩbwaarɛ anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ mu ansi.

eng: who wants all people to be saved and to come to a knowledge of the truth.
local: nɩɩ mʋ ii biti fɛɛ asa kpini ba nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ kɛ ba ba bɩɩ kesintin mʋ.

eng: There is one God and one mediator between God and humanity, the human Christ Jesus.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋlʋn ɩ bʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɔsa kʋlʋn ɩ yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa asa nsana, nɩɩ Krisito Yesu ɩ gyɛ kanɩn nyɩmɩsa maŋa.

eng: who gave himself as a payment to set all people free. This was a testimony that was given at the right time.
local: nɩɩ mʋ ɩ taa mʋ nkpa lɛɛ saraga wu kɔɔlɛ asa kpini, ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ adansɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ kaapʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa.

eng: I was appointed to be a preacher and apostle of this testimony—Im telling the truth and Im not lying! Im a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and truth.
local: Kanɩn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mɛ waa asɩn mʋ kabɔɔ yɛ Krisito osunpu. Nɩɩ n gyɛ kesintin yɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ ɔkaapʋpʋ sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ. N tɔwɛ kesintin nɩn, n mɛɛ tɩn antɩŋɛsa.

eng: Therefore, I want men to pray everywhere by lifting up hands that are holy, without anger or argument.
local: N biti fɛɛ Krisito kʋbʋ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, anyɩn ba kʋsaa bamʋ abaa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ yɛgɛ agbʋ yɛ kamɔɔrɛ‐gyii man bʋ bamʋ tɔ.

eng: In the same way, I want women to enhance their appearance with clothing that is modest and sensible, not with elaborate hairstyles, gold, pearls, or expensive clothes.
local: N bɩla n biti fɛɛ akyɩɩ mʋ ba bun atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ kʋkwɛ bamʋ, nɩɩ ɩ dagaa, nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ agyaga‐sɩn. Ba man waa bamʋ inyini adawʋ‐adawʋ, nɩɩ ba man taa suwa atɔ abɛɛ agyibi yɛ ataa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ sʋ ɔgyalɩn mʋ bun.

eng: They should make themselves attractive by doing good, which is appropriate for women who claim to honor God.
local: Amaa ba taa kɩbaabʋtɔ danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dagaa fɛɛ akyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ bee sun Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: A wife should learn quietly with complete submission.
local: Akyɩɩ ba bun bamʋ nnɔ sʋ bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ bɩɩla atɔ.

eng: I dont allow a wife to teach or to control her husband. Instead, she should be a quiet listener.
local: N man sa ɔkpa yɛ ɔkyɩɩ ɔ kaapʋ abɛɛ ɔ baa ɔ sʋ ɔlʋn ɔnyɩn sʋ, i tiri fɛɛ ɔ waa surum.

eng: Adam was formed first, and then Eve.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Adam nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ gyankpaa tʋʋ pɔyɩ nɩɩ ɔ tʋʋ Hawa.

eng: Adam wasnt deceived, but rather his wife became the one who stepped over the line because she was completely deceived.
local: Nɩɩ man gyɛ Adam nɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ pɩna, amaa ɔkyɩɩ mʋ, nɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ pɩna nɩɩ o biliŋi alibi ɔwaapʋ.

eng: But a wife will be brought safely through childbirth, if they both continue in faith, love, and holiness, together with self-control.
local: Amaa nɩɩ akyɩɩ ba kan kyaga sʋ yɩlɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ yɛ kebiti yɛ kɩkyɩrɛkyɩrɛ tɔ, nɩɩ ba waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ mɔlɩgɛ bamʋ lɩɩ nbii kɩkʋʋgɛ sʋ.

eng: This saying is reliable: if anyone has a goal to be a supervisor in the church, they want a good thing.
local: Katɔwɛ nɩmʋ gyɛ kesintin nɩn, yɛ ɔkʋ kan ee biti Krisito kʋbʋ ɔbɩlɩsa kusun mʋ, ee biti kusun kparɛ nɩn.

eng: So the churchs supervisor must be without fault. They should be faithful to their spouse, sober, modest, and honest. They should show hospitality and be skilled at teaching.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ Krisito kʋbʋ ɔbɩlɩsa maa gyɛ nyɩmɩsa mʋ nɩɩ mʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ man sʋ asɩn, nɩɩ o kili ɔkyɩɩ kʋlʋn kpen, nɩɩ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ dɛ, nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩtaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ ɔ sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ, nɩɩ ɛɛ kɔɔlɛ afɔ, nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ kaapʋ.

eng: They shouldnt be addicted to alcohol or be a bully. Instead, they should be gentle, peaceable, and not greedy.
local: nɩɩ ɔ man gyɛ ɔtabʋʋpʋ, abɛɛ o du kirikiri, amaa o du bwahn, yɛgɛ ɔ man gyɛ oluu bitipu abɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ mu ansi ɩ payɩ afulee sʋ.

eng: They should manage their own household well—they should see that their children are obedient with complete respect.
local: Ɩ dagaa maa taalɛ kɩɩ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa kɩkpaara sʋ danbɩrasa, kɛ ɔ kɩɩ fɛɛ mu‐bii ana bee nu mʋ asɛ nɩɩ bee buu mʋ danbɩrasa.

eng: They shouldnt be new believers so that they wont become proud and fall under the devils spell.
local: Ɩ man dagaa maa gyɛ nyɩmɩsa pʋpwɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ, kɛ ɔ ba kaapʋ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kɛ ɔ lɩɩ tɩyɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ lɩɩ tɩyɛ nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ mʋ.

eng: They should also have a good reputation with those outside the church so that they wont be embarrassed and fall into the devils trap.
local: Ɩ dagaa maa gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Krisito akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu gbaa ba tɩɩ mʋ kɩtɩɩ danbɩrasa, kɛ ɔ man nyɛ tɩyɛ Sɩtaanɛ ɔdʋʋ tɔ kɛ o gyii ipeeli.

eng: In the same way, servants in the church should be dignified, not two-faced, heavy drinkers, or greedy for money.
local: Kanɩn maŋa gbaa nɩɩ ɩ dagaa Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ akyɛtɔpʋ mʋ ba maa gyɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ, nɩɩ ba man gyɛ nnɔ nyɔ‐nyɔ wuya ana, yɛgɛ be mee nuu nta gaa, nɩɩ ba man sʋ onsi‐payɩ libi lɩɩ afulee sʋ.

eng: They should hold on to the faith that has been revealed with a clear conscience.
local: Ɩ dagaa ba maa bɩɩ bamʋ nkɔlɔ tɔ fɛɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa mʋ ɩ bʋrɔn Krisito tɔ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii, mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ kaapʋ mʋ.

eng: They should also be tested and then serve if they are without fault.
local: I tiri fɛɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ ɔ gyankpaa waa bamʋ kɩɩ, amaa nɩɩ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kan man sʋ asɩn kʋ mʋ, ba nyɛ waa akyɛtɔpʋ kusun mʋ.

eng: In the same way, women who are servants in the church should be dignified and not gossip. They should be sober and faithful in everything they do.
local: Kanɩn ɔkpa maŋa sʋ, i tiri fɛɛ bamʋ akyɩɩ ana gbaa ba baa ba sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ, nɩɩ ba man gyɛ akyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ bee nyita asa atɩɩ, amaa bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ dɛ, nɩɩ asa ba kɔɔlɛ bamʋ gyii kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: Servants must be faithful to their spouse and manage their children and their own households well.
local: Krisito kʋbʋ ɔkyɛtɔpʋ ɔ baa ɔ gyɛ ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ o kili ɔkyɩɩ kʋlʋn kpen, nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ kɩɩ mu‐bii ana yɛ mʋ kɩkpaara sʋ danbɩrasa.

eng: Those who have served well gain a good standing and considerable confidence in the faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa akyɛtɔpʋ kusun danbɩrasa mʋ, bɛɛ nyɛ bɛɛrɛɛ, nɩɩ bɛɛ taalɛ yɩlɛ kɩnyɩn tɔ tɔwɛ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ Krisito Yesu gyii mʋ.

eng: I hope to come to you quickly. But Im writing these things to you so that.
local: Halɩɩ n maa sʋ tamaa yɛ n biti n ba fʋ asɛ nkɛ nnyɔ nɩmʋ tɔ gbaa mʋ, n kyʋrɔɔ asɩn nɩmʋ n bɩya fʋ.

eng: if Im delayed, youll know how you should behave in Gods household. It is the church of the living God and the backbone and support of the truth.
local: saamʋ, nɩɩ n kan n man ba bilen mʋ, fii biti fʋ bɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ asa ba kyɩna Ɩbwaarɛ kɩkpaara sʋ, nɩɩ kɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ kakpaa mʋ kʋbʋ mʋ. Kʋbʋ mʋ ɩ sʋ kesintin kenken fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ sabarɛ sʋ lenbu tɔ mʋ.

eng: Without question, the mystery of godliness is great: he was revealed as a human, declared righteous by the Spirit, seen by angels, preached throughout the nations, believed in around the world, and taken up in glory.
local: Nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ kamɔɔrɛ‐gyii fɛɛ anɛ Krisito kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ, ɩ gyɛ asɩn baalasa kparɛ. Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, Ɔ lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ kɔɔlɛ mʋ kyula kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ ba wu mʋ, nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ mʋ asɩn sa dulinyaa asa kpini, nɩɩ asa ba kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa mʋ kyʋn sʋsʋ.

eng: The Spirit clearly says that in latter times some people will turn away from the faith. They will pay attention to spirits that deceive and to the teaching of demons.
local: Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ bugi tɔ tɔwɛ yɛ nkɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, akʋ bee biti ba ba yɛgɛ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ, kɛ ba buu n‐yaayu libi antɩŋɛsa mʋ yɛ nbwɩɩ libi kɩkaapʋ mʋ.

eng: They will be controlled by the pretense of lying, and their own consciences will be seared.
local: Falɛ kɩkaapʋ mʋ lɩɩ antɩŋɛsa nnɔ nnyɔ‐nnyɔ wuya ana mʋ asɛ nɩn. Bɛɛ kɩɩ ansi bɛɛ tɩŋɛ antɩŋɛsa yɛgɛ bamʋ nkɔlɔ mɛɛ ŋmaa bamʋ.

eng: They will prohibit marriage and eating foods that God created—and he intended them to be accepted with thanksgiving by those who are faithful and have come to know the truth.
local: Ba bɩla bee tii asa ɔkpa fɛɛ ba man kili, kɛ ba man gyii agyitɔ kʋ. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ tʋʋ falɛ agyitɔ nɩmʋ sa fɛɛ, mʋ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii, nɩɩ be nyi kesintin mʋ, ba kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ abaa anyɔ kɛ ba taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: Everything that has been created by God is good, and nothing that is received with thanksgiving should be rejected.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tʋʋ mʋ bʋrɔn, nɩɩ ɩ man dagaa fɛɛ a kina ɩmʋ tɔ ɩkʋ, ɩ dagaa fɛɛ a kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ kɛ a taa afwaala sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: These things are made holy by Gods word and prayer.
local: Kpalɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn yɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ mʋ lɔŋɔ ɩmʋ sa kigyii.

eng: If you point these things out to the believers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus who has been trained by the words of faith and the good teaching that youve carefully followed.
local: Nɩɩ fɩɩ kan fɩɩ kaapʋ fʋ‐daa ana yɛ fu‐supu ana falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ mʋ, fii biti fʋ baa fʋ gyɛ Krisito Yesu kɩyaafɔlɛ danbɩrasa, fɛɛ fʋ maa dan kesintin asɩn danbɩrasa kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kɩkaapʋ danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ fii buu mʋ.

eng: But stay away from the godless myths that are passed down from the older women. Train yourself for a holy life!.
local: Lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ asɩrɩkpan ikisii‐sɩn yɛ adɩdaasɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ tɔnɔ, kɛ fʋ yɛgɛ kabwaarɛ‐sun danbɩrasa ɩ dɩn fʋ.

eng: While physical training has some value, training in holy living is useful for everything. It has promise for this life now and the life to come.
local: Nyɩmɩsa n‐yɩɩ kɩtɛɛŋɛ tɔ mʋ, ɩɩ sa mʋ tɔnɔ gbɛrɛɛ kʋ, amaa kabwaarɛ‐sun danbɩrasa ɩɩ bɩya mʋ tɔnɔ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩɩ sa mʋ nkpa nbɩɩnbɩɩ kakyɩna nɩmʋ tɔ yɛ nkpa kakpaa kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ ba mʋ.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves complete acceptance.
local: Katɔwɛ nɩmʋ gyɛ kesintin nɩn, nɩɩ i tiri fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ gyii.

eng: We work and struggle for this: Our hope is set on the living God, who is the savior of all people, especially those who believe.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ sʋ an payɩ ansi an sun kusun gaa, lɩɩ fɛɛ an taa anɛ tamaa gyaga Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ kakpaa, nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ sa asa kpini mʋ, fɔnfɔn bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ.

eng: Command these things. Teach them.
local: Kaapʋ bamʋ atɔ nɩmʋ, kɛ fʋ yɩlɛ bamʋ sʋ fɛɛ ba buu ɩmʋ.

eng: Dont let anyone look down on you because you are young. Instead, set an example for the believers through your speech, behavior, love, faith, and by being sexually pure.
local: Man yɛgɛ ɔkʋ ɔ kɩɩ fʋ fɛɛrɛ fɛɛ fʋ maa gyɛ kebii sʋ. Amaa yɛgɛ fʋ katɔwɛ, yɛ fʋ kɩbaabʋtɔ, yɛ fu kebiti, yɛ fʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii, yɛ fʋ kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ kakyɩna mʋ ɩ waa asɩn kaalasa sa akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ.

eng: Until I arrive, pay attention to public reading, preaching, and teaching.
local: Pɔyɩ kɛ n ba mʋ, taa fʋ n‐yɩɩ sa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ kɩkaragɛ sakyɔ tɔ, kɛ fʋ tɔwɛ abwaarɛsɩn, kɛ fʋ kaapʋ ɩmʋ.

eng: Dont neglect the spiritual gift in you that was given through prophecy when the elders laid hands on you.
local: Man kan kina fʋ kakɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla kɩlɛɛkaapʋ asɩn mʋ sʋ sa fʋ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ abɩlɩsa ba taa abaa gyaga fʋ sʋ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa fʋ mʋ.

eng: Practice these things, and live by them so that your progress will be visible to all.
local: Kɩta ɩmʋ tɔ kɛ fʋ taa fʋ n‐yɩɩ kpini sa ɩmʋ kɩwaa tɔ, kɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ o wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ fii kpee ansi tɔ fʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ.

eng: Focus on working on your own development and on what you teach. If you do this, you will save yourself and those who hear you.
local: Baa fʋ da fʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ yɛ fʋ Abwaarɛsɩn kɩkaapʋ mʋ sʋ. Baa fʋ maa sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ fʋ kan waa kanɩn mʋ, fii biti fʋ mɔlɩgɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bee nu fʋ asɛ mʋ.

eng: Dont correct an older man, but encourage him like hes your father; treat younger men like your brothers.
local: Man kan tɔwɛ yii kɩnyɩn‐bɩlɩsa, amaa tɔwɛ waa mʋ fɛɛ maa gyɛ fʋ‐sɛ. Tɔwɛ waa ayaafɔlɛ mʋ fɛɛ ba maa gyɛ fʋ‐daa ana yɛ fu‐supu ana.

eng: treat older women like your mother, and treat younger women like your sisters with appropriate respect.
local: Kɛ fʋ tɔwɛ waa akyɩɩ‐nyi mʋ fɛɛ fu‐nyi ana, kɛ fʋ tɔwɛ waa nbitebii mʋ fɛɛ fʋ‐pɩɩkyɩɩ ana yɛgɛ agyaga‐sɩn nfɛɛrɛ kʋ man tii sʋ.

eng: Take care of widows who are truly needy.
local: Taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa akulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ba tɛ bamʋ abaa sʋ, kɛ fʋ kɩɩ bamʋ sʋ.

eng: But if a particular widow has children or grandchildren, they should first learn to respect their own family and repay their parents, because this pleases God.
local: Amaa nɩɩ okulapu‐kyɩɩ kan ɔ sʋ nbii abɛɛ anaana‐bii mʋ, i tiri fɛɛ nbii mʋ ba kaapʋ bamʋ kabwaarɛ‐sun mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ ba kɩɩ bamʋ gbaa‐gbaa akpaara sʋ asa sʋ mʋ. Saamʋ, bamʋ awaasa mʋ, ɩɩ tɛɛla bamʋ akʋʋgɛpʋ yɛ bamʋ naana ana mʋ. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi.

eng: A widow who is truly needy and all alone puts her hope in God and keeps on going with requests and prayers, night and day.
local: Okulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛ mʋ kɩbaa sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ man sʋ ɔkɩɩsʋpʋ mʋ, ɛɛ taa mʋ tamaa gyaga Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ nɩn, nɩɩ ɛɛ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ kakyʋwapɛ yɛ kagyanbwɛ, ɛɛ kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ ɔ kyɛ mʋ tɔ.

eng: But a widow who tries to live a life of luxury is dead even while she is alive.
local: Amaa Okulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ sa kensi kigyii mʋ, ɔ tɛ nkpa tɔ bɩrɛ, yɛgɛ o du fɛɛ maa wu nɩn.

eng: Teach these things so that the families will be without fault.
local: Tɔwɛ falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ sa Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ, kɛ asa ba man nyɛ tɔwɛ asɩn akʋ yii bamʋ.

eng: But if someone doesnt provide for their own family, and especially for a member of their household, they have denied the faith. They are worse than those who have no faith.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man kan kɩɩ mʋ kʋʋpʋ ana sʋ, fɔnfɔn mʋ kɩkpaara sʋ asa sʋ mʋ, o kina kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ, nɩɩ mu alibi ɩ kyɔ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ Yesu Krisito gyii mʋ gbaa.

eng: Put a widow on the list who is older than years old and who was faithful to her husband.
local: Okulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man pɩɩ fʋʋ nsu adisiye mʋ, ɩ man dagaa fɛɛ ba taa mʋ kɩtɩɩ tii akulapu‐kyɩɩ atɩɩ mʋ sʋ. Ɩ dagaa okulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ maa gyɛ ɔkyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man lɩɩ mu‐kuli kamaa.

eng: She should have a reputation for doing good: raising children, providing hospitality to strangers, washing the feet of the saints, helping those in distress, and dedicating herself to every kind of good thing.
local: nɩɩ asa be nyi mʋ adanbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa, fɛɛ ɛɛ bɩla mu‐bii ana danbɩrasa, nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩtaa afɔ, nɩɩ ɛɛ bɩya mʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ ɛɛ kyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa tɔ, nɩɩ ɛɛ kyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bee wu awʋrʋfɔ mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɛɛ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ sa adanbɩrasa kʋmaa nɩmʋ kɩwaa.

eng: But dont accept younger widows for the list. When their physical desires distract them from Christ, they will want to get married.
local: Man kan taa akulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩ bɩlɛ mʋ atɩɩ tii akulapu atɩɩ mʋ sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ nɩɩ ɩ kan ba fɛɛ bamʋ kayalaga gyan kekili sʋ ɩ kyɔ kɩyɛgɛ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sa Krisito mʋ.

eng: Then they will be judged for setting aside their earlier commitment.
local: bee biti ba gyii kʋpwɛ lɩɩ bamʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ kɩda gyankpaasa sa Krisito mʋ tɔ.

eng: Also, they learn to be lazy by going from house to house. They are not only lazy, but they also become gossips and busybodies, talking about things they shouldnt.
local: Ɩmʋ kamaa mʋ bee biti ba biliŋi awʋlɛgyɔpʋ, yɛgɛ ba naa ba naa asa akpaara sʋ. Nɩɩ man gyɛ ɩmʋ nkʋn, ba naa bee kuli asa, yɛgɛ bee loo asa asɩn tɔ, nɩɩ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man dagaa nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔwɛ.

eng: So I want younger widows to marry, have children, and manage their homes so that they wont give the enemy any reason to slander us. .
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ n biti fɛɛ akulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩ bɩlɛ mʋ ba kili, kɛ ba kʋʋgɛ nbii kɛ ba kɩɩ bamʋ akpaara sʋ, saamʋ, ɔdʋn mʋ mɛɛ nyɛ‐nyɛ ɔkpa tɔwɛ asɩn libi kʋ lɩɩ anɛ sʋ.

eng: Some have already turned away to follow Satan.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ akulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ba man pɩɩ bɩlɛ mʋ, akʋ be tee bee buu Sɩtaanɛ ɩkpa.

eng: If any woman who is a believer has widows in her family, she should take care of them and not burden the church, so that it can help other widows who are truly needy.
local: Nɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ‐kɔɔlɛ‐gyipu kʋ kan ɔ sʋ akulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ mʋ kʋʋpʋ ana mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa kyɛ bamʋ tɔ kɛ ɩ man waa kasʋla sa Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ, saamʋ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ ɩ nyɛ kyɛ akulapu‐kyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ i tiri bamʋ mʋ tɔ.

eng: Elders who lead well should be paid double, especially those who work with public speaking and teaching.
local: Krisito kʋbʋ abɩlɩsa mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kɩɩ kʋbʋ mʋ asɩn kyɛɛkyɛɛ sʋ mʋ, bɛɛrɛɛ yɛ kʋkɔka dagaa sa bamʋ ɩlɩɩ ɩnyɔ, fɔnfɔn bamʋ nɩɩ bee sun abwaarɛsɩn katɔwɛ yɛ ɩmʋ kɩkaapʋ mʋ.

eng: The scripture says, Dont put a muzzle on an ox while it treads grain , and Workers deserve their pay .
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔwɛ yɛ, Ɩ man dagaa ba ŋmina naatɛ kɔnɔ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa kusun agyitɔ opula mʋ. Nɩɩ ba bɩla kyʋrɔɔ katɩn kʋ yɛ, Kusun ɔwaapʋ mʋ dagaa mʋ kʋkɔka.

eng: Dont accept an accusation made against an elder unless it is confirmed by two or three witnesses.
local: Man kan kɔɔlɛ alibi mʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ ba tɔwɛ fʋ lɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ ɔbɩlɩsa kʋ sʋ gyii, amɔɔ ba waa asa anyɔ abɛɛ asa.

eng: Discipline those who are sinning in front of everyone so that all the others will be afraid.
local: Bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa alibi mʋ, tɔwɛ yii bamʋ Krisito kʋbʋ mu ansi tɔ kɛ ɩ waa asansa mʋ kufuu.

eng: I charge you before God and Christ Jesus and the elect angels to follow these practices without bias, and without playing favorites.
local: N yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ Krisito Yesu, yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mu ansi tɔ, n tɔwɛ fʋ yɛ, fu buu nnɔsa ɩnɩmʋ, yɛgɛ fʋ man yɩlɛ ɔkʋ kamaa abɛɛ fʋ sʋ nmɛɛgɛ tɔ lɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋ tɔ.

eng: Dont rush to commission anyone to leadership, and dont participate in the sins of others. Keep yourself morally pure.
local: Man kan kpaala taa fʋ abaa gyaga asa sʋ waa bamʋ abɩlɩsa kabwaarɛ‐sun mʋ tɔ, kɛ fʋ man kan taa fʋ n‐yɩɩ loo akʋ alibi tɔ. Kɩta fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ ineesi sʋ.

eng: Dont drink water anymore, but use a little wine because of your stomach problems and your frequent illnesses.
local: Man bɩla nuu nkyu nkʋn, baa fii nuu nta gbɛrɛɛ, kpalɩ fɛɛ fʋ ɔtɔ tɔ maa taalɛ ɩɩ kɔ fʋ yɛ fʋ alɔ wuribi mʋ sʋ.

eng: The sins of some people are obvious, and the sins are judged before the people must face judgment, but the sins of other people show up later.
local: Asa akʋ alibi ɩ dan lɩɩ ifuli nɩn, nɩɩ ɩɩ gyankpaa bamʋ ii kpee Ɩbwaarɛ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ mʋ tɔ. Akʋ lɛɛ mɔɔ kamaa tɔ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ ba lɩɩ ifuli.

eng: In the same way, the good that people do is also obvious and cant be hidden.
local: Ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ, nɩɩ akʋ kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa ii biti ɩ lɩɩ ifuli. Nɩɩ halɩɩ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ lɩɩ ifuli gbaa mʋ ɩ mɛɛ taalɛ baala.

eng: Those who are under the bondage of slavery should consider their own masters as worthy of full respect so that Gods name and our teaching wont get a bad reputation.
local: Anyɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ bamʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana kasɛ mʋ kpini, i tiri fɛɛ ba maa taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa bamʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana, kɛ asa ba man nyɛ ɔkpa tɔwɛ asɩn libi kʋ yii Ɩbwaarɛ kɩtɩɩ abɛɛ anɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an kaapʋ mʋ.

eng: And those who have masters who are believers shouldnt look down on them because they are brothers. Instead, they should serve them more faithfully, because the people who benefit from your good service are believers who are loved. Teach and encourage these things.
local: Anyɛ mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana ba gyɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ, ba man kɔɔgɛ bɛɛrɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ sa bamʋ mʋ sʋ, fɛɛ ba maa bamʋ ba maa gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn Krisito tɔ mʋ sʋ. Amaa ɩ dagaa fɛɛ ba sun bamʋ kɔkɔlɔ fuuli tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ anyɩrɩpɛ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ nyɛ tɔnɔ bɛɛ lɩɩ anyɛ mʋ kusun tɔ mʋ, ba gyɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu nɩɩ anyɛ mʋ ba sʋ kebiti sa bamʋ. Falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ i tiri fɛɛ fʋ kaapʋ bamʋ, kɛ fʋ waa bamʋ aniya tɔ kɛ ba buu ɩmʋ.

eng: If anyone teaches anything different and doesnt agree with sound teaching about our Lord Jesus Christ and teaching that is consistent with godliness.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kaapʋ asɩn pʋpwɛ, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ kɔɔlɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kesintin asɩn mʋ, yɛ anɛ kabwaarɛ‐sun kɩkaapʋ ee gyii mʋ.

eng: that person is conceited. They dont understand anything but have a sick obsession with debates and arguments. This creates jealousy, conflict, verbal abuse, and evil suspicions.
local: ɔ gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kʋsaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋsʋ yɛgɛ ɔ man nyi sɛhn. Kanɩn ɔsa maŋa sʋ ɩmɔɔrɛ‐libi yɛ nluu kʋkɔ lɩɩ asɩn sʋ, nɩɩ ɩmʋ ɩɩ bɩya kayɩɩ basa yɛ nbarɩgɛ tɔ yɛ asebi yɛ nfɛɛrɛ libi kɩfɛ.

eng: There is constant bickering between people whose minds are ruined and who have been robbed of the truth. They think that godliness is a way to make money!.
local: Ɔsa maŋa ii gyii ɩmɔɔrɛ nɩn fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ i nyita, nɩɩ ba man bɩla ba sʋ kesintin asɩn mʋ, bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ kabwaarɛ‐sun ɩ gyɛ ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ bɔla sʋ nyɛ afulee.

eng: Actually, godliness is a great source of profit when it is combined with being happy with what you already have.
local: Amaa kabwaarɛ‐sun danbɩrasa sʋ tɔnɔ gaa, nɩɩ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ an sʋ mʋ ɩ kan kʋkwɛ anɛ mʋ.

eng: We didnt bring anything into the world and so we cant take anything out of it.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ a man bɩya sɛhn dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ, nɩɩ a mɛɛ taalɛ taa sɛhn lɩɩ kɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: well be happy with food and clothing.
local: Amaa nɩɩ an kan an sʋ agyitɔ yɛ atɔ bunsa mʋ, a yɛgɛ ɩ kʋkwɛ anɛ.

eng: But people who are trying to get rich fall into temptation. They are trapped by many stupid and harmful passions that plunge people into ruin and destruction.
local: Asa mʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba waa atɔ wuya ana mʋ, bɛɛ tɩyɛ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ tɔ yɛ ɔdʋʋ tɔ, kɛ be loo kimelensi yɛ kayalaga libi‐libi gaalaagaa tɔ, kɛ ɩ bɩɩtɛ bamʋ muuri kɛ ba wu nyita.

eng: The love of money is the root of all kinds of evil. Some have wandered away from the faith and have impaled themselves with a lot of pain because they made money their goal.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ kefulee biti gaa gyɛ alibi kʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔlɩɩkpa nɩn. Akʋ ba maa biti afulee kɩbansa sʋ mʋ, ba fɔyɩ lɩɩ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ, nɩɩ i yii bamʋ nkɔlɔ tɔ fɛɛ deebi.

eng: But as for you, man of God, run away from all these things. Instead, pursue righteousness, holy living, faithfulness, love, endurance, and gentleness.
local: Amaa fʋ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nyɩmɩsa nɩn, ɩmʋ sʋ lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ kpini tɔ, kɛ fʋ kɔ biti ɩkpa kikyiigi yɛ kabwaarɛ‐sun danbɩrasa yɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kebiti yɛ kenyiita yɛ bwahn kɩwaa.

eng: Compete in the good fight of faith. Grab hold of eternal life—you were called to it, and you made a good confession of it in the presence of many witnesses.
local: Kɔ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii keluu danbɩrasa mʋ, kɛ fʋ nyɛ nkpa kakpaa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ fʋ ba waa kɩmʋ tɔ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ fu bugi fʋ kɔnɔ tɔwɛ fʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sakyɔ tɔ, nɩɩ ba nu mʋ.

eng: I command you in the presence of God, who gives life to all things, and Christ Jesus, who made the good confession when testifying before Pontius Pilate.
local: N yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nkpa mʋ, maa Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ o bugi mʋ kɔnɔ tɔwɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ sa Pontu Paleti mu ansi tɔ mʋ, n tɔwɛ fʋ yɛ.

eng: Obey this order without fault or failure until the appearance of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: fu buu nnɔsa nɩmʋ, kɛ fʋ kɩtaa ɩmʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ, naa fʋʋ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ii biti ɔ ba mʋ.

eng: The timing of this appearance is revealed by God alone, who is the blessed and only master, the King of kings and Lord of lords.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ayenbi ɩ gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ, nɩɩ mʋ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ Ɔlʋlʋnpʋ, yɛ awura tɔ Owura, yɛ anyɩrɩpɛ mʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, mʋ ii biti ɔ yɛgɛ Krisito Yesu kibwii ba mʋ kɩ ba tɔ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ saŋa mʋ.

eng: He alone has immortality and lives in light that no one can come near. No human being has ever seen or is able to see him. Honor and eternal power belong to him. Amen.
local: Mʋ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ Ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ tɔ kakpaa, nɩɩ ɔ man bʋ tɔ o wu kakaakʋ, nɩɩ mʋ ɔ tɛ ɩŋmaŋɛsa mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ ŋalɩgɛ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa kʋ mɛɛ taalɛ tiri mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɔkʋ man pɩɩta wu mʋ, nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ wu mʋ. Bʋnyaa yɛ ɔlʋn ɩ gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ kakpaa Amen.

eng: Tell people who are rich at this time not to become egotistical and not to place their hope on their finances, which are uncertain. Instead, they need to hope in God, who richly provides everything for our enjoyment.
local: Tɔwɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ atɔ mʋ fɛɛ, ba man ba bɛɛ kɩɩ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ abɛɛ ba taa bamʋ tamaa gyaga bamʋ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ taalɛ fɔyɩ mʋ sʋ. Amaa ba taa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ sa anɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ an nyɛ falɛ, nɩɩ ɩɩ waa anɛ ɔkɔn mʋ sʋ.

eng: Tell them to do good, to be rich in the good things they do, to be generous, and to share with others.
local: Tɔwɛ bamʋ fɛɛ ba waa kɩdanbɩrasa kɛ bamʋ awaasa ɩ baa ɩ bʋrɔn gaa, kɛ ba lɛɛ bamʋ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ mʋ tɔ kyɛ abaa tɔ.

eng: When they do these things, they will save a treasure for themselves that is a good foundation for the future. That way they can take hold of what is truly life.
local: Nɩɩ ba kan waa kanɩn mʋ, ii biti ɩ waa fɛɛ bɛɛ kʋʋla atɔ bɛɛ yɩla bɛɛ sa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋsʋ nɩn. Saamʋ, bee biti ba nyɛ nkpa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kesintin nkpa mʋ.

eng: Timothy, protect what has been given to you in trust. Avoid godless and pointless discussions and the contradictory claims of so-called knowledge.
local: Timoti kɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa waa fʋ kɩbaa tɔ mʋ sʋ danbɩrasa. Lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ ntɔwɛ kɩyan yɛ ɩmɔɔrɛ‐gyaga mʋ nɩɩ akʋ bɛɛ tɩɩ yɛ kinyi mʋ tɔ.

eng: When some people adopted this false knowledge, they missed the goal of faith. May grace be with you all.
local: Ɩmʋ nɩɩ akʋ bɛɛ kaapʋ fɛɛ ba sʋ, nɩɩ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ ba fɔyɩ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ asɛ.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, to promote the promise of life that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ mʋ nɩɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti sʋ nɩɩ n ba waa Krisito Yesu osunpu, nɩɩ o sun mɛ yɛ n tɔwɛ Nkpa asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ yɩla, nɩɩ an nyɛ lɩɩ kʋkʋlʋn kɩwaa yɛ Krisito Yesu mʋ.

eng: To Timothy, my dear child. Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: N kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ n sa fʋ, mi‐bii bitisa Timoti. Anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Krisito Yesu kabwaala yɛ kʋwɛɛ kuwu yɛ keyuula ɩ baa ɩ bʋ fʋ asɛ.

eng: Im grateful to God, whom I serve with a good conscience as my ancestors did. I constantly remember you in my prayers day and night.
local: N fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ n sun mʋ yɛgɛ n man sʋ alibi akʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ mɛ naana ana ba daa sun mʋ mʋ. Saŋa kʋmaa n nyiŋi fʋ sʋ mɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ tɔ kagyanbwɛ yɛ kakyʋwapɛ.

eng: When I remember your tears, I long to see you so that I can be filled with happiness.
local: N nyiŋi fʋ ansikyu mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ɩ bʋ mɛ tɔ gaa fɛɛ n wu fʋ, saamʋ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ ɩ nyɛ fuuli mɛ.

eng: Im reminded of your authentic faith, which first lived in your grandmother Lois and your mother Eunice. Im sure that this faith is also inside you.
local: N nyiŋi fʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kesintin mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sʋ, nɩɩ fʋ naana‐kyɩɩsa Lowisi yɛ fu‐nyi Yunisi gbaa ba nyɛ mʋ. Nɩɩ n nyi kesintin fɛɛ kanɩn nɩɩ ngbaa fʋ sʋ.

eng: Because of this, Im reminding you to revive Gods gift that is in you through the laying on of my hands.
local: Lɩɩ falɛ sʋ mʋ, n nyiŋi fʋ fɛɛ, nin fʋlɔn waa Ɩbwaarɛ kakɛɛ, mʋ nɩɩ n kyɩna taa mɛ abaa gyaga fʋ sʋ, nɩɩ fʋ nyɛ mʋ tɔ.

eng: God didnt give us a spirit that is timid but one that is powerful, loving, and self-controlled.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ man sa anɛ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ waa anɛ afuupu, amaa ɔ sa anɛ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sa anɛ ɔlʋn, yɛ kebiti kɛ a bɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ an kɩtaa anɛ n‐yɩɩ.

eng: So dont be ashamed of the testimony about the Lord or of me, his prisoner. Instead, share the suffering for the good news, depending on Gods power.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ́ man waa fʋ ipeeli fɛɛ, fʋ maa tɔwɛ kesintin asɩn lɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ mʋ sʋ, abɛɛ ɩ́ waa fʋ ipeeli lɩɩ mɛ sʋ fɛɛ ba maa tii mɛ obu. Amaa fʋ gbaa fu gyii awʋrʋfɔ sa asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ, lɩɩ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa sa fʋ mʋ sʋ.

eng: God is the one who saved and called us with a holy calling. This wasnt based on what we have done, but it was based on his own purpose and grace that he gave us in Christ Jesus before time began.
local: Mʋ ɩ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ, nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ anɛ ba waa mʋ gbaa‐gbaa asa, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ yɛ an waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋrɔn sʋ, amaa lɩɩ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mu kiŋmina yɩla yɛ mʋ kabwaala sʋ. Nɩɩ Krisito Yesu sʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɔla taa kabwaala nɩmʋ bwaala anɛ pɔyɩ nɩɩ ɔ tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ.

eng: Now his grace is revealed through the appearance of our savior, Christ Jesus. He destroyed death and brought life and immortality into clear focus through the good news.
local: Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ ɔ bɔla anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Krisito Yesu kɩba mʋ sʋ ba lɛɛ kabwaala nɩmʋ kaapʋ anɛ, nɩɩ ɔ bɔla asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sʋ nyita lewu ɔlʋn mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ nkpa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ ɔkaa mʋ ifuli.

eng: I was appointed a messenger, apostle, and teacher of this good news.
local: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mɛ waa Krisito osunpu yɛ ɔkaapʋpʋ yɛ asɩn danbɩrasa nɩmʋ ɔtɔwɛpʋ.

eng: This is also why Im suffering the way I do, but Im not ashamed. I know the one in whom Ive placed my trust. Im convinced that God is powerful enough to protect what he has placed in my trust until that day.
local: Kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ n gyii ɩnɩmʋ awʋrʋfɔ falɛ. Amaa ɩ man sʋ mɛ ipeeli, lɩɩ fɛɛ n nyi ɔmʋ nɩɩ n kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii, nɩɩ n nyi kesintin tɔ fɛɛ ɛɛ taalɛ kun kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n taa waa mʋ abaa tɔ naa fʋʋ mʋ kakɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ.

eng: Hold on to the pattern of sound teaching that you heard from me with the faith and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: Timoti, kɩtaa kesintin asɩn kaapʋsa mʋ nɩɩ fʋ nyɛ lɩɩ mɛ asɛ mʋ kenken, kɛ fu buu ɩmʋ, yɛgɛ fʋ sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ lɩɩ Krisito Yesu sʋ an nyɛ mʋ.

eng: So, my child, draw your strength from the grace that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ mi‐bii, bɔla kabwaala mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Krisito Yesu tɔ mʋ nyɛ ɔlʋn.

eng: Protect this good thing that has been placed in your trust through the Holy Spirit who lives in us.
local: Bɔla Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ anɛ tɔ mʋ sʋ, kun asɩn kparɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa waa fʋ abaa tɔ mʋ.

eng: Take the things you heard me say in front of many other witnesses and pass them on to faithful people who are also capable of teaching others.
local: Nɩɩ asɩn kaapʋsa mʋ nɩɩ fu nu lɩɩ mɛ asɛ sakyɔ ansi tɔ mʋ, taa ɩmʋ waa asa mʋ nɩɩ fʋ kɔɔlɛ bamʋ gyii mʋ abaa tɔ, kɛ ngbaa bamʋ bɛ taalɛ taa kaapʋ akʋ gbaa.

eng: You know that everyone in Asia has turned away from me, including Phygelus and Hermogenes.
local: Fu nyi fɛɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ Asiya ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ kpini, ba sɩlɛ yɛgɛ mɛ, nɩɩ Figelusi maa Hemogene gbaa ba tii sʋ.

eng: Accept your share of suffering like a good soldier of Christ Jesus.
local: Yɩlɛ tɔ gyii awʋrʋfɔ yɛ anɛ, fɛɛ Krisito Yesu ɔnaakɔpʋ danbɩrasa.

eng: May the Lord show mercy to Onesiphorus household, because he supported me many times and he wasnt ashamed of my imprisonment.
local: N kʋlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ fɛɛ o wu Onesiforu kɩkpaara sʋ abi kpini kʋwɛɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa kʋmaa ɛɛ yɛgɛ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ kii fuuli mɛ. Nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ mʋ ipeeli fɛɛ ba tii mɛ obu gbaa.

eng: Nobody who serves in the military gets tied up with civilian matters, so that they can please the one who recruited them.
local: Ɔnaakɔpʋ ɩ payɩ ansi lɩɩ mu kusun sunsa sʋ, kɛ ɩ nyɛ bɔla mʋ ɔbɩlɩsa ansi, ɩmʋ sʋ ɔ mɛɛ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ ɛɛ waa asa mʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ anaakɔpʋ mʋ awaasa tɔ.

eng: After I arrived in Rome, he quickly looked for me and found me.
local: Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ki tii sʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ ba Roma mʋ, ɔ natɛ biti mɛ halɩɩ naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ o wu mɛ.

eng: Also in the same way, athletes dont win unless they follow the rules.
local: Kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ asɩlɛpʋ ba kan bɛɛ sɩlɛ, nɩɩ ɔmʋ nɩɩ o gyii sʋ kan ɔ man buu kɩsɩlɛ nbara mʋ, ɔ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ nyɛ kigyii sʋ kakɛɛ mʋ.

eng: May the Lord allow him to find his mercy on that day .
local: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ o wu mʋ kʋwɛɛ mʋ kakɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ. Fu nyi danbɩrasa kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kyɛ mɛ tɔ ɩkpa gaalaagaa sʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ Efeso kadɛ tɔ mʋ.

eng: A hardworking farmer should get the first share of the crop.
local: Nɩɩ onsi‐payɩ ɔdɔɔpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa kusun mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa gyankpaa gyii lɩɩ kʋdɔɔ mʋ tɔ.

eng: Think about what Im saying; the Lord will give you understanding about everything.
local: Fɛ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ falɛ sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ ii biti ɔ yɛgɛ fʋ taalɛ nu atɔ nɩmʋ kpini kasɛ.

eng: Remember Jesus Christ, who was raised from the dead and descended from David. This is my good news.
local: Nyiŋi Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɩɩ owura Dawidi kanan tɔ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kyiŋi mʋ lɩɩ lewu tɔ mʋ. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ mʋ.

eng: This is the reason Im suffering to the point that Im in prison like a common criminal. But Gods word cannot be imprisoned.
local: nɩɩ n gyii ɩmʋ awʋrʋfɔ falɛ, halɩɩ ba taa agbeeleebi ŋmina mɛ fɛɛ maa gyɛ alibi ɔwaapʋ. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ bɩrɛ, ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ taa agbeeleebi ŋmina ɩmʋ.

eng: This is why I endure everything for the sake of those who are chosen by God so that they too may experience salvation in Christ Jesus with eternal glory.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n yɩlɛ tɔ gyii awʋrʋfɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ, lɩɩ asa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ yɩla mʋ sʋ, kɛ ngbaa bamʋ ba bɔla Krisito Yesu sʋ nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ yɛ bʋnyaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ ɔkaa mʋ.

eng: This saying is reliable: If we have died together, we will also live together.
local: Katɔwɛ nɩmʋ gyɛ kesintin nɩn, nɩɩ an kan wu yɛ mʋ bɩrɛ, an biti a kyɩna nkpa tɔ yɛ mʋ.

eng: If we endure, we will also rule together. If we deny him, he will also deny us.
local: Nɩɩ an kan yɩlɛ tɔ gyii awʋrʋfɔ bɩrɛ, an biti i gyii kuwura yɛ mʋ. Nɩɩ an kan kina mʋ bɩrɛ, ngbaa mʋ ii biti o kina anɛ.

eng: If we are disloyal, he stays faithful because he cant be anything else than what he is.
local: Nɩɩ an man kan kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ, mɛɛ mʋ bɩrɛ ɔ san ee gyii mʋ asɩn sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ mɛɛ tɔwɛ asɩn, nɩɩ ɛɛ lɩɩ ɩmʋ kamaa.

eng: Remind them of these things and warn them in the sight of God not to engage in battles over words that arent helpful and only destroy those who hear them.
local: Kyaga sʋ nyiŋi bamʋ falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ sʋ. Yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩtɩɩ tɔ da bamʋ amu tɔ lɩɩ ntɔwɛ sʋ kamɔɔrɛ‐gyii, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ man sʋ kyaarɛ, amɔɔ ii nyita bamʋ nɩɩ bee nu ɩmʋ mʋ nɩn.

eng: Make an effort to present yourself to God as a tried-and-true worker, who doesnt need to be ashamed but is one who interprets the message of truth correctly.
local: Kpan fʋ n‐yɩɩ kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ o wu fʋ fɛɛ fʋ dagaa, nɩɩ fʋ gyɛ kusun osunpu mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man dagaa maa sʋ ipeeli mu kusun mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ o nyi Ɩbwaarɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ kɩkaapʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

eng: Avoid their godless discussions, because they will lead many people into ungodly behavior.
local: Lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ aligyima mʋ nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ bʋnyaa Ɩbwaarɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa ɩmʋ mʋ, ɩɩ bɩɩtɛ bamʋ ɩɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ gaa.

eng: and their ideas will spread like an infection. This includes Hymenaeus and Philetus.
local: Nɩɩ kanɩn asa mʋ kɩkaapʋ ɩɩ yɛlɩgɛ fɛɛ kɩtamɛɛ. Anyɩn anyɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba tii bamʋ sʋ ɩ gyɛ Himenasu maa Filetusi.

eng: who have deviated from the truth by claiming that the resurrection has already happened. This has undermined some peoples faith.
local: Ba fɔyɩ kesintin asɩn mʋ ɔkpa, nɩɩ bɛɛ kaapʋ yɛ, asa kikyiŋi lɩɩ lewu tɔ mʋ tɛɛ wʋla ba kyʋn, nɩɩ kɩkaapʋ nɩmʋ ii nyita akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ akʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii.

eng: Gods solid foundation is still standing with this sign: The Lord knows the people who belong to him, and Everyone who confesses the Lords name must avoid wickedness. .
local: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn du nɩn fɛɛ ɔpɔrɛ gyankpaasa mʋ nɩɩ o yii mʋ, nɩɩ ɩ yɩlɛ gin, nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ asɩn nɩmʋ ba gyaga kɩmʋ sʋ yɛ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nyi bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ, nɩɩ ba bɩla kyʋrɔɔ yɛ, Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ ɔ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ, dagaa maa yɛgɛ alibi kɩwaa.

eng: In a mansion, there arent just gold and silver bowls but also some bowls that are made of wood and clay. Some are meant for special uses, some for garbage.
local: Kɩkpaara lala sʋ mʋ, atɔ mʋ nɩɩ bee gyii bee nu ɩmʋ tɔ kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ ɩ bʋ tɔ. Ba taa suwa abɛɛ gbiti waa ɩkʋ, nɩɩ ba taa iyu abɛɛ kabɔlɛ waa ɩmʋ ɩkʋ mɔɔ. Ɩmʋ ɩkʋ ɩ dɛ sa nkɛ kparɛ kigyii, nɩɩ ɩkʋ mɔɔ ɩ man dɛ sa nkɛ kparɛ kʋ.

eng: So if anyone washes filth off themselves, they will be set apart as a special bowl. They will be useful to the owner of the mansion for every sort of good work.
local: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ alibi kɩwaa tɔ mʋ, ee biti ɔ baa ɔ dɛ sa nkɛ kparɛ kigyii mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ ba waa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kyaarɛ sa mʋ ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ kʋʋla mʋ n‐yɩɩ yɩla sa kusun danbɩrasa kʋmaa nɩmʋ.

eng: Run away from adolescent cravings. Instead, pursue righteousness, faith, love, and peace together with those who confess the Lord with a clean heart.
local: Amaa lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ ayaafɔlɛ‐sɩn kayalaga libi tɔ, kɛ fʋ taa fu ansi gyaga ɩkpa kikyiigi yɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kebiti yɛ kayɩɩ yuuli sʋ, bʋga yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba taa kɔkɔlɔ fuuli sʋ bee sun Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ sʋ.

eng: Avoid foolish and thoughtless discussions, since you know that they produce conflicts.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kimelensi ɩmɔɔrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ kasɛ mʋ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fu nyi ɩ maa bɩya nluu.

eng: Gods slave shouldnt be argumentative but should be kind toward all people, able to teach, patient.
local: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ kɩyaafɔlɛ man dagaa maa kɔ keluu, amaa ɔ dagaa maa waa kɩdanbɩrasa ɛɛ sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ, kɛ ɔ taalɛ kaapʋ, kɛ ɔ nyɛ kenyiita kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: and should correct opponents with gentleness. Perhaps God will change their mind and give them a knowledge of the truth.
local: Bamʋ nɩɩ bee gyii mʋ ɩmɔɔrɛ mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa lɛɛ asɩn mʋ kaapʋ bamʋ laakalɛ sʋ, akʋtɔ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti o bugi ɔkpa sa bamʋ, kɛ ba yɛgɛ alibi kɩwaa, kɛ ba ba bɩɩ kesintin asɩn mʋ.

eng: They may come to their senses and escape from the devils trap that holds them captive to do his will.
local: Kɛ ba nyɛ nfɛɛrɛ danbɩrasa, kɛ ba sɩlɛ lɩɩ ɔdʋʋ mʋ nɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ sʋʋ kɩtaa bamʋ, nɩɩ bee nu mʋ asɛ bɛɛ waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ee biti mʋ tɔ.

eng: Understand that the last days will be dangerous times.
local: Amaa baa fʋ nyi ɩnɩmʋ fɛɛ, nkɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, awʋrʋfɔ damantɛ ii biti ɩ ba asa sʋ.

eng: People will be selfish and love money. They will be the kind of people who brag and who are proud. They will slander others, and they will be disobedient to their parents. They will be ungrateful, unholy.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ, asa bee biti ba kɩɩ biti bamʋ nkʋn lɛɛ, yɛ kefulee biti bansa, yɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩkaapʋ, yɛ alala‐sɩn, yɛ asa kɩsaalɛ, yɛ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn sa bamʋ akʋʋgɛpʋ, nɩɩ ɔkʋ waa kɩdanbɩrasa sa bamʋ gbaa ba mɛɛ lɛɛ mʋ kɩtɩɩ, nɩɩ ba mɛɛ taa Ɩbwaarɛ bɛɛ tɩɩ sɛhn.

eng: unloving, contrary, and critical. They will be without self-control and brutal, and they wont love what is good.
local: nɩɩ ba mɛɛ yɛ bɛ nyɛ kebiti sa ɔkʋ, nɩɩ be mee wu ɔkʋ kʋwɛɛ, nɩɩ bee biti ba nyita asa kɩtɩɩ, nɩɩ ba mɛɛ taalɛ kɩtaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ asa bee biti ba sɩlɛ bamʋ, nɩɩ bee biti ba kisi kɩdanbɩrasa.

eng: They will be people who are disloyal, reckless, and conceited. They will love pleasure instead of loving God.
local: nɩɩ bee biti ba waa adiboyipu, nɩɩ ba mɛɛ fɛ nfɛɛrɛ pɔyɩ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa kʋtɔ kʋ, nɩɩ bɛɛ kaapʋ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ bee biti dulinyaa tɔ ɔkɔn ba kyɔ Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: They will look like they are religious but deny Gods power. Avoid people like this.
local: Bee biti ba sun Ɩbwaarɛ ansi sʋ, amaa ba kina mʋ ɔlʋn mʋ. Man bʋga yɛ kanɩn asa.

eng: Some will slither into households and control immature women who are burdened with sins and driven by all kinds of desires.
local: Bamʋ tɔ akʋ bɛɛ taa kanyaasɩn libi bee loo akpaara sʋ, nɩɩ bɛɛ taa kɔnɔ tɔ kɔn bɛɛ pɩna akyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ ba mɛɛ taalɛ kɩtaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ bamʋ alibi i du fɛɛ kasʋla ɩ gyan bamʋ sʋ, nɩɩ kayalaga libi kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ bʋ bamʋ tɔ.

eng: These women are always learning, but they can never arrive at an understanding of the truth.
local: Kanɩn akyɩɩ mʋ bɛɛ kpan n‐yɩɩ saŋa kʋmaa bɛɛ bɩɩla, amaa ba mɛɛ taalɛ ba bɩɩ kesintin mʋ.

eng: These people oppose the truth in the same way that Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses. Their minds are corrupt and their faith is counterfeit.
local: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Gyanise maa Gyanberesi ba daa kyɩna kʋsʋ yɩlɛ Mosesi sʋ mʋ, kanɩn nɩɩ falɛ anyɩn anɩmʋ gbaa bɛɛ kɔ bee tii kesintin mʋ ɔkpa. Bamʋ amu i nyita, nɩɩ ba man sʋ ɔyɩlɛkpa kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ.

eng: But they wont get very far. Their foolishness will become obvious to everyone like those others.
local: Bamʋ awaasa nɩmʋ mee kpiya bamʋ ansi tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ii biti o wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba melensi, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Gyanise maa Gyanberesi kimelensi ɩ daa lɩɩ ifuli mʋ.

eng: But you have paid attention to my teaching, conduct, purpose, faithfulness, patience, love, and endurance.
local: Amaa fɛɛ fʋ bɩrɛ, fu nyi asɩn mʋ nɩɩ n kaapʋ mʋ kpini, yɛ mɛ kakyɩna tɔ, yɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ mi ansi ɩ gyan sʋ, yɛ mɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii, yɛ mɛ kenyiita, yɛ mi kebiti, yɛ mɛ kɩyɩlɛ tɔ gyii awʋrʋfɔ.

eng: You have seen me experience physical abuse and ordeals in places such as Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. I put up with all sorts of abuse, and the Lord rescued me from it all!.
local: Fu nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ asa ba nyanla mɛ, yɛ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ n gyii Antiyoki yɛ Ikoniyum yɛ Lisitira ndɛ tɔ, nɩɩ n nyɛ kenyiita yɩlɛ kanyanla mʋ kpini tɔ, nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito lɛɛ mɛ lɩɩ ɩmʋ kpini tɔ.

eng: In fact, anyone who wants to live a holy life in Christ Jesus will be harassed.
local: Ɩ gyɛ kesintin fɛɛ, ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti o buu Krisito Yesu, kɛ ɔ waa Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti mʋ, ee biti ɔ nyɛ kanyanla.

eng: But evil people and swindlers will grow even worse, as they deceive others while being deceived themselves.
local: Alibi awaapʋ yɛ apɩnapʋ bɩrɛ bamʋ alibi ii biti ɩ lɔŋɔ tii sʋ nɩn, kanan mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ pɩna asa mʋ, kanɩn gbaa nɩɩ ii biti ɩ pɩna bamʋ.

eng: But you must continue with the things you have learned and found convincing. You know who taught you.
local: Amaa fɛɛ fʋ bɩrɛ, kyaga sʋ kɩtaa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fʋ bɩɩla nɩɩ fʋ kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fu nyi bamʋ nɩɩ fʋ bɩɩla lɩɩ bamʋ asɛ.

eng: Since childhood you have known the holy scriptures that help you to be wise in a way that leads to salvation through faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: nɩɩ lɩɩ fʋ kibii tɔ mʋ, fu nyi Asɩnkyan yɩlasa kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɩmʋ ɩ taalɛ sa fʋ kanyaasɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bɩya kamɔlɩgɛ bɔla kɩkɔɔlɛ Krisito Yesu gyii sʋ.

eng: Every scripture is inspired by God and is useful for teaching, for showing mistakes, for correcting, and for training character.
local: Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ kpini ɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ nɩn, nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn sa kɩkaapʋ, yɛ katɔwɛ yii, yɛ kɩtɔwɛ kyiigi, yɛ kɩbɩla ɩkpa kikyiigi tɔ.

eng: so that the person who belongs to God can be equipped to do everything that is good.
local: saamʋ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔsa ɩ nyɛ dan tɔ sa kusun danbɩrasa kʋmaa kɩwaa.

eng: Im giving you this commission in the presence of God and of Christ Jesus, who is coming to judge the living and the dead, and by his appearance and his kingdom.
local: Krisito Yesu ii biti ɔ ba yɛ mu kuwura‐gyii ba talɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba tɛ nkpa tɔ, yɛ alewupu. N yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa Yesu Krisito ansi tɔ n sa fʋ kɔnɔ yɛ.

eng: Preach the word. Be ready to do it whether it is convenient or inconvenient. Correct, confront, and encourage with patience and instruction.
local: tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ. Kʋʋla fʋ n‐yɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa yɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man dagaa, taa kenyiita kpini tɔwɛ kyiigi asa ɩkpa, kɛ fʋ tɔwɛ yii asa, kɛ fʋ tɔwɛ waa asa ɔlʋn tɔ.

eng: There will come a time when people will not tolerate sound teaching. They will collect teachers who say what they want to hear because they are self-centered.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa kʋ ii biti ɔ ba nɩɩ asa ba mɛɛ yɛ be buu kesintin kɩkaapʋ mʋ. Amɔɔ be buu bamʋ kayalaga tɔ asɩn. Bee biti ba kɩɩ biti akaapʋpʋ damantɛ kyaabɔɔ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ, kɛ bɛ kaapʋ bamʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋkɔn bamʋ asʋ tɔ kɛ be nu.

eng: They will turn their back on the truth and turn to myths.
local: Ba man bɩla yɛ be nu kesintin mʋ, bee biti ba biliŋi ba buu asɩrɩkpan ikisii‐sɩn.

eng: But you must keep control of yourself in all circumstances. Endure suffering, do the work of a preacher of the good news, and carry out your service fully.
local: Amaa fɛɛ fʋ bɩrɛ, baa fʋ da fu kumu sʋ asɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ, nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ yɩlɛ awʋrʋfɔ tɔ, waa asɩn danbɩrasa kusun mʋ ɔtɔwɛpʋ, sun fʋ kusun kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa naa lʋwɛ.

eng: Im already being poured out like a sacrifice to God, and the time of my death is near.
local: Mɛɛ mɛ bɩrɛ mɛ saŋa fʋ fɛɛ n wu, nɩɩ i du nɩn fɛɛ mɛ nkpa ɩɩ kyɛɛgɛ ɩɩ wʋrɩgɛ fɛɛ saraga sa Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: I have fought the good fight, finished the race, and kept the faith.
local: N kɔ keluu danbɩrasa mʋ, nɩɩ n sɩlɛ kɩsɩlɛ mʋ naa fʋʋ ɔkaa, nɩɩ n kɩtaa kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ.

eng: At last the champions wreath that is awarded for righteousness is waiting for me. The Lord, who is the righteous judge, is going to give it to me on that day. Hes giving it not only to me but also to all those who have set their heart on waiting for his appearance.
local: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kii gyoo mɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kigyii sʋ kakɛɛ, mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ, ɩkpa kyiigisa ɔtalɛpʋ mʋ ii biti ɔ taa sa mɛ kanɩn kakɛ maŋa, nɩɩ man gyɛ mɛ nkʋn, amaa yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ gyʋgyʋʋ bamʋ yɛ be wu Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kɩba mʋ.

eng: Do your best to come to me quickly.
local: Kpan fʋ n‐yɩɩ kɛ fʋ ba mɛ asɛ bilen.

eng: Demas has fallen in love with the present world and has deserted me and has gone to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
local: lɩɩ fɛɛ Demasi sʋ kebiti sa dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ atɔ, nɩɩ ɔ sɩlɛ yɛgɛ mɛ kpee Tesalonika kadɛ tɔ. Kresensi kyʋn Galati kadɛ tɔ, nɩɩ Titusi mɔɔ kyʋn Dalimatiya kadɛ tɔ.

eng: Only Luke is with me. Get Mark, and bring him with you. He has been a big help to me in the ministry.
local: Luka nkʋn ɩ bʋ mɛ asɛ. Biti Maki kɛ fʋ taa mʋ bɩya mɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ ɩ taalɛ kyɛ mɛ tɔ, mi kusun mʋ tɔ.

eng: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
local: N sun Takikusi yɛ o kpee Efeso kadɛ tɔ.

eng: When you come, bring along the coat I left with Carpus in Troas. Also bring the scrolls and especially the parchments.
local: Nɩɩ fʋ kan fɩɩ ba mʋ, fʋ taa mɛ balɩmaasʋ mʋ nɩɩ n yɛgɛ yɩla Kapusi asɛ Trowa kadɛ tɔ, yɛ mɛ ɩwʋlɛ, fɔnfɔn ɩmʋ nɩɩ ba taa atɔbwaaya ɩwʋlɛ waa mʋ bɩya mɛ.

eng: Alexander, the craftsman who works with metal, has really hurt me. The Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
local: Alekisanda mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ bayɩpʋ mʋ waa mɛ alibi gaa. Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa mɛ mʋ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ ii biti ɔ ka mʋ kʋkɔ.

eng: But watch out for him, because he opposes our teaching.
local: Fʋ gbaa fʋ, baa fʋ da mʋ sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ yɩlɛ sʋ kenken ee tii anɛ asɩn tɔwɛsa mʋ ɔkpa.

eng: No one took my side at my first court hearing. Everyone deserted me. I hope that God doesnt hold it against them!.
local: Kakɛ gyankpaasa mʋ nɩɩ n yɩlɛ n lɛɛ kɔnɔ mɛ asɩn kigyii tɔ mʋ, ɔkʋ man ba yɩlɛ mɛ kamaa, ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ palɛ mʋ kamaa sa mɛ. N kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ ɔ man ka bamʋ kʋkɔ lɩɩ ɩmʋ sʋ.

eng: But the Lord stood by me and gave me strength, so that the entire message would be preached through me and so all the nations could hear it. I was also rescued from the lions mouth!.
local: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ yɩlɛ mɛ kamaa nɩɩ ɔ sa mɛ ɔlʋn, nɩɩ n nyɛ tɔwɛ asɩn mʋ lʋwɛ, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man gyɛ Gyiwu abi mʋ gbaa ba nu ɩmʋ. Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mɛ lɩɩ bɩranɛ kɔnɔ tɔ.

eng: The Lord will rescue me from every evil action and will save me for his heavenly kingdom. To him be the glory forever and always. Amen.
local: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu mʋ ii biti ɔ lɛɛ mɛ lɩɩ alibi kʋmaa mʋ tɔ, kɛ ɔ bɩya mɛ sʋsʋ kuwura‐gyii mʋ tɔ yɛ alanfɩya. Mʋ nɩɩ bʋnyaa gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ kakpaa. Amen.

eng: Say hello to Prisca and Aquila and the household of Onesiphorus.
local: Fwaala Prisila maa Akwila yɛ Onesiforu kɩkpaara sʋ asa kpini.

eng: Erastus stayed in Corinth, and I left Trophimus in Miletus because of his illness.
local: Erasitu sii ɔ tɛ Korinto kadɛ tɔ, nɩɩ n yɛgɛ Trofimu mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ lɔɔ mʋ, Miletu kadɛ tɔ.

eng: Try hard to come to me before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, Claudia, and all the brothers and sisters say hello.
local: Kpan fʋ n‐yɩɩ kɛ fʋ fʋʋ nfɩɩ pɔyɩ kɛ gbangban ɔ fʋʋ. Ebulusi yɛ Pudensi yɛ Linusi yɛ Kilodiya yɛ bamʋ bɩrɩsa ana kpini bɛɛ fwaala fʋ.

eng: The Lord be with your spirit. Grace be with you all.
local: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ yɛ fʋ kayaayu fan kyɩna. Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ bwaala fanɛ.

eng: From Paul, a slave of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ. Im sent to bring about the faith of Gods chosen people and a knowledge of the truth that agrees with godliness.
local: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ mɛ Pɔɔlɩ, Ɩbwaarɛ kɩyaafɔlɛ yɛ Yesu Krisito osunpu mʋ asɛ. O sun mɛ yɛ n ba kyɛ mʋ asa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ, kɛ n kaapʋ bamʋ kɛ ba bɩɩ kesintin mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ asa bee buu kabwaarɛ‐sun danbɩrasa.

eng: Their faith and this knowledge are based on the hope of eternal life that God, who doesnt lie, promised before time began.
local: mʋ nɩɩ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ kinyi ɩ gyan nkpa kakpaa tamaa mʋ sʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ tɩn antɩŋɛsa mʋ, da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ sa anɛ nkpa nɩmʋ lɩɩ koo npiili asɛ.

eng: God revealed his message at the appropriate time through preaching, and I was trusted with preaching this message by the command of God our savior.
local: nɩɩ saŋa kyɛɛkyɛɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ mʋ lɛɛ mʋ asɩn kaapʋ, fɛɛ maa taa waa mɛ abaa tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ sa mɛ kɔnɔ yɛ n tɔwɛ asɩn mʋ sa asa.

eng: To Titus, my true child in a common faith. Grace and peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus our savior.
local: N kyʋrɔɔ n sa fʋ Titusi, mʋ nɩɩ n taa fʋ fɛɛ mi‐bii gbaa‐gbaa anɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kʋlʋn mʋ tɔ mʋ. Kabwaala yɛ kayɩɩ yuuli mʋ nɩɩ kɩ lɩɩ anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito asɛ mʋ yɛ fʋ fan kyɩna.

eng: The reason I left you behind in Crete was to organize whatever needs to be done and to appoint elders in each city, as I told you.
local: Kʋtɔ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ n yɛgɛ fʋ Kereti ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, fʋ nyɛ lɔŋɔ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ san mʋ lʋwɛ, kɛ fʋ yii abɩlɩsa kadɛ kʋmaa nɩmʋ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n kaapʋ fʋ mʋ.

eng: Elders should be without fault. They should be faithful to their spouse, and have faithful children who cant be accused of self-indulgence or rebelliousness.
local: Ɩ dagaa ɔbɩlɩsa maa gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ mʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ man sʋ asɩn pwɩɩsa, nɩɩ o kili ɔkyɩɩ kʋlʋn kpen, nɩɩ mu‐bii ana bɛ gyɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu, mʋ nɩɩ ba man sʋ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn abɛɛ kibii libi.

eng: This is because supervisors should be without fault as Gods managers: they shouldnt be stubborn, irritable, addicted to alcohol, a bully, or greedy.
local: Fɛɛ ɔbɩlɩsa maa gyɛ Krisito kʋbʋ ɔkɩɩsʋpʋ mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ mʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ man sʋ asɩn pwɩɩsa, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ kʋsaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ nyɛ agbʋ benbilen, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ bʋʋ nta, nɩɩ ɔ man gyɛ oluu bitipu, nɩɩ ɔ man sʋ onsi‐payɩ libi afulee sʋ.

eng: Instead, they should show hospitality, love what is good, and be reasonable, ethical, godly, and self-controlled.
local: Amaa ɔ dagaa maa gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɔɔlɛ afɔ, nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn, nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩtaa mʋ n‐yɩɩ, nɩɩ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi, nɩɩ ɔ sɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nɩɩ mʋ awaasa du kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

eng: They must pay attention to the reliable message as it has been taught to them so that they can encourage people with healthy instruction and refute those who speak against it.
local: Ɔ dagaa maa taalɛ kɩtaa kesintin asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ kenken, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba kaapʋ ɩmʋ mʋ, kɛ ngbaa mʋ ɔ taalɛ taa kesintin kɩkaapʋ mʋ tɔwɛ waa asa, kɛ ɔ taa ɩmʋ tii bamʋ nɩɩ bee gyii ɩmʋ ɩmɔɔrɛ mʋ ɔkpa.

eng: In fact, there are many who are rebellious people, loudmouths, and deceivers, especially some of those who are Jewish believers.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ asa gaalaagaa bɛɛ kʋsʋ bɛɛ yɩlɛ asɩn mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ bɛ sʋ bamʋ ntɔwɛ kɩyan bɛɛ pɩna asa, fɔnfɔn Gyiwu abi akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu.

eng: They must be silenced because they upset entire households. They teach what they shouldnt to make money dishonestly.
local: Ɩ dagaa fʋ tii bamʋ ntɔwɛ mʋ ɔkpa, lɩɩ fɛɛ bɛ sʋ bamʋ npɩna kɩkaapʋ mʋ bee nyita akpaara sʋ abi lɩɩ kɩkaapʋ danbɩrasa mʋ sʋ. Bɛɛ waa ipeeli‐sɩn nɩmʋ bee biti afulee.

eng: Someone who is one of their own prophets said, People from Crete are always liars, wild animals, and lazy gluttons.
local: Halɩɩ Kereti abi atɔwɛpʋ mʋ tɔ ɔkʋ tɔwɛ yɛ, Kereti abi bɛ gyɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya ana nɩn saŋa kʋmaa, nɩɩ be du fɛɛ ndʋnbwɛ libi, nɩɩ bɛ gyɛ awʋlɛgyɔpʋ agyipu lala.

eng: This statement is true. Because of this, correct them firmly, so that they can be healthy in their faith.
local: Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kesintin. Ɩmʋ sʋ taa kensi payɩ tɔwɛ yii bamʋ, kɛ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii ɩ nyɛ yɩlɛ kinkin.

eng: They shouldnt pay attention to Jewish myths and commands from people who reject the truth.
local: kɛ ba man nu Gyiwu abi asɩrɩkpan ikisii‐sɩn mʋ, abɛɛ be nu sa bamʋ nɩɩ bee kina kesintin asɩn mʋ.

eng: Everything is clean to those who are clean, but nothing is clean to those who are corrupt and without faith. Instead, their mind and conscience are corrupted.
local: Bamʋ nɩɩ ba man sʋ ineesi mʋ, kʋtɔ kʋ man gyɛ ineesi bamʋ asɛ, amaa bamʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ ineesi nɩɩ ba mɛɛ kɔɔlɛ bee gyii mʋ, sɛhn man gyɛ kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ bamʋ asɛ, amaa alibi ɩ bɔla bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ yɛ bamʋ nkɔlɔ tɔ kpini.

eng: They claim to know God, but they deny God by the things that they do. They are detestable, disobedient, and disqualified to do anything good.
local: Bɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ be nyi Ɩbwaarɛ, amaa bamʋ awaasa tɔ mʋ bee kina mʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ ii kisi bamʋ awaasa kpini, nɩɩ bɛ gyɛ kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn wuya ana, nɩɩ ba mɛɛ taalɛ waa kɩdanbɩrasa kakaakʋ.

eng: But you should talk in a way that is consistent with sound teaching.
local: Amaa fɛɛ fʋ bɩrɛ, ɩ dagaa fʋ kaapʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ii buu kesintin kɩkaapʋ mʋ.

eng: Tell the older men to be sober, dignified, sensible, and healthy in respect to their faith, love, and patience.
local: Tɔwɛ anyɩn abɩlɩsa fɛɛ bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ baa ɩ dɛ, kɛ ba baa bɛ sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ, kɛ ba kɩtaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ, kɛ ba kɩtaa kesintin kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ, kɛ ba nyɛ kebiti sa abaa, kɛ ba nyɛ nkɔlɔ yɩlɛ tɔ.

eng: Likewise, tell the older women to be reverent in their behavior, teaching what is good, rather than being gossips or addicted to heavy drinking.
local: Kanɩn maa nɩɩ fʋ tɔwɛ akyɩɩ‐nyi mʋ fɛɛ ba kyɩna kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ Krisito abuupu ba kyɩna mʋ. Ba man natɛ nyita asa atɩɩ abɛɛ ba baa bɛ gyɛ atabʋʋpʋ, amaa ba kaapʋ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn.

eng: That way they can mentor young women to love their husbands and children.
local: Kanɩn gbaa nɩɩ ba kaapʋ abite mʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ bee biti bamʋ‐kuli ana yɛ bamʋ‐bii ana.

eng: and to be sensible, morally pure, working at home, kind and submissive to their own husbands, so that Gods word wont be ridiculed.
local: kɛ ba kɩtaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kɛ ba man waa kɩgyagaa, kɛ ba waa bamʋ akpaara sʋ asun, kɛ ba waa adanbɩrasa, kɛ ba bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa bamʋ‐kuli ana, kɛ ɔkʋ ɔ man nyɛ tɔwɛ asɩn libi nyita Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ.

eng: Likewise, encourage the younger men to be sensible.
local: Kanɩn maa nɩɩ fʋ tɔwɛ waa ayaafɔlɛ gbaa fɛɛ ba kɩtaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ.

eng: in every way. Offer yourself as a role model of good actions. Show integrity, seriousness.
local: Lɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ mʋ, ɩ dagaa fʋ maa waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋrɔn kɛ asa bɛ kasɛ fʋ tɔ. Lɩɩ fʋ kɩkaapʋ tɔ mʋ taa kensi payɩ yɛ kɔkɔlɔ fuuli kaapʋ.

eng: and a sound message that is above criticism when you teach, so that any opponent will be ashamed because they wont find anything bad to say about us.
local: Yɛgɛ fʋ katɔwɛ kɩ baa kɩ dɛ ɔkpa, yɛgɛ ɩ man sʋ asɩn pwɩɩsa kʋ, kɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛ kʋsʋ yɩlɛ fʋ sʋ mʋ be gyii ipeeli, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba mɛɛ yɛ bɛ nyɛ alibi kʋ tɔwɛ lɩɩ anɛ sʋ.

eng: Tell slaves to submit to their own masters and please them in everything they do. They shouldnt talk back.
local: Kaapʋ anyɛ mʋ fɛɛ bɛ bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa bamʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana kʋtɔ kʋmaa tɔ, kɛ ɩ bɔla bamʋ ansi. Amaa ba man kan tɔwɛ gyaŋa bamʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana.

eng: or steal. Instead, they should show that they are completely reliable in everything so that they might make the teaching about God our savior attractive in every way.
local: abɛɛ ba yuuri bamʋ. Amaa ba waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn kɛ bamʋ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana bɛ kɔɔlɛ bamʋ gyii, kɛ bamʋ awaasa ɩ yɛgɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ asɩn kaapʋsa mʋ, ɩ baa ɩ bʋ ɔbʋlɛ.

eng: The grace of God has appeared, bringing salvation to all people.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ kabwaala mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ bɩya kamɔlɩgɛ ifuli sa asa kpini.

eng: It educates us so that we can live sensible, ethical, and godly lives right now by rejecting ungodly lives and the desires of this world.
local: Kabwaala mʋ kaapʋ anɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ a lɛɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ ɩkpa libi yɛ dulinyaa tɔ atɔ kayalaga sʋ, kɛ a taalɛ kɩtaa anɛ n‐yɩɩ, kɛ a waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ dɛ ɔkpa, yɛ kabwaarɛ‐sun danbɩrasa kakyɩna nɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: At the same time we wait for the blessed hope and the glorious appearance of our great God and savior Jesus Christ.
local: fɛɛ a maa gyoo tamaa kparɛ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ anɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lala, yɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Yesu Krisito ii biti o bwii ba yɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ.

eng: He gave himself for us in order to rescue us from every kind of lawless behavior, and cleanse a special people for himself who are eager to do good actions.
local: Mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ kyula wu ka anɛ kʋkɔ, lɛɛ anɛ lɩɩ alibi kpini tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ waa anɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba man sʋ ineesi, nɩɩ ɩɩ gyʋgyʋʋ bamʋ fɛɛ ba waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn.

eng: Talk about these things. Encourage and correct with complete authority. Dont let anyone disrespect you.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fʋ kaapʋ. Tɔwɛ waa bamʋ kɛ fʋ tɔwɛ yii bamʋ ɔlʋn tɔ. Man yɛgɛ ɔkʋ ɔ fɛɛrɛ fʋ.

eng: Remind them to submit to rulers and authorities. They should be obedient and ready to do every good thing.
local: Nyiŋi Krisito abuupu mʋ fɛɛ ba bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa awuragyipu yɛ kɩbanɛ alʋnpʋ kɛ ba nu sa bamʋ, kɛ ba baa bee biti kɩdanbɩrasa kʋmaa kɩwaa.

eng: They shouldnt speak disrespectfully about anyone, but they should be peaceful, kind, and show complete courtesy toward everyone.
local: kɛ ba man tɔwɛ asɩn libi gyaga ɔkʋ sʋ, amaa ba nyɛ keyuula yɛ abaa, kɛ ba baa bee su bɛɛ sa abaa, kɛ ba bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ.

eng: We were once foolish, disobedient, deceived, and slaves to our desires and various pleasures too. We were spending our lives in evil behavior and jealousy. We were disgusting, and we hated other people.
local: Saŋa kʋ tɔ mʋ, anɛ gbaa anɛ an daa melensi, nɩɩ an waa kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn, an fɔyɩ ɔkpa, nɩɩ an gyɛ anyɛ sa kɩgyagaa yɛ kayalaga kʋmaa nɩmʋ. Nɩɩ an sʋ kumu tɔ ɔlʋn yɛ kayɩɩ basa, nɩɩ bee kisi anɛ nɩɩ anɛ gbaa anɛ an kisi bamʋ.

eng: But when God our saviors kindness and love appeared.
local: Amaa saŋa mʋ nɩɩ anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Ɩbwaarɛ mu kebiti yɛ mʋ kʋwɛɛ kuwu lɩɩ ifuli mʋ.

eng: he saved us because of his mercy, not because of righteous things we had done. He did it through the washing of new birth and the renewing by the Holy Spirit.
local: ɔ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ. Man gyɛ anɛ adanbɩrasa kɩwaa sʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ, amaa lɩɩ mʋ kʋwɛɛ kuwu sʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɔla mʋ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ fwɩɩ anɛ mʋ sʋ, sa anɛ kakʋʋgɛ pʋpwɛ yɛ nkpa pʋpwɛ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ.

eng: which God poured out upon us generously through Jesus Christ our savior.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Yesu Krisito sʋ sa anɛ mʋ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ gaa.

eng: So, since we have been made righteous by his grace, we can inherit the hope for eternal life.
local: Saamʋ, lɩɩ mʋ kabwaala mʋ sʋ mʋ, anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi mu ansi tɔ, kɛ a ba waa mʋ nkpa kakpaa mʋ nɩɩ an sʋ ɩmʋ tamaa mʋ agyipu.

eng: This saying is reliable. And I want you to insist on these things, so that those who have come to believe in God might give careful attention to doing good. These things are good and useful for everyone.
local: Katɔwɛ nɩmʋ gyɛ kesintin nɩn. Nɩɩ n biti fɛɛ fu bwii pɩla asɩn nɩmʋ tɔ, kɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gyii mʋ, ba taa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sa kɩdanbɩrasa kɩwaa. Falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ ɩ bʋrɔn gaa nɩɩ ɩ sʋ tɔnɔ sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ.

eng: Avoid stupid controversies, genealogies, and fights about the Law, because they are useless and worthless.
local: Amaa lɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kimelensi ɩmɔɔrɛ‐libi tɔ yɛ kakʋʋgɛ tɔ nkyaga sʋ yɛ kamɔɔrɛ‐gyii yɛ nluu kʋkɔ lɩɩ nbara sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ kɩyan nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ tɔnɔ kpini‐kpini.

eng: After a first and second warning, have nothing more to do with a person who causes conflict.
local: Ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ fanɛ tɔ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ asa amu ɛɛ wɔtɛ abaa mʋ, tɔwɛ yii mʋ kɩlɩɩ kʋlʋn abɛɛ ɩlɩɩ ɩnyɔ. Nɩɩ ɔ man kan yɛgɛ mʋ, barɩgɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ yɛgɛ mʋ.

eng: because you know that someone like this is twisted and sinful—so they condemn themselves.
local: Baa fii nyi fɛɛ kanɩn ɔsa maŋa alibi i gyii mʋ nfɛɛrɛ yɛ mu kumu, yɛgɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa nyi fɛɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa mʋ gyɛ alibi.

eng: When I send Artemas or Tychicus to you, try to come to me in Nicopolis, because Ive decided to spend the winter there.
local: N dan kan sun Atemasi abɛɛ Tikiku fʋ asɛ mʋ, waa aniya kɛ fʋ ba gyaŋa mɛ Nikopoli kadɛ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ n waa mɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ n kpee tʋtɔ awɔɔ saŋa.

eng: Help Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their journey with enthusiasm so that they wont need anything.
local: Waa kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fɩɩ taalɛ, kɛ fʋ kyɛ Senasi mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ lɔya mʋ yɛ Apolosi tɔ, kɛ ba nyɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri bamʋ lɩɩ ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba kpee mʋ.

eng: But our people should also learn to devote themselves to doing good in order to meet pressing needs so they arent unproductive.
local: Ɩ dagaa anɛ bɩrɩsa ana Krisito abuupu mʋ, ba bɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba nyɛ saŋa sa kusun kɩwaa, kɛ ɩ kyɛ asa tɔ kɛ ba nyɛ bamʋ atɔ tirisa, kɛ ba man kyɩna kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ tɔnɔ.

eng: Everyone with me greets you; greet those who love us faithfully. Grace be with all of you.
local: Bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ mɛ asɛ nfɩɩ mʋ kpini bɛɛ fwaala fʋ. Fwaala ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti anɛ asɩn, nɩɩ ana bamʋ an bʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ mʋ kpini. Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ asɛ.

eng: From Paul, who is a prisoner for the cause of Christ Jesus, and our brother Timothy. To Philemon our dearly loved coworker.
local: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ mɛ Pɔɔlɩ mʋ nɩɩ lɩɩ Krisito Yesu kusun sʋ nɩɩ ba tii mɛ obu mʋ, yɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa Timoti asɛ. An kyʋrɔɔ an sa fʋ Filemon, anɛ kyɛmɩnɛ danbɩrasa yɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa osunpu.

eng: Apphia our sister, Archippus our fellow soldier, and the church that meets in your house.
local: yɛ anɛ‐pɩɩkyɩɩ Afiiya yɛ anɛ bɩrɩsa Krisito tɔ ɔnaakɔpʋ Akyipusi, yɛ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ gyaŋɛ fʋ kɩkpaara sʋ mʋ.

eng: May the grace and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: Anɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kabwaala yɛ keyuula kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ asɛ.

eng: Philemon, I thank my God every time I mention you in my prayers.
local: Mi‐supu Filemon, saŋa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ n kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ mʋ, n nyiŋi fʋ sʋ nɩɩ n fwaala Ɩbwaarɛ lɩɩ fʋ sʋ.

eng: because Ive heard of your love and faithfulness, which you have both for the Lord Jesus and for all Gods people.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ, n nu kanan mʋ nɩɩ fʋ kɔɔlɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu gyii yɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sʋ sa Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ kpini.

eng: I pray that your partnership in the faith might become effective by an understanding of all that is good among us in Christ.
local: Mɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, payɩ ansi kyaga sʋ tɔwɛ fʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ kaapʋ asa. Saamʋ, fʋ ɩ nyɛ bɩɩ atɔ danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ an sʋ lɩɩ Yesu Krisito sʋ mʋ kpini lʋwɛ.

eng: I have great joy and encouragement because of your love, since the hearts of Gods people are refreshed by your actions, my brother.
local: Mi‐supu Filemon, fu kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sʋ mʋ yɛgɛ nɩɩ mi ansi i gyii gaa nɩɩ ɩ waa mɛ aniya tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fʋ yɛgɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asa nkɔlɔ ɩ dɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba nyɛ ɔlʋn.

eng: Therefore, though I have enough confidence in Christ to command you to do the right thing.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ, lɩɩ Yesu Krisito sʋ mʋ, naafɔɔ n sʋ ɔkpa n taalɛ nyan fʋ lɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ fʋ waa mʋ sʋ.

eng: I would rather appeal to you through love. I, Paul—an old man, and now also a prisoner for Christ Jesus.
local: amaa n kʋlɛ fʋ lɩɩ kebiti ɩkpa sʋ. Nɩɩ mɛ, Pɔɔlɩ mʋ nɩɩ n bɩlɛ, nɩɩ lɩɩ Yesu Krisito kusun sʋ mʋ, nbɩɩnbɩɩ n tii obu falɛ mʋ.

eng: appeal to you for my child Onesimus. I became his father in the faith during my time in prison.
local: n kʋlɛ fʋ lɩɩ mi‐bii Onesimu, mʋ nɩɩ ɔ ba biliŋi mi‐bii Krisito tɔ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n bʋ obu kitii tɔ falɛ.

eng: He was useless to you before, but now he is useful to both of us.
local: Naafɔɔ saamʋ, ɔ daa ɔ man sʋ kyaarɛ sa fʋ, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ ɔ sʋ kyaarɛ sa n maa fʋ kpini.

eng: Im sending him back to you, which is like sending you my own heart.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ, n bwiiyaa mʋ n bɩya fʋ, nɩɩ n biti mʋ asɩn gaa, kɔɔlɛ mʋ sa mɛ.

eng: I considered keeping him with me so that he might serve me in your place during my time in prison because of the gospel.
local: Naafɔɔ n daa n biti fɛɛ ɔ baa ɔ bʋ mɛ asɛ, kɛ o yii fʋ ayaa tɔ ɛɛ kyɛ mɛ tɔ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n tii obu falɛ lɩɩ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ katɔwɛ sʋ.

eng: However, I didnt want to do anything without your consent so that your act of kindness would occur willingly and not under pressure.
local: Amaa n mee biti fɛɛ n waa kʋtɔ kʋ yɛgɛ n man nyi fʋ nfɛɛrɛ, kɛ ɩ man naa ba fɛɛ n nyan fʋ nɩn, amaa ɩ baa ɩ gyɛ fʋ kebiti.

eng: Maybe this is the reason that Onesimus was separated from you for a while so that you might have him back forever.
local: Akʋtɔ Onesimu barɩgɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ fʋ asɛ nkɛ gbɛrɛɛ kʋ nɩn, saamʋ nɩɩ ɔ kan bwii ba mʋ fii biti fʋ nyɛ mʋ kakpaa.

eng: no longer as a slave but more than a slave—that is, as a dearly loved brother. He is especially a dearly loved brother to me. How much more can he become a brother to you, personally and spiritually in the Lord!.
local: yɛgɛ ɔ man bɩla ɔ gyɛ kɩnyɛ nkʋn, amaa ɔ kyɔ kɩnyɛ lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ fʋ bɩrɩsa bitisa Krisito tɔ. Nɩɩ n biti mʋ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ gaa, kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ ngbaa fʋ fii biti fʋ ba biti mʋ fʋ kyɔ mɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ fʋ kɩnyɛ, nɩɩ ɔ bɩla ɔ gyɛ fʋ bɩrɩsa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ tɔ.

eng: So, if you really consider me a partner, welcome Onesimus as if you were welcoming me.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fʋ kan fu nyi fɛɛ fʋ bɩrɩsa ɩ gyɛ mɛ mʋ, fu bwii kɔɔlɛ mʋ yɛ ɔdan fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fii biti fʋ kɔɔlɛ mɛ mʋ.

eng: If he has harmed you in any way or owes you money, charge it to my account.
local: Nɩɩ ɔ kan waa fʋ alibi akʋ abɛɛ ɔ sʋ fʋ kʋkɔ mʋ, taa ɩmʋ kpini sʋla mɛ.

eng: I, Paul, will pay it back to you . Of course, I wont mention that you owe me your life.
local: Mɛ Pɔɔlɩ, n sʋ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ kɩbaa n kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ yɛ n biti n ka fʋ kʋkɔ maŋa. Ngbaagbaa fʋ, fʋ sʋ mɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kʋkɔ lɩɩ nkpa mʋ nɩɩ n yɛgɛ nɩɩ fʋ nyɛ mʋ sʋ.

eng: Yes, brother, I want this favor from you in the Lord! Refresh my heart in Christ.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ mi‐supu Filemon, n biti fɛɛ fʋ kɩɩ Krisito Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ sʋ kɛ fʋ waa ɩnɩmʋ sa mɛ, kɛ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ kɩ dɛ mɛ.

eng: Im writing to you, confident of your obedience and knowing that you will do more than what I ask.
local: N maa kyʋrɔɔ fʋ falɛ n kɔɔlɛ fu gyii fɛɛ fii biti fʋ waa sa mɛ, nɩɩ n nyi fɛɛ fii biti fʋ waa fʋ kyɔ ɩmʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ falɛ gbaa.

eng: Also, one more thing—prepare a guest room for me. I hope that I will be released from prison to be with you because of your prayers.
local: Amaa kʋtɔ kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ kɛ bɩla kɛ tii sʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, lɔŋɔ afɔ obu yɩla mɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ n sʋ tamaa fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti o kyula fanɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ, kɛ ɔ yɛgɛ ba tigi mɛ kɛ n ba fanɛ asɛ.

eng: Epaphras, who is in prison with me for the cause of Christ Jesus, greets you.
local: Mɛ bɩrɩsa Epafarasi mʋ nɩɩ maa mʋ an tii obu lɩɩ Krisito Yesu sʋ mʋ, ɩɩ fwaala fʋ.

eng: as well as my coworkers Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke.
local: Kanɩn nɩɩ Maki maa Arisitako yɛ Demasi yɛ Luka mʋ nɩɩ bɛ gyɛ mɛ bɩrɩsa ana asunpu mʋ bɛɛ fwaala fʋ.

eng: May the grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit.
local: Anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kabwaala kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ asɛ.

eng: In the past, God spoke through the prophets to our ancestors in many times and many ways.
local: Saŋa mʋ dɩdaa mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla mʋ atɔwɛpʋ sʋ nɩn tɔwɛ mʋ asɩn sa anɛ naana ana saŋa gaalaagaa yɛ ɩkpa kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ sʋ.

eng: In these final days, though, he spoke to us through a Son. God made his Son the heir of everything and created the world through him.
local: Amaa nkɛ laalaalʋwɛ nɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, ɔ bɔla Mu‐Bii Yesu sʋ nɩn tɔwɛ mʋ asɩn sa anɛ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla mʋ sʋ tʋʋ sʋsʋ yɛ kasɛ yɛ ɩmʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ, nɩɩ ɔ wʋla lɛɛ mʋ fɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa ii biti ɩ baa ɩ gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ.

eng: The Son is the light of Gods glory and the imprint of Gods being. He maintains everything with his powerful message. After he carried out the cleansing of people from their sins, he sat down at the right side of the highest majesty.
local: Nɩɩ mʋ ɩ lɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bʋnyaa ŋalɩgɛsa kparɛ mʋ ifuli kaapʋ, nɩɩ mʋ tɔ nɩɩ an wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa‐gbaa du. Nɩɩ mʋ kɔnɔ tɔ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋgya nɩɩ ɔ sʋ ɛɛ kɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ. Nɩɩ maa fwɩɩ nyɩmɩsa alibi kamaa mʋ, ɔ naa kyɩna Ɔlʋnpʋ Owura lala Ɩbwaarɛ gyisa sʋ sʋsʋ.

eng: And the Son became so much greater than the other messengers, such as angels, that he received a more important title than theirs.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔ kyɔ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ mʋ kʋkyɔ, nɩɩ kɩtɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa mʋ mʋ, bɩla kɩ kyɔ bamʋ lɛɛ gaa.

eng: After all, when did God ever say to any of the angels: You are my Son. Today I have become your Father? Or, even, I will be his Father, and he will be my Son? .
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ tɔ ɔmɔmɔ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ mʋ kakaakʋ yɛ, Fʋ gyɛ Mi‐Bii, Lɩɩ ndaga n gyɛ Fʋ‐Sɛ? Abɛɛ, N biti n baa n gyɛ Mʋ‐Sɛ, kɛ mɔɔ mʋ ɔ baa ɔ gyɛ Mi‐Bii.

eng: But then, when he brought his firstborn into the world, he said, All of Gods angels must worship him. .
local: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɩya Mu‐Bii gyankpaasa dulinyaa tɔ mʋ, ɔ bɩla tɔwɛ mʋ nbɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ sʋsʋ mʋ yɛ, Fanɛ mɛ nbɔɔ kpini fan muŋa sun mʋ.

eng: He talks about the angels: Hes the one who uses the spirits for his messengers and who uses flames of fire as ministers. .
local: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa tɔwɛ lɩɩ mʋ nbɔɔ mʋ sʋ mʋ, ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, N waa mɛ nbɔɔ fɛɛ afuu, nɩɩ n bɩla waa bamʋ fɛɛ fʋlɔn anobi.

eng: But he says to his Son, God, your throne is forever and your kingdoms scepter is a rod of justice. .
local: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ sa mu‐Bii mʋ bɩrɛ yɛ, Fʋ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ fu kuwura‐gyii kii biti kɩ baa kɩ bʋ tɔ kakpaa, nɩɩ fii biti fʋ taa kesintin gyii fu kuwura mʋ kɩmʋ ɔkpa sʋ.

eng: You loved righteousness and hated lawless behavior. That is why God, your God, has anointed you more than your companions with the oil of joy. .
local: Nɩɩ kesintin kigyii nɩɩ fii biti, nɩɩ fii kisi alibi. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ mɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ n diyaa fʋ n kyɔ fʋ tɔmaa ana ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ, nɩɩ n yɛgɛ fʋ kɔkɔlɔ ki fuuli fʋ.

eng: And he says, You, Lord, laid the earths foundations in the beginning, and the heavens are made by your hands. .
local: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɩla tɔwɛ mu‐Bii mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ mʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ yɛ, Lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ fʋ ii yii dulinyaa kasɛ, nɩɩ fʋ ɩ waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ sʋsʋ mʋ.

eng: They will pass away, but you remain. They will all wear out like old clothes. .
local: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini ii biti i nyita, amaa fɛɛ fʋ bɩrɛ fʋ bʋ tɔ kakpaa. Ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩ kyatɛ fɛɛ atɔ bunsa.

eng: You will fold them up like a coat. They will be changed like a person changes clothes, but you stay the same, and the years of your life wont come to an end. .
local: Fii biti fʋ bɔɔ ɩmʋ fɛɛ ɩkaalɛ bunsa, kɛ fʋ kyɛɛgɛ ɩmʋ fɛɛ atɔ bunsa. Amaa fɛɛ fʋ, fʋ mɛɛ yɛ fʋ kyɛɛgɛ nɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fu du mʋ, kanɩn nɩɩ fii biti fʋ baa fu du, nɩɩ fu nsu ɩ man sʋ ɔkaa.

eng: When has he ever said to any of the angels, Sit at my right side until I put your enemies under your feet like a footstool? .
local: Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ mu‐Bii yɛ, Kyɩna mɛ kɩbaa gyisa sʋ naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n biti n taa fu akisipu waa fʋ ayaa kasɛ. Amaa ɔ man tɔwɛ falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ sa mʋ kabɔɔ kʋkʋ.

eng: Arent all the angels ministering spirits who are sent to serve those who are going to inherit salvation?.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ mʋ kpini ba gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bee sun Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ o sun bamʋ yɛ ba ba kyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba ba nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ tɔ.

eng: This is why its necessary for us to pay more attention to what we have heard, or else we may drift away from it.
local: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ ɩ dagaa a maa bɩya asʋ kasɛ, kɛ a kɩtaa asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ an nu mʋ tɔ yɛ ɔdan, kɛ a man kyɛɛgɛ gbɛrɛɛ‐gbɛrɛɛ lɩɩ ɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: If the message that was spoken by angels was reliable, and every offense and act of disobedience received an appropriate consequence.
local: Fɛɛ nɩɩ nbara asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bɔla mʋ nbɔɔ mʋ sʋ tɔwɛ anɛ naana ana mʋ i sun kusun, nɩɩ an nyi yɛ lɩɩ koo dɩdaa mʋ, ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn nɩɩ ɔ man buu Ɩbwaarɛ nbara ɩnɩmʋ mʋ, ɔ nyɛ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa.

eng: how will we escape if we ignore such a great salvation? It was first announced through the Lord, and then it was confirmed by those who heard him.
local: Kanɩn bɩrɛ, fɛɛ nɩɩ an kan kina kamɔlɩgɛ lala asɩn nɩmʋ mʋ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ an taalɛ sɩlɛ lɩɩ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ mʋ tɔ? Falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu gyankpaa tɔwɛ mʋ, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba nu ɩmʋ mʋ, ba gyii ɩmʋ kesintin sa anɛ.

eng: God also vouched for their message with signs, amazing things, various miracles, and gifts from the Holy Spirit, which were handed out the way he wanted.
local: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa gyii ɩmʋ kesintin lɩɩ mʋ ɩsɩnkaala yɛ adangana yɛ asɩn kyinkyinsa yɛ mʋ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ kakɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa sa mʋ asa lɩɩ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ biti sʋ.

eng: God didnt put the world that is coming under the angels control.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ mʋ ɩ gyɛ akɩɩsʋpʋ sa dulinyaa pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ waa, nɩɩ an tɔwɛ ɩmʋ asɩn falɛ.

eng: Instead, someone declared somewhere, What is humanity that you think about them? Or what are human beings that you care about them? .
local: Amaa ɩ sʋ opula kʋ nɩɩ ɔsa kʋ gyii ɩmʋ kesintin lɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, Mɩnɛ nɩɩ anyɩmɩsa ba dan ba gyɛ nɩɩ fɩɩ fɛ bamʋ sʋ nfɛɛrɛ, nɩɩ mɩnɛ nɩɩ daadimaadi nbii‐nyɩnsa ba dan ba gyɛ nɩɩ fii wu bamʋ sʋ kanɩn?.

eng: For a while you made them lower than angels. You crowned human beings with glory and honor. .
local: Fʋ waa bamʋ pii fʋ nbɔɔ mʋ asɛ saŋa gbɛrɛɛ, amaa fʋ taa bʋnyaa yɛ bɛɛrɛɛ sa bamʋ.

eng: You put everything under their control. When he puts everything under their control, he doesnt leave anything out of control. But right now, we dont see everything under their control yet.
local: nɩɩ fʋ taa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ waa bamʋ kasɛ. Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa tɔwɛ yɛ ɔ taa kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ waa nyɩmɩsa kasɛ mʋ, nɩɩ sɛhn man bʋ tɔ yɛ ɔ man taa waa mʋ kasɛ. Nɩɩ halɩɩ ndaga gbaa, a man pɩɩta wu fɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ kɩ bʋ nyɩmɩsa kasɛ.

eng: However, we do see the one who was made lower in order than the angels for a little while—its Jesus! Hes the one who is now crowned with glory and honor because of the suffering of his death. He suffered death so that he could taste death for everyone through Gods grace.
local: Amaa an wu Yesu mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa mʋ pii mʋ nbɔɔ asɛ saŋa gbɛrɛɛ kʋ, nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ, ɔ taa bʋnyaa yɛ bɛɛrɛɛ sa mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ o gyii lewu awʋrʋfɔ, nɩɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ sʋ mʋ, o wu sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ.

eng: It was appropriate for God, for whom and through whom everything exists, to use experiences of suffering to make perfect the pioneer of salvation. This salvation belongs to many sons and daughters whom hes leading to glory.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tʋʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa, nɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ kɩ bʋ tɔ sa mʋ mʋ, ɩ dagaa sa mʋ fɛɛ ɔ bɩya mu‐bii ana gaalaagaa mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ tɔ. Kɛ ɩnɩmʋ ɩ taalɛ waa mʋ, o ŋmina yɛ Yesu o gyii awʋrʋfɔ, kɛ ɔ ba waa ɔgyankpaapʋ danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ mɔlɩgɛ bamʋ naa lʋwɛ.

eng: This is because the one who makes people holy and the people who are being made holy all come from one source. That is why Jesus isnt ashamed to call them brothers and sisters when he says.
local: Mʋ ɩ lɛɛ bamʋ lɩɩ bamʋ alibi tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ mʋ yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ bamʋ lɩɩ alibi tɔ mʋ kpini ba gyɛ Ɔsɛ kʋlʋn. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ mʋ ipeeli fɛɛ maa tɩɩ bamʋ mu‐supu ana.

eng: I will publicly announce your name to my brothers and sisters. I will praise you in the middle of the assembly. .
local: Nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ, N biti n tɩɩ fʋ kɩtɩɩ sa mi‐supu ana, kɛ n bɩɩ ɩlʋn yɩn fʋ asa nsana tɔ.

eng: He also says, I will rely on him. And also, Here I am with the children whom God has given to me. .
local: Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla tɔwɛ yɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ, n biti n taa mɛ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ fʋ sʋ. Nɩɩ o bwii kyaga sʋ yɛ, Kɩɩ mɛ ndee yɛ nbii mʋ nɩɩ fʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ fʋ taa sa mɛ mʋ.

eng: Therefore, since the children share in flesh and blood, he also shared the same things in the same way. He did this to destroy the one who holds the power over death—the devil—by dying.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ nbii mʋ ba maa gyɛ anyɩmɩsa nɩɩ ba sʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ yɛ nkalan mʋ, kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ Yesu gbaa ba biliŋi nyɩmɩsa fɛɛ bamʋ, kɛ ɔ taalɛ wu. Lɩɩ mu kelewu mʋ sʋ mʋ, o nyita Sɩtaanɛ ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ lɩɩ lewu sʋ.

eng: He set free those who were held in slavery their entire lives by their fear of death.
local: Kɛ ɔ kɔɔlɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba sɩlɛ lewu, nɩɩ lewu kufuu ki gyii bamʋ amu kakyɩna tɔ mʋ, lɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ abaa tɔ.

eng: Of course, he isnt trying to help angels, but rather hes helping Abrahams descendants.
local: Ɩ gyɛ kesintin fɛɛ, Abraham kɩnaana nɩɩ ɔ kyɛ tɔ, amaa ɩ man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ nɩɩ ɔ kyɛ tɔ.

eng: Therefore, he had to be made like his brothers and sisters in every way. This was so that he could become a merciful and faithful high priest in things relating to God, in order to wipe away the sins of the people.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ i tiri sa mʋ fɛɛ maa waa mʋ n‐yɩɩ fɛɛ mu‐supu ana ɔkpa kʋmaa sʋ, kɛ ɔ baa ɔ gyɛ kʋwɛɛ owupu yɛ kesintin Ɩbwaarɛ oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ sa bamʋ, mu kusun mʋ nɩɩ ee sun ɛɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ mʋ ii biti ɔ yɩlɛ tɔ sa asa kpini kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ taa bamʋ alibi kɛɛ bamʋ.

eng: Hes able to help those who are being tempted, since he himself experienced suffering when he was tempted.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ wu awʋrʋfɔ nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ mʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ ɛɛ taalɛ kyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba nyɛ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ mʋ tɔ.

eng: Every high priest is taken from the people and put in charge of things that relate to God for their sake, in order to offer gifts and sacrifices for sins.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ Oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ kʋmaa nɩmʋ, bɛɛ lɛɛ mʋ lɩɩ mʋ asa tɔ nɩn, kɛ ɔ yɩlɛ bamʋ ayaa tɔ sun Ɩbwaarɛ. Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla ɔ sʋ bamʋ nkɛɛ yɛ saraga ɛɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ, kɛ ɔ fwɩɩ bamʋ alibi.

eng: The high priest is able to deal gently with the ignorant and those who are misled since he himself is prone to weakness.
local: Kanɩn ɔsa maŋa ɩɩ nyɛ kenyiita ee wu asa mʋ nɩɩ ba man nyi nɩɩ ba fɔyɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔkpa mʋ kʋwɛɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ngbaa mʋ gyɛ nyɩmɩsa nɩn, nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ waa alibi.

eng: Because of his weakness, he must offer sacrifices for his own sins as well as for the people.
