local: Fɛɛ nɩɩ ɔsa kʋ kan waa katɔwɛ yɩla lɩɩ mʋ kapatɩyɛ sʋ mʋ, i tiri fɛɛ ɔsa maŋa maa wu nɩn pɔyɩ kɛ i sun kusun.

eng: This is because a will takes effect only after a death, since its not in force while the one who made the will is alive.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ katɔwɛ yɩlasa mɛɛ taalɛ waa kusun yɛgɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa kɩmʋ mʋ, san ɔ tɛ nkpa tɔ, amɔɔ o wu nɩn pɔyɩ kɛ ɩ waa kusun.

eng: So not even the first covenant was put into effect without blood.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ halɩɩ katɔwɛ kyula gyankpaasa mʋ gbaa nɩɩ nkalan ɩ man kyɛɛgɛ wʋrɩgɛ mʋ, i mee sun kusun.

eng: Moses took the blood of calves and goats, along with water, scarlet wool, and hyssop, and sprinkled both the Law scroll itself and all the people after he had proclaimed every command of the Law to all the people.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Mosesi lɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbara mʋ kpini tɔwɛ asa mʋ, kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa ba waa mʋ, ɔ taa ɩnaatɛ yɛ nbwɛ nkalan bʋga yɛ nkyu. Nɩɩ ɔ taa kebula pɩpɛɛ taa ŋmina yɛ afatɛɛ, nɩɩ ɔ taa nyɔ nkalan yɛ nkyu mʋ tɔ taa ŋmatɛ‐ŋmatɛ nbara ɔwʋlɛ mʋ yɛ asa mʋ kpini sʋ.

eng: While he did it, he said, This is the blood of the covenant that God established for you. .
local: Nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, Nkalan nɩmʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ katɔwɛ kyula mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa fanɛ mʋ nsana, nɩɩ ɔ sa fanɛ kɔnɔ yɛ fan buu.

eng: And in the same way he sprinkled the meeting tent and also all the equipment that would be used in the priests service with blood.
local: Kanɩn ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ Mosesi taa nkalan mʋ ŋmatɛ‐ŋmatɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tantɩ kubuu lala yɛ kabwaarɛ‐sun atɔ waasa mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ bee sun Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ kpini sʋ.

eng: Almost everything is cleansed by blood, according to the Laws regulations, and there is no forgiveness without blood being shed.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fʋ kɩɩ mʋ, Mosesi Nbara saŋa mʋ, atɔbwaaya nkalan nɩɩ ba sʋ bɛɛ fwɩɩ ineesi. Nɩɩ nkalan ɩ man kyɛɛgɛ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ taa alibi kɛɛ.

eng: So it was necessary for the copies of the heavenly things to be cleansed with these sacrifices, but the heavenly things had to be cleansed with better sacrifices than these.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ kasɛ sʋ tantɩ kubuu mʋ, yɛ atɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ ɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, nɩɩ ɩ yɩlɛ sa sʋsʋ gbaa‐gbaa lɛɛ mʋ, i tiri fɛɛ ba maa taa nkalan fwɩɩ ɩmʋ. Amaa sʋsʋ gbaa‐gbaa lɛɛ mʋ, ɩ dagaa ba maa taa nkalan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ kyɔ atɔbwaaya lɛɛ mʋ fwɩɩ ɩmʋ.

eng: Christ didnt enter the holy place made by human hands, but into heaven itself, so that he now appears in Gods presence for us.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ Krisito man loo kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa opula kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ asa ba taa bamʋ abaa waa mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ sʋsʋ lɛɛ kɩgbaa‐gbaa mʋ keduli. Amaa o loo sʋsʋ lɛɛ kɩgbaa‐gbaa mʋ tɔ naa yɩlɛ anɛ ayaa tɔ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ nbɩɩnbɩɩ.

eng: He didnt enter to offer himself over and over again, like the high priest enters the earthly holy place every year with blood that isnt his.
local: Nɩɩ Krisito man taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ ee loo sʋsʋ Opula Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛkpa Kɩkyɩrɛkyɩrɛ kesu kʋmaa, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Oseepu bɩlɩsa asɛ ɩɩ taa atɔbwaaya nkalan ee loo Opula Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛkpa Kɩkyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ tɔ kɩlɩɩ kʋlʋn kesu kʋmaa nɩmʋ mʋ.

eng: If that were so, then Jesus would have to suffer many times since the foundation of the world. Instead, he has now appeared once at the end of the ages to get rid of sin by sacrificing himself.
local: Kanɩn bɩrɛ, naafɔɔ Krisito ii biti ɔ ba ee gyii awʋrʋfɔ kesu kʋmaa lɩɩ koo saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tʋʋ dulinyaa mʋ. Amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ dulinyaa maa kpee kɩmʋ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ, ɔ ba taa mʋ gbaa‐gbaa n‐yɩɩ waa kɔlɔŋɔ kɩlɩɩ kʋlʋn lɛɛ alibi kakpaa.

eng: People are destined to die once and then face judgment.
local: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dɛ sa daadimaadi kʋmaa nɩmʋ yɛ o wu kɩlɩɩ kʋlʋn, kɛ mu lewu kamaa mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ o gyii mʋ asɩn.

eng: In the same way, Christ was also offered once to take on himself the sins of many people. He will appear a second time, not to take away sin but to save those who are eagerly waiting for him.
local: Ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ Krisito ba wu kɩlɩɩ kʋlʋn kakpaa, kɛ ɔ lɛɛ asa gaalaagaa alibi. Nɩɩ ee biti o bwii ba kɩnyɔsapʋ, yɛgɛ ɩ man gyɛ alibi kɩlɛɛ sʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ ba. Amaa ee biti ɔ ba mɔlɩgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kʋʋla bee gyoo mʋ mʋ.

eng: From James, a slave of God and of the Lord Jesus Christ. To the twelve tribes who are scattered outside the land of Israel. Greetings!.
local: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ mɛ, Gyemisi mʋ nɩɩ n gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito kɩyaafɔlɛ mʋ asɛ. N sʋ n sa fanɛ Krisito abuupu mʋ nɩɩ fan lɩɩ Ɩsɩrayɩ nbunɔ kudu anyɔ mʋ tɔ mʋ, nɩɩ fan yaasɛ tɔ fan bʋ dulinyaa tɔ kpini mʋ. N fwaala fanɛ kpini.

eng: My brothers and sisters, think of the various tests you encounter as occasions for joy.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ kan tu fanɛ mʋ, fan yɛgɛ fanɛ ansi i gyii.

eng: After all, you know that the testing of your faith produces endurance.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan nyi fɛɛ nɩɩ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ kɩ kan tu fanɛ lɩɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ mʋ, kɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fan taalɛ yɩlɛ tɔ.

eng: Let this endurance complete its work so that you may be fully mature, complete, and lacking in nothing.
local: Fan kɩtaa kanɩn kɔkɔlɔ ɔsɩɩ mʋ kpee ansi tɔ. Nɩɩ fan kan waa kanɩn mʋ, ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fɛn dan naa fʋʋ ɔkaa, kɛ kʋtɔ danbɩrasa kʋ ɔ man pan fanɛ.

eng: But anyone who needs wisdom should ask God, whose very nature is to give to everyone without a second thought, without keeping score. Wisdom will certainly be given to those who ask.
local: Nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ kan ee biti kanyaasɩn de, ɔ kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, ee biti ɔ sa mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ sa asa atɔ kɔkɔlɔ fuuli sʋ yɛgɛ ɔ man taasɛ kɔnɔ nkyu.

eng: Whoever asks shouldnt hesitate. They should ask in faith, without doubting. Whoever doubts is like the surf of the sea, tossed and turned by the wind.
local: Amaa fʋ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ fʋ kan kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, ɩ dagaa fɛɛ fʋ maa kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ ee biti ɔ waa sa fʋ. Man kan waa sika‐sika kpini‐kpini, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa sika‐sika mʋ, o du nɩn fɛɛ ɔpʋ apaa mʋ nɩɩ afuu ɩ sʋ ɩmʋ ii kyenkpen mʋ.

eng: People like that should never imagine that they will receive anything from the Lord.
local: Kanɩn ɔsa maŋa ɔ́ man fɛ nfɛɛrɛ fɛɛ ee biti ɔ nyɛ kʋtɔ kʋ lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ asɛ.

eng: They are double-minded, unstable in all their ways.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ nfɛɛrɛ nnyɔ‐nnyɔ wuya kpini asɩn a mɛɛ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi.

eng: Brothers and sisters who are poor should find satisfaction in their high status.
local: Nɩɩ Krisito obuupu otiripu ɔ yɛgɛ ɩɩ waa mʋ ɔkɔn gaa fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa diyaa mʋ sʋsʋ. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɩya mʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ nɩɩ asa ba man taa mʋ tɩɩ sɛhn mʋ, ɔ yɛgɛ mu ansi i gyii kpalɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bɩrɛ o diyaa mʋ kɩtɩɩ sʋsʋ.

eng: Those who are wealthy should find satisfaction in their low status, because they will die off like wildflowers.
local: Amaa obuupu atɔ wuya ɔ yɛgɛ mu ansi i gyii fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa bɩya mʋ kasɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ee biti o wu kyʋn fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ iyu ntʋtʋlɛ danbɩrasa ɩ mɛɛ kyɛɛrɛɛ nɩɩ ɩɩ kpɩkpaa mʋ.

eng: The sun rises with its scorching heat and dries up the grass so that its flowers fall and its beauty is lost. Just like that, in the midst of their daily lives, the wealthy will waste away.
local: Kpalɩ fɛɛ kyɔwɛ ɩɩ lɩɩ ɩmʋ sʋ, kɛ ɩmʋ afatɛɛ mʋ ɩɩ bwɩɩ kɛ ntʋtʋlɛ danbɩrasa mʋ i nyita. Kanɩn ɔkpa kʋlʋn sʋ nɩɩ atɔ wuya gbaa ii biti i nyita yɛgɛ ɔ san ɛɛ fɛ ɩmʋ nfɛɛrɛ kʋlʋn maŋa.

eng: Those who stand firm during testing are blessed. They are tried and true. They will receive the life God has promised to those who love him as their reward.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii gyii Sɩtaanɛ sʋ mʋ, ɩ waa mʋ ɔkɔn. Kpalɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taalɛ gyii Sɩtaanɛ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ sʋ mʋ, ee biti ɔ nyɛ nkpa kakpaa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ yɩla yɛ ee biti ɔ taa sa bamʋ nɩɩ bee biti mʋ mʋ.

eng: No one who is tested should say, God is tempting me! This is because God is not tempted by any form of evil, nor does he tempt anyone.
local: Fʋ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ tʋʋ fʋ tɔ kɩɩ de, Man kan tɔwɛ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ tʋʋ fʋ tɔ ɛɛ kɩɩ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ tʋʋ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔ kɩɩ kɛ ɔ waa alibi, nɩɩ mɔɔ mʋ ɔ mɛɛ tʋʋ ɔkʋ tɔ ɛɛ kɩɩ.

eng: Everyone is tempted by their own cravings; they are lured away and enticed by them.
local: Amaa nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa kan nyɛ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ mʋ, ɩ lɩɩ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ biti libi sʋ, nɩɩ ɩɩ pɩna mʋ ii kpee kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ tɔ.

eng: Once those cravings conceive, they give birth to sin; and when sin grows up, it gives birth to death.
local: Nɩɩ kɔkɔlɔ biti libi mʋ kan dan mʋ, kɩ nyɛ ɔtɔ kɛ kɩɩ kʋʋgɛ alibi, nɩɩ alibi mɔɔ ɩ kan dan lʋwɛ mʋ, a kʋʋgɛ lewu nɩn.

eng: Dont be misled, my dear brothers and sisters.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana danbɩrasa, fan man yɛgɛ ɔkʋ ɔ pɩna fanɛ.

eng: Every good gift, every perfect gift, comes from above. These gifts come down from the Father, the creator of the heavenly lights, in whose character there is no change at all.
local: Kʋtɔ danbɩrasa yɛ kakɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋrɔn kyɛɛkyɛɛ mʋ ɩɩ lɩɩ sʋsʋ nɩn. Atɔ nɩmʋ kpini ɛɛ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ fɩtɩla kpini mʋ asɛ. Mɛɛ mʋ ɔ mɛɛ kyɛɛgɛ kakaakʋ, nɩɩ kitentenbiri man bʋ mʋ tɔ.

eng: He chose to give us birth by his true word, and here is the result: we are like the first crop from the harvest of everything he created.
local: Nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ mʋ kɩpɩrɛ sʋ nɩn, nɩɩ ɔ bɔla mʋ kesintin asɩn mʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɔ sa anɛ nkpa pʋpwɛ, nɩɩ ɔ waa anɛ mʋ atɔ tʋʋsa tɔ kpini agyankpaapʋ.

eng: Know this, my dear brothers and sisters: everyone should be quick to listen, slow to speak, and slow to grow angry.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, fan baa fan nyi ɩnɩmʋ. Ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ kɛ o nu asɩn, amaa ɔ man kpaala tɔwɛ asɩn, nɩɩ ɔ man nyɛ agbʋ bilen‐bilen.

eng: This is because an angry person doesnt produce Gods righteousness.
local: Kpalɩ fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa agbʋ ɩ mɛɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti mʋ.

eng: Therefore, with humility, set aside all moral filth and the growth of wickedness, and welcome the word planted deep inside you—the very word that is able to save you.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan kɩtaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ ineesi kpini tɔ, yɛ alibi kʋmaa sʋ kɛ fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ, kɔɔlɛ abwaarɛsɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba duu fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ mʋ, kɛ ɩ mɔlɩgɛ fanɛ.

eng: You must be doers of the word and not only hearers who mislead themselves.
local: Fan man waa asɩn mʋ anupu nkʋn, amaa fan waa ɩmʋ awaasa, nɩɩ man gyɛ kanɩn mʋ fan pɩna fanɛ n‐yɩɩ nɩn.

eng: Those who hear but dont do the word are like those who look at their faces in a mirror.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o nu asɩn mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ man waa ɩmʋ awaasa mʋ, o du nɩn fɛɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa digi kɩɩ mu ansi tɔ mʋ.

eng: They look at themselves, walk away, and immediately forget what they were like.
local: Ɛ kɩɩ wu mʋ n‐yɩɩ kɛ ɔ kyʋn, opula maŋa tɔ mʋ ɔ tan kanan mʋ nɩɩ o du mʋ sʋ.

eng: But there are those who study the perfect law, the law of freedom, and continue to do it. They dont listen and then forget, but they put it into practice in their lives. They will be blessed in whatever they do.
local: Amaa ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ nfɛɛrɛ gyaga ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ alibi kpini‐kpini, nɩɩ kɩɩ taalɛ lɛɛ asa lɩɩ alibi tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ man tan sʋ, amaa nɩɩ ee buu nɩɩ ɛɛ waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ee nu mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ waa mʋ kusee.

eng: If those who claim devotion to God dont control what they say, they mislead themselves. Their devotion is worthless.
local: Ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɛ ɔ gyɛ ɔbwaarɛ‐sunpu danbɩrasa, yɛgɛ ɔ mɛɛ kɩtaa mʋ kanandʋlʋ lɩɩ mʋ asɩn tɔwɛsa sʋ mʋ, ɛɛ pɩna mʋ n‐yɩɩ nɩn, nɩɩ mʋ kabwaarɛ‐sun kɩ gyɛ kɩyan.

eng: True devotion, the kind that is pure and faultless before God the Father, is this: to care for orphans and widows in their difficulties and to keep the world from contaminating us.
local: Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti lɩɩ kabwaarɛ‐sun kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ yɛ kesintin ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ ii gyii Ɩbwaarɛ ansi ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fan kɩɩ akulapu yɛ aŋmangyi sʋ yɛ ɔdan, lɩɩ bamʋ awʋrʋfɔ sʋ, kɛ fan kɩtaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ dulinyaa atɔ karan‐karan mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɛɛ waa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ ineesi tɔ mʋ.

eng: My brothers and sisters, when you show favoritism you deny the faithfulness of our Lord Jesus Christ, who has been resurrected in glory.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana. Fɛɛ fan maa gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito bʋnyaa wuya akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu sʋ mʋ, fan man kan kɩɩ daadimaadi ansi tɔ kɛ fan waa nmɛɛgɛ tɔ.

eng: Imagine two people coming into your meeting. One has a gold ring and fine clothes, while the other is poor, dressed in filthy rags.
local: Fɛɛ nɩɩ afulee wuya bun ɩkaalɛ danbɩrasa nɩɩ ɔ waa suwa kepini ba fanɛ nsarɛ tɔ. Nɩɩ otiripu gbaa bun ɩkaalɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ danbɩrasa ba tʋtɔ.

eng: Then suppose that you were to take special notice of the one wearing fine clothes, saying, Heres an excellent place. Sit here. But to the poor person you say, Stand over there; or, Here, sit at my feet.
local: Nɩɩ fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa afulee wuya tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, Kyɩna kagya danbɩrasa nɩmʋ sʋ, kɛ fan tɔwɛ otiripu mɔɔ yɛ, Yɩlɛ tʋtɔ abɛɛ Kyɩna kasɛ tʋtɔ.

eng: Wouldnt you have shown favoritism among yourselves and become evil-minded judges?.
local: Tʋtɔ mʋ, man gyɛ nmɛɛgɛ tɔ nɩɩ fan bɩya fanɛ nsana tɔ falɛ? Nɩɩ fan kan waa kanɩn mʋ, ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ fan sʋ nfɛɛrɛ libi fɛn talɛ yɛ ɔkʋ dagaa ɔ kyɔ ɔkʋ.

eng: My dear brothers and sisters, listen! Hasnt God chosen those who are poor by worldly standards to be rich in terms of faith? Hasnt God chosen the poor as heirs of the kingdom he has promised to those who love him?.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana danbɩrasa, fan nu mɛ asɛ. Bamʋ nɩɩ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ bɛɛ kɩɩ bamʋ yɛ ba gyɛ atiripu mʋ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ lɛɛ bamʋ kɛ ba be biliŋi kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii atɔ wuya ana. Lɩɩ fɛɛ bee biti ba bɛ nyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kuwura‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɩla yɛ ee biti ɔ taa sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ kebiti sa mʋ mʋ?.

eng: But you have dishonored the poor. Dont the wealthy make life difficult for you? Arent they the ones who drag you into court?.
local: Amaa fɛn kɩɩ atiripu mʋ kɩyan. Man gyɛ afulee wuya ana ɩɩ nyanla fanɛ, nɩɩ bɛɛ bɩɩtɛ fanɛ bee kpee asɩn igyikpa mʋ?.

eng: Arent they the ones who insult the good name spoken over you at your baptism?.
local: Man gyɛ bamʋ akʋlʋn maŋa ɩɩ tɔwɛ asɩn bɔrɔbɔrɔ bɛɛ gyaga Yesu Krisito kɩtɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ kɛ sʋ bʋnyaa nɩɩ kɩ gyan fanɛ sʋ mʋ?.

eng: You do well when you really fulfill the royal law found in scripture, Love your neighbor as yourself. .
local: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ nbara mʋ tɔ kɩlala mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Ɩbwaarɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, Biti fʋ tɔɔmaa fɛɛ fʋ n‐yɩɩ. Nɩɩ fan kan buu nbara nɩmʋ mʋ, fan waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dagaa nɩmʋ.

eng: But when you show favoritism, you are committing a sin, and by that same law you are exposed as a lawbreaker.
local: Amaa nɩɩ fan kɩɩ asa tɔ waa nmɛɛgɛ tɔ bɩrɛ fan waa alibi nɩmʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ nbara sʋ mʋ i bun fanɛ kʋpwɛ fɛɛ fan gyɛ nbara mʋ anyitapu.

eng: Anyone who tries to keep all of the Law but fails at one point is guilty of failing to keep all of it.
local: Ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o buu nbara mʋ kpini, amaa nɩɩ ɛɛ fɔyɩ ɩmʋ tɔ kʋkʋlʋn gbaa mʋ, o gyii kʋpwɛ ɩmʋ kpini‐kpini tɔ.

eng: The one who said, Dont commit adultery , also said, Dont commit murder . So if you dont commit adultery but do commit murder, you are a lawbreaker.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, Man lɩɩ fʋ‐ka abɛɛ fu‐kuli kamaa mʋ, bɩla tɔwɛ yɛ, Man mɔɔ nyɩmɩsa. Nɩɩ fʋ kan fʋ man lɩɩ fʋ‐ka abɛɛ fu kuli kamaa, amaa nɩɩ fʋ mɔɔ nyɩmɩsa bɩrɛ, fu gyii kʋpwɛ nbara mʋ kpini‐kpini tɔ.

eng: In every way, then, speak and act as people who will be judged by the law of freedom.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fanɛ atɔwɛsa yɛ fanɛ awaasa tɔ mʋ, fan baa fan nyi fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbara mʋ nɩɩ fan taa sʋ nyɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ mʋ, nɩɩ bee biti ba taa gyii fanɛ asɩn.

eng: There will be no mercy in judgment for anyone who hasnt shown mercy. Mercy overrules judgment.
local: Ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o mee wu asa kʋwɛɛ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa mɛɛ yɛ o wu mʋ kʋwɛɛ. Ɩbwaarɛ kʋwɛɛ kuwu kɩ nyɛ akyɔ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ katalɛ tɔ.

eng: My brothers and sisters, what good is it if people say they have faith but do nothing to show it? Claiming to have faith cant save anyone, can it?.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana Krisito abuupu! Mɩnɛ kyaarɛ nɩɩ ɩ sʋ fɛɛ ɔkʋ maa tɔwɛ yɛ, ɔ sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii, yɛgɛ ɔ man sʋ kɩmʋ awaasa mʋ, kanɩn kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii maŋa kɩɩ taalɛ mɔlɩgɛ mʋ?.

eng: Imagine a brother or sister who is naked and never has enough food to eat.
local: Taa fɛɛ fu wu ɔpɩɩnyɩn abɛɛ ɔpɩɩkyɩɩ Krisito abuupu mʋ nɩɩ ba man sʋ atɔ bunsa yɛ agyitɔ gyisa.

eng: What if one of you said, Go in peace! Stay warm! Have a nice meal!? What good is it if you dont actually give them what their body needs?.
local: Kɛ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ ɔ tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, Natɛ kɔkɔlɔ yuuli sʋ kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ yɛgɛ fʋ ŋmɛ. Amaa fʋ man sa mʋ atɔ bunsa yɛ agyitɔ kɛ o gyii. Man gyɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩyan nɩmʋ?.

eng: In the same way, faith is dead when it doesnt result in faithful activity.
local: Kanɩn nɩɩ i du sa kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii. Kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ awaasa bɩrɛ ki wu nɩmʋ.

eng: Someone might claim, You have faith and I have action. But how can I see your faith apart from your actions? Instead, Ill show you my faith by putting it into practice in faithful action.
local: Amaa ɔkʋ ii biti ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, Fʋ sʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii, nɩɩ mɛɛ mɛ n sʋ awaasa. Amaa mɛɛ mɛ n tɔwɛ yɛ, Kaapʋ mɛ fʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛgɛ kɩ man sʋ awaasa. Kɛ mɛɛ mɛ n taa mɛ awaasa lɛɛ mɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kaapʋ fʋ.

eng: Its good that you believe that God is one. Ha! Even the demons believe this, and they tremble with fear.
local: Fʋ kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kʋlʋn ɛɛ bʋ tɔ. Kesintin nɩn! Nbwɩɩ libi gbaa ba kɔɔlɛ gyii kanɩn, yɛgɛ ba sʋ kufuu bɛɛ kyɩkyaa.

eng: Are you so slow? Do you need to be shown that faith without actions has no value at all?.
local: Fu, omelensipu nɩmʋ! Fii biti fɛɛ ba bɩla kaapʋ fʋ fɛɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ awaasa mʋ kɩ man sʋ kyaarɛ?.

eng: What about Abraham, our father? Wasnt he shown to be righteous through his actions when he offered his son Isaac on the altar?.
local: Mɩnɛ ɩ ba sʋ nɩɩ naana Abraham awaasa ɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi? Lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ awaasa maa dɛ ɔkpa, lɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa mu‐bii Isaki ɔ naa lɛɛ saraga kaswɩɩ kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ sʋ mʋ.

eng: See, his faith was at work along with his actions. In fact, his faith was made complete by his faithful actions.
local: Fu wu fɛɛ mʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ mʋ awaasa kpini ɩ gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn nɩn. Mʋ awaasa mʋ ɛɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ mʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ kɩ naa fʋʋ ɔkaa.

eng: So the scripture was fulfilled that says, Abraham believed God, and God regarded him as righteous . What is more, Abraham was called Gods friend.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ ba tɔ kesintin yɛ, Abraham kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gyii, kpalɩ mʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii maŋa sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kɔɔlɛ mʋ fɛɛ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ Abraham yɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ kyɛmɩnɛ.

eng: So you see that a person is shown to be righteous through faithful actions and not through faith alone.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ lɩɩ awaasa sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii wu fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa ɩkpa kpini i kyiigi, amaa man gyɛ mʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii nkʋn.

eng: In the same way, wasnt Rahab the prostitute shown to be righteous when she received the messengers as her guests and then sent them on by another road?.
local: Kanɩn nɩn nɩɩ ɔkyɩɩ Rahabu awaasa ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wu fɛɛ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ kɩtaa Ɩsɩrayɩ abi mʋ nɩɩ ba sun bamʋ mʋ kɩfɔ, nɩɩ ɔ kyɛ bamʋ tɔ nɩɩ ba nyɛ ɔkpa pʋpwɛ sʋ sɩlɛ lɩɩ Gyeriko kadɛ mʋ tɔ.

eng: As the lifeless body is dead, so faith without actions is dead.
local: Kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔkala kan man bʋ n‐yɩɩ tɔ, nɩɩ ki wu mʋ, kanɩn nɩɩ i du nɩn fɛɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ awaasa gbaa ɩ man tii kɩmʋ sʋ mʋ i wu nɩn.

eng: My brothers and sisters, not many of you should become teachers, because we know that we teachers will be judged more strictly.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, fan man yɛgɛ fanɛ gaalaagaa ansi ɩ payɩ fɛɛ fan ba biliŋi akaapʋpʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan nyi fɛɛ anɛ mʋ nɩɩ an kaapʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ katalɛ anɛ sʋ ii biti ɩɩ baa ɩ bʋlʋn ɩ kyɔ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ lɛɛ.

eng: We all make mistakes often, but those who dont make mistakes with their words have reached full maturity. Like a bridled horse, they can control themselves entirely.
local: Anɛ kpini an taalɛ an fɔyɩ ɩkpa, nɩɩ ɔsa kʋ bʋ tɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ fɔyɩ ɔkpa lɩɩ mʋ atɔwɛsa tɔ mʋ, o du kyɛɛkyɛɛ nɩn, nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ kun mʋ n‐yɩɩ danbɩrasa.

eng: When we bridle horses and put bits in their mouths to lead them wherever we want, we can control their whole bodies.
local: An sʋ nbɩrɩga an waa ɩgbaŋɛ nnɔ tɔ nɩn, kanɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ waa kɛ ba nu anɛ asɛ kɛ a taalɛ biliŋaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kpee katɩn mʋ nɩɩ an biti.

eng: Consider ships: They are so large that strong winds are needed to drive them. But pilots direct their ships wherever they want with a little rudder.
local: Fan yɛgɛ a bɩla taa ɩkʋlɩ lala mʋ nɩɩ ɩ kyɔ gaa, nɩɩ afuu bʋlʋnsa ii nin ɩmʋ waa sɩnkaala. Ɩmʋ abaŋɛ i du pii‐pii, nkɛɛ apalɩpʋ mʋ bɛɛ taalɛ biliŋaa ɩkʋlɩ mʋ kpee katɩn kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ bee biti.

eng: In the same way, even though the tongue is a small part of the body, it boasts wildly. Think about this: A small flame can set a whole forest on fire.
local: Kanɩn nɩɩ kanandʋlʋ gbaa gyɛ kʋtɔ pii nyɩmɩsa n‐yɩɩ tɔ, amaa kɩ sʋ alala‐sɩn gaa. Bɩla kɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ kɩfʋlɔn‐gyi pii kɩɩ taalɛ yɛgɛ nɩɩ kɩpʋ lala kɩɩ dɛɛ mʋ.

eng: The tongue is a small flame of fire, a world of evil at work in us. It contaminates our entire lives. Because of it, the circle of life is set on fire. The tongue itself is set on fire by the flames of hell.
local: Kanɩn nɩɩ kanandʋlʋ gbaa du fɛɛ fʋlɔn. I du fɛɛ kadɛ mʋ nɩɩ alibi i gyii kɩmʋ kpini. Nɩɩ kɩ bʋ nyɩmɩsa n‐yɩɩ tɔ kɩɩ waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ man dagaa. Nɩɩ kɩmʋ alibi mʋ akyaŋaa nyɩmɩsa n‐yɩɩ kpini nɩɩ i nyita mʋ kakyɩna tɔ. Nɩɩ kɩɩ dɛɛla fʋlɔn lɩɩ awʋrʋfɔ fʋlɔn yen‐yen tɔ sa kɩmʋ gbaa‐gbaa kɩmʋ n‐yɩɩ.

eng: People can tame and already have tamed every kind of animal, bird, reptile, and fish.
local: Nyɩmɩsa ɩɩ taalɛ pɔɔla atɔbwaaya libi kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ, nɩɩ bɛ pɔɔla atɔbwaaya fɛɛ nbwiibi yɛ atɔbwaaya kpɩɩsa yɛ atɔbwaaya mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ nkyu tɔ kpini.

eng: No one can tame the tongue, though. It is a restless evil, full of deadly poison.
local: Amaa nyɩmɩsa kʋ mɛɛ taalɛ pɔɔla kanandʋlʋ. Kɩ gyɛ kʋtɔ libi mʋ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa mɛɛ taalɛ kun kɩmʋ, nɩɩ kɩ sʋ kʋbwɛ.

eng: With it we both bless the Lord and Father and curse human beings made in Gods likeness.
local: Kanandʋlʋ maŋa nɩɩ an sʋ an yɩn Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ yɛ anɛ‐Sɛ, nɩɩ an bɩla an sʋ an da anɛ tɔɔmaa ana, mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tʋʋ bamʋ fɛɛ mu keduli sʋ mʋ oyu.

eng: Blessing and cursing come from the same mouth. My brothers and sisters, it just shouldnt be this way!.
local: Kɔnɔ kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ bɛɛ yɩn mʋ, kanɩn kɔnɔ kʋlʋn maŋa nɩɩ ba sʋ bɛɛ da nyɩmɩsa oyu. Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu anɛ, ɩ man dagaa ɩ maa ba kanɩn.

eng: Both fresh water and salt water dont come from the same spring, do they?.
local: Nkyu danbɩrasa yɛ nkyu mʋ nɩɩ i du mɛmɛɛ kpini ɩ taalɛ lɩɩ kitiribo kʋlʋn tɔ?.

eng: My brothers and sisters, can a fig tree produce olives? Can a grapevine produce figs? Of course not, and fresh water doesnt flow from a saltwater spring either.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, figi oyu ɩ taalɛ sɔyɩ olifu abi, abɛɛ kimango oyu kɩ taalɛ sɔyɩ akutu abɛɛ? Kanɩn ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ nkyu danbɩrasa yɛ nkyu mɛmɛɛ ɔ mɛɛ taalɛ lɩɩ kitiribo kʋlʋn tɔ.

eng: Are any of you wise and understanding? Show that your actions are good with a humble lifestyle that comes from wisdom.
local: Nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ sʋ kanyaasɩn nɩɩ ee nu asɩn kasɛ mʋ, kanɩn ɔsa maŋa ɔ taa mʋ kakyɩna danbɩrasa yɛ mʋ awaasa danbɩrasa kɛ ɔ bɩya mʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ kaapʋ fɛɛ ɔ sʋ kanyaasɩn.

eng: However, if you have bitter jealousy and selfish ambition in your heart, then stop bragging and living in ways that deny the truth.
local: Amaa nɩɩ fan kan fan sʋ kayɩɩ basa yɛ kensi payɩ libi fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ, fan man kaapʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ ɩmʋ sʋ. Nɩɩ ɩ kan ba kanɩn mʋ, fan tɩn antɩŋɛsa gyaga kesintin mʋ sʋ.

eng: This is not the wisdom that comes down from above. Instead, it is from the earth, natural and demonic.
local: Kanɩn kanyaasɩn maŋa kɩ man lɩɩ sʋsʋ nɩn, amaa kɩ lɩɩ nyɩmɩsa tɔ, nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ Sɩtaanɛ lɛɛ, nɩɩ kɩ man gyɛ kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ.

eng: Wherever there is jealousy and selfish ambition, there is disorder and everything that is evil.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ kayɩɩ basa yɛ kensi payɩ libi bʋ mʋ, tʋtɔ nɩɩ sʋgʋrɛ‐sʋgʋrɛ yɛ alibi kɩwaa kpini bʋ.

eng: What of the wisdom from above? First, it is pure, and then peaceful, gentle, obedient, filled with mercy and good actions, fair, and genuine.
local: Amaa kanyaasɩn mʋ nɩɩ kɩ lɩɩ sʋsʋ mʋ, kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyankpaa mʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ kɩ man sʋ ineesi, amaa kɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ asa bɛ nyɛ kayɩɩ yuuli, yɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ kɩ bɩya, yɛ kɩkyɛmɩnɛ ɔkɔn, yɛ kuwu asa kʋwɛɛ, kɛ ɩɩ sɔyɩ abi danbɩrasa. Kanɩn kanyaasɩn maŋa mʋ kɩ man sʋ kɩmɛɛgɛ tɔ yɛ antɩŋɛsa.

eng: Those who make peace sow the seeds of justice by their peaceful acts.
local: Kayɩɩ yuuli wuya ana mʋ nɩɩ bee duu kayɩɩ yuuli tɔ mʋ, bamʋ ɩɩ kpa adanbɩrasa bɛɛ lɩɩ ɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: What is the source of conflict among you? What is the source of your disputes? Dont they come from your cravings that are at war in your own lives?.
local: Mɩnɛ ɩɩ bɩya fanɛ ɩkɔ yɛ nluu mʋ nɩɩ fɛn kɔɔ yɛ abaa falɛ? Man gyɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ biti libi mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ lɩɩ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ tɔ ɩɩ kɔɔ yɛ fanɛ falɛ abɛɛ?.

eng: You long for something you dont have, so you commit murder. You are jealous for something you cant get, so you struggle and fight. You dont have because you dont ask.
local: Fen biti atɔ akʋ, amaa fɛn mɛɛ nyɛ. Ɩmʋ sʋ fɛn mɔɔ abaa. Fɛn taa ɔlʋn sʋ fen biti atɔ, amaa fɛn mɛɛ nyɛ ɩmʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ fɛn kɔɔ nluu. Fan maa mɛɛ nyɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fɛn mɛɛ kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: You ask and dont have because you ask with evil intentions, to waste it on your own cravings.
local: Fan maa taasɛ nɩɩ fɛn mɛɛ nyɛ mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fɛn taasɛ yɛ nfɛɛrɛ libi, kɛ fan nyɛ taa waa fanɛ nkɔlɔ biti.

eng: You unfaithful people! Dont you know that friendship with the world means hostility toward God? So whoever wants to be the worlds friend becomes Gods enemy.
local: Fanɛ asa gyaga ba nɩmʋ, fan man nyi fɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ dulinyaa tɔ atɔ ii gyii mu kumu mʋ, ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ okisipu nɩn. Ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ dulinyaa tɔ atɔ ii gyii mu kumu mʋ, ee biliŋi Ɩbwaarɛ okisipu.

eng: Or do you suppose that scripture is meaningless? Doesnt God long for our faithfulness in the life he has given to us?.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa maa tɔwɛ yɛ, Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa waa anɛ tɔ mʋ, ɛɛ kɔɔ kɔkʋrʋkɔ mʋ, fan nyi yɛ ɔ tɔwɛ ɩnɩmʋ kɩyan nɩn abɛɛ?.

eng: But he gives us more grace. This is why it says, God stands against the proud, but favors the humble .
local: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ sa anɛ mʋ bʋlʋn gaa. Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii tii bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kʋsaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋsʋ mʋ ɔkpa, amaa nɩɩ ɛɛ taa kabwaala ɛɛ sa bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ.

eng: Therefore, submit to God. Resist the devil, and he will run away from you.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sa Ɩbwaarɛ kɛ fan nu mʋ asɛ. Fan tii Sɩtaanɛ ɔkpa kɛ ɔ sɩlɛ lɩɩ fanɛ asɛ.

eng: Come near to God, and he will come near to you. Wash your hands, you sinners. Purify your hearts, you double-minded.
local: Fan nin tiri Ɩbwaarɛ, kɛ ngbaa mʋ o nin tiri fanɛ. Fanɛ alibi awaapʋ, fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ alibi tɔ. Nfɛɛrɛ nnyɔ‐nnyɔ wuya ana, fan lɛɛ nfɛɛrɛ libi lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ.

eng: Cry out in sorrow, mourn, and weep! Let your laughter become mourning and your joy become sadness.
local: Fan bɔta tɔ, kɛ fan su, kɛ fan saawʋ. Fan kyɛɛgɛ fanɛ ɩŋmasɛ biliŋi kusu, kɛ fan kyɛɛgɛ fanɛ kensi‐gyii biliŋi kʋwɛɛ.

eng: Humble yourselves before the Lord, and he will lift you up.
local: Kɛ fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, kɛ ɔ kʋsaa fanɛ sʋsʋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, dont say evil things about each other. Whoever insults or criticizes a brother or sister insults and criticizes the Law. If you find fault with the Law, you are not a doer of the Law but a judge over it.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, fan man tɔwɛ alibi akʋ lɩɩ fanɛ bɩrɩsa ana sʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ, ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ alibi lɩɩ mʋ bɩrɩsa sʋ nɩɩ o bun mʋ kʋpwɛ mʋ, ɛɛ kaapʋ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbara mʋ ɩ man bʋrɔn, nɩɩ o bun nbara mʋ kʋpwɛ. Fɛɛ nɩɩ fʋ bun nbara mʋ kʋpwɛ mʋ, fʋ man bɩla fʋ gyɛ nbara mʋ obuupu. Fu biliŋi ɩmʋ kʋpwɛ obunpu nɩn.

eng: There is only one lawgiver and judge, and he is able to save and to destroy. But you who judge your neighbor, who are you?.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ nbara mʋ ɔsapʋ, yɛ ɩmʋ ɔtalɛpʋ. Mʋ nkʋn ɛɛ taalɛ mɔlɩgɛ kɛ ɔ bɩla taalɛ nyita asa. Ɩmʋ sʋ fʋ ɩ gyɛ anɩmʋ nɩɩ fʋ talɛ fʋ bɩrɩsa ana?.

eng: Pay attention, you who say, Today or tomorrow we will go to such-and-such a town. We will stay there a year, buying and selling, and making a profit.
local: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ, fan nu mɛ asɛ, fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fɛn tɔwɛ yɛ, Ndaga abɛɛ ɔkɛ an biti a kpee kadɛ lala kʋ tɔ naa kyɩna kesu kʋlʋn sun kusun kɛ a biliŋi afulee wuya ana.

eng: You dont really know about tomorrow. What is your life? You are a mist that appears for only a short while before it vanishes.
local: Amaa fan man tɔwɛ kanɩn, yɛgɛ fan man nyi ɔkɛ asɩn yɛ fanɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan du nɩn fɛɛ ɩfɛ‐kyu. Ɩɩ ba ɩ mɛɛ kyɛɛrɛɛ nɩɩ ɩɩ nyaa.

eng: Heres what you ought to say: If the Lord wills, we will live and do this or that.
local: Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fan tɔwɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kan kyula, nɩɩ an sʋ nkpa mʋ an biti n waa falɛ abɛɛ ɩnɩmʋ.

eng: But now you boast and brag, and all such boasting is evil.
local: Amaa fan dan fɛn kaapʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ, yɛgɛ fɛn gyɛɛrɛ. N‐yɩɩ kɩkaapʋ yɛ kɩkyɛɛrɛɛ maŋa kpini ɩ gyɛ alibi nɩn.

eng: It is a sin when someone knows the right thing to do and doesnt do it.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o nyi adanbɩrasa mʋ, nɩɩ ɩ dagaa maa waa, nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ waa ɩmʋ mʋ, ɔ waa alibi nɩmʋ.

eng: Pay attention, you wealthy people! Weep and moan over the miseries coming upon you.
local: Fanɛ atɔ wuya ana, fan nu mɛ asɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ. Fan su kɛ fan saawʋ kenken lɩɩ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ ba fanɛ sʋ mʋ.

eng: Your riches have rotted. Moths have destroyed your clothes.
local: Fanɛ atɔ mʋ ɩ gyɔɔ muuri, kɛ atɔ wɛsa ba wɛ fanɛ atɔ bunsa kpini.

eng: Your gold and silver have rusted, and their rust will be evidence against you. It will eat your flesh like fire. Consider the treasure you have hoarded in the last days.
local: Fanɛ isuwa yɛ igbiti kpini‐kpini ɩ waa nkandɩra, kɛ kanɩn nkandɩra maŋa ɩ lɛɛ fanɛ alibi kaapʋ, kɛ ɩ dɩyɛ fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ fɛɛ fʋlɔn mʋ. Fan kʋʋla atɔ gyaga abaa sʋ nkɛ lala lʋwɛ nɩmʋ.

eng: Listen! Hear the cries of the wages of your field hands. These are the wages you stole from those who harvested your fields. The cries of the harvesters have reached the ears of the Lord of heavenly forces.
local: Fan kɩɩ, kusun awaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba sun fanɛ asun lɩɩ fanɛ ndɔɔ ana tɔ mʋ, nɩɩ fan kina bamʋ akɔ kɩka mʋ, bɛɛ fabɩlɛ bɛɛ sa fanɛ. Bamʋ nɩɩ ba kpa fanɛ adɔɔ‐gyitɔ sa fanɛ nɩɩ fan kina bamʋ akɔ kɩka mʋ, bamʋ kusu maŋa kpini i loo Ɩbwaarɛ Owura lala mʋ asʋ tɔ.

eng: You have lived a self-satisfying life on this earth, a life of luxury. You have stuffed your hearts in preparation for the day of slaughter.
local: Fan taa kɩnyɛ kyɩna danbɩrasa yɛ kensi‐gyii kyɩna dulinyaa tɔ. Nɩɩ fan kɩɩrɛ waa nfɔ gyoo fɛɛ kɩtɔbwaaya mʋ nɩɩ ɔ dan waa nfɔ o gyoo kakɛ mɔɔsa mʋ.

eng: You have condemned and murdered the righteous one, who doesnt oppose you.
local: Fan bun bamʋ nɩɩ bamʋ ɩkpa ii kyiigi kʋpwɛ, mɔɔ bamʋ yɛgɛ ba man kʋsʋ yɩlɛ fanɛ sʋ.

eng: Therefore, brothers and sisters, you must be patient as you wait for the coming of the Lord. Consider the farmer who waits patiently for the coming of rain in the fall and spring, looking forward to the precious fruit of the earth.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, fan waa kenyiita yɩlɛ naa fʋʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kɩba saŋa mʋ. Fan kɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔdɔɔpʋ sʋ kenyiita o gyoo bʋlayɩ gyankpaasa yɛ kɩkyɛ bʋlayɩ ɔ ba da mʋ ndɔɔ tɔ. Yɛgɛ ɔ sʋ kenyiita o gyoo mʋ atɔ‐gyisa mʋ ɩɩ sɔyɩ danbɩrasa.

eng: You also must wait patiently, strengthening your resolve, because the coming of the Lord is near.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan nyɛ kenyiita kɛ fan kɩtaa fanɛ nkɔlɔ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kibwii ba saŋa mʋ ki tee tiri tɔ.

eng: Dont complain about each other, brothers and sisters, so that you wont be judged. Look! The judge is standing at the door!.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, fan man pwɩɩ abaa, kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ man talɛ fanɛ. Ɔtalɛpʋ mʋ man bɩla ɔ bʋ kata, o tee tiri tɔ yɛ kɩba.

eng: Brothers and sisters, take the prophets who spoke in the name of the Lord as an example of patient resolve and steadfastness.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, fan nyiŋi Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ asɩn Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kɩtɩɩ tɔ mʋ. Fan bɩɩla kanɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba wu awʋrʋfɔ nɩɩ ba nyɛ kenyiita.

eng: Look at how we honor those who have practiced endurance. You have heard of the endurance of Job. And you have seen what the Lord has accomplished, for the Lord is full of compassion and mercy.
local: Bamʋ nɩɩ ba gyii awʋrʋfɔ nɩɩ ba nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ yɩlɛ tɔ mʋ, bamʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩɩ waa kusee. Nɩɩ fan nu ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Gyobu kenyiita mʋ nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ mʋ awʋrʋfɔ kigyii tɔ, yɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa adanbɩrasa sa mʋ kamaa tɔ mʋ. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ii su asa sʋ nɩɩ ee wu kʋwɛɛ.

eng: Most important, my brothers and sisters, never make a solemn pledge—neither by heaven nor earth, nor by anything else. Instead, speak with a simple Yes or No, or else you may fall under judgment.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, mɛ asɩn mʋ kpini ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fan man bɔ ntan tɩɩ sʋsʋ abɛɛ kasɛ abɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ. Fan yɛgɛ fanɛ kekyula kɩ baa kɩ gyɛ Ɛɛhn, kɛ fanɛ kekina kɩ waa ayee. Nɩɩ fan waa kanɩn mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ mɛɛ yɛ o bun fanɛ kʋpwɛ.

eng: If any of you are suffering, they should pray. If any of you are happy, they should sing.
local: Fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ kan ee wu awʋrʋfɔ mʋ, ɔ kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɛ ɔ kyɛ mʋ tɔ. Fanɛ ɔkʋ bʋ kensi‐gyii tɔ mʋ, ɔ bɩɩ ɩlʋn yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: If any of you are sick, they should call for the elders of the church, and the elders should pray over them, anointing them with oil in the name of the Lord.
local: Nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ kan ɛɛ lɔ mʋ, ɔ tɩɩ Krisito abi kʋbʋ mʋ abɩlɩsa kɛ ba ba kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa mʋ, kɛ ba sʋswa mʋ nfɔ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kɩtɩɩ tɔ.

eng: Prayer that comes from faith will heal the sick, for the Lord will restore them to health. And if they have sinned, they will be forgiven.
local: Kabwaarɛ kʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ lɩɩ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ falɛ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ ɔlɔpʋ mʋ ɔ nyɛ alanfɩya. Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ ii biti ɔ kyɛ mʋ kɛ ɔ kʋsaa mʋ. Nɩɩ ɔ kan waa alibi akʋ gbaa mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ taa mu alibi kɛɛ mʋ.

eng: For this reason, confess your sins to each other and pray for each other so that you may be healed. The prayer of the righteous person is powerful in what it can achieve.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan lɛɛ fanɛ alibi tɔwɛ abaa, kɛ fan kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ sa abaa, kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ kyɛ fanɛ alɔ sa fanɛ. Ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ, mʋ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɩ bʋgya nɩɩ i sun kusun.

eng: Elijah was a person just like us. When he earnestly prayed that it wouldnt rain, no rain fell for three and a half years.
local: Ɔnyɩn mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Eligya gbaa gyɛ nyɩmɩsa nɩn fɛɛ anɛ falɛ. Ɔ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ yɛ bʋlayɩ ɔ man da kasɛ sʋ. Nɩɩ bʋlayɩ yɩlɛ nsu ɩsa yɛ ɩbwaayɩ isiye.

eng: He prayed again, God sent rain, and the earth produced its fruit.
local: Ɩmʋ kamaa mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ bɩla bwii kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ yɛ bʋlayɩ ɔ da, nɩɩ bʋlayɩ tigi, nɩɩ atɔ duusa ɩ kɔyɩ, nɩɩ ɩ sɔyɩ abi kʋkyɔ.

eng: My brothers and sisters, if any of you wander from the truth and someone turns back the wanderer.
local: Mɛ‐daa ana yɛ mi‐supu ana, fɛɛ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ kan kina lɩɩ kesintin ɔkpa mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ bwiiyaa mʋ ba mʋ.

eng: recognize that whoever brings a sinner back from the wrong path will save them from death and will bring about the forgiveness of many sins.
local: fan nyiŋi fɛɛ, ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o bwiiyaa alibi ɔwaapʋ lɩɩ mu alibi ɔkpa mʋ sʋ mʋ, ɔ mɔlɩgɛ alibi ɔwaapʋ maŋa mʋ kala lɩɩ lewu tɔ ba nkpa tɔ, kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ taa mu alibi mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa kpini mʋ kɛɛ mʋ.

eng: Peter, an apostle of Jesus Christ, To Gods chosen strangers in the world of the diaspora, who live in Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia, and Bithynia.
local: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ mɛ Pita, mʋ nɩɩ n gyɛ Yesu Krisito osunpu mʋ asɛ. N kyʋrɔɔ kɩmʋ n sa fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa, nɩɩ fan yaasɛ tɔ, nɩɩ fan gyɛ afɔ Pontiyu yɛ Galati yɛ Kapadosiya yɛ Asiya yɛ Bitaniya ɩsʋwʋlɛ sʋ mʋ.

eng: God the Father chose you because of what he knew beforehand. He chose you through the Holy Spirits work of making you holy and because of the faithful obedience and sacrifice of Jesus Christ. May Gods grace and peace be multiplied to you.
local: Fanɛ nɩɩ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla o nyi kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa mʋ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ dɩdaa, nɩɩ ɔ bɔla mʋ Kayaayu sʋ lɛɛ fanɛ waa mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ asa, kɛ fan ba buu Yesu kɛ ɔ taa mʋ nkalan kpayɩ fanɛ. N kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ ɔ bwaala fanɛ kʋkyɔ, kɛ ɔ sa fanɛ kayɩɩ‐yuuli.

eng: May the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ be blessed! On account of his vast mercy, he has given us new birth. You have been born anew into a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead.
local: An yɩn anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito mʋ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ee su anɛ kʋwɛɛ gaa, ɩmʋ sʋ ɔ bɔla Yesu Krisito kelewu kyiŋi mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ sa anɛ nkpa pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ sʋ tamaa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ ɔkaa.

eng: You have a pure and enduring inheritance that cannot perish—an inheritance that is presently kept safe in heaven for you.
local: Kanɩn sʋ an biti an nyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kapatɩyɛ mʋ nɩɩ ki mee nyita nɩɩ kɩ mɛɛ gyɔɔ nɩɩ kɩ mɛɛ kpa sʋ nɩɩ ɩ dɛ i gyoo fanɛ sʋsʋ mʋ.

eng: Through his faithfulness, you are guarded by Gods power so that you can receive the salvation he is ready to reveal in the last time.
local: Nɩɩ lɩɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn ii kun fanɛ naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ lɛɛ kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ kaapʋ kakɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ.

eng: You now rejoice in this hope, even if its necessary for you to be distressed for a short time by various trials.
local: Nɩɩ halɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ gbaa mʋ, fan yɛgɛ fanɛ ansi i gyii, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ bɩrɛ akʋtɔ fen biti fan wu awʋrʋfɔ gaalaagaa lɩɩ asɩn wuribi kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ tɔ. Fanɛ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan gyii falɛ mʋ, ɩ kaala fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ ɩɩ kɩɩ.

eng: This is necessary so that your faith may be found genuine. Your genuine faith will result in praise, glory, and honor for you when Jesus Christ is revealed.
local: Nɩɩ fanɛ awʋrʋfɔ maŋa ɩ lɛɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mu kedubi mʋ nɩɩ kɩ kyɔ suwa mʋ kaapʋ. Halɩɩ suwa maa gyɛ kʋtɔ nyitasa gbaa mʋ, ba sʋ fʋlɔn bɛɛ kaala kɩmʋ bɛɛ kɩɩ kɩmʋ kedubi. Ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ ba kaala fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ kɩ kyɔ suwa mʋ kɩɩ. Nɩɩ fan kan taalɛ yɩlɛ tɔ bɩrɛ, fen biti fan nyɛ kɩyɩn yɛ bʋnyaa yɛ bɛɛrɛɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Yesu Krisito ii biti ɔ lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ mʋ.

eng: Although youve never seen him, you love him. Even though you dont see him now, you trust him and so rejoice with a glorious joy that is too much for words.
local: Halɩɩ fan maa man wu Yesu gbaa mʋ, fen biti mʋ, yɛgɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ gbaa fen mee wu mʋ, amaa fɛn kɔɔlɛ mʋ fen gyii nɩɩ fan nyɛ kensi‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ kaala.

eng: You are receiving the goal of your faith: your salvation.
local: lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fɛn nyɛ tamaa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ sa fanɛ kala ana.

eng: The prophets, who long ago foretold the grace that youve received, searched and explored, inquiring carefully about this salvation.
local: Falɛ kamɔlɩgɛ nɩmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ mʋ ba kɩɩ tɔ taasɛ biti tɔ, nɩɩ ba wʋla tɔwɛ yɩla yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ gyɛ fanɛ lɛɛ.

eng: They wondered what the Spirit of Christ within them was saying when he bore witness beforehand about the suffering that would happen to Christ and the glory that would follow. They wondered what sort of person or what sort of time they were speaking about.
local: Krisito Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu, nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ mʋ tɔ mʋ, lɛɛ kaapʋ bamʋ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa Krisito awʋrʋfɔ kigyii yɛ bʋnyaa mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ ba kamaa tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ ba kɩɩ tɔ taasɛ biti tɔ saŋa yɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ ba tɔ.

eng: It was revealed to them that in their search they were not serving themselves but you. These things, which even angels long to examine, have now been proclaimed to you by those who brought you the good news. They did this in the power of the Holy Spirit, who was sent from heaven.
local: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ kaapʋ bamʋ fɛɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ mʋ ɩ man gyɛ bamʋ gbaa‐gbaa bamʋ lɛɛ, amaa asa mʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba ba kamaa tɔ mʋ lɛɛ. Fanɛ ɩ gyɛ kamaa tɔ abi mʋ nɩɩ fan nu asɩn nɩmʋ lɩɩ ndaga atɔwɛpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa ba sa fanɛ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ lɩɩ sʋsʋ ɔlɔn tɔ mʋ. Halɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ gbaa bee biti ba nu asɩn mʋ kasɛ.

eng: Therefore, once you have your minds ready for action and you are thinking clearly, place your hope completely on the grace that will be brought to you when Jesus Christ is revealed.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan yɛgɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ ɩ baa ɩ dɛ kɛ fan taa sun kusun, kɛ fan baa fan da sʋ. Fan nyɛ tamaa lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ taa sa fanɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Yesu Krisito ii biti ɔ lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ kaapʋ mʋ.

eng: Dont be conformed to your former desires, those that shaped you when you were ignorant. But, as obedient children.
local: Fan waa nbii mʋ nɩɩ bee nu Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ, kɛ fan man taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ waa atɔ gyaga mʋ nɩɩ fan daa kyɩna fan man nyi nɩɩ fan waa mʋ.

eng: you must be holy in every aspect of your lives, just as the one who called you is holy.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ mʋ maa du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ sʋ mʋ, fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan baa fan du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ fanɛ awaasa kpini tɔ.

eng: It is written, You will be holy, because I am holy. .
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ tɔwɛ mʋ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, Fan baa fan du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, kpalɩ fɛɛ n du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ nɩn.

eng: Since you call upon a Father who judges all people according to their actions without favoritism, you should conduct yourselves with reverence during the time of your dwelling in a strange land.
local: Ɩ gyɛ kesintin fɛɛ fan tɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Sɛ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ kɩɩ ansi tɔ pɔyɩ nɩɩ ɛɛ talɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ maa mʋ awaasa. Kanan sʋ fan taa kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ bɛɛrɛɛ kyɩna dulinyaa tɔ fɛɛ afɔ.

eng: Live in this way, knowing that you were not liberated by perishable things like silver or gold from the empty lifestyle you inherited from your ancestors.
local: Yɛ fen nyi fɛɛ man gyɛ atɔ nyitasa fɛɛ gbiti abɛɛ suwa, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa ka fanɛ kʋkɔ lɩɩ fanɛ kakyɩna gyaga mʋ nɩɩ fan bɩɩla lɩɩ fanɛ naana ana asɛ mʋ.

eng: Instead, you were liberated by the precious blood of Christ, like that of a flawless, spotless lamb.
local: Amaa ɩ gyɛ Yesu Krisito nkalan kparɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ sʋ ɔgyalɩn mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ taa ka fanɛ kʋkɔ. Krisito du nɩn fɛɛ kabʋlʋpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man sʋ kʋlɔpanɛ abɛɛ ineesi kʋ mʋ nyɩɩ sʋ.

eng: Christ was chosen before the creation of the world, but was only revealed at the end of time. This was done for you.
local: Pɔyɩ kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ tʋʋ dulinyaa mʋ, ɔ wʋla lɛɛ Yesu yɩla fɛɛ o be wu mɔlɩgɛ fanɛ, nɩɩ fanɛ sʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ mʋ kaapʋ saŋa laalaalʋwɛ nɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: who through Christ are faithful to the God who raised him from the dead and gave him glory. So now, your faith and hope should rest in God.
local: Fan bɔla Yesu sʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ o kyiŋi mʋ lɩɩ lewu tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ bʋnyaa mʋ mʋ gyii. Ɩmʋ sʋ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ fanɛ tamaa ɩ bʋ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔ.

eng: As you set yourselves apart by your obedience to the truth so that you might have genuine affection for your fellow believers, love each other deeply and earnestly.
local: Nɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ fan maa bɩya fanɛ asʋ kasɛ sa kesintin asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ fwɩɩ fanɛ sʋ, nɩɩ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ fan nyɛ kebiti sa fanɛ bɩrɩsa ana akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ, fan taa kebiti mʋ nɩɩ kɩ lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ mʋ biti abaa.

eng: Do this because you have been given new birth—not from the type of seed that decays but from seed that doesnt. This seed is Gods life-giving and enduring word.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ man bɔla kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ mɛɛ taalɛ kyɩna kakpaa mʋ sʋ kʋʋgɛ fanɛ, amaa ɔ bɔla mʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ tɔ kakpaa nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ kyɛɛgɛ mʋ sʋ kʋʋgɛ fanɛ.

eng: Thus, All human life on the earth is like grass, and all human glory is like a flower in a field. The grass dries up and its flower falls off, .
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Asɩn kyanyɩlasa mʋ ɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, Asa kpini be du nɩn fɛɛ afitiri, nɩɩ bamʋ bʋnyaa kpini du nɩn fɛɛ afitiri ntʋtʋlɛ. Afitiri ii wu kɛ ɩmʋ ntʋtʋlɛ mʋ gbaa ɩɩ kpɩkpaa tɩyɛ.

eng: but the Lords word endures forever. This is the word that was proclaimed to you as good news.
local: amaa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ asɩn mʋ bɩrɛ ɩ bʋ tɔ kakpaa. Kanɩn asɩn maŋa ɩ gyɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ sa fanɛ mʋ.

eng: Therefore, get rid of all ill will and all deceit, pretense, envy, and slander.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ alibi ɩkpa kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ yɛ npɩna yɛ kebunbun ansi yɛ kayɩɩ basa yɛ kɩtɩɩ kinyita tɔ.

eng: Instead, like a newborn baby, desire the pure milk of the word. Nourished by it, you will grow into salvation.
local: Fan biti asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ fɛɛ nbii pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kɩɩ bee biti kɩnyapʋ‐kyu mʋ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ fan dan fanɛ kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ tɔ naa lʋwɛ.

eng: since you have tasted that the Lord is good.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan maa daa kɩɩ nɩɩ fen wu fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ adanbɩrasa ɩ bʋrɔn.

eng: Now you are coming to him as to a living stone. Even though this stone was rejected by humans, from Gods perspective it is chosen, valuable.
local: Fan ba Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu mʋ asɛ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ kubuu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ sʋ nkpa, nɩɩ asa ba kina mʋ, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ fɛɛ mʋ ɩ bɔla mu ansi.

eng: You yourselves are being built like living stones into a spiritual temple. You are being made into a holy priesthood to offer up spiritual sacrifices that are acceptable to God through Jesus Christ.
local: Fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan gyɛ abuu mʋ nɩɩ ɩ sʋ nkpa, kɛ fan yɛgɛ ɔ taa fanɛ pɔyɩ kabwaarɛ‐sunkpa ayɛ. Kɛ fan bɔla Yesu Krisito sʋ fan ba waa Ɩbwaarɛ aseepu kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ, kɛ fan lɛɛ kayaayu tɔ saraga mʋ nɩɩ ki gyii Ɩbwaarɛ ansi mʋ sa mʋ.

eng: Thus it is written in scripture, Look! I am laying a cornerstone in Zion, chosen, valuable. The person who believes in him will never be shamed. .
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ mʋ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ yɛ, Fan kɩɩ, n sʋ kɩbɔntɔnbʋlɔntɔ kubuu kparɛ mʋ nɩɩ n lɛɛ n yii Siyon kɩbɩɩ sʋ Gyerusalem kadɛ tɔ. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ, man bʋ tɔ o gyii ipeeli.

eng: So God honors you who believe. For those who refuse to believe, though, the stone the builders tossed aside has become the capstone.
local: Nɩɩ kubuu mʋ kɩ dagaa sa fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ, amaa kɩ man dagaa sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ mʋ gyii mʋ. Kubuu mʋ nɩɩ apɔyɩpʋ ba kina mʋ, kɩmʋ ɩ ba biliŋi kɩbɔntɔnbʋlɔntɔ kubuu tirisa.

eng: This is a stone that makes people stumble and a rock that makes them fall. Because they refuse to believe in the word, they stumble. Indeed, this is the end to which they were appointed.
local: Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla tɔwɛ yɛ Kubuu maŋa kɩɩ yɛgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ bee siti, nɩɩ kɩ bɩla kɩ gyɛ kɩfʋlɛ‐buu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ bɛɛ lɩɩ tɩyɛ. Bee siti lɩɩ fɛɛ ba maa man nu abwaarɛsɩn mʋ, nɩɩ kanɩn nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ wʋla ŋmina yɩla sa bamʋ.

eng: But you are a chosen race, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, a people who are Gods own possession. You have become this people so that you may speak of the wonderful acts of the one who called you out of darkness into his amazing light.
local: Amaa fanɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ fan gyɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ, nɩɩ fan gyɛ mu aseepu mʋ nɩɩ bee gyii kuwura, nɩɩ fan gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ asa, nɩɩ fan bɩla fan gyɛ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa‐gbaa asa. Mʋ ɩ lɛɛ fanɛ lɩɩ kitentenbiri tɔ ba mʋ fɩtɩla kparɛ mʋ tɔ fɛɛ fan ba lɛɛ mʋ awaasa lala mʋ kaapʋ.

eng: Once you werent a people, but now you are Gods people. Once you hadnt received mercy, but now you have received mercy.
local: Saŋa kʋ tɔ mʋ fan man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ fan gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa. Saŋa kʋ tɔ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ man kyɩna ee wu fanɛ kʋwɛɛ, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ o wu fanɛ kʋwɛɛ.

eng: Dear friends, since you are immigrants and strangers in the world, I urge that you avoid worldly desires that wage war against your lives.
local: Mi‐nyi mu‐bii ana Krisito tɔ, fan gyɛ afɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan yaasɛ tɔ loo ndɛndɛmandɛ tɔ, n tɔwɛ n waa fanɛ fɛɛ fan lɛɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kebiti tɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ kɔ yɛ ɔkala mʋ.

eng: Live honorably among the unbelievers. Today, they defame you, as if you were doing evil. But in the day when God visits to judge they will glorify him, because they have observed your honorable deeds.
local: Fan taa kakyɩna danbɩrasa kyɩna yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii mʋ, halɩɩ nɩɩ bɛɛ pwɩɩ fanɛ yɛ fan gyɛ alibi awaapʋ gbaa mʋ, bee biti ba baa bee wu fanɛ awaasa danbɩrasa, kɛ ba bʋnyaa Ɩbwaarɛ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ ba talɛ asa awaasa mʋ.

eng: For the sake of the Lord submit to every human institution. Do this whether it means submitting to the emperor as supreme ruler.
local: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ sʋ mʋ, fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa anyɩmɩsa alʋlʋnpʋ kʋmaa nɩmʋ. Fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa owura lala mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ kumu wuya.

eng: or to governors as those sent by the emperor. They are sent to punish those doing evil and to praise those doing good.
local: yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ o sun fɛɛ ba ba bɩɩtɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa alibi mʋ asʋ, kɛ ba yɩn bamʋ nɩɩ ba waa adanbɩrasa mʋ.

eng: Submit to them because its Gods will that by doing good you will silence the ignorant talk of foolish people.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti fɛɛ fan taa adanbɩrasa kɩwaa tii asa mʋ nɩɩ ba man nyi sɛhn ɔkpa yɛgɛ ba man nyɛ tɔwɛ amelensi‐sɩn.

eng: Do this as Gods slaves, and yet also as free people, not using your freedom as a cover-up for evil.
local: Fan kyɩna fɛɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba gyii bamʋ n‐yɩɩ, amaa fan man taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kigyii mʋ baala waa alibi. Amaa fan kyɩna fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ayaafɔlɛ.

eng: Honor everyone. Love the family of believers. Have respectful fear of God. Honor the emperor.
local: Fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ. Fen biti abaa, fanɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu. Fan sɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ. Fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa Owura lala mʋ.

eng: Household slaves, submit by accepting the authority of your masters with all respect. Do this not only to good and kind masters but also to those who are harsh.
local: Kɩkpaara sʋ ayaafɔlɛ, fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa fanɛ‐nyɩrɩpɛ ana kɛ fan nu bamʋ asɛ. Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋrɔn nɩɩ ba bʋpɔɔ mʋ nkʋn, amaa yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bamʋ amu tɔ ɩ bʋlʋn mʋ gbaa.

eng: Now, it is commendable if, because of ones understanding of God, someone should endure pain through suffering unjustly.
local: Fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fanɛ ansi ɩ dɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti sʋ, nɩɩ fan kan yɩlɛ tɔ gyii ɩbasa wu awʋrʋfɔ yɛgɛ fan man waa sɛhn mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ waa fanɛ kusee.

eng: But what praise comes from enduring patiently when you have sinned and are beaten for it? But if you endure steadfastly when youve done good and suffer for it, this is commendable before God.
local: Nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ kan waa alibi, nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ ɩmʋ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ lɩɩ kɩdayɛ sʋ nɩɩ ɔ taalɛ yɩlɛ tɔ mʋ, mɩnɛ kumu ɔkɔn nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ? Amaa nɩɩ fan nyɛ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ lɩɩ adanbɩrasa sʋ nɩɩ fan kan yɩlɛ tɔ gyii awʋrʋfɔ lɩɩ ɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, ɩmʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ waa fanɛ kusee.

eng: You were called to this kind of endurance, because Christ suffered on your behalf. He left you an example so that you might follow in his footsteps.
local: Nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Krisito gbaa gyii awʋrʋfɔ sa fanɛ kɛ fan waa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa yɩla anɛ mʋ, kanɩn sʋ mʋ fan buu mʋ ayaa tɔ.

eng: He committed no sin, nor did he ever speak in ways meant to deceive.
local: Ɔ man waa kilibi kʋ, nɩɩ npɩna ɩ man bʋ mʋ kɔnɔ tɔ.

eng: When he was insulted, he did not reply with insults. When he suffered, he did not threaten revenge. Instead, he entrusted himself to the one who judges justly.
local: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ba saalɛ mʋ mʋ, ɔ man bwiiyaa asebi mʋ sa. Nɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ o gyii awʋrʋfɔ mʋ, ɔ man ŋaala bamʋ amaa ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ talɛ kesintin ɔkpa sʋ mʋ abaa tɔ.

eng: He carried in his own body on the cross the sins we committed. He did this so that we might live in righteousness, having nothing to do with sin. By his wounds you were healed.
local: Krisito gbaa‐gbaa ɛɛ kɔɔlɛ anɛ alibi sʋla nɩɩ ba mɔɔ mʋ oyu laasa mʋ sʋ, kɛ ɩ waa fɛɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ i wu sa alibi kɩwaa, kɛ a kyɩna kakyɩna mʋ nɩɩ anɛ ɩkpa i kyiigi. Lɩɩ Krisito akyʋʋkyʋʋ ɩlɔ mʋ sʋ mʋ fan nyɛ kɩkyɛ.

eng: Though you were like straying sheep, you have now returned to the shepherd and guardian of your lives.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan daa fen du fɛɛ nbʋlʋpʋ fɔyɩsa, amaa nbɩɩnbɩɩ bɩrɛ fan bwii ba fanɛ Ɔkpapʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kun fanɛ kala ana sʋ mʋ asɛ.

eng: Wives, likewise, submit to your own husbands. Do this so that even if some of them refuse to believe the word, they may be won without a word by their wives way of life.
local: Kanɩn ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ mʋ, akyɩɩ‐kilipu fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa fanɛ‐kuli ana. Nɩɩ fan waa kanɩn mʋ fanɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ danbɩrasa mʋ kii biti yɛgɛ bamʋ tɔ akʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ gyii mʋ, ba kyɛɛgɛ bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ kɛ ba kɔɔlɛ asɩn mʋ gyii. Nɩɩ ɩ man bɩla i tiri fɛɛ fan tɔwɛ asɩn mʋ sa bamʋ.

eng: After all, they will have observed the reverent and holy manner of your lives.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ‐kuli ana mʋ, bee biti ba wu fanɛ kakyɩna danbɩrasa mʋ yɛ bɛɛrɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ sa abwaarɛsɩn mʋ.

eng: Dont try to make yourselves beautiful on the outside, with stylish hair or by wearing gold jewelry or fine clothes.
local: Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ kɩlɔŋɔ fɛɛ inyini kiŋmina yɛ suwa atɔ suusa fɛɛ ɩkyalagasʋ yɛ agbeeleebi abɛɛ ataa danbɩrasa nɩɩ fen biti fan taa waa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ ɔdan.

eng: Instead, make yourselves beautiful on the inside, in your hearts, with the enduring quality of a gentle, peaceful spirit. This type of beauty is very precious in Gods eyes.
local: Amaa fan yɛgɛ fanɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩbɩya kasɛ, yɛ nfɛɛrɛ kasɛ kɩdɛ mʋ, ɔ lɛɛ fanɛ ɔdan mʋ nɩɩ i mee nyita kakaakʋ mʋ kaapʋ. Kanɩn ɔdan nɩmʋ ɩ bɔla Ɩbwaarɛ ansi.

eng: For it was in this way that holy women who trusted in God used to make themselves beautiful, accepting the authority of their own husbands.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ dɩdaa akyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ bee sun Ɩbwaarɛ nɩɩ ba sʋ tamaa mʋ tɔ mʋ, kanɩn ɔkpa nɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ba taa waa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ ɔdan. Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ ba maa bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa bamʋ‐kuli ana.

eng: For example, Sarah accepted Abrahams authority when she called him master . You have become her children when you do good and dont respond to threats with fear.
local: Kanan nɩɩ anɛ naana‐kyɩɩsa Sara gbaa waa. O nu mu‐kuli Abraham asɛ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ, mɛ‐nyɩrɩpɛ! Nɩɩ fan kan waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋrɔn nɩɩ fan man sʋ kufuu mʋ, fan gyɛ Sara anaana‐bii.

eng: Husbands, likewise, submit by living with your wife in ways that honor her, knowing that she is the weaker partner. Honor her all the more, as she is also a coheir of the gracious care of life. Do this so that your prayers wont be hindered.
local: Kanɩn ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ fanɛ anyɩn gbaa, fan su fanɛ‐ka ana sʋ fanɛ kekili tɔ, yɛgɛ fan da sʋ fɛɛ akyɩɩ mʋ ba man bʋlʋn fɛɛ fanɛ anyɩn. Kanɩn sʋ fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ sa bamʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fanaa akyɩɩ mʋ kpini fen biti fan nyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala nkpa atɔ mʋ kpini kyɛɛkyɛɛ. Nɩɩ fan waa kanɩn mʋ, sɛhn mɛɛ yɛ o tii fanɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɔkpa.

eng: Finally, all of you be of one mind, sympathetic, lovers of your fellow believers, compassionate, and modest in your opinion of yourselves.
local: Mɛ asɩn mʋ kpini ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fanɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ kpini fan waa kɔnɔ kʋlʋn kɛ fan wu abaa kʋwɛɛ, kɛ fan biti abaa fɛɛ kenyibi, kɛ fan waa kɩdanbɩrasa sa abaa kɛ fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa abaa.

eng: Dont pay back evil for evil or insult for insult. Instead, give blessing in return. You were called to do this so that you might inherit a blessing.
local: Fan man taa alibi ka alibi kʋkɔ, kɛ fan man taa asebi ka tɛɛla asebi kʋkɔ. Amaa fan kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ ɔ taa kusee ka bamʋ kʋkɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ fanɛ yɛ fan ba waa, kɛ fan ba nyɛ mʋ kusee mʋ.

eng: For those who want to love life and see good days should keep their tongue from evil speaking and their lips from speaking lies. .
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti kakyɩna danbɩrasa yɛ kensi‐gyii, kɛ ɔ kyɩna nkpa tɔ kyɛɛrɛɛ mʋ, ɔ man yɛgɛ ntɔwɛ libi yɛ atɩntɩnsa ɩ ba ɩ lɩɩ mʋ kɔnɔ tɔ.

eng: They should shun evil and do good; seek peace and chase after it. .
local: Kanɩn ɔsa maŋa ɔ yɛgɛ alibi kɩwaa kɛ ɔ waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn. Ɔ kpan mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ bɩya kayɩɩ yuuli, kɛ ɔ kɩtaa tɔ danbɩrasa.

eng: The Lords eyes are on the righteous and his ears are open to their prayers. But the Lord cannot tolerate those who do evil. .
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɛɛ kɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ bamʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ee nu bamʋ kɩkʋlɛ saŋa kʋmaa. Amaa bamʋ nɩɩ bɛ waa alibi mʋ bɩrɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ biliŋaa mʋ kamaa sa bamʋ.

eng: Who will harm you if you are zealous for good?.
local: Fɛɛ nɩɩ fanɛ ansi ɩ payɩ adanbɩrasa kɩwaa sʋ mʋ, anɩmʋ ii biti ɔ waa fanɛ alibi abɛɛ?.

eng: But happy are you, even if you suffer because of righteousness! Dont be terrified or upset by them.
local: Halɩɩ nɩɩ fan kan gyii awʋrʋfɔ gbaa lɩɩ kɩdanbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ fan waa sʋ mʋ, fanaa kumu ɔkɔn. Fan man sɩlɛ bamʋ kɛ fan man yɛgɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ n nyita fanɛ.

eng: Instead, regard Christ the Lord as holy in your hearts. Whenever anyone asks you to speak of your hope, be ready to defend it.
local: Amaa fanɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ fan taa bɛɛrɛɛ lala sa Krisito lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ, kɛ fan bɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ. Saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ fan lɔŋɔ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ, kɛ nɩɩ ɔkʋ ba taasɛ fanɛ tamaa mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔ mʋ, kɛ fan nyɛ kɔnɔ sa mʋ.

eng: Yet do this with respectful humility, maintaining a good conscience. Act in this way so that those who malign your good lifestyle in Christ may be ashamed when they slander you.
local: Amaa fan taa bwahn kɩwaa yɛ bɛɛrɛɛ lɛɛ bamʋ nnɔ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ fanɛ amu tɔ ɛɛ saaŋɛ fanɛ. Ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔwɛ bɛɛ pwɩɩ fanɛ lɩɩ Krisito tɔ kakyɩna danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ fan bʋ kɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, be gyii ipeeli.

eng: It is better to suffer for doing good than for doing evil.
local: Fɛɛ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti fɛɛ fen gyii awʋrʋfɔ kɩdanbɩrasa sʋ mʋ, ɩ bʋrɔn ɩ kyɔ fan maa gyii awʋrʋfɔ alibi sʋ.

eng: Christ himself suffered on account of sins, once for all, the righteous one on behalf of the unrighteous. He did this in order to bring you into the presence of God. Christ was put to death as a human, but made alive by the Spirit.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Krisito gbaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ maa waa alibi kʋ mʋ, wu sa alibi wuya ana. O wu kɩlɩɩ kʋlʋn kakpaa sa alibi, kɛ ɩ lɔŋɔ anaa Ɩbwaarɛ nsana. Ba mɔɔ mʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ tɔ, amaa o bwii kyiŋi kayaayu tɔ ba nkpa tɔ.

eng: And it was by the Spirit that he went to preach to the spirits in prison.
local: Nɩɩ o kpee kayaayu tɔ naa tɔwɛ asɩn sa n‐yaayu mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩtaa bamʋ tii yɩla mʋ.

eng: In the past, these spirits were disobedient—when God patiently waited during the time of Noah. Noah built an ark in which a few lives were rescued through water.
local: Nɩɩ falɛ n‐yaayu nɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ dɩdaa ba kyɩna waa kʋsʋ tɔ ɔlʋn sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ nyɛ kenyiita kyɛɛrɛɛ sa bamʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Nowa salɛ ɔkʋlɩ lala mʋ. Ɩnɩmʋ kpini tɔ mʋ, asa kalɩsa fɛɛ asa aburuwa nkʋn i loo ɔkʋlɩ mʋ tɔ nɩɩ ba nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ lɩɩ nkyu mʋ tɔ.

eng: Baptism is like that. It saves you now—not because it removes dirt from your body but because it is the mark of a good conscience toward God. Your salvation comes through the resurrection of Jesus Christ.
local: Nowa saŋa nkyu mʋ ɩ yɩlɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee mʋ nɩɩ ɩ mɔlɩgɛ fanɛ. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ man gyɛ kekyugyee mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ fwɩɩ nyɩmɩsa n‐yɩɩ sʋ ineesi. Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee ɩ gyɛ nfɛɛrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an nyɛ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ kɩda sa Ɩbwaarɛ. Nɩɩ ɩɩ mɔlɩgɛ anɛ lɩɩ Yesu Krisito kelewu kyiŋi mʋ sʋ.

eng: who is at Gods right side. Now that he has gone into heaven, he rules over all angels, authorities, and powers.
local: Yesu bwii kyʋn sʋsʋ naa kyɩna Ɩbwaarɛ gyisa sʋ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ yɛ sʋsʋ awuragyi yɛ alʋlʋnpʋ kpini ba bʋ mʋ kasɛ.

eng: Therefore, since Christ suffered as a human, you should also arm yourselves with his way of thinking. This is because whoever suffers is finished with sin.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Yesu maa gyii awʋrʋfɔ mʋ n‐yɩɩ tɔ sʋ mʋ, ɩmʋ sʋ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fan taa kanɩn nfɛɛrɛ mʋ waa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ ɔlʋn. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ sa awʋrʋfɔ mʋ, alibi ɩ man bɩla ɩ sʋ ɔlʋn mʋ sʋ.

eng: As a result, they dont live the rest of their human lives in ways determined by human desires but in ways determined by Gods will.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ lɩɩ ndaga ɩɩ sʋ ii kpee mʋ, fan man bɩla taa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ waa fanɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kebiti, amaa fan waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti.

eng: You have wasted enough time doing what unbelievers desire—living in their unrestrained immorality and lust, their drunkenness and excessive feasting and wild parties, and their forbidden worship of idols.
local: Dɩdaa mʋ fan nyita saŋa waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ ba waa mʋ. Fan taa ineesi waa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ, fan waa kɩbʋrʋkɔɔnɛ, yɛ kata‐bʋʋ, yɛ kɩgyaŋɛ‐gyii yɛ kɩbʋʋ libi, yɛ kɩbaabʋtɔ gyaga yɛ ɩdakpa kusun.

eng: They think its strange that you dont join in these activities with the same flood of unrestrained wickedness. So they slander you.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ i kyinkyin bamʋ nɩɩ ba man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ fɛɛ fan man bɩla fan tii bamʋ sʋ fɛn waa kanɩn kɩbaabʋtɔ gyaga mʋ. Kanan sʋ ba saalɛ fanɛ.

eng: They will have to reckon with the one who is ready to judge the living and the dead.
local: Amaa bee biti ba ba lɛɛ bamʋ kɔnɔ lɩɩ atɔ libi mʋ nɩɩ ba waa falɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɛɛ wʋla kʋʋla ee gyoo, kɛ o gyii asa kɩɩsa yɛ alewupu mʋ asɩn.

eng: Indeed, this is the reason the good news was also preached to the dead. This happened so that, although they were judged as humans according to human standards, they could live by the Spirit according to divine standards.
local: Kpalɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ Yesu Krisito naa tɔwɛ asɩn danbɩrasa mʋ sa alewupu mʋ. Lewu mʋ nɩɩ ba wu mʋ, ɩ gyɛ kʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bun bamʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ, amaa Yesu asɩn mʋ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ bamʋ kala ana ba kyɩna nkpa tɔ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bʋ tɔ mʋ.

eng: The end of everything has come. Therefore, be self-controlled and clearheaded so you can pray.
local: Atɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ laalaalʋwɛ i tiri tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ fan baa fan da sʋ, kɛ fan kɩtaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ, kɛ fan taalɛ kʋlɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ.

eng: Above all, show sincere love to each other, because love brings about the forgiveness of many sins.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini tɔ mʋ, fan biti abaa fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ kebiti kɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ bee bun ansi bɛɛ lɩɩ alibi kpini sʋ.

eng: Open your homes to each other without complaining.
local: Kɛ fan taa kɔkɔlɔ fuuli kɔɔlɛ abaa kɩfɔ fanɛ akpaara sʋ, yɛgɛ fan man kɔlɩtɛ.

eng: And serve each other according to the gift each person has received, as good managers of Gods diverse gifts.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ sa ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kabwaarɛ‐sun tɔ kakɛɛ kʋkwɩɩ‐kʋkwɩɩ. Nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ maa kɩɩ kakɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa sa mʋ mʋ sʋ, kɛ ɔ taa kyɛ mʋ bɩrɩsa ana tɔ.

eng: Whoever speaks should do so as those who speak Gods word. Whoever serves should do so from the strength that God furnishes. Do this so that in everything God may be honored through Jesus Christ. To him be honor and power forever and always. Amen.
local: Fɛɛ nɩɩ ɔkʋ lɛɛ ɩ gyɛ asɩn kɩtɔwɛ mʋ, ɔ tɔwɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn. Fɛɛ nɩɩ ɔkʋ lɛɛ ɩ gyɛ o sun asa mʋ, ɩ dagaa fɛɛ ɔ taa ɔlʋn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa sa mʋ mʋ kpini kyɛ tɔ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ asa ba bɔla Yesu Krisito sʋ yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ atɔ kpini tɔ. Mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ maŋa nkʋn ɩ dagaa ayɩn‐bi yɛ ɔlʋn lɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ ɔkaa. Amen!.

eng: Dear friends, dont be surprised about the fiery trials that have come among you to test you. These are not strange happenings.
local: Mi‐nyi mu‐bii ana Krisito tɔ, fan man yɛgɛ i kyinkyin fanɛ fɛɛ awʋrʋfɔ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ fen wu falɛ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ kʋtɔ pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ ba fanɛ sʋ.

eng: Instead, rejoice as you share Christs suffering. You share his suffering now so that you may also have overwhelming joy when his glory is revealed.
local: Amaa fan yɛgɛ fanɛ ansi i gyii fɛɛ fan maa gyii Yesu Krisito awʋrʋfɔ mʋ ɩkʋ. Ɩnɩmʋ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ fan nyɛ kensi‐gyii tii sʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Yesu ii biti ɔ ba yɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ.

eng: If you are mocked because of Christs name, you are blessed, for the Spirit of glory—indeed, the Spirit of God—rests on you.
local: Nɩɩ asa bɛ kan bɛɛ saalɛ fanɛ fɛɛ fan maa gyɛ Krisito abuupu sʋ mʋ, kumu ɔkɔn ɩ gyɛ fanɛ lɛɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu yɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ ɩ gyan fanɛ sʋ.

eng: Now none of you should suffer as a murderer or thief or evildoer or rebel.
local: Amaa fan man yɛgɛ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ o gyii awʋrʋfɔ fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ asa ɔmɔɔpʋ abɛɛ oyu abɛɛ asɩn libi ɔwaapʋ abɛɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ taa mʋ kɔnɔ ɛɛ waa asa asɩn tɔ.

eng: But dont be ashamed if you suffer as one who belongs to Christ. Rather, honor God as you bear Christs name. Give honor to God.
local: Amaa nɩɩ fan kan gyii awʋrʋfɔ fɛɛ fan maa gyɛ Krisito abi sʋ mʋ, fan man yɛgɛ ɩ waa fanɛ ipeeli. Amaa fan taa afwaala nkʋn sa Ɩbwaarɛ fɛɛ Krisito kɩtɩɩ kɩ maa gyan fanɛ sʋ.

eng: because its time for judgment to begin with Gods own household. But if judgment starts with us, what will happen to those who refuse to believe Gods good news?.
local: Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti o gyii asa asɩn mʋ ɩɩ fʋʋ. Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti o piili katalɛ mʋ lɩɩ mʋ asa sʋ. Nɩɩ ɔ kan ee biti o piili lɩɩ mʋ asa sʋ falɛ mʋ, bamʋ nɩɩ bee kina abwaarɛsɩn mʋ kunu mʋ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ baa i du sa bamʋ?.

eng: If the righteous are barely rescued, what will happen to the godless and sinful?.
local: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, Fɛɛ nɩɩ ɩ kan ɩ bʋlʋn sa bamʋ nɩɩ bamʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi gbaa ba nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ baa i du sa bamʋ nɩɩ ba man sɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa alibi mʋ.

eng: So then, those who suffer because they follow Gods will should commit their lives to a trustworthy creator by doing what is right.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ bamʋ nɩɩ bee gyii awʋrʋfɔ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti sʋ mʋ, ba kyaga sʋ bɛɛ waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn, kɛ ba taa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ waa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tʋʋ bamʋ mʋ abaa tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ ɩɩ tɔwɛ asɩn nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ laaŋɛ.

eng: Therefore, I have a request for the elders among you. I urge the elders.
local: Nbɩɩnbɩɩ mʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ mɛ, Pita gbaa n gyɛ Krisito akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu ɔbɩlɩsa mʋ, nɩɩ mi ansi i wu kanan mʋ nɩɩ Yesu Krisito wu awʋrʋfɔ, nɩɩ n biti n nyɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ nɩɩ ki biti kɩ ba lɛɛ kaapʋ mʋ, n tɔwɛ n sa fanɛ abɩlɩsa mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ fanɛ tɔ mʋ yɛ.

eng: Like shepherds, tend the flock of God among you. Watch over it. Dont shepherd because you must, but do it voluntarily for God. Dont shepherd greedily, but do it eagerly.
local: n kʋlɛ fanɛ gaa fɛɛ, fan kɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa waa fanɛ abaa tɔ mʋ sʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ atɔbwaaya ɔkpapʋ ɩɩ kɩɩ atɔbwaaya sʋ mʋ. Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ yɛ ba nyan fanɛ, amaa fan kɩɩ bamʋ sʋ lɩɩ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti mʋ. Fan man waa fɛɛ fan sʋ fen biti afulee, amaa fan waa kanɩn taa sun Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: Dont shepherd by ruling over those entrusted to your care, but become examples to the flock.
local: Fan man gyii kuwura bamʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa ba waa fanɛ abaa tɔ mʋ sʋ, amaa fan yɛgɛ fanɛ awaasa ɩ baa ɩ gyɛ bamʋ atɔ bɩɩlasa.

eng: And when the chief shepherd appears, you will receive an unfading crown of glory.
local: Nɩɩ fɛɛ Ɔkpapʋ Ɔbɩlɩsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Yesu Krisito mʋ kan paatɛ lɩɩ ba mʋ, fen biti fan nyɛ mʋ bʋnyaa kuwura‐wʋrʋ mʋ nɩɩ ki mee nyita mʋ.

eng: In the same way, I urge you who are younger: accept the authority of the elders. And everyone, clothe yourselves with humility toward each other. God stands against the proud, but he gives favor to the humble.
local: Fɔɔ fanɛ ayaafɔlɛ yɛ abite, kanɩn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa abɩlɩsa mʋ. Kɛ fanɛ kpini fan bɩya fan n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa abaa, lɩɩ fɛɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii tii bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kaapʋ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ mʋ ɔkpa, amaa ɛɛ taa bɛɛrɛɛ ɛɛ sa bamʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ bɩya bamʋ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ mʋ.

eng: Therefore, humble yourselves under Gods power so that he may raise you up in the last day.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan bɩya fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kasɛ sa Ɔlʋnpʋ Ɩbwaarɛ, kɛ ɔ kʋsaa fanɛ sʋsʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa mʋ tɔ.

eng: Throw all your anxiety onto him, because he cares about you.
local: Fan taa fanɛ asɩn tirisa kpini naa tʋʋ mu ansi tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fanɛ asɩn i tiri mʋ.

eng: Be clearheaded. Keep alert. Your accuser, the devil, is on the prowl like a roaring lion, seeking someone to devour.
local: Fan kɩtaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ, yɛgɛ fan da sʋ. Fanɛ okisipu, Sɩtaanɛ mʋ, ɔ naa ɛɛ kyaabɔɔ fɛɛ kuntun mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔkʋ ɔ kɩtaa wɛ.

eng: Resist him, standing firm in the faith. Do so in the knowledge that your fellow believers are enduring the same suffering throughout the world.
local: Fan tii mʋ ɔkpa, kɛ fan yɩlɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ kenken. Lɩɩ fɛɛ fen nyi fɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɩsa ana akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ dulinyaa tɔ katɩn kʋmaa mʋ gbaa bee wu awʋrʋfɔ kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ fen wu falɛ.

eng: After you have suffered for a little while, the God of all grace, the one who called you into his eternal glory in Christ Jesus, will himself restore, empower, strengthen, and establish you.
local: Amaa fan kan gyii awʋrʋfɔ saŋa gbɛrɛɛ kamaa mʋ, nɩɩ fan naa Yesu Krisito fan maa gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala wuya mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩɩ fanɛ fɛɛ fan ba nyɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ tɔ kakpaa mʋ, ee biti ɔ kʋsaa fanɛ yɩlɛ, kɛ ɔ waa fanɛ gin, kɛ ɔ waa fanɛ ɔlʋn tɔ, kɛ fan nyɛ ɔyɩlɛkpa.

eng: To him be power forever and always. Amen.
local: Mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ ɔlʋn tɔ kpini ɔlʋn wuya lɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ ɔkaa. Amen!.

eng: I have written and sent these few lines to you by Silvanus. I consider him to be a faithful brother. In these lines I have urged and affirmed that this is the genuine grace of God. Stand firm in it.
local: Anɛ bɩrɩsa Silifanu ɩ kyɛ mɛ tɔ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ fanɛ ɔwʋlɛ dɛɛ nɩɩ mʋ. Ɔ gyɛ kesintin ɔkɔɔlɛ‐gyipu. N kyʋrɔɔ n waa fanɛ aniya tɔ, nɩɩ n tɔwɛ n kaapʋ tɔ fɛɛ ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala mʋ kesintin. Kanɩn sʋ fan yɩlɛ tɔ kenken.

eng: The fellow-elect church in Babylon greets you, and so does my son Mark.
local: Akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ Babilon fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ fanɛ mʋ, bɛɛ fwaala fanɛ. Nɩɩ mɛ kɩyaafɔlɛ Maki gbaa ɩɩ fwaala fanɛ.

eng: Greet each other with the kiss of love. Peace to you all who are in Christ.
local: Fan taa kebiti lala fwaala abaa. Fanɛ kpini mʋ nɩɩ fan naa Krisito fan gyɛ kʋkʋlʋn mʋ, fan kyɩna yɛ kayɩɩ yuuli tɔ.

eng: From Simon Peter, a slave and apostle of Jesus Christ. To those who received a faith equal to ours through the justice of our God and savior Jesus Christ.
local: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ mɛ Simon Pita, mʋ nɩɩ n gyɛ Yesu Krisito kɩyaafɔlɛ yɛ osunpu mʋ asɛ. N kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ n sʋ n sa fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ Yesu Krisito gyii, nɩɩ fan nyɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kparɛ fɛɛ anɛ lɛɛ mʋ. Kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩnɩmʋ kɩ lɩɩ anɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi.

eng: May you have more and more grace and peace through the knowledge of God and Jesus our Lord.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan maa nyi Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu sʋ mʋ, n kʋlɛ fɛɛ fan nyɛ kakyɩna danbɩrasa yɛ kɔkɔlɔ yuuli kʋkyɔ tii sʋ.

eng: By his divine power the Lord has given us everything we need for life and godliness through the knowledge of the one who called us by his own honor and glory.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn kparɛ sʋ mʋ, ɔ sa anɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ki tiri anɛ kɛ a taalɛ kyɩna kakyɩna danbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ i gyii Ɩbwaarɛ ansi lɩɩ anɛ kinyi mʋ nɩɩ an nyi Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ sʋ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɔla mʋ bʋnyaa yɛ mu keduli danbɩrasa sʋ tɩɩ anɛ.

eng: Through his honor and glory he has given us his precious and wonderful promises, that you may share the divine nature and escape from the worlds immorality that sinful craving produces.
local: Lɩɩ falɛ sʋ mʋ ɔ sa anɛ kakɛɛ kparɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ fɛɛ ee biti ɔ sa anɛ mʋ. Lɩɩ kakɛɛ nɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, an nyɛ taa anɛ n‐yɩɩ waa mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ keduli mʋ tɔ, kɛ a lɛɛ anɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ nkɔlɔ biti mʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ atɔ gyɔɔsa dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: This is why you must make every effort to add moral excellence to your faith; and to moral excellence, knowledge.
local: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ fan kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ nyɛ kɩdanbɩrasa tii fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ, kɛ fan taa kinyi tii kɩdanbɩrasa mʋ sʋ.

eng: and to knowledge, self-control; and to self-control, endurance; and to endurance, godliness.
local: nɩɩ kinyi mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ mɔɔ mʋ, fan taa n‐yɩɩ kɩkɩta tii sʋ, nɩɩ n‐yɩɩ kɩkɩta mɔɔ mʋ, fan nyɛ kenyiita yɩlɛ tɔ nɩɩ fan nyɛ kenyiita yɩlɛ tɔ mʋ, fan nyɛ kabwaarɛ‐sun danbɩrasa.

eng: and to godliness, affection for others; and to affection for others, love.
local: Lɩɩ kabwaarɛ‐sun danbɩrasa sʋ mʋ, fan taa kinyi‐bii kyɩna yɛ abaa, nɩɩ kinyi‐bii mɔɔ mʋ, fan biti abaa.

eng: If all these are yours and they are growing in you, theyll keep you from becoming inactive and unfruitful in the knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Fɛɛ nɩɩ atɔ nɩmʋ kpini ɩ bʋ fanɛ kakyɩna tɔ kʋkyɔ mʋ, ɩɩ kyɛ fanɛ tɔ. Nɩɩ lɩɩ fanɛ kinyi anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito sʋ mʋ, ɩɩ yɛgɛ fan baa fan gyɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ kyaarɛ yɛgɛ fɛn waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa.

eng: Whoever lacks these things is shortsighted and blind, forgetting that they were cleansed from their past sins.
local: Amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man nyɛ falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ mʋ gyɛ gyaatanapʋ nɩɩ mu ansi ɩ man kɩɩ kata‐kata. Nɩɩ ɔ tan sʋ fɛɛ Yesu Krisito fwɩɩ mʋ dɩdaa alibi mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kyɩna waa mʋ.

eng: Therefore, brothers and sisters, be eager to confirm your call and election. Do this and you will never ever be lost.
local: Kanɩn sʋ mʋ, mɛ bɩrɩsa ana akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu fan kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ waa atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ fanɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ. Nɩɩ fan kan waa kanɩn mʋ, fan mɛɛ yɛ fan siti kɛ fan lɩɩ tɩyɛ.

eng: In this way you will receive a rich welcome into the everlasting kingdom of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ.
local: Nɩɩ falɛ ɔkpa nɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ kɔɔlɛ fanɛ abaa anyɔ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ yɛ anɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Yesu Krisito sʋsʋ kuwura‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ kɩ man sʋ ɔkaa mʋ tɔ.

eng: So Ill keep reminding you about these things, although you already know them and stand secure in the truth you have.
local: N nyi fɛɛ fan wʋla fan nyi ɩmʋ kpini, nɩɩ fan yɩlɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ tɔ kenken. Amaa i tiri fɛɛ n bɩla nyiŋi fanɛ falɛ atɔ nɩmʋ saŋa kʋmaa.

eng: I think its right that I keep stirring up your memory, as long as Im alive.
local: N maa san n tɛ nkpa tɔ falɛ mʋ, ɩ dagaa n maa nyiŋi fanɛ asɩn nɩmʋ n sʋ n da fanɛ n kyiŋi.

eng: After all, our Lord Jesus Christ has shown me that I am about to depart from this life.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ n nyi mɛ nkɛ ɩ man bɩla ɛɛ kyɔ kasɛ sʋ nfɩɩ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito lɛɛ kaapʋ mɛ mʋ.

eng: Im eager for you always to remember these things after my death.
local: Nɩɩ n biti n kpan mɛ n‐yɩɩ ɔkpa kʋmaa sʋ kɛ mi lewu kamaa mʋ, fan taalɛ nyiŋi atɔ nɩmʋ saŋa kʋmaa.

eng: We didnt repeat crafty myths when we told you about the powerful coming of our Lord Jesus Christ. Quite the contrary, we witnessed his majesty with our own eyes.
local: Nɩɩ a maa tɔwɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito ɔlʋn yɛ mu kibwii‐ba mʋ asɩn mʋ, ɩ man gyɛ atɩntɩnsa asɩrɩkpan nɩɩ an taa tɔwɛ fanɛ asɩn mʋ. Amaa anɛ gbaa‐gbaa anɛ ansi i wu mʋ bʋnyaa kparɛ mʋ.

eng: He received honor and glory from God the Father when a voice came to him from the magnificent glory, saying, This is my dearly loved Son, with whom I am well-pleased.
local: Nɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ bɛɛrɛɛ yɛ bʋnyaa lɩɩ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ an bʋ tʋtɔ. Saŋa maa nɩɩ an nu Ɔlʋnpʋ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔbʋlɛ maa tɔwɛ yɛ Ɔnɩmʋ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ mɛ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ obii bitisa, mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɔla mi ansi.

eng: We ourselves heard this voice from heaven while we were with him on the holy mountain.
local: Anɛ gbaa‐gbaa anɛ a nu falɛ ɔbʋlɛ maŋa maa lɩɩ sʋsʋ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ an bʋ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu asɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ kɩbɩɩ mʋ sʋ mʋ.

eng: In addition, we have a most reliable prophetic word, and you would do well to pay attention to it, just as you would to a lamp shining in a dark place, until the day dawns and the morning star rises in your hearts.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ anɛ akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ an wu fɛɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ ba tɔwɛ yɩla mʋ, an kɔɔlɛ ɩmʋ gyii kesintin. Kɛ fan kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩtaa ɩmʋ tɔ yɛ ɔdan. Lɩɩ fɛɛ ki du nɩn fɛɛ fɩtɩla mʋ nɩɩ kɩ kɩɩ kitentenbiri tɔ, taa naa fʋʋ fɛɛ kɩbwayɩkɛ asɛ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ nyenyenfuu kikyikpebi kii biti kɩ ŋalɩgɛ fanɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ mʋ.

eng: Most important, you must know that no prophecy of scripture represents the prophets own understanding of things.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini kamaa mʋ, ɩ dagaa fan maa nu kasɛ fɛɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn tɔwɛ yɩla sa mʋ, ɩ man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa nfɛɛrɛ tɔ asɩn.

eng: because no prophecy ever came by human will. Instead, men and women led by the Holy Spirit spoke from God.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩnlɛɛ tɔwɛsa mʋ, ɩ man lɩɩ nyɩmɩsa kebiti tɔ nɩn, amaa Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ i sa bamʋ, nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ abwaarɛsɩn mʋ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

eng: But false prophets also arose among the people. In the same way, false teachers will come among you. They will introduce destructive opinions and deny the master who bought them, bringing quick destruction on themselves.
local: Amaa dɩdaa mʋ antɩŋɛsa wuya ana ba kyɩna ba bʋ Ɩsɩrayɩ asa tɔ, nɩɩ kanɩn gbaa nɩɩ atɩntɩnsa akaapʋpʋ bee biti ba baa ba bʋ fanɛ tɔ. Nɩɩ bee biti ba ba kaapʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ kesintin yɛgɛ ii nyita asa mʋ nɩɩ bee buu kanɩn kɩkaapʋ mʋ. Kɛ ba kina Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɔlɩgɛ bamʋ, kɛ bamʋ kinyita mʋ ki bwii ba bamʋ sʋ opula tɔ.

eng: Many will follow them in their unrestrained immorality, and because of these false teachers the way of truth will be slandered.
local: Lɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, akɔɔlɛ‐gyipu mʋ gaalaagaa bee biti ba buu bamʋ kɩbaabʋtɔ gyaga nɩmʋ sʋ. Lɩɩ bamʋ kɩbaabʋtɔ gyaga maŋa sʋ mʋ, asa mʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ bee biti ba tɔwɛ asɩn libi gyaga kesintin ɔkpa mʋ sʋ.

eng: In their greed they will take advantage of you with lies. The judgment pronounced against them long ago hasnt fallen idle, nor is their destruction sleeping.
local: Lɩɩ kensi payɩ libi atɩntɩnsa akaapʋpʋ nɩmʋ bee biti ba taa kanyaasɩn ɔkpa sʋ pɩna fanɛ biti afulee. Amaa bamʋ ɔtalɛpʋ wʋla waa siriya lɩɩ koo dɩdaa o gyoo bamʋ. Nɩɩ ba mɛɛ taalɛ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ bamʋ onyitapu mʋ abaa tɔ.

eng: God didnt spare the angels when they sinned but cast them into the lowest level of the underworld and committed them to chains of darkness, keeping them there until the judgment.
local: Fɛɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa man yɛgɛ nbɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba waa alibi mʋ kʋsʋ kɩbɩɩtɛ, amaa nɩɩ ɔ taa bamʋ tʋʋ waa awʋrʋfɔ kamandɛ, katɩn mʋ nɩɩ o ŋmina bamʋ waa kitentenbiri ɔbɔ bunkyinsa tɔ, ba dɛ ba gyoo Kakɛ talɛsa lala mʋ.

eng: And he didnt spare the ancient world when he brought a flood on the world of ungodly people, even though he protected Noah, a preacher of righteousness, along with seven others.
local: Fɛɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa man yɛgɛ dɩdaa abi mʋ nɩɩ ba waa alibi mʋ kʋsʋ kɩbɩɩtɛ, amaa nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ nkyu n bɔla gyii kasɛ yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man nu Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ. Asa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɔlɩgɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ Nowa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ ɩkpa kyiigisa mʋ asɩn, yɛ asa asunɔ akʋ.

eng: God condemned the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah to total destruction, reducing them to ashes as a warning to ungodly people.
local: Fɛɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa man yɛgɛ alibi awaapʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Sodom yɛ Gomora ndɛ lala mʋ tɔ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ, amaa ɔ yɛgɛ fʋlɔn dɛɛ bamʋ biliŋi ndaara, kɛ ɩ waa sɩnkaala sa kamaa tɔ alibi awaapʋ.

eng: And he rescued righteous Lot, who was made miserable by the unrestrained immorality of unruly people. .
local: Nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ mɔlɩgɛ Loti mʋ nɩɩ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi, nɩɩ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ ki nyita mʋ lɩɩ asa mʋ kɩbaabʋtɔ gyaga yɛ kumu tɔ ɔlʋn mʋ sʋ.

eng: These things show that the Lord knows how to rescue the godly from their trials, and how to keep the unrighteous for punishment on the Judgment Day.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ kpini ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nyi kanan mʋ nɩɩ ee biti ɔ mɔlɩgɛ asa mʋ nɩɩ bee nu mʋ asɛ lɩɩ bamʋ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ tɔ, kɛ ɔ yɛgɛ alibi awaapʋ mʋ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ yɩla naa fʋʋ Kakɛ talɛsa mʋ akɛ.

eng: This is especially true for those who follow after the corrupt cravings of the sinful nature and defy the Lords authority. These reckless, brash people arent afraid to insult the glorious ones.
local: Fɔnfɔn bamʋ nɩɩ ba taa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ sa kɩgyagaa abɛɛ kɔkɔlɔ biti nɩɩ ba man taa Ɩbwaarɛ ɔlʋn tɩɩ sɛhn mʋ. Falɛ atɩntɩnsa akaapʋpʋ banɩmʋ ba man sʋ kufuu, nɩɩ ba yɩlɛ tɔ bɛɛ saalɛ bamʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa bamʋ bʋnyaa mʋ.

eng: yet angels, who are stronger and more powerful, dont use insults when pronouncing the Lords judgment on them.
local: Nɩɩ halɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ ɔlʋn gaa ba kyɔ atɩntɩnsa akaapʋpʋ anɩmʋ gbaa ba mɛɛ pwɩɩ bʋnyaa wuya ana mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ.

eng: These false teachers are like irrational animals, mere creatures of instinct, born to be captured and destroyed. They slander what they dont understand and, like animals, they will be destroyed.
