local: Amaa falɛ atɩntɩnsa akaapʋpʋ anɩmʋ awaasa a du nɩn fɛɛ atɔbwaaya kpensa mʋ nɩɩ ba kʋʋgɛ bamʋ fɛɛ asa ba kɩtaa kɛ ba mɔɔ. Ba sʋ asebi bɛɛ sa kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ be mee nu kasɛ. Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ mɔɔ bamʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ asa bɛɛ mɔɔ atɔbwaaya kpensa mʋ.

eng: In this way, they will receive payment for their wrongdoing. They even enjoy unruly parties in broad daylight. They are blots and blemishes, taking delight in their seductive pleasures while feasting with you.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ taa bamʋ alibi bwii ka bamʋ akɔ. Bamʋ asɛ mʋ kɩlandɛ sʋ alibi kɩwaa ɩ gyɛ bamʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kensi‐gyii. Halɩɩ ba maa san ba bʋ bamʋ npɩna yɛ kɩgyagaa kigyii ɩkpa sʋ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ ipeeli yɛ ŋaabaa sa bamʋ fɛɛ ba maa ba tii fanɛ sʋ bee gyii mʋ.

eng: They are always looking for someone with whom to commit adultery. They are always on the lookout for opportunities to sin. They ensnare people whose faith is weak. They have hearts trained in greed. They are under Gods curse.
local: Nɩɩ be mee wu ɔkyɩɩ bɛɛ kyʋn, nɩɩ kɩbʋrʋkɔɔnɛ kɩwaa ii gyii bamʋ ansi. Bɛ yɛgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii kɩ man bʋlʋn mʋ bɛɛ waa alibi. Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bɔla bamʋ nkɔlɔ tɔ ɩ gyɛ kensi payɩ libi. Ɩnɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ bɩɩtɛ bamʋ asʋ.

eng: Leaving the straight path, they have gone off course, following the way of Balaam son of Bosor, who loved the payment of doing wrong.
local: Nɩɩ ba yɛgɛ ɔkpa kyiigisa mʋ, nɩɩ ba fɔyɩ naa taa Bewo mu‐bii Balaam ɔkpa sʋ. Balaam kyɩna ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ, nɩɩ mu kebiti ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ ɔ nyɛ afulee lɩɩ alibi kɩwaa tɔ.

eng: But Balaam was rebuked for his wrongdoing. A donkey, which has no voice, spoke with a human voice and put a stop to the prophets madness.
local: Amaa mu kuruma mʋ gya mʋ. Mu kuruma mʋ tɔwɛ mʋ asɛ fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa, nɩɩ i tii Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ Balaam abʋnpʋ‐sɩn mʋ ɔkpa.

eng: These false teachers are springs without water, mists driven by the wind. The underworld has been reserved for them.
local: Falɛ atɩntɩnsa akaapʋpʋ anɩmʋ ba du nɩn fɛɛ atiribo mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ nkyu yɛ abwaarɛ‐wʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ afuu a sʋ ɩmʋ a naa. Bamʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɔŋɔ kitentenbiri ɔbɔ bunkyinsa yɩla.

eng: With empty, self-important speech, they use sinful cravings and unrestrained immorality to ensnare people who have only just escaped life with those who have wandered from the truth.
local: Ba sʋ alala‐sɩn ntɔwɛ mʋ nɩɩ sɛhn man bʋ ɩmʋ tɔ bɛɛ kaapʋ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ. Nɩɩ ba sʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ kɩgyagaa bɛɛ tʋʋ bamʋ tɔ bɛɛ kɩɩ, kɛ ba nyɛ waa alibi mʋ nɩɩ ba daa kyɩna bɛɛ waa nɩɩ ba sɩlɛ lɩɩ ɩmʋ tɔ mʋ.

eng: These false teachers promise freedom, but they themselves are slaves of immorality; whatever overpowers you, enslaves you.
local: Atɩntɩnsa akaapʋpʋ mʋ ba da bamʋ nkɔlɔ sʋ sa asa mʋ yɛ bee biti ba yɛgɛ ba nyɛ bamʋ n‐yɩɩ, yɛgɛ bamʋ gbaa‐gbaa bamʋ ba gyɛ anyɛ sa bamʋ asun libi. Lɩɩ fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa gyɛ kɩnyɛ sa kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ i gyii mu kumu.

eng: If people escape the moral filth of this world through the knowledge of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ, then get tangled up in it again and are overcome by it, they are worse off than they were before.
local: Fɛɛ ba maa ba bɩɩ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ yɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Yesu Krisito, nɩɩ ba yɛgɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa ɛɛ waa alibi kɩwaa dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ba kan bɩla bwii naa loo ɩmʋ tɔ mʋ, ɩɩ nyɛ bamʋ sʋ ɔlʋn ɩ kyɔ kakyɩna dɩdaa mʋ nɩɩ ba daa ba bʋ kɩmʋ tɔ mʋ.

eng: It would be better for them never to have known the way of righteousness than, having come to know it, to turn back from the holy commandment entrusted to them.
local: Naafɔɔ ii biti ɩ baa ɩ bʋrɔn sa bamʋ gaa fɛɛ ba maa man bɩɩ ɔkpa kyiigisa mʋ, ɩ kyɔ fɛɛ ba maa bɩɩ kɩmʋ, nɩɩ ba bɩla bwii kamaa lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ nbara kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa sa bamʋ mʋ sʋ.

eng: They demonstrate the truth of the proverb: A dog returns to its own vomit, and a washed sow wallows in the mud.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ ba kanɩn sa bamʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ aŋasan mʋ ɩ tɔwɛ yɛ, Gyoonɔ bwii naa taa mʋ ɩkpalagɛ gyii nɩɩ Kuuri mʋ nɩɩ ba gyee mʋ mʋ, bwii naa dɛ biliŋi kɩdɩpɔɔ tɔ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ kesintin.

eng: My dear friends, this is now my second letter to you. I have written both letters to stir up your sincere understanding with a reminder.
local: Mi‐nyi mu‐bii ana Krisito tɔ, ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ mɛ Pita ɔwʋlɛ nyɔsapʋ mʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ n sʋ n sa fanɛ. Nɩɩ mɛ ɩwʋlɛ mʋ kpini tɔ mʋ, n sʋ n nyiŋi fanɛ n da fanɛ n kyiŋi lɩɩ falɛ atɔ kpini sʋ.

eng: I want you to recall what the holy prophets foretold as well as what the Lord and savior commanded through your apostles.
local: N biti fɛɛ fan nyiŋi asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ atɔwɛpʋ kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ ba tɔwɛ yɩla lɩɩ koo dɩdaa, yɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ yɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ mʋ kɔnɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa bɔla asunpu mʋ sʋ sa fanɛ mʋ.

eng: Most important, know this: in the last days scoffers will come, jeering, living by their own cravings.
local: Ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyankpaa ɩmʋ kpini tɔ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fan baa fan nyi fɛɛ nkɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ aŋmasɛpʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba buu bamʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kebiti mʋ bee biti ba ba ŋmasɛ fanɛ.

eng: and saying, Where is the promise of his coming? After all, nothing has changed—not since the beginning of creation, nor even since the ancestors died.
local: Bee biti ba taasɛ yɛ, Yɛ fan tɔwɛ yɛ ee biti o bwii ba, ɔ bʋ fɩnɛ? Lɩɩ koo saŋa mʋ nɩɩ anɛ naana ana ba wu mʋ, atɔ kpini ɩ dan san i du nɩn fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ i du lɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tʋʋ dulinyaa mʋ.

eng: But they fail to notice that, by Gods word, heaven and earth were formed long ago out of water and by means of water.
local: Amaa ba kɩɩ ansi nɩn kina kesintin maŋa lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɔnɔ tɔ asɩn sʋ nɩɩ sʋsʋ yɛ kasɛ ba, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛgɛ kasɛ lɩɩ nkyu tɔ, nɩɩ nkyu sʋ nɩɩ ɔ bɔla waa kasɛ.

eng: And it was through these that the world of that time was flooded and destroyed.
local: Nɩɩ kanɩn nkyu kʋlʋn maŋa nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa muuri nyita dɩdaa dulinyaa mʋ.

eng: But by the same word, heaven and earth are now held in reserve for fire, kept for the Judgment Day and destruction of ungodly people.
local: Amaa kanɩn Ɩbwaarɛ kɔnɔ tɔ asɩn kʋlʋn maŋa nɩɩ ɔ taa kʋʋla nbɩɩnbɩɩ sʋsʋ yɛ kasɛ yɩla, nɩɩ ɩ dɛ i gyoo fʋlɔn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ dɛɛla sa Kakɛ talɛsa ɔ taa nyita asa mʋ nɩɩ be mee nu mʋ asɛ mʋ.

eng: Dont let it escape your notice, dear friends, that with the Lord a single day is like a thousand years and a thousand years are like a single day.
local: Amaa mi‐nyi mu‐bii ana Krisito tɔ, fan man tan kʋtɔ kʋlʋn nɩmʋ sʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ bɩrɛ, kakɛ kʋlʋn gyɛ mʋ asɛ fɛɛ nsu kagbɩn, nɩɩ nsu kagbɩn mɔɔ gyɛ mʋ asɛ fɛɛ kakɛ kʋlʋn.

eng: The Lord isnt slow to keep his promise, as some think of slowness, but he is patient toward you, not wanting anyone to perish but all to change their hearts and lives.
local: Nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ man sʋ mʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɔ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ tɔwɛ yɩla mʋ ɛɛ kpɩɩ kasɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ akʋ bɛ fɛ ɩmʋ nfɛɛrɛ mʋ. Amaa ɔ sʋ kenyiita sa fanɛ, nɩɩ ee biti fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɔ kyɛɛgɛ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ mu alibi tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ o mee biti ɔkʋ maa nyita.

eng: But the day of the Lord will come like a thief. On that day the heavens will pass away with a dreadful noise, the elements will be consumed by fire, and the earth and all the works done on it will be exposed.
local: Amaa Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ Yesu Krisito ii biti ɔ ba mʋ ii biti i purigi asa fɛɛ oyu maa ba mʋ. Kɛ sʋsʋ ɔ nyaa yɛ ɔlanba, kɛ fʋlɔn ɔ dɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ sʋsʋ kpini, kɛ kasɛ yɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ kɩmʋ sʋ mʋ ɩ ba ɩ dɛ kɩkpan yɛgɛ sɛhn man bʋ kɩmʋ sʋ.

eng: Since everything will be destroyed in this way, what sort of people ought you to be? You must live holy and godly lives.
local: Nɩɩ falɛ ɔkpa nɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ atɔ kpini ii biti i nyita mʋ, nɛnɛ asa nɩɩ ɩ dagaa fan bɩla fan du? Ɩ dagaa fan kyɩna kakyɩna kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ yɛ kabwaarɛ‐sun tɔ.

eng: waiting for and hastening the coming day of God. Because of that day, the heavens will be destroyed by fire and the elements will melt away in the flames.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ fan maa kɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩba mʋ ɔkpa yɛ kɩ ba bilen falɛ. Kanɩn kakɛ maŋa nɩɩ fʋlɔn ii biti o nyita sʋsʋ atɔ, kɛ fʋlɔn mʋ awulawula ɩ ŋalɩgɛ kanɩn atɔ maŋa.

eng: But according to his promise we are waiting for a new heaven and a new earth, where righteousness is at home.
local: Amaa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɩlɛ tɔ mʋ an kɩɩ sʋsʋ pʋpwɛ yɛ kasɛ pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ ɔkpa.

eng: Therefore, dear friends, while you are waiting for these things to happen, make every effort to be found by him in peace—pure and faultless.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ mi‐nyi mu‐bii ana Krisito tɔ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan kɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ɔkpa mʋ, fan kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ kɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ man pwɩɩ abɛɛ o wu alibi akʋ fanɛ tɔ, kɛ keyuula kɩ baa kɩ bʋ faa naa mʋ asɛ.

eng: Consider the patience of our Lord to be salvation, just as our dear friend and brother Paul wrote to you according to the wisdom given to him.
local: Fan baa fan nyi fɛɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kenyiita mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ ɔkpa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sa fanɛ kɛ fan nyɛ kamɔlɩgɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ anɛ bɩrɩsa ɔkɔɔlɛ‐gyipu Pɔɔlɩ kyʋrɔɔ sa fanɛ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa mʋ kanyaasɩn mʋ.

eng: speaking of these things in all his letters. Some of his remarks are hard to understand, and people who are ignorant and whose faith is weak twist them to their own destruction, just as they do the other scriptures.
local: Nɩɩ ɔkpa kʋlʋn maŋa sʋ nɩɩ Pɔɔlɩ kyʋrɔɔ waa mʋ ɩwʋlɛ kpini tɔ, ɩɩ tɔwɛ asɩn kʋlʋn maŋa. Asɩn akʋ ɩ bʋ mʋ ɩwʋlɛ mʋ tɔ nɩɩ ɛɛ bʋlʋn sa kasɛ kunu. Nɩɩ ɛɛ yɛgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man nyi abwaarɛsɩn yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man yɩlɛ kɩyaa kʋlʋn sʋ bee biliŋaa Pɔɔlɩ asɩn mʋ, nɩɩ kanɩn nɩɩ bee biliŋaa Ɩbwaarɛ Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ gbaa. Nɩɩ bɛɛ waa kanɩn mʋ, bee biti kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ ba sa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ.

eng: Therefore, dear friends, since you have been warned in advance, be on guard so that you arent led off course into the error of sinful people, and lose your own safe position.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ mi‐nyi mu‐bii ana Krisito tɔ, fan maa wʋla fan nyi falɛ sʋ mʋ, fan baa fan da sʋ, kɛ fan man yɛgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man buu Ɩbwaarɛ nbara mʋ ba pɩna fanɛ kɛ fan lɩɩ tɩyɛ lɩɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ tɔ.

eng: Instead, grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ. To him belongs glory now and forever. Amen.
local: Amaa fan kyaga sʋ fen dan anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ yɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ Yesu Krisito kabwaala mʋ tɔ kɛ fan bɩɩ mʋ danbɩrasa. Mʋ nɩɩ bʋnyaa gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ ndaga yɛ saŋa kʋmaa nɩmʋ. Amen!.

eng: We announce to you what existed from the beginning, what we have heard, what we have seen with our eyes, what we have seen and our hands handled, about the word of life.
local: An kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla ɔ bʋ tɔ lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ asɩn, an sa fanɛ. An nu mʋ asɩn tɔwɛsa, nɩɩ an wu mʋ, nɩɩ an taa anɛ ansi kɩɩ mʋ, nɩɩ an taa anɛ abaa mata mʋ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sa nkpa mʋ.

eng: The life was revealed, and we have seen, and we testify and announce to you the eternal life that was with the Father and was revealed to us.
local: Yesu mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ nkpa mʋ, lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ ifuli nɩɩ an wu mʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ an gyii ɩmʋ kesintin, nɩɩ an tɔwɛ fanɛ lɩɩ nkpa kakpaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla ɔ bʋ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ asɛ, nɩɩ ɔ ba lɛɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ ifuli kaapʋ anɛ.

eng: What we have seen and heard, we also announce it to you so that you can have fellowship with us. Our fellowship is with the Father and with his Son, Jesus Christ.
local: Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ anɛ ansi i wu nɩɩ an taa anɛ asʋ nu mʋ, ɩmʋ kibonbon nɩɩ an da an sa fanɛ, kɛ fan ba tii anɛ sʋ lɩɩ kɩkyɛmɩnɛ ɔkɔn mʋ nɩɩ an sʋ anaa Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ Mu‐Bii Yesu Krisito mʋ sʋ.

eng: We are writing these things so that our joy can be complete.
local: An kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ an sa fanɛ nɩn, kɛ anɛ ansi i gyii gaa.

eng: This is the message that we have heard from him and announce to you: God is light and there is no darkness in him at all.
local: Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ an nu lɩɩ Yesu asɛ mʋ, ɩmʋ nɩɩ an sʋ an tɔwɛ fanɛ falɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ fɩtɩla nɩɩ kitentenbiri kɩ man bʋ mʋ tɔ kpini‐kpini.

eng: If we claim, We have fellowship with him, and live in the darkness, we are lying and do not act truthfully.
local: Nɩɩ an kan tɔwɛ yɛ anaa mʋ an sʋ kɩkyɛmɩnɛ ɔkɔn, yɛgɛ an san an naa kitentenbiri tɔ bɩrɛ, an pɩna nɩn lɩɩ anɛ atɔwɛsa yɛ anɛ awaasa sʋ.

eng: But if we live in the light in the same way as he is in the light, we have fellowship with each other, and the blood of Jesus, his Son, cleanses us from every sin.
local: Amaa nɩɩ an kan an naa fɩtɩla mʋ tɔ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ fɩtɩla mʋ tɔ bɩrɛ, ɩmɛɛ ɩmʋ an sʋ kɩkyɛmɩnɛ ɔkɔn yɛ abaa, kɛ Mu‐Bii Yesu Krisito nkalan mʋ ɛɛ fwɩɩ anɛ lɩɩ alibi kʋmaa nɩmʋ tɔ.

eng: If we claim, We dont have any sin, we deceive ourselves and the truth is not in us.
local: Nɩɩ an kan tɔwɛ yɛ a man sʋ alibi bɩrɛ, an pɩna anɛ n‐yɩɩ nɩn, nɩɩ kesintin kɩ man bʋ anɛ tɔ.

eng: But if we confess our sins, he is faithful and just to forgive us our sins and cleanse us from everything weve done wrong.
local: Nɩɩ an kan lɛɛ anɛ alibi tɔwɛ Ɩbwaarɛ bɩrɛ, ee biti ɔ taa anɛ alibi kɛɛ anɛ kɛ ɔ lɔŋɔ anɛ lɩɩ ɩkpa libi kʋmaa nɩmʋ sʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ sʋ kesintin, nɩɩ mʋ asɩn ii du kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

eng: If we claim, We have never sinned, we make him a liar and his word is not in us.
local: Nɩɩ an kan tɔwɛ yɛ an man waa alibi mʋ, ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ an tɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ atɩŋɛsa wuya, nɩɩ mʋ asɩn ɩ man bʋ anɛ tɔ.

eng: See what kind of love the Father has given to us in that we should be called Gods children, and that is what we are! Because the world didnt recognize him, it doesnt recognize us.
local: Fan kɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ kebiti lala sa anɛ, fɛɛ ba tɩɩ anɛ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii ana. Nɩɩ kanɩn nɩɩ an gyɛ falɛ. Kanɩn sʋ nɩɩ dulinyaa tɔ abi ba man nyi anɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: Dear friends, now we are Gods children, and it hasnt yet appeared what we will be. We know that when he appears we will be like him because well see him as he is.
local: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana danbɩrasa, nbɩɩnbɩɩ an gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii ana nɩn. Nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ an biti an baa an gyɛ mʋ ɩ man pɩɩta lɩɩ ifuli. Amaa an nyi fɛɛ nɩɩ ɔ kan ba lɩɩ ofuli mʋ, an biti an baa an du fɛɛ mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ an biti an wu mʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ o du mʋ.

eng: And all who have this hope in him purify themselves even as he is pure.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ falɛ tamaa fɛɛ ee biti o wu Yesu mʋ, ɛɛ waa mʋ n‐yɩɩ kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Yesu du kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ.

eng: Every person who practices sin commits an act of rebellion, and sin is rebellion.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa alibi mʋ, o mee man buu nbara mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ alibi kɩwaa ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ ɔkʋ maa mee buu nbara mʋ.

eng: You know that he appeared to take away sins, and there is no sin in him.
local: Amaa fan nyi fɛɛ ɔ ba nɩn yɛ ɔ ba lɛɛ anɛ alibi lɩɩ anɛ sʋ, nɩɩ mʋ tɔ nɩɩ alibi akʋ ɩ man bʋ.

eng: Every person who remains in relationship to him does not sin. Any person who sins has not seen him or known him.
local: Ɔkʋ man bʋ Yesu tɔ nɩɩ ɛɛ kyaga sʋ ɛɛ waa alibi, nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan kyaga sʋ ɛɛ waa alibi mʋ, ɔ man pɩɩta wu mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ man nyi mʋ.

eng: Little children, make sure no one deceives you. The person who practices righteousness is righteous, in the same way that Jesus is righteous.
local: Mi‐bii ana danbɩrasa, fan man yɛgɛ ɔkʋ ɔ pɩna fanɛ. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dɛ ɔkpa mʋ, ɔ gyɛ ɔkpa kyiigisa wuya, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Krisito ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ.

eng: The person who practices sin belongs to the devil, because the devil has been sinning since the beginning. Gods Son appeared for this purpose: to destroy the works of the devil.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa alibi mʋ, gyɛ Sɩtaanɛ lɛɛ nɩn. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Sɩtaanɛ wʋla ɛɛ waa alibi lɩɩ koo npiili asɛ. Kʋtɔ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii mʋ ba mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, ɔ baa o be nyita Sɩtaanɛ kusun nɩn.

eng: Those born from God dont practice sin because Gods DNA remains in them. They cant sin because they are born from God.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ waa mʋ Mu‐Bii mʋ, mɛɛ kyaga sʋ ɛɛ waa alibi, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ awaasa ɩ bʋ mʋ tɔ. Ɩmʋ sʋ ɔ mɛɛ taalɛ kyaga sʋ ɛɛ waa alibi, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ taa mʋ waa Mu‐bii.

eng: This is how Gods children and the devils children are apparent: everyone who doesnt practice righteousness is not from God, including the person who doesnt love a brother or sister.
local: Falɛ nɩɩ an sʋ an bɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐bii ana yɛ Sɩtaanɛ mu‐bii ana. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ mʋ ɩkpa ɩ man kyiigi abɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o mee biti mʋ tɔɔmaa mʋ, ɔ man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐bii.

eng: This is the message that you heard from the beginning: love each other.
local: Asɩn mʋ nɩɩ fan nu lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ, ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ a biti abaa.

eng: Dont behave like Cain, who belonged to the evil one and murdered his brother. And why did he kill him? He killed him because his own works were evil, but the works of his brother were righteous.
local: A man waa fɛɛ Ken mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Sɩtaanɛ lɛɛ nɩɩ ɔ mɔɔ mu‐supu mʋ. Mɩnɛ ɩ waa sʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɔɔ mu‐supu? Lɩɩ fɛɛ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ awaasa ɩ gyɛ alibi, nɩɩ mu‐supu ɩkpa i kyiigi.

eng: Dont be surprised, brothers and sisters, if the world hates you.
local: Mɛ bɩrɩsa ana, nɩɩ dulinyaa asa ba kan bee kisi fanɛ mʋ, fan man yɛgɛ i kyinkyin fanɛ.

eng: We know that we have transferred from death to life, because we love the brothers and sisters. The person who does not love remains in death.
local: An nyi fɛɛ an lɩɩ lewu tɔ ba nkpa tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ an biti anɛ tɔɔmaa ana. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o mee biti mʋ bɩrɩsa mʋ, ɔ san ɔ bʋ lewu tɔ.

eng: Everyone who hates a brother or sister is a murderer, and you know that murderers dont have eternal life residing in them.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee kisi mʋ bɩrɩsa mʋ gyɛ ɔmɔɔpʋ nɩn, nɩɩ fan nyi yɛ amɔɔpʋ maa man sʋ nkpa kakpaa.

eng: This is how we know love: Jesus laid down his life for us, and we ought to lay down our lives for our brothers and sisters.
local: Lewu mʋ nɩɩ Krisito wu sa anɛ mʋ kaapʋ anɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti ki du. Ɩmʋ sʋ ɩ dagaa fɛɛ a maa wu sa anɛ bɩrɩsa ana.

eng: But if someone has material possessions and sees a brother or sister in need but refuses to help—how can the love of God dwell in a person like that?.
local: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ɔ sʋ atɔ gaa nɩɩ o wu fɛɛ i tiri mʋ tɔɔmaa, amaa nɩɩ ɔ man wu mʋ kʋwɛɛ mʋ, mɩnɛ ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ ɔ sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti mʋ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ?.

eng: Little children, lets not love with words or speech but with action and truth.
local: Mi‐bii ana danbɩrasa, an man taa ntɔwɛ abɛɛ kɔnɔ tɔ kɩyan biti abaa, amaa a taa anɛ awaasa kaapʋ fɛɛ an biti abaa kesintin tɔ.

eng: This is how we will know that we belong to the truth and reassure our hearts in Gods presence.
local: Ɩmʋ nɩɩ an biti a bɩɩ fɛɛ an buu kesintin ɔkpa mʋ sʋ. Ɩmʋ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ kɛ a taalɛ taa kɔkɔlɔ fuuli a yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ.

eng: Even if our hearts condemn us, God is greater than our hearts and knows all things.
local: Nɩɩ anɛ nkɔlɔ ɩ kan bun anɛ kʋpwɛ mʋ, an nyi fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ kyɔ anɛ nkɔlɔ, nɩɩ o nyi anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ ɔ kyɔ anɛ gbaa‐gbaa, nɩɩ mʋ i nyi kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ.

eng: Dear friends, if our hearts dont condemn us, we have confidence in relationship to God.
local: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana danbɩrasa, nɩɩ anɛ nkɔlɔ ɩ man kan bun anɛ kʋpwɛ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ an taalɛ yɩlɛ tɔ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ.

eng: We receive whatever we ask from him because we keep his commandments and do what pleases him.
local: Kɛ a nyɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ an taasɛ mʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ an buu mʋ nbara, nɩɩ an waa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ bɔla mu ansi.

eng: This is his commandment, that we believe in the name of his Son, Jesus Christ, and love each other as he commanded us.
local: Nɩɩ ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ mʋ nbara mʋ, fɛɛ a kɔɔlɛ Mu‐Bii Yesu Krisito kɩtɩɩ mʋ gyii, kɛ a biti abaa fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sa anɛ kɔnɔ mʋ.

eng: Those who keep his commandments dwell in God and God dwells in them. This is how we know that he dwells in us, because of the Spirit he has given us.
local: Bamʋ nɩɩ bee nu mʋ nbara mʋ, ba maa Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ sʋ kɔnɔ kʋlʋn, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ bʋ bamʋ nkɔlɔ tɔ. Mʋ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa sa anɛ mʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ, ɔ bʋ anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ.

eng: My little children, Im writing these things to you so that you dont sin. But if you do sin, we have an advocate with the Father, Jesus Christ the righteous one.
local: Mi‐bii ana danbɩrasa, n kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ n sa fanɛ kɛ fan man nyɛ waa alibi. Amaa nɩɩ anɛ tɔ ɔkʋ kan waa alibi mʋ, an sʋ ɔmaatapʋ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kʋlɛ Ɔsɛ mʋ ɛɛ sa anɛ. Nɩɩ mʋ ɩ gyɛ Yesu Krisito, nɩɩ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi.

eng: He is Gods way of dealing with our sins, not only ours but the sins of the whole world.
local: Mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa kɔlɔŋɔ ka anɛ alibi kʋkɔ, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ anɛ nkʋn alibi, amaa ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ dulinyaa tɔ kpini.

eng: This is how we know that we know him: if we keep his commandments.
local: Nɩɩ an kan buu Ɩbwaarɛ nbara mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sa anɛ mʋ, ɩmʋ ɩ yɛgɛ a taalɛ da anɛ nkɔlɔ sʋ fɛɛ an nyi mʋ.

eng: The one who claims, I know him, while not keeping his commandments, is a liar, and the truth is not in this person.
local: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan tɔwɛ yɛ, N nyi mʋ, yɛgɛ ɔ man buu mʋ nbara mʋ, ɔ gyɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya, nɩɩ kesintin kɩ man bʋ mʋ tɔ.

eng: But the love of God is truly perfected in whoever keeps his word. This is how we know we are in him.
local: Amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o buu mʋ asɩn tɔwɛsa mʋ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti Ɩbwaarɛ kesintin tɔ kyɛɛkyɛɛ. Ɩnɩmʋ falɛ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an bɩɩ fɛɛ an bʋ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

eng: The one who claims to remain in him ought to live in the same way as he lived.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nyɩmɩsa mʋ, dagaa maa kyɩna fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Yesu kyɩna mʋ.

eng: Dear friends, Im not writing a new commandment to you, but an old commandment that you had from the beginning. The old commandment is the message you heard.
local: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana danbɩrasa, man gyɛ nbara pʋpwɛ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ n sʋ n bɩya fanɛ, amaa ɩ gyɛ nbara dɩdaa mʋ nɩɩ fan wʋla nyɛ lɩɩ npiili asɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔlɛ gyii mʋ. Nbara dɩdaa nɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ fan wʋla nu mʋ.

eng: On the other hand, I am writing a new commandment to you, which is true in him and in you, because the darkness is passing away and the true light already shines.
local: Amaa ɔkpa kʋ sʋ mʋ, nbara mʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ n sa fanɛ falɛ bɩrɛ gyɛ kɩpʋpwɛ nɩn, nɩɩ fanaa Krisito fan lɛɛ kaapʋ fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ nbara pʋpwɛ kesintin. Lɩɩ fɛɛ kitentenbiri mʋ kɩ tɛɛ kɩɩ kyʋn, nɩɩ kesintin fɩtɩla mʋ tɛɛ wʋla kɩɩ ŋalɩgɛ tɔ.

eng: The one who claims to be in the light while hating a brother or sister is in the darkness even now.
local: Nɩɩ ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, ɔ bʋ fɩtɩla tɔ, yɛgɛ ee kisi mʋ tɔmaa Krisito osunpu bɩrɛ, ɔ san ɔ bʋ kitentenbiri tɔ, ba fʋʋ halɩɩ saŋa nɩmʋ.

eng: The person loving a brother and sister stays in the light, and there is nothing in the light that causes a person to stumble.
local: Nɩɩ ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti mʋ tɔmaa Krisito osunpu mʋ bʋ fɩtɩla mʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ sɛhn man bʋ mʋ tɔ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ yɛgɛ o siti tɩyɛ alibi tɔ.

eng: But the person who hates a brother or sister is in the darkness and lives in the darkness, and doesnt know where to go because the darkness blinds the eyes.
local: Amaa ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee kisi mʋ tɔmaa Krisito osunpu mʋ bʋ kitentenbiri tɔ. Nɩɩ ɔ naa kitentenbiri tɔ yɛgɛ o mee nyi katɩn mʋ nɩɩ ee kpee, lɩɩ fɛɛ kitentenbiri mʋ kɩ waa mʋ gyaatanapʋ.

eng: Little children, Im writing to you because your sins have been forgiven through Jesus name.
local: Mi‐bii ana danbɩrasa, n kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ n sʋ n sa fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ taa fanɛ alibi kɛɛ fanɛ lɩɩ Yesu sʋ.

eng: Parents, Im writing to you because you have known the one who has existed from the beginning. Young people, Im writing to you because you have conquered the evil one.
local: Asɛ ana, n kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ n sa fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan wʋla fan nyi Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla ɔ bʋ tɔ lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ. Ayaafɔlɛ, n kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ n sa fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan taalɛ gyii Sɩtaanɛ alibi wuya mʋ sʋ. Nbii, n kyʋrɔɔ n sa fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan bɩɩ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ.

eng: Little children, I write to you because you know the Father. Parents, I write to you because you have known the one who has existed from the beginning. Young people, I write to you because you are strong, the word of God remains in you, and you have conquered the evil one.
local: Asɛ ana, n kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ n sa fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan wʋla fan nyi Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ wʋla ɔ bʋ tɔ lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ. Ayaafɔlɛ, n kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ n sa fanɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ fan bʋlʋn nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ a bʋ fanɛ tɔ nɩɩ fan gyii Sɩtaanɛ alibi wuya mʋ sʋ.

eng: Dont love the world or the things in the world. If anyone loves the world, the love of the Father is not in them.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan man biti dulinyaa abɛɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ a bʋ dulinyaa tɔ. Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ee biti dulinyaa mʋ, ɔ man sʋ kebiti sa Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: Everything that is in the world—the craving for whatever the body feels, the craving for whatever the eyes see and the arrogant pride in ones possessions—is not of the Father but is of the world.
local: Kanɩn sʋ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ dulinyaa tɔ fɛɛ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kɔkɔlɔ biti, atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ansi i wu nɩɩ ɛɛ yalaga, yɛ n‐yɩɩ kɩkaapʋ lɩɩ kasɛ sʋ atɔ. Ɩnɩmʋ kpini ɩ man lɩɩ Ɔsɛ mʋ asɛ amaa ɩ lɩɩ dulinyaa tɔ nɩn.

eng: And the world and its cravings are passing away, but the person who does the will of God remains forever.
local: Dulinya yɛ kɩmaa kɩmʋ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ i gyii asa amu kpini ii biti ɛɛ kyʋn, amaa ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa Ɩbwaarɛ kɔkɔlɔ biti bɩrɛ ee biti ɔ kyɩna kakpaa.

eng: Little children, it is the last hour. Just as you have heard that the antichrist is coming, so now many antichrists have appeared. This is how we know it is the last hour.
local: Mi‐bii ana, anɛ dulinyaa tɔ kakyɩna laalaalʋwɛ mʋ kɩ fʋʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan wʋla nu yɛ Krisito okisipu mʋ ii biti ɔ ba mʋ. Halɩɩ nbɩɩnbɩɩ gbaa Krisito akisipu gaalaagaa ba tɛɛ ba. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an bɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa mʋ laalaalʋwɛ ndee.

eng: They went out from us, but they were not really part of us. If they had been part of us, they would have stayed with us. But by going out from us, they showed they all are not part of us.
local: Krisito akisipu banɩmʋ ba lɩɩ anɛ tɔ kyʋn, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba man gyɛ anɛ asa gbaa‐gbaa. Nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ ba daa ba gyɛ anɛ asa mʋ, naafɔɔ ba san ba bʋ anɛ tɔ. Amaa ba lɩɩ anɛ tɔ nɩn kɛ ɩ nyɛ lɛɛ kaapʋ fɛɛ bamʋ ɔkʋ man tii anɛ sʋ.

eng: But you have an anointing from the holy one, and all of you know the truth.
local: Amaa fanɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ Krisito sa fanɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ, nɩɩ fanɛ kpini fan nyi Ɩbwaarɛ kesintin asɩn mʋ.

eng: I dont write to you because you dont know the truth but because you know it. You know that no lie comes from the truth.
local: Man gyɛ yɛ fan maa man nyi kesintin mʋ sʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ n sa fanɛ, amaa fan nyi kɩmʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ antɩŋɛsa akʋ a man bʋ kesintin mʋ tɔ.

eng: Who is the liar? Isnt it the person who denies that Jesus is the Christ? This person is the antichrist: the one who denies the Father and the Son.
local: Anɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya mʋ? Mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ee kina yɛ Yesu man gyɛ Krisito mʋ. Kanɩn nyɩmɩsa maŋa ɩ gyɛ Krisito okisipu, nɩɩ mʋ ii kina Ɔsɛ yɛ Obii mʋ.

eng: Everyone who denies the Son does not have the Father, but the one who confesses the Son has the Father also.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee kina Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii mʋ, ee kina Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ gbaa, amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii mʋ gyii mʋ, ɛɛ kɔɔlɛ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ gbaa ee gyii.

eng: As for you, what you heard from the beginning must remain in you. If what you heard from the beginning remains in you, you will also remain in relationship to the Son and in the Father.
local: Kanɩn sʋ fan yɛgɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ fan wʋla nu lɩɩ npiili asɛ mʋ ɩ kyɩna fanɛ tɔ. Nɩɩ ɩ kan ɩ tɛ fanɛ tɔ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ fanɛ gbaa fanɛ fɛn bʋ Ɔsɛ yɛ Obii mʋ tɔ.

eng: This is the promise that he himself gave us: eternal life.
local: Nɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Yesu da mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ fɛɛ ee biti ɔ sa anɛ ɩ gyɛ nkpa kakpaa mʋ.

eng: I write these things to you about those who are attempting to deceive you.
local: N kyʋrɔɔ ɩnɩmʋ n sʋ n sa fanɛ lɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba pɩna fanɛ mʋ sʋ.

eng: As for you, the anointing that you received from him remains on you, and you dont need anyone to teach you the truth. But since his anointing teaches you about all things , remain in relationship to him just as he taught you.
local: Amaa fanɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ lɩɩ Krisito asɛ mʋ kɩ bʋ fanɛ tɔ, nɩɩ ɩ man tiri fɛɛ ɔkʋ ɔ bɩla ba kaapʋ fanɛ. Kanɩn Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ mʋ ɩɩ kaapʋ fanɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa, nɩɩ kanɩn kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ kaapʋ fanɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ kesintin, nɩɩ npɩna man bʋ kɩmʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kaapʋ fanɛ mʋ, fanaa Krisito fan kyɩna kanɩn.

eng: And now, little children, remain in relationship to Jesus, so that when he appears we can have confidence and not be ashamed in front of him when he comes.
local: Kanɩn sʋ mi‐bii ana, fanaa Krisito fan kyɩna. Kɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti o bwii ba mʋ, kɛ a taalɛ yɩlɛ tɔ, yɛgɛ a man sʋ ipeeli mu ansi tɔ.

eng: If you know that he is righteous, you also know that every person who practices righteousness is born from him.
local: Kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan nyi fɛɛ mʋ ɩkpa i kyiigi mʋ, fan bɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa atɔ kyiigisa mʋ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii.

eng: From the elder. To the chosen gentlewoman and her children, whom I truly love.
local: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ ɩ lɩɩ mɛ, ɔbɩlɩsa asɛ. N kyʋrɔɔ naa sa kibite danbɩrasa maa mu‐bii ana, mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ kebiti kesintin tɔ n sa bamʋ. Nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ mɛ wʋlɛ nkʋn, amaa bʋga yɛ bamʋ nɩɩ be nyi kesintin mʋ kpini, ba sʋ kebiti sa faa fu‐bii ana.

eng: because of the truth that remains with us and will be with us forever.
local: Kpalɩ fɛɛ kesintin mʋ kɩ maa bʋ anɛ asɛ mʋ, kii biti ki sii anɛ asɛ kakpaa.

eng: Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and from Jesus Christ, the Son of the Father, will be ours who live in truth and love.
local: Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa Yesu Krisito, Ɔsɛ mʋ Mu‐Bii mʋ ba bwaala anɛ, kɛ ba wu anɛ kʋwɛɛ, kɛ ba sa anɛ kayɩɩ yuuli lɩɩ kesintin yɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ anɛ tɔ mʋ sʋ.

eng: I was overjoyed to find some of your children living in the truth, just as we had been commanded by the Father.
local: Ɩ waa mɛ ɔkɔn gaa fɛɛ n maa wu fu‐bii ana mʋ tɔ akʋ ba maa naa kesintin ɔkpa sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ sa anɛ nnɔsa mʋ.

eng: Now, dear friends, I am requesting that we love each other. Its not as though Im writing a new command to you, but its one we have had from the beginning.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ kibite danbɩrasa, n tɔwɛ fʋ fɛɛ fan biti abaa. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ man gyɛ kɔnɔsa pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ n kyʋrɔɔ n kyʋŋɛ n sa fanɛ, amaa ɩ gyɛ kɔnɔsa mʋ nɩɩ an wʋla nu lɩɩ koo asɩn mʋ npiili asɛ yɛ, an biti anɛ abaa.

eng: This is love: that we live according to his commands. This is the command that you heard from the beginning: live in love.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ kebiti mʋ fɛɛ, an maa buu Ɩbwaarɛ kɔnɔsa mʋ. Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan wʋla nu lii npiili asɛ mʋ, ɔ sa anɛ kɔnɔ yɛ an biti abaa anɛ kakyɩna tɔ.

eng: Many deceivers have gone into the world who do not confess that Jesus Christ came as a human being. This kind of person is the deceiver and the antichrist.
local: Asa pɩnapʋ damantɛ akʋ ba wʋla natɛ dulinyaa tɔ katɩn kʋmaa nɩmʋ, nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ Yesu Krisito ba dulinyaa tɔ fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ tɔ. Kanɩn asa nɩmʋ tɔ ɔkʋmaa gyɛ ɔpɩnapʋ yɛ Krisito okisipu nɩn.

eng: Watch yourselves so that you dont lose what weve worked for but instead receive a full reward.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan baa fan da sʋ kɛ fan man pan kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan sun nyɛ mʋ, kɛ fan nyɛ fanɛ kʋkɔka bɔla abaa.

eng: Anyone who goes too far and does not continue in the teaching about Christ does not have God. Whoever continues in this teaching has both the Father and the Son.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kan taa ɔ mʋ gbaa‐gbaa mʋ nfɛɛrɛ tii kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Yesu kaapʋ mʋ sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ man kɔɔlɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Krisito kaapʋ mʋ gyii mʋ, ɔ man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ. Amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kan kɔɔlɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Krisito kaapʋ mʋ gyii mʋ, o nyi Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ Mu‐Bii Yesu Krisito mʋ.

eng: Whoever comes to you who does not affirm this teaching should neither be received nor welcomed into your home.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ɔ man sʋ falɛ akaapʋ‐bi anɩmʋ mʋ, fan man kɔɔlɛ mʋ ba fan akpaara sʋ abɛɛ fan waa mʋ nsa‐nsa.

eng: because welcoming people like that is the same thing as sharing in their evil actions.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ kanɩn nyɩmɩsa maŋa mʋ, ngbaa mʋ tii mʋ asun libi mʋ sʋ.

eng: I have a lot to tell you. I dont want to use paper and ink, but I hope to visit you and talk with you face-to-face, so that our joy can be complete.
local: N sʋ asɩn gaalaagaa mʋ nɩɩ n biti n tɔwɛ fanɛ, amaa n mɛɛ yɛ n kyʋrɔɔ ɩmʋ gyaga ɔwʋlɛ sʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ n sʋ tamaa fɛɛ n biti n ba fanɛ asɛ kɛ a tɔwɛ, kɛ maa fanɛ a kyɩna biri aligyima kɛ anɛ kpini ansi i gyii.

eng: Your chosen sisters children greet you.
local: Fanɛ pɩɩkyɩɩ danbɩrasa mu‐bii ana bɛɛ fwaala fanɛ.

eng: From the elder. To my dear friend Gaius, whom I truly love.
local: Mɛ ɔbɩlɩsa, n kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ n sa mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ danbɩrasa Gayusi mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ kebiti kesintin tɔ sa mʋ.

eng: Dear friend, Im praying that all is well with you and that you enjoy good health in the same way that you prosper spiritually.
local: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ danbɩrasa, mɛ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ kinsigyi, yɛ alanfɩya, yɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ i kpee sʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ sa fʋ, fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fʋ kala sʋ alanfɩya mʋ.

eng: I was overjoyed when the brothers and sisters arrived and spoke highly of your faithfulness to the truth, shown by how you live according to the truth.
local: Fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ anɛ‐nyi mu‐bii ana akʋ ba be gyii fu kesintin, tɔwɛ mɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fʋ taa kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii fʋ yɩlɛ kesintin mʋ tɔ mʋ, ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ mi ansi i gyii gaa.

eng: I have no greater joy than this: to hear that my children are living according to the truth.
local: N man sʋ kinsigyi lala kʋ n kyɔ n maa nu yɛ mi‐nyi mu‐bii ana ba yɩlɛ kesintin mʋ tɔ.

eng: Dear friend, you act faithfully in whatever you do for our brothers and sisters, even though they are strangers.
local: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ danbɩrasa, kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fɩɩ waa fɩɩ sa fʋ bɩrɩsa ana Krisito abi afɔ mʋ, ɩɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ fʋ gyɛ kesintin wuya.

eng: They spoke highly of your love in front of the church. You all would do well to provide for their journey in a way that honors God.
local: Ba tɔwɛ fu kebiti mʋ nɩɩ fʋ sʋ sa asa, sa Krisito abi kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ nfɩɩ mʋ. Fʋ kɩɩ kɛ fʋ lɛɛ bamʋ ɔkpa kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɩ dagaa nɩɩ ii gyii Ɩbwaarɛ ansi.

eng: because they left on their journey for the sake of Jesus Christ without accepting any support from the Gentiles.
local: Lɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kɩtɩɩ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ ba naa bee kpee yɛgɛ ba man kɔɔlɛ nkyɛtɔ kʋ lɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ Yesu Krisito gyii mʋ asɛ.

eng: Therefore, we ought to help people like this so that we can be coworkers with the truth.
local: Ɩ gyɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ dɛ sa anɛ yɛ a lɛɛ anɛ kesintin kaapʋ asa banɩmʋ, kɛ ana bamʋ a bʋga sun kesintin kusun mʋ.

eng: I wrote something to the church, but Diotrephes, who likes to put himself first, doesnt welcome us.
local: N wʋla kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ naa sa Krisito abi kʋbʋ mʋ, amaa Diyotrefesi mʋ nɩɩ mu ansi ɩ payɩ kʋbʋ mʋ kɩbɩlɩsa kigyii sʋ mʋ, ɔ man taa anɛ waa sɛhn.

eng: Because of this, if I come, I will bring up what he has done—making unjustified and wicked accusations against us. And as if that were not enough, he not only refuses to welcome the brothers and sisters but stops those who want to do so and even throws them out of the church!.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ n kan ba fanɛ asɛ mʋ, n biti n tɩɩ fanɛ gyaŋɛ kɛ n tɔwɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa mʋ yɛ asɩn libi mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɩn ɛɛ gyaga anɛ sʋ. Ɛɛ bɩla ee kina mʋ bɩrɩsa ana Krisito abi kɩfɔ kɩkɔɔlɛ, nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba kɔɔlɛ bamʋ kɩfɔ mʋ, ee tii bamʋ ɔkpa, nɩɩ ɛɛ gya bamʋ ɛɛ lɩɩ Krisito abi kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ.

eng: Dear friend, dont imitate what is bad but what is good. Whoever practices what is good belongs to God. Whoever practices what is bad has not seen God.
local: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ danbɩrasa, man bɩɩla alibi kɩwaa amɔɔ adanbɩrasa. Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa adanbɩrasa mʋ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ nɩn. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ waa alibi mʋ ɔ man pɩɩta bɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: Everyone speaks highly of Demetrius, even the truth itself. We also speak highly of him, and you know that what we say is true.
local: Demetirisu bɩrɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ɩɩ tɔwɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ asɩn danbɩrasa lɩɩ mʋ kesintin kigyii sʋ. Anɛ gbaa anɛ a tɔwɛ mʋ n‐yɩɩ sʋ asɩn danbɩrasa, nɩɩ fan nyi fɛɛ anɛ asɩn ɩ gyɛ kesintin.

eng: I have a lot to say to you, but I dont want to use pen and ink.
local: N sʋ asɩn kɩkyɔ n kyʋrɔɔ sa fʋ, amaa n mee biti n kyʋrɔɔ ɩmʋ waa ɔwʋlɛ tɔ.

eng: I hope to see you soon, and we will speak face-to-face.
local: N sʋ tamaa fɛɛ ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ kyɛɛrɛɛ n biti n wu fʋ kɛ a tɔwɛ abaa asɛ.

eng: Peace be with you. Your friends here greet you. Greet our friends there by name.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ keyuula kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fʋ asɛ. Fʋ kyɛmɩnɛ ana mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ nfɩɩ kpini bɛɛ fwaala fʋ. Fwaala anɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana kpini kʋkʋlʋn kʋlʋn.

eng: Everyone who believes that Jesus is the Christ has been born from God. Whoever loves someone who is a parent loves the child born to the parent.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ gyii fɛɛ Yesu ɩ gyɛ Krisito mʋ, ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐bii nɩn. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa ɔsɛ mʋ, sʋ kebiti sa kebii mʋ gbaa.

eng: This is how we know that we love the children of God: when we love God and keep Gods commandments.
local: Falɛ nɩɩ an bɩɩ fɛɛ an biti Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐bii ana, fɛɛ a maa biti Ɩbwaarɛ nɩɩ an buu mʋ nnɔsa mʋ sʋ.

eng: This is the love of God: we keep Gods commandments. Gods commandments are not difficult.
local: Mʋ nnɔsa kibuu sʋ, ɩ gyɛ nyɩmɩsa maa biti Ɩbwaarɛ, nɩɩ mʋ nnɔsa mʋ ɩ man bʋsɩn.

eng: because everyone who is born from God defeats the world. And this is the victory that has defeated the world: our faith.
local: Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐bii mʋ, i gyii dulinyaa sʋ. Lɩɩ anɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii nɩmʋ sʋ mʋ, an gyii dulinyaa sʋ.

eng: Who defeats the world? Isnt it the one who believes that Jesus is Gods Son?.
local: Anɩmʋ i gyii dulinyaa sʋ? Amɔɔ bamʋ nɩɩ ba kɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii Yesu gyii mʋ.

eng: This is the one who came by water and blood: Jesus Christ. Not by water only but by water and blood. And the Spirit is the one who testifies, because the Spirit is the truth.
local: Yesu ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ ba, nɩɩ o gyee Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee nɩɩ ɔ kyɛɛgɛ mʋ nkalan wʋrɩgɛ, man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee mʋ nkʋn sʋ nɩɩ ɔ ba, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ kekyugyee mʋ yɛ nkalan kɩkyɛɛgɛ wʋrɩgɛ mʋ sʋ. Nɩɩ Kayaayu mʋ ɩ lɛɛ kaapʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ Kayaayu mʋ gyɛ kesintin.

eng: The three are testifying.
local: Ɩ sʋ atɔ asa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ lɛɛ Yesu keduli ɩɩ kaapʋ anɛ.

eng: the Spirit, the water, and the blood—and the three are united in agreement.
local: Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ, yɛ nkyu, yɛ nkalan. Falɛ atɔ asa anɩmʋ ɩɩ waa atɔ kʋlʋn.

eng: If we receive human testimony, Gods testimony is greater, because this is what God testified: he has testified about his Son.
local: An kɔɔlɛ nyɩmɩsa asɩn tɔwɛsa an gyii, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ gyɛ kɩkparɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɩ gyɛ adansɛ mʋ nɩɩ o gyii lɩɩ Mu‐Bii mʋ sʋ.

eng: The one who believes in Gods Son has the testimony within; the one who doesnt believe God has made God a liar, because that one has not believed the testimony that God gave about his Son.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ Obii mʋ gyii mʋ, kɔɔlɛ asɩn nɩmʋ waa mʋ kɔkɔlɔ tɔ. Amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gyii mʋ, kanɩn nyɩmɩsa maŋa kaapʋ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ gyɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya, lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔ man kɔɔlɛ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ lɩɩ Mu‐Bii mʋ sʋ mʋ gyii.

eng: And this is the testimony: God gave eternal life to us, and this life is in his Son.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ asɩn mʋ yɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ sa anɛ nkpa kakpaa, nɩɩ kanɩn nkpa kakpaa nɩmʋ bʋ Mu‐Bii tɔ nɩn.

eng: The one who has the Son has life. The one who doesnt have Gods Son does not have life.
local: Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔɔlɛ Obii mʋ gyii mʋ sʋ nkpa, amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man kɔɔlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii mʋ gyii mʋ man sʋ nkpa kakpaa nɩmʋ.

eng: I write these things to you who believe in the name of Gods Son so that you can know that you have eternal life.
local: N kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ sa fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan kɔɔlɛ Yesu gyii fɛɛ ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii mʋ, kɛ fan nyɛ bɩɩ fɛɛ fan sʋ nkpa kakpaa.

eng: This is the confidence that we have in our relationship with God: If we ask for anything in agreement with his will, he listens to us.
local: Atɔ mʋ nɩɩ an nyi anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ ɩ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an bugi anɛ nkɔlɔ tɔ an sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ an kʋlɛ mʋ mʋ, ee nu anɛ asɛ.

eng: If we know that he listens to whatever we ask, we know that we have received what we asked from him.
local: Nɩɩ an nyɛ nɩɩ an nyi fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ i nu kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ an kʋlɛ mʋ mʋ, kanɩn bɩrɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ an kʋlɛ mʋ mʋ, ɛɛ waa ɛɛ sa anɛ.

eng: If anyone sees a brother or sister committing a sin that does not result in death, they should pray, and God will give life to them—that is, to those who commit sins that dont result in death. There is a sin that results in death—Im not saying that you should pray about that.
local: Nɩɩ fanɛ tɔ ɔkʋ kan wu fɛɛ mʋ bɩrɩsa ɩɩ waa alibi mʋ nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ barɩgɛ maa Ɩbwaarɛ nsana kakpaa mʋ, ɔ kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ sa mʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ sa ɔsa mʋ nkpa. Alibi mʋ nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ barɩgɛ nyɩmɩsa maa Ɩbwaarɛ nsana mʋ, asɩn nɩɩ n tɔwɛ. Amaa alibi akʋ ɩɩ bɩya lewu abɛɛ ɩɩ barɩgɛ nyɩmɩsa maa Ɩbwaarɛ nsana, maa gyɛ ɩmʋ kabwaarɛ‐kʋlɛ nɩɩ n dɛ.

eng: Every unrighteous action is sin, but there is a sin that does not result in death.
local: Asɩn kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man bʋrɔn sa Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ gyɛ alibi nɩn. Amaa alibi akʋ ɩɩ barɩgɛ nyɩmɩsa maa Ɩbwaarɛ nsana kakpaa nɩn.

eng: We know that everyone born from God does not sin, but the ones born from God guard themselves, and the evil one cannot touch them.
local: An nyi fɛɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ba kʋʋgɛ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔ mʋ, mɛɛ kyaga sʋ ɛɛ waa alibi. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kʋʋgɛ mʋ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔ mʋ ii kun kanɩn ɔsa mʋ, nɩɩ nyɩmɩsa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Sɩtaanɛ lɛɛ mʋ mɛɛ taalɛ waa mʋ alibi akʋ.

eng: We know we are from God, and the whole world lies in the power of the evil one.
local: An nyi fɛɛ an gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐bii ana, nɩɩ asa mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ kpini ba bʋ alibi awaapʋ mʋ abaa tɔ.

eng: We know that Gods Son has come and has given us understanding to know the one who is true. We are in the one who is true by being in his Son, Jesus Christ. This is the true God and eternal life.
local: Nɩɩ an bɩla an nyi fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐Bii mʋ ba kasɛ sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ yɛgɛ nɩɩ an nu kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ kasɛ, kɛ ɩ yɛgɛ a bɩɩ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kesintin mʋ. Anaa Ɩbwaarɛ kesintin wuya mʋ an waa kʋkʋlʋn, lɩɩ fɛɛ an waa kʋkʋlʋn maa Mu‐Bii Yesu Krisito mʋ. Mʋ ɩ gyɛ Kesintin Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ nkpa kakpaa mʋ.

eng: Little children, guard yourselves from idols!.
local: Mi‐bii ana, fan kɩtaa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ lɩɩ ɩdakpa mʋ sʋ.

eng: Jude, a slave of Jesus Christ and brother of James. To those who are called, loved by God the Father and kept safe by Jesus Christ.
local: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ lɩɩ mɛ Gyudi asɛ, n gyɛ Yesu Krisito kɩyaafɔlɛ, nɩɩ n bɩla n gyɛ Gyemisi mu‐supu. N kyʋrɔɔ n sa bamʋ nɩɩ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɩɩ bamʋ, nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti sa bamʋ, nɩɩ Yesu Krisito ɩɩ kɩɩ bamʋ sʋ mʋ.

eng: May you have more and more mercy, peace, and love.
local: N kʋlɛ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ o wu fanɛ kʋwɛɛ, kɛ mʋ kɔkɔlɔ yuuli yɛ kebiti kɩ baa kɩ bʋ fanɛ tɔ gaa.

eng: Dear friends, I wanted very much to write to you concerning the salvation we share. Instead, I must write to urge you to fight for the faith delivered once and for all to Gods holy people.
local: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana, naafɔɔ ɩ bʋ mɛ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ fɛɛ n kyʋrɔɔ fanɛ lɩɩ kamɔlɩgɛ mʋ nɩɩ anɛ kpini an nyɛ mʋ asɩn, amaa n bɩla wu fɛɛ ɩ dagaa n kyʋrɔɔ waa fanɛ ɔlʋn tɔ fɛɛ fan kɔ kun kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa waa mʋ asa abaa tɔ kɩlɩɩ kʋlʋn kakpaa mʋ keluu.

eng: Godless people have slipped in among you. They turn the grace of our God into unrestrained immorality and deny our only master and Lord, Jesus Christ. Judgment was passed against them a long time ago.
local: Kʋtɔ mʋ sʋ nɩɩ n tɔwɛ kanɩn mʋ ɩ gyɛ fɛɛ, asa kʋ mʋ nɩɩ ba man sɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ ba baala loo fanɛ tɔ, bɛɛ kyɛɛgɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kabwaala asɩn mʋ kasɛ, kɛ ba nyɛ‐nyɛ ɔkpa waa kakyɩɩ yɛ kanyɩn biti kɩgyagaa. Kanɩn asa maŋa ba kina Yesu Krisito mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ yɛ anɛ Owura mʋ. Lɩɩ koo dɩdaa mʋ, nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ waa Asɩnkyan yɩlasa mʋ tɔ kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ mʋ nɩɩ bee biti ba nyɛ.

eng: I want to remind you of something you already know very well. The Lord, who once saved a people out of Egypt, later destroyed those who didnt maintain their faith.
local: Fan tɛɛ wʋla fan nyi ɩnɩmʋ kpini, amaa n biti n nyiŋi fanɛ fɛɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ daa mɔlɩgɛ mʋ asa Ɩsɩrayɩ abi lɩɩ Egyipiti ɔsʋwʋlɛ sʋ. Amaa ɩmʋ kamaa tɔ mʋ, nɩɩ o muuri bamʋ tɔ bamʋ nɩɩ ba man kɔɔlɛ gyii mʋ.

eng: I remind you too of the angels who didnt keep their position of authority but deserted their own home. The Lord has kept them in eternal chains in the underworld until the judgment of the great day.
local: Fan nyiŋi fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba man kɩtaa bamʋ kɩbɩlɩsa kigyii yɛ bamʋ ɩyɩlɛkpa, amaa ba kina bamʋ ɩkyɩnakpa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sa bamʋ mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ ŋmina bamʋ agbeeleebi kakpaa yɩla kitentenbiri naa fʋʋ katalɛ Kakɛ lala mʋ.

eng: In the same way, Sodom and Gomorrah and neighboring towns practiced immoral sexual relations and pursued other sexual urges. By undergoing the punishment of eternal fire, they serve as a warning.
local: Kanɩn maŋa nɩɩ fan nyiŋi Sodom yɛ Gomora ndɛ, yɛ ndɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ kyaabɔɔ ɩmʋ mʋ. Ba daa kyɩna waa kakyɩɩ yɛ kanyɩn biti kɩgyagaa yɛ agyaga‐sɩn kɩbansa, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa fʋlɔn muuri bamʋ. Ndɛ maŋa tɔ asa gbaa be du nɩn fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ waa agyaga‐sɩn kayalaga. Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ sɩnkaala sa alibi awaapʋ kpini fɛɛ bee biti ba loo awʋrʋfɔ fʋlɔn yen‐yen mʋ nɩɩ i mee dun kakpaa mʋ tɔ.

eng: Yet, even knowing this, these dreamers in the same way pollute themselves, reject authority, and slander the angels.
local: Kanɩn ɔkpa maŋa sʋ nɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba ba baala loo fanɛ tɔ mʋ gbaa be du. Bɛɛ kɔyɩ idee nɩɩ bɛɛ yɩlɛ ɩmʋ sʋ bɛɛ waa bamʋ gbaa‐gbaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ agyaga‐sɩn, nɩɩ bee kina Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ ɔlʋn, nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔwɛ nbusaa asɩn bɛɛ gyaga sʋsʋ nbɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba sʋ bʋnyaa mʋ.

eng: The archangel Michael, when he argued with the devil about Moses body, did not dare charge him with slander. Instead, he said, The Lord rebuke you.
local: Amaa Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ bɩlɩsa Maakɛlɩ gbaa man saalɛ Sɩtaanɛ. Saŋa mʋ nɩɩ maa mʋ bɛɛ bɩɩtɛ ɔdɩdaapʋ Mosesi kibuni sʋ mʋ, ɔ man tɔwɛ Sɩtaanɛ nnɔ, amaa ɔ tɔwɛ mʋ yɛ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔ bɩɩtɛ fʋ kʋsʋ.

eng: But these people slander whatever they dont understand. They are destroyed by what they know instinctively, as though they were irrational animals.
local: Amaa falɛ asa banɩmʋ bɩrɛ bɛɛ saalɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ be mee nu kɩmʋ kasɛ mʋ nɩn. Nɩɩ be du nɩn fɛɛ atɔbwaaya, lɩɩ fɛɛ ba man sʋ nfɛɛrɛ, kɛ ba fɛ lɩɩ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ kanɩn atɔ maŋa ii muuri bamʋ.

eng: They are damned, for they follow in the footsteps of Cain. For profit they give themselves over to Balaams error. They are destroyed in the uprising of Korah.
local: Kanɩn asa maŋa bamʋ laakʋ! Lɩɩ fɛɛ ɔkpa libi mʋ nɩɩ Ken kyɩna bɔla sʋ mʋ, nɩɩ ba buu falɛ. Be du nɩn fɛɛ Baalam mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kpalɩ afulee sʋ waa alibi mʋ. Nɩɩ ba kʋsʋ yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Kora gbaa kʋsʋ yɩlɛ mʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ bamʋ gbaa bamʋ bee biti ba muuri fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ Kora muuri mʋ.

eng: These people are like jagged rocks just below the surface of the water waiting to snag you when they join your love feasts. They feast with you without reverence. They care only for themselves. They are waterless clouds carried along by the winds; fruitless autumn trees, twice dead, uprooted.
local: Falɛ asa nɩmʋ ba kan naa loo fanɛ tɔ kɛ fan bʋga gyii mʋ, be du nɩn fɛɛ atɔ kpensa fanɛ tɔ, nɩɩ ba man sʋ ipeeli fɛɛ bamʋ nkʋn lɛɛ nɩɩ bee biti. Nɩɩ be du nɩn fɛɛ abwaarɛ‐wʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ bɩya bʋlayɩ, nɩɩ afuu ɩ da ɩmʋ ɩ kyaa ɩ bɔɔ. Ba bɩla be du nɩn fɛɛ iyu mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sɔyɩ abi ɩmʋ kɩsɔyɩ saŋa kyɛɛkyɛɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ba kyiigi ɩmaa ɩmʋ ilin nɩɩ i wu kpini‐kpini mʋ.

eng: wild waves of the sea foaming up their own shame; wandering stars for whom the darkness of the underworld is reserved forever.
local: Be du nɩn fɛɛ ɔpʋ apaa nɩɩ bamʋ ipeeli awaasa mʋ ii fuu fɛɛ afʋfʋʋ ɩɩ sʋ akpa ɩ naa. Nɩɩ ba bɩla ba du nɩn fɛɛ akyikpebi mʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ naa ɩɩ naa mʋ. Bamʋ opula kyɩnasa ɩ gyɛ kitentenbiri kyilim mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɔŋɔ yɩla bamʋ kakpaa mʋ.

eng: Enoch, who lived seven generations after Adam, prophesied about these people when he said, See, the Lord comes with his countless holy ones.
local: Enoki mʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyan Adam sʋ kakʋʋgɛ tɔ nkyaga sʋ sunɔsapʋ mʋ, tɔwɛ falɛ asa banɩmʋ asɩn koo dɩdaa yɩla yɛ, Fan kɩɩ, Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ ɩɩ ba maa mʋ nbɔɔ kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ ngbɩn‐ngbɩn mʋ.

eng: to execute judgment on everyone and to convict everyone about every ungodly deed they have committed in their ungodliness as well as all the harsh things that sinful ungodly people have said against him.
local: kɛ o be gyii asa kpini asɩn. Ee biti o be bun bamʋ nɩɩ ba man sɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ kʋpwɛ lɩɩ bamʋ alibi kɩwaa sʋ, yɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ ba tɔwɛ asɩn libi yii Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ.

eng: These are faultfinding grumblers, living according to their own desires. They speak arrogant words and they show partiality to people when they want a favor in return.
local: Falɛ asa banɩmʋ ba tɛ nɩn bɛɛ kɔlɩtɛ, yɛgɛ bɛɛ pwɩɩ bamʋ asa. Ba buu bamʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kayalaga sʋ, nɩɩ bɛɛ kʋsaa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ yɛgɛ ba sʋ kɔnɔ tɔ kɔn bɛɛ pɩna asa kɛ ɩ waa ɔdan sa bamʋ.

eng: But you, dear friends, remember the words spoken beforehand by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Amaa mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana danbɩrasa, fan nyi atɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito asunpu ba daa tɔwɛ fanɛ.

eng: They said to you, In the end time scoffers will come living according to their own ungodly desires.
local: Ba daa tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, kakɛ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ tɔ mʋ, asa bee biti ba taa Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn bɛɛ waa ahin‐sɩn, kɛ ba buu bamʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ alibi kayalaga.

eng: These people create divisions. Since they dont have the Spirit, they are worldly.
local: Falɛ asa banɩmʋ ɩɩ bɩya nbarɩgɛ tɔ fanɛ tɔ, bamʋ kayɩɩ‐wʋlɛ kayalaga i gyii bamʋ amu, nɩɩ ba man sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ.

eng: But you, dear friends: build each other up on the foundation of your most holy faith, pray in the Holy Spirit.
local: Amaa mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana danbɩrasa, fanɛɛ fanɛ bɩrɛ, fan waa fanɛ n‐yɩɩ ɔlʋn tɔ lɩɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii danbɩrasa mʋ tɔ, yɛgɛ fɛn kʋlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ, Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ mʋ ɔlʋn mʋ tɔ.

eng: keep each other in the love of God, wait for the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ, who will give you eternal life.
local: Fan kyɩna Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti mʋ tɔ, yɛgɛ fan gyoo anɛ Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito o be wu fanɛ kʋwɛɛ kɛ ɔ sa fanɛ nkpa kakpaa mʋ.

eng: Have mercy on those who doubt.
local: Fan wu bamʋ nɩɩ bamʋ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii du sika‐sika mʋ kʋwɛɛ.

eng: Save some by snatching them from the fire. Fearing God, have mercy on some, hating even the clothing contaminated by their sinful urges.
local: Fan mɔlɩgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ɩɩ sʋ bamʋ ii kpee awʋrʋfɔ fʋlɔn yen‐yen tɔ mʋ, kɛ fan wu akʋ mɔɔ kʋwɛɛ yɛgɛ fan sʋ kufuu, kɛ fan kisi bamʋ alibi awaasa mʋ nɩɩ i du fɛɛ ataa kpensa mʋ.

eng: To the one who is able to protect you from falling, and to present you blameless and rejoicing before his glorious presence.
local: Fan yɛgɛ a yɩn Ɩbwaarɛ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ taalɛ yɛgɛ fan man lɩɩ tɩyɛ, kɛ ɔ taa fanɛ yɩlɛ mʋ bʋnyaa mu ansi tɔ yɛ kɔkɔlɔ fuuli, yɛgɛ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ man sʋ asɩn pwɩɩsa kʋ.

eng: to the only God our savior, through Jesus Christ our Lord, belong glory, majesty, power, and authority, before all time, now and forever. Amen.
local: Mʋ nkʋn ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ. Nɩɩ mʋ ɩ dagaa bʋnyaa, yɛ kɩkparɛ, yɛ ɔlʋn, yɛ kɩbɩlɩsa bɔla anɛ‐Nyɩrɩpɛ Yesu Krisito lɩɩ koo dɩdaa yɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ man sʋ ɔkaa. Amen.

eng: Dear friends, dont believe every spirit. Test the spirits to see if they are from God because many false prophets have gone into the world.
local: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana, fan man kɔɔlɛ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ yɛ ɔ sʋ Kayaayu mʋ gyii, amaa fan tʋʋ n‐yaayu mʋ tɔ kɩɩ fɛɛ ba lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ nɩn, abɛɛ ba man lɩɩ mʋ asɛ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ antɩŋɛsa atɔwɛpʋ gaalaagaa ba ba dulinyaa tɔ katɩn kʋmaa.

eng: This is how you know if a spirit comes from God: every spirit that confesses that Jesus Christ has come as a human is from God.
local: Falɛ nɩɩ fen biti fan bɩɩ kayaayu mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mʋ. Kayaayu kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ tɔwɛ yɛ Yesu Krisito ba biliŋi nyɩmɩsa ba dulinyaa tɔ mʋ, kɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ.

eng: and every spirit that doesnt confess Jesus is not from God. This is the spirit of the antichrist, which you have heard is coming and is now already in the world.
local: Amaa kayaayu kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ kii kina yɛ Yesu Krisito man ba biliŋi nyɩmɩsa mʋ, kɩ man lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ. Kanɩn kayaayu nɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ Krisito okisipu mʋ nɩɩ fan nu yɛ ɛɛ ba mʋ, nɩɩ halɩɩ ɔ tɛɛ wʋla ɔ bʋ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ gbaa.

eng: You are from God, little children, and you have defeated these people because the one who is in you is greater than the one who is in the world.
local: Amaa fanɛ, mi‐bii ana bɩrɛ fan gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa, nɩɩ fan tee gyii bamʋ sʋ. Lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ fanɛ tɔ mʋ, kyɔ Sɩtaanɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ mʋ.

eng: They are from the world. So they speak from the worlds point of view and the world listens to them.
local: Nɩɩ kanɩn asa maŋa ba gyɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ lɛɛ nɩn, ɩmʋ sʋ bɛɛ tɔwɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ gyɛ dulinyaa tɔ asɩn mʋ nɩn, kanɩn sʋ dulinyaa asa bee nu bamʋ asɛ.

eng: We are from God. The person who knows God listens to us. Whoever is not from God doesnt listen to us. This is how we recognize the Spirit of truth and the spirit of error.
local: Anɛɛnɛ bɩrɛ, an gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asa nɩn, nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ o nyi Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, ee nu anɛ asɛ. Amaa ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ nyɩmɩsa mʋ, o mee nu anɛ asɛ. Ɩmʋ sʋ falɛ asɩn nɩmʋ nɩɩ an sʋ an bɩɩ kesintin Kayaayu yɛ antɩŋɛsa kayaayu.

eng: Dear friends, lets love each other, because love is from God, and everyone who loves is born from God and knows God.
local: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana danbɩrasa, fan yɛgɛ a biti abaa, kpalɩ fɛɛ kebiti kɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ nɩn. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti mʋ, ɔ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐bii, nɩɩ o nyi Ɩbwaarɛ.

eng: The person who doesnt love does not know God, because God is love.
local: Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ man sʋ kebiti bɩrɛ, ɔ man nyi Ɩbwaarɛ kpini‐kpini, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ obitipu.

eng: This is how the love of God is revealed to us: God has sent his only Son into the world so that we can live through him.
local: Falɛ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ lɛɛ mu kebiti mʋ kaapʋ anɛ tɔ, fɛɛ maa sun Mu‐Bii kʋlʋn kpen ba dulinyaa tɔ, kɛ a ba bɔla mʋ sʋ nyɛ nkpa.

eng: This is love: it is not that we loved God but that he loved us and sent his Son as the sacrifice that deals with our sins.
local: Ɩnɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ kebiti mʋ, man gyɛ anɛ ii biti Ɩbwaarɛ, amaa Ɩbwaarɛ bɩrɛ ɩ sʋ kebiti sa anɛ, nɩɩ o sun Mu‐Bii kʋlʋn yɛ, ɔ ba taa mʋ n‐yɩɩ waa ɩmata saraga sa anɛ alibi.

eng: Dear friends, if God loved us this way, we also ought to love each other.
local: Mɛ kyɛmɩnɛ ana, fan kɩɩ kebiti lala mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ sʋ sa anɛ, kanɩn sʋ ɩ dagaa anɛ gbaa a maa biti abaa.

eng: No one has ever seen God. If we love each other, God remains in us and his love is made perfect in us.
local: Ɔkʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔkʋ man pɩɩ wu Ɩbwaarɛ, amaa nɩɩ an kan an biti abaa bɩrɛ, Ɩbwaarɛ bʋ anɛ tɔ, nɩɩ mu kebiti mʋ kɩ bʋ anɛ asɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

eng: This is how we know we remain in him and he remains in us, because he has given us a measure of his Spirit.
local: Ɩbwaarɛ maa sa anɛ mʋ Kayaayu Kyɩrɛkyɩrɛ sʋ, nɩɩ an nyi fɛɛ an bʋ mʋ tɔ nɩɩ ngbaa mʋ bʋ anɛ tɔ.

eng: We have seen and testify that the Father has sent the Son to be the savior of the world.
local: Nɩɩ an wu yɛ anɛ ansi, nɩɩ ana gyii ɩmʋ kesintin fɛɛ Ɔsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ sun Mu‐Bii Yesu Krisito yɛ ɔ ba waa dulinyaa tɔ Ɔmɔlɩgɛpʋ.

eng: If any of us confess that Jesus is Gods Son, God remains in us and we remain in God.
local: Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kan bɩɩ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, Yesu ɩ gyɛ Ɩbwaarɛ Mu‐bii mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ bʋ mʋ tɔ nɩɩ ngbaa mʋ bʋ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔ.

eng: We have known and have believed the love that God has for us. God is love, and those who remain in love remain in God and God remains in them.
local: Nɩɩ anɛ bɩrɛ an nyi Ɩbwaarɛ kebiti mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ sa anɛ, nɩɩ an taa anɛ n‐yɩɩ tʋʋ kɩmʋ sʋ mʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyɛ kebiti. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kebiti mʋ, ɔ bʋ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔ, nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ gbaa bʋ mʋ tɔ.

eng: This is how love has been perfected in us, so that we can have confidence on the Judgment Day, because we are exactly the same as God is in this world.
local: Nɩɩ ɔkpa nɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ kebiti kɩ lɛɛ kaapʋ anɛ tɔ kyɛɛkyɛɛ, nɩɩ ɩmʋ sʋ nɩɩ an sʋ tamaa fɛɛ kakɛ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ ii biti ɔ ba talɛ asa mʋ, an taalɛ yɩlɛ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ dulinyaa nɩmʋ tɔ mʋ an du fɛɛ mʋ.

eng: There is no fear in love, but perfect love drives out fear, because fear expects punishment. The person who is afraid has not been made perfect in love.
local: Kufuu kɩ man bʋ kebiti tɔ, amaa kebiti mʋ nɩɩ ki du kyɛɛkyɛɛ, kɩɩ gya kufuu kɩɩ lɩɩ tɔ, lɩɩ fɛɛ kufuu maa kʋsʋ bɩɩtɛ ɛɛ naa, amaa ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ kufuu mʋ man du kyɛɛkyɛɛ kebiti mʋ tɔ.

eng: We love because God first loved us.
local: An sʋ kebiti sa Ɩbwaarɛ yɛ asa, lɩɩ fɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɩ gyankpaa ee biti anɛ.

eng: Those who say, I love God and hate their brothers or sisters are liars. After all, those who dont love their brothers or sisters whom they have seen can hardly love God whom they have not seen!.
local: Nɩɩ ɔkʋ kan tɔwɛ yɛ, ee biti Ɩbwaarɛ yɛgɛ ee kisi mʋ tɔɔmaa bɩrɛ, ɔ gyɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ biti mʋ tɔɔmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee wu mʋ, ɔ mɛɛ taalɛ biti Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ o mee wu mʋ mʋ.

eng: This commandment we have from him: Those who claim to love God ought to love their brother and sister also.
local: Nɩɩ nbara nɩmʋ nɩɩ ɔ taa sa anɛ yɛ, Ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ee biti Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ, ɩ dagaa maa biti mʋ tɔɔmaa gbaa.

eng: A revelation of Jesus Christ, which God gave him to show his servants what must soon take place. Christ made it known by sending it through his angel to his servant John.
local: Ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ tɔ asɩn ɩ gyɛ asɩnlɛɛ kaapʋsa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ taa sa Yesu Krisito fɛɛ, ɔ lɛɛ kaapʋ mʋ ayaafɔlɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ ba waa saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɩ mɛɛ yɛ ɩ kyɛɛrɛɛ. Nɩɩ Yesu mɔɔ sun mʋ kabɔɔ kʋ nɩɩ ɔ ba lɛɛ asɩn mʋ kaapʋ mɛ Gyɔn, Krisito kɩyaafɔlɛ.

eng: who bore witness to the word of God and to the witness of Jesus Christ, including all that John saw.
local: Nɩɩ mɛ Gyɔn, ɩ tɔwɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ maa Yesu Krisito tɔwɛ nɩɩ ɔ lɛɛ kaapʋ mɛ mʋ.

eng: Favored is the one who reads the words of this prophecy out loud, and favored are those who listen to it being read, and keep what is written in it, for the time is near.
local: Kumu ɔkɔn wuya ɩ gyɛ ɔsa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kalɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩnlɛɛ kaapʋsa nɩmʋ, nɩɩ kumu ɔkɔn wuya ana ɩ bɩla ba gyɛ bamʋ nɩɩ bee nu asɩn mʋ, nɩɩ bee buu ɩmʋ, lɩɩ fɛɛ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ atɔ nɩmʋ kpini ii biti ɩ waa mʋ i tiri tɔ.

eng: John, to the seven churches that are in Asia: Grace and peace to you from the one who is and was and is coming, and from the seven spirits that are before Gods throne.
local: Mɛ Gyɔn ɩ kyʋrɔɔ ɔwʋlɛ nɩmʋ n sʋ n sa Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ asunɔ, mʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋ Asiya ɔsʋwʋlɛ kɩbaafʋn kʋ mʋ sʋ. Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ bʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ wʋla ɔ bʋ tɔ pɔyɩ nɩɩ atɔ i piili, nɩɩ ee biti ɔ baa ɔ bʋ tɔ kakpaa mʋ, yɛ mʋ n‐yaayu nsunɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ mu kuwura‐gya mʋ asɛ mʋ, bamʋ kabwaala yɛ kayɩɩ yuuli kɩ gyɛ fanɛ lɛɛ.

eng: and from Jesus Christ—the faithful witness, the firstborn from among the dead, and the ruler of the kings of the earth. To the one who loves us and freed us from our sins by his blood.
local: Yesu Krisito gbaa kabwaala yɛ kayɩɩ yuuli kɩ ba fanɛ asɛ. Mʋ ii gyii kesintin nɩɩ ɛɛ lɛɛ kʋtɔ kʋmaa nɩmʋ ɛɛ kaapʋ tɔ, mʋ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ gyankpaa kyiŋi lɩɩ lewu tɔ, nɩɩ ɔ gyɛ kasɛ sʋ awura tɔ Owura. Nɩɩ mʋ ii biti anɛ asɩn gaa, nɩɩ o wu taa mʋ nkalan lɛɛ anɛ lɩɩ alibi ɔlʋn tɔ.

eng: who made us a kingdom, priests to his God and Father—to him be glory and power forever and always. Amen.
local: nɩɩ ɔ waa anɛ mu kuwura‐gyii tɔ asa yɛ mu aseepu, kɛ a sun Mʋ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mʋ. Yesu Krisito nɩɩ bʋnyaa yɛ ɔlʋn gyɛ mʋ lɛɛ kakpaa. Amen!.

eng: Look, he is coming with the clouds! Every eye will see him, including those who pierced him, and all the tribes of the earth will mourn because of him. This is so. Amen.
local: Fan kɩɩ! Yesu bʋ abwaarɛ‐wʋlɛ tɔ ɛɛ ba. Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ ii biti o wu mʋ, halɩɩ bamʋ nɩɩ ba yii mʋ kɩkpa mʋ gbaa, lɩɩ mʋ sʋ kasɛ sʋ asa kpini bee biti ba su. Kanɩn nɩɩ ii biti ɩ ba. Amen!.

eng: I am the Alpha and the Omega, says the Lord God, the one who is and was and is coming, the Almighty.
local: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Ɩbwaarɛ tɔwɛ yɛ, Mɛ ɩ gyɛ Alɩfa yɛ Omega. Mɛ ɩ bʋ tɔ, nɩɩ n wʋla n bʋ tɔ pɔyɩ nɩɩ atɔ i piili, nɩɩ n biti n baa n bʋ tɔ kakpaa mʋ. Mɛ ɩ gyɛ Ɔlʋlʋnpʋ.

eng: I, John, your brother who shares with you in the hardship, kingdom, and endurance that we have in Jesus, was on the island called Patmos because of the word of God and my witness about Jesus.
local: Mɛ, Gyɔn mʋ nɩɩ n gyɛ fanɛ bɩrɩsa, lɩɩ Yesu sʋ mʋ n gyii awʋrʋfɔ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fen gyii mʋ, lɩɩ an maa gyɛ mu kuwura‐gyii mʋ tɔ asa sʋ mʋ. Amaa an nyɛ kenyiita yɩlɛ tɔ. Lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn kɩtɔwɛ yɛ Yesu asɩn kɩlɛɛ tɔwɛ sʋ mʋ, ba kɩtaa mɛ naa tʋʋ Patimose kifintin mʋ sʋ.

eng: I was in a Spirit-inspired trance on the Lords day, and I heard behind me a loud voice that sounded like a trumpet.
local: Ɔnyɩrɩpɛ Yesu kakɛ sunsa mʋ, Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ kɩ ba mɛ sʋ, nɩɩ n nu ɔbʋlɛ lala kʋ mɛ kamaa, kɩ maa su fɛɛ kabɩlɛ.

eng: It said, Write down on a scroll whatever you see, and send it to the seven churches: to Ephesus, Smyrna, Pergamum, Thyatira, Sardis, Philadelphia, and Laodicea.
local: Nɩɩ ɔbʋlɛ mʋ tɔwɛ mɛ yɛ, Kyʋrɔɔ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ fii wu falɛ waa ɔwʋlɛ tɔ, kɛ fʋ taa kyʋŋɛ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ asunɔ mʋ. Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ Efeso yɛ Simirina yɛ Pegamum yɛ Tatira yɛ Sadisi yɛ Filadefiya maa Lawodisiya.

eng: I turned to see who was speaking to me, and when I turned, I saw seven oil lamps burning on top of seven gold stands.
local: N maa biliŋi n kɩɩ ɔbʋlɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ tɔwɛ mɛ asɛ mʋ, n wu ɩfɩtɩla ɩgyagakpa isunɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa isuwa waa ɩmʋ.

eng: In the middle of the lampstands I saw someone who looked like the Human One. He wore a robe that stretched down to his feet, and he had a gold sash around his chest.
local: Ɩmʋ nsana tɔ mʋ, n wu ɔkʋ fɛɛ Daadimaadi Obii‐nyɩnsa mʋ. O bun kaalɛ bʋnswɩɩsa ba yii kasɛ, nɩɩ ɔ taa suwa kɩrɩsʋ ŋmina mʋ kɔkɔlɔ sʋ.

eng: His head and hair were white as white wool—like snow—and his eyes were like a fiery flame.
local: Nɩɩ mu kumu inyini i fuuli parɛparɛ fɛɛ ateebi abɛɛ bwanbwan, nɩɩ mu ansi abi i du fɛɛ fʋlɔn anobi.

eng: His feet were like fine brass that has been purified in a furnace, and his voice sounded like rushing water.
local: Nɩɩ mʋ ayaa i du fɛɛ kɩbɩlɩtɔ pɩpɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa tʋʋ fʋlɔn tɔ, nɩɩ kɩɩ ŋalɩgɛ, nɩɩ mʋ ɔbʋlɛ mʋ i du fɛɛ nkyu ɩ maa bɔla ɩ kyʋn akʋlɩ tɔ.

eng: He held seven stars in his right hand, and from his mouth came a sharp, two-edged sword. His appearance was like the sun shining with all its power.
local: Nɩɩ ɔ sʋ akyikpebi asunɔ mʋ gyisa kɩbaa tɔ, nɩɩ sakunde gyimba anyɔ ɩ lɩɩ mʋ kɔnɔ tɔ. Nɩɩ mu ansi tɔ mɔɔ ɩ ŋalɩgɛ fɛɛ kakyʋwapɛ kyɔwɛ.

eng: When I saw him, I fell at his feet like a dead man. But he put his right hand on me and said, Dont be afraid. Im the first and the last.
local: Nɩɩ n maa wu mʋ mʋ, n tɩyɛ mʋ ayaa tɔ fɛɛ nyɩmɩsa wusa, nɩɩ ɔ taa mʋ gyisa kɩbaa gyaga mɛ sʋ, nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ yɛ, Man waa kufuu. Mɛ ɩ gyɛ kagyankpaa yɛ laalaalʋwɛ.

eng: and the living one. I was dead, but look! Now Im alive forever and always. I have the keys of Death and the Grave.
local: Mɛ ɩ gyɛ Ɔmʋ nɩɩ n bʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ n kyɩna wu, amaa kɩɩ, n tɛ nkpa tɔ kakpaa. Nɩɩ lewu yɛ Kamandɛ ɩsafwɩɩ ɩ bʋ mɛ kɩbaa tɔ.

eng: So write down what you have seen, both the scene now before you and the things that are about to unfold after this.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ, kyʋrɔɔ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ fu wu ɩ maa waa nbɩɩnbɩɩ nɩmʋ yɛ atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ii biti ɩ ba kamaa tɔ mʋ kpini yɩla.

eng: As for the mystery of the seven stars that you saw in my right hand and the seven gold lampstands, here is what they mean: the seven stars are the angels of the seven churches, and the seven lampstands are the seven churches.
local: Akyikpebi asunɔ mʋ nɩɩ fu wu mɛ gyisa kɩbaa tɔ mʋ, yɛ ɩfɩtɩla ɩgyagakpa asunɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa suwa waa ɩmʋ mʋ kasɛ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, Akyikpebi asunɔ mʋ ɩ yɩlɛ sa Ɩbwaarɛ nbɔɔ asunɔ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ kɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ asunɔ mʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ɩfɩtɩla ɩgyagakpa asunɔ mʋ ɩ yɩlɛ sa Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ asunɔ mʋ.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Ephesus: These are the words of the one who holds the seven stars in his right hand and walks among the seven gold lampstands.
local: Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla tɔwɛ mɛ yɛ, Kyʋrɔɔ asɩn nɩmʋ naa sa Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Efeso kadɛ tɔ mʋ sʋ. Asɩn nɩmʋ ɩ lɩɩ mɛ, mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ akyikpebi asunɔ mɛ gyisa kɩbaa tɔ, nɩɩ n naa ɩfɩtɩla ɩgyagakpa asunɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa suwa waa mʋ nsana.

eng: I know your works, your labor, and your endurance. I also know that you dont put up with those who are evil. You have tested those who say they are apostles but are not, and you have found them to be liars.
local: N tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, N nyi fanɛ asɩn waasa yɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan kpan fanɛ n‐yɩɩ waa kusun yɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan nyɛ kenyiita yɩlɛ tɔ. Nɩɩ n nyi fan maa mee biti alibi awaapʋ fanɛ tɔ, nɩɩ fan kaala bamʋ nɩɩ ba yɛ ba gyɛ Krisito asunpu yɛgɛ ba man gyɛ mʋ kɩɩ, nɩɩ fan wu fɛɛ ba gyɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya ana.

eng: You have shown endurance and put up with a lot for my names sake, and you havent gotten tired.
local: Nɩɩ n nyi fan maa nyɛ kenyiita yɩlɛ tɔ, nɩɩ fen gyii awʋrʋfɔ lɩɩ mɛ kɩtɩɩ sʋ, nɩɩ fanɛ abaa a man yɔɔ.

eng: But I have this against you: you have let go of the love you had at first.
local: Amaa n sʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ asɩn akʋ, ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ nbɩɩnbɩɩ fan man bɩla fɛn sʋ kebiti fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan gyankpaa fɛn sʋ mʋ.

eng: So remember the high point from which you have fallen. Change your hearts and lives and do the things you did at first. If you dont, Im coming to you. I will move your lampstand from its place if you dont change your hearts and lives.
local: Fan nyiŋi katɩn mʋ nɩɩ naafɔɔ fan fʋʋ, nɩɩ fan bwii lɩɩ tɩyɛ mʋ. Fan kyɛɛgɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ alibi tɔ, kɛ fan waa adanbɩrasa mʋ nɩɩ fan kyɩna fɛn waa mʋ. Nɩɩ fan man kan kyɛɛgɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ alibi tɔ mʋ, n biti n ba fanɛ asɛ ba lɛɛ fanɛ fɩtɩla ɔgyagakpa mʋ lɩɩ katɩn mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ mʋ.

eng: But you have this in your favor: you hate what the Nicolaitans are doing, which I also hate.
local: Amaa fanɛ kʋtɔ kʋlʋn mʋ nɩɩ fɛn waa nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, fen kisi Nikolatan abi awaasa mʋ nɩɩ ngbaa mɛ n kisi mʋ.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches. I will allow those who emerge victorious to eat from the tree of life, which is in Gods paradise.
local: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ asʋ mʋ, o nu asɩn mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ ɩɩ tɔwɛ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ. Ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔ lɩɩ mʋ, n biti n sa mʋ ɔkpa, kɛ o gyii oyu mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ sa nkpa mʋ abi nɩɩ kɩ yɩlɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ayɛ sʋsʋ, mʋ nɩɩ bɛ bɩla bɛɛ tɩɩ yɛ Paradise mʋ.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Smyrna: These are the words of the one who is the first and the last, who died and came back to life.
local: Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla tɔwɛ mɛ yɛ, Kyʋrɔɔ asɩn nɩmʋ naa sa Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Simirina mʋ sʋ. Asɩn nɩmʋ ɩ lɩɩ mɛ mʋ nɩɩ n gyɛ Kagyankpaa yɛ Laalaalʋwɛ mʋ, nɩɩ n da wu nɩɩ n kyiŋi bɩla n tɛ nkpa tɔ mʋ.

eng: I know your hardship and poverty . I also know the hurtful things that have been spoken about you by those who say they are Jews .
local: N nyi awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ fen gyii yɛ fanɛ kitiri, amaa kesintin tɔ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii sʋ mʋ fen gyɛ atɔ wuya ana. N nyi bamʋ nɩɩ ba yɛ ba gyɛ Gyiwu abi yɛgɛ ba man gyɛ, nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩn antɩŋɛsa bɛɛ gyaga fanɛ sʋ mʋ. Ba gyɛ Sɩtaanɛ kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ asa.

eng: Dont be afraid of what you are going to suffer. Look! The devil is going to throw some of you into prison in order to test you. You will suffer hardship for ten days. Be faithful even to the point of death, and I will give you the crown of life.
local: Fan man waa kufuu lɩɩ awʋrʋfɔ mʋ nɩɩ fen biti fan gyii mʋ sʋ. N tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ, fen biti fɛn nyɛ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ, mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ fɛɛ Sɩtaanɛ ii biti ɔ taa fanɛ asa mʋ tɔ akʋ naa tii obu. Fen biti fɛn nyɛ kanyanla nkɛ kudu. Halɩɩ lewu tɔ gbaa, fan yɩlɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ kenken, kɛ n sa fanɛ kʋkɔka mʋ nɩɩ kɩ gyɛ nkpa kakpaa.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches. Those who emerge victorious wont be hurt by the second death.
local: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ asʋ mʋ, o nu kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ ɩɩ tɔwɛ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ. Ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔ lɩɩ mʋ, lewu nyɔsapʋ mʋ man bɩla yɛ o gyii mʋ.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Pergamum: These are the words of the one who has the sharp, two-edged sword.
local: Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla tɔwɛ mɛ yɛ, Kyʋrɔɔ asɩn nɩmʋ naa sa Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Pegamum kadɛ tɔ mʋ sʋ. Asɩn nɩmʋ ɩɩ lɩɩ mɛ mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ sakunde gyimba anyɔ mɛ asɛ.

eng: I know that you are living right where Satans throne is. You are holding on to my name, and you didnt break faith with me even at the time that Antipas, my faithful witness, was killed among you, where Satan lives.
local: N nyi katɩn mʋ nɩɩ fan tɛ. Tʋtɔ nɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ kuwura‐gya mʋ kɩ bʋ. Ɩmaa ɩmʋ kpini gbaa mʋ fan san kɔɔlɛ mɛ gyii. Halɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ba mɔɔ mɛ asɩn mʋ kesintin ogyipu Antipasi fanɛ kadɛ lala mʋ nɩɩ Sɩtaanɛ tɛ mʋ tɔ gbaa mʋ, fan man kina mɛ lɩɩ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii tɔ.

eng: But I have a few things against you, because you have some there who follow Balaams teaching. Balaam had taught Balak to trip up the Israelites so that they would eat food sacrificed to idols and commit sexual immorality.
local: Amaa n sʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ asɩn pwɩɩsa kʋ. Ɩmʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, asa mʋ nɩɩ bee buu Balaam asɩn kaapʋsa mʋ akʋ ba bʋ fanɛ kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ. Balaam nɩmʋ ɩ kyɩna kaapʋ Balaki yɛ, kanan mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa kɛ Ɩsɩrayɩ abi ba waa alibi mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, ɔ pɩna bamʋ kɛ ba gyii agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa lɔŋɔ sa ɩdakpa, kɛ ba waa kakyɩɩ yɛ kanyɩn biti kɩgyagaa.

eng: In the same way, you have some who follow the Nicolaitans teaching.
local: Kanɩn ɔkpa maŋa sʋ, nɩɩ asa mʋ nɩɩ bee buu Nikolatan abi asɩn kaapʋsa mʋ akʋ ba bʋ fanɛ kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ.

eng: So change your hearts and lives. If you dont, I am coming to you soon, and I will make war on them with the sword that comes from my mouth.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan kyɛɛgɛ fanɛ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ alibi tɔ ba Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ, nɩɩ ɩ man gyɛ kanɩn bɩrɛ, n biti n ba fanɛ asɛ bilen kɛ n ba taa mɛ kɔnɔ tɔ sakunde ba kɔ yɛ kanɩn asa maŋa.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches. I will give those who emerge victorious some of the hidden manna to eat. I will also give to each of them a white stone with a new name written on it, which no one knows except the one who receives it.
local: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ asʋ mʋ, o nu kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ ɩɩ tɔwɛ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ. Ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔ lɩɩ mʋ, n biti n sa mʋ agyitɔ baalasa mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ yɛ mana, nɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ mʋ. N biti n bɩla sa ɔsa maŋa kubuu fufuli mʋ nɩɩ ba kyʋrɔɔ kɩtɩɩ pʋpwɛ gyaga kɩmʋ sʋ, nɩɩ ɔkʋ man nyi kanɩn kɩtɩɩ maŋa, amɔɔ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ nyɛ kɩmʋ mʋ nkʋn.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Thyatira: These are the words of Gods Son, whose eyes are like a fiery flame, and whose feet are like fine brass.
local: Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla tɔwɛ mɛ yɛ, Kyʋrɔɔ asɩn nɩmʋ naa sa Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Tiyatira kadɛ tɔ mʋ sʋ. Asɩn nɩmʋ ɩɩ lɩɩ mɛ Ɩbwaarɛ mu‐Bii mʋ nɩɩ mi ansi i du fɛɛ fʋlɔn anobi, nɩɩ mɛ ayaa sʋ ɩ du fɛɛ kɩbɩlɩtɔ pɩpɛɛ mʋ nɩɩ kɩɩ ŋalɩgɛ mʋ.

eng: I know your works, your love and faithfulness, your service and endurance. I also know that the works you have done most recently are even greater than those you did at first.
local: N nyi fanɛ asɩn waasa. N nyi fanɛ kebiti yɛ fanɛ kɩkɔɔlɛ‐gyii yɛ fanɛ kusun, yɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fɛn nyɛ kenyiita yɩlɛ tɔ. Nɩɩ n nyi fan maa waa ɩnɩmʋ kpini fan kyɔ kanan mʋ nɩɩ fan daa kyɩna waa mʋ.

eng: But I have this against you: you put up with that woman, Jezebel, who calls herself a prophet. You allow her to teach and to mislead my servants into committing sexual immorality and eating food sacrificed to idols.
local: Amaa n sʋ fanɛ n‐yɩɩ sʋ asɩn pwɩɩsa kʋ, fɛɛ fan maa sa ɔkyɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ yɛ Gyesebeli ɔkpa, nɩɩ ɛɛ tɩɩ mʋ n‐yɩɩ yɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ɔtɔwɛpʋ. Nɩɩ ɛɛ taa mʋ kɩkaapʋ mʋ pɩna mɛ abuupu, nɩɩ bɛɛ waa kanyɩn abɛɛ kakyɩɩ biti kɩgyagaa, nɩɩ ba bɩla bee gyii agyitɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba taa lɔŋɔ sa ɩdakpa mʋ.

eng: I gave her time to change her heart and life, but she refuses to change her life of prostitution.
local: N nyɛ saŋa sa mʋ fɛɛ ɔ kyɛɛgɛ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ mʋ kɩgyagaa mʋ tɔ, amaa o kina ɔ mɛɛ kyɛɛgɛ.

eng: Look! Im throwing her onto a sickbed. I am casting those who have committed adultery with her into terrible hardship—if they dont change their hearts from following her practices.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ n biti n yɛgɛ ɔ lɔɔ, kɛ n yɛgɛ bamʋ nɩɩ ba lɩɩ bamʋ‐ka ana kamaa nyita kekili yɛ mʋ mʋ, ba wu awʋrʋfɔ lala, amɔɔ ba kyɛɛgɛ bamʋ nfɛɛrɛ lɩɩ alibi ɩkpa mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ waa mʋ sʋ.

eng: and I will even put her children to death with disease. Then all the churches will know that Im the one who examines minds and hearts, and that I will give to each of you what your actions deserve.
local: N biti n mɔɔ mu abuupu mʋ kpini, kɛ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ kpini ba bɩɩ fɛɛ mɛ ɩ gyɛ ɔmʋ nɩɩ o nyi nyɩmɩsa kɔkɔlɔ tɔ yɛ mʋ nfɛɛrɛ tɔ asɩn. N biti n ka fanɛ ɔkʋmaa nɩmʋ kʋkɔ lɩɩ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔ waa sʋ.

eng: As for the rest of you in Thyatira—those of you who dont follow this teaching and havent learned the so-called deep secrets of Satan—I wont burden you with anything else.
local: Amaa n tɔwɛ fanɛ mʋ nɩɩ fan san Tiyatira, nɩɩ fan man buu ɔkyɩɩ mʋ asɩn kaapʋsa libi, nɩɩ fan man bɩɩla mʋ asɩn mʋ nɩɩ mu abuupu bɛɛ tɩɩ yɛ Sɩtaanɛ asɩn budusa baalasa mʋ. Ɩmʋ sʋ n tɔwɛ fanɛ yɛ n man bɩla yɛ n taa kɩkpɩnɛ kʋ tii fanɛ sʋ.

eng: Just hold on to what you have until I come.
local: Amaa fan dan kɩtaa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan wʋla fan sʋ tɔ mʋ kenken, naa fʋʋ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n biti n ba.

eng: To those who emerge victorious, keeping my practices until the end, I will give authority over the nations.
local: Ɔsa kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɔ ɛɛ lɩɩ, nɩɩ ɛɛ waa mi kebiti naa fʋʋ laalaalʋwɛ mʋ, n biti n sa mʋ ɔlʋn ndɛndɛmandɛ sʋ.

eng: to rule the nations with an iron rod and smash them like pottery.
local: Nɩɩ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ n nyɛ ɔlʋn lɩɩ mɛ‐Sɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ, saŋa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ tɔwɛ asɩn lɩɩ mɛ sʋ yɛ, Ee biti ɔ taa kɩbɩlɩtɔ ɔlʋn kudubi gyii kuwura bamʋ sʋ, yɛgɛ o mee wu bamʋ kʋwɛɛ. Ee biti o boyi bamʋ fɛɛ kanan mʋ nɩɩ bee boyi apɛɛ tɔ bɛɛ waa ɩmʋ buriburi mʋ.

eng: just as I received authority from my Father. I will also give them the morning star.
local: N biti n bɩla sa ɔsa maŋa kɩbwayɩkɛ kikyikpebi mʋ, ɩnɩmʋ ɩ kaapʋ fɛɛ ba kɔ lɩɩ.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches.
local: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ asʋ mʋ o nu kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu ɩɩ tɔwɛ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Sardis: These are the words of the one who holds Gods seven spirits and the seven stars: I know your works. You have the reputation of being alive, and you are in fact dead.
local: Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla tɔwɛ mɛ yɛ, Kyʋrɔɔ asɩn nɩmʋ naa sa Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Sadisi kadɛ tɔ mʋ sʋ. Asɩn nɩmʋ ɩ lɩɩ mɛ, mʋ nɩɩ n sʋ Ɩbwaarɛ N‐yaayu nsunɔ yɛ akyikpebi asunɔ mʋ. N nyi fʋ asɩn waasa, fʋ nyɛ kɩtɩɩ fɛɛ fʋ maa tɛ nkpa tɔ, amaa fu wu.

eng: Wake up and strengthen whatever you have left, teetering on the brink of death, for Ive found that your works are far from complete in the eyes of my God.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan kyiŋi, kɛ fan sa ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ san nɩɩ ii biti i wu mʋ tɔ ɔlʋn. Lɩɩ fɛɛ n wu fanɛ asɩn waasa ɩ maa man du kyɛɛkyɛɛ mɛ Ɩbwaarɛ ansi tɔ.

eng: So remember what you received and heard. Hold on to it and change your hearts and lives. If you dont wake up, I will come like a thief, and you wont know what time I will come upon you.
local: Ɩmʋ sʋ fan nyiŋi atɔ mʋ nɩɩ ba kaapʋ fanɛ nɩɩ fan nu mʋ. Fan buu ɩmʋ, kɛ fan yɛgɛ alibi kɩwaa. Amaa nɩɩ fan man kan kyiŋi bɩrɛ, n biti n ba purigi fanɛ sʋ fɛɛ oyu, nɩɩ fɛn mɛɛ yɛ fan bɩɩ saŋa mʋ nɩɩ n biti n ba fanɛ asɛ.

eng: But you do have a few people in Sardis who havent stained their clothing. They will walk with me clothed in white because they are worthy.
local: Amaa ɩ san asa kalɩsa akʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Sadisi, nɩɩ ba man waa bamʋ n‐yɩɩ ineesi. Bamʋ ii biti ba bun atɔ fufuli, kɛ n maa bamʋ a natɛ, lɩɩ fɛɛ bamʋ ɩ dagaa kanɩn.

eng: Those who emerge victorious will wear white clothing like this. I wont scratch out their names from the scroll of life, but will declare their names in the presence of my Father and his angels.
local: Nɩɩ ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ kan kɔ lɩɩ mʋ, mʋ ii biti o bun atɔ fufuli fɛɛ bamʋ. Nɩɩ n mɛɛ yɛ n kpayɩ mʋ kɩtɩɩ lɩɩ nkpa ɔwʋlɛ mʋ tɔ kakaakʋ. Amaa n biti n lɛɛ tɔwɛ Nsɛ Ɩbwaarɛ maa mʋ nbɔɔ mu ansi tɔ fɛɛ ba gyɛ mɛ asa.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches.
local: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ asʋ mʋ, o nu kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ ɩɩ tɔwɛ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Philadelphia: These are the words of the one who is holy and true, who has the key of David. Whatever he opens, no one will shut; and whatever he shuts, no one opens.
local: Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla tɔwɛ mɛ yɛ, Kyʋrɔɔ asɩn nɩmʋ naa sa Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Filadefiya kadɛ tɔ mʋ sʋ. Asɩn nɩmʋ ɩ lɩɩ mɛ mʋ nɩɩ n gyɛ Ɔkyɩrɛkyɩrɛpʋ yɛ kesintin wuya, nɩɩ mɛ kɩbaa tɔ nɩɩ Dawidi safɩɩ bʋ mʋ. Nɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ n tigi mʋ, ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ tii, nɩɩ kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ n tii mɔɔ mʋ, ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ tigi.

eng: I know your works. Look! I have set in front of you an open door that no one can shut. You have so little power, and yet you have kept my word and havent denied my name.
local: N nyi fanɛ asɩn waasa. Fan nu, n tigi kebunɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɔkʋ mɛɛ taalɛ tii mʋ yɩla sa fanɛ. N nyi fɛɛ fanɛ ɔlʋn man kyɔ, amaa fan buu mɛ asɩn mʋ, nɩɩ fan man kina mɛ.

eng: Because of this I will make the people from Satans synagogue —I will make them come and bow down at your feet and realize that I have loved you.
local: Kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ n biti n taa waa bamʋ nɩɩ ba bʋ Sɩtaanɛ kʋbʋ mʋ tɔ, nɩɩ ba gyɛ antɩŋɛsa wuya ana, nɩɩ bɛɛ tɔwɛ yɛ ba gyɛ Gyiwu abi yɛgɛ ba man gyɛ mʋ ɩ gyɛ yɛ, n biti n nyan kanɩn asa maŋa kɛ ba be muŋa fanɛ ayaa kasɛ, kɛ ba bɩɩ fɛɛ n biti fanɛ asɩn.

eng: Because you kept my command to endure, I will keep you safe through the time of testing that is about to come over the whole world, to test those who live on earth.
local: Kpalɩ fɛɛ fan maa man nu mɛ kɔnɔsa, nɩɩ fan nyɛ kenyiita yɩlɛ tɔ mʋ, ngbaa mɛ n biti n lɛɛ fanɛ lɩɩ awʋrʋfɔ kʋtʋʋ tɔ kɩɩ mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ ba dulinyaa tɔ, kɛ ɩ ba tʋʋ dulinyaa asa kpini tɔ kɩɩ mʋ.

eng: Im coming soon. Hold on to what you have so that no one takes your crown.
local: N biti n ba bilen. Fan kɩtaa kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ fan sʋ tɔ mʋ kenken, kɛ ɔkʋ ɔ man kɔɔlɛ kʋkɔka mʋ nɩɩ n biti n taa sa fanɛ mʋ.

eng: As for those who emerge victorious, I will make them pillars in the temple of my God, and they will never leave it. I will write on them the name of my God and the name of the city of my God, the New Jerusalem that comes down out of heaven from my God. I will also write on them my own new name.
local: Nɩɩ ɔkʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ ɔ kɔ lɩɩ mʋ, ee biti ɔ baa ɔ gyɛ fɛɛ lenbu tɔ sabarɛ, Mɛ Ɩbwaarɛ osunkpa obu mʋ tɔ. Nɩɩ ɔ mɛɛ yɛ ɔ lɩɩ tʋtɔ kakaakʋ kpaa. N biti n kyʋrɔɔ Mɛ Ɩbwaarɛ kɩtɩɩ yɛ mʋ kadɛ lala mʋ kɩtɩɩ gyaga kanɩn ɔsa maŋa sʋ. Kanɩn kadɛ lala maŋa ɩ gyɛ Gyerusalem pʋpwɛ mʋ nɩɩ kii biti kɩ lɩɩ sʋsʋ Mɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɛ ba kasɛ sʋ mʋ. Nɩɩ n biti n kyʋrɔɔ mɛ gbaa‐gbaa mɛ kɩtɩɩ pʋpwɛ gyaga kanɩn ɔsa maŋa sʋ.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches.
local: Ɔmʋ nɩɩ ɔ sʋ asʋ mʋ, o nu kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ Kayaayu mʋ ɩɩ tɔwɛ Krisito kʋbʋ‐kʋbʋ mʋ.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Laodicea: These are the words of the Amen, the faithful and true witness, the ruler of Gods creation.
local: Nɩɩ ɔ bɩla tɔwɛ mɛ yɛ, Kyʋrɔɔ asɩn nɩmʋ naa sa Ɩbwaarɛ kabɔɔ mʋ nɩɩ ɛɛ kɩɩ Krisito kʋbʋ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ Lawodisiya kadɛ tɔ mʋ sʋ. Asɩn nɩmʋ ɩ lɩɩ mɛ mʋ nɩɩ bɛɛ tɩɩ yɛ Amen mʋ asɛ. Nɩɩ n gyɛ kesintin wuya, nɩɩ n ba lɛɛ Ɩbwaarɛ asɩn mʋ ifuli kaapʋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ. Nɩɩ mɛ ɩ gyɛ kumu sa kʋtɔ kʋmaa mʋ nɩɩ Ɩbwaarɛ tʋʋ mʋ.

eng: I know your works. You are neither cold nor hot. I wish that you were either cold or hot.
local: N nyi fanɛ asɩn waasa, fɛɛ fan man yuuli nɩɩ fan man bʋgya. Nɩɩ fan daa fan yuuli abɛɛ fan bʋgya mʋ, naafɔɔ ɩ bʋrɔn!.

eng: So because you are lukewarm, and neither hot nor cold, Im about to spit you out of my mouth.
local: Amaa lɩɩ fɛɛ fan maa du mɔlɔmɔlɔ, nɩɩ fan man yuuli abɛɛ fan man bʋgya sʋ mʋ, n biti n fura fanɛ lɩɩ mɛ kɔnɔ tɔ fɔyɩ.
